Matthew1:1 Lokwalo lwa lotso lwa ga Jesu morwa Dafita, morwa Aborahame." 
Matthew1:2 Aborahame o ne a tsala Isaka; Isaka a tsala Jakobe; Jakobe a tsala Juta le bomorwa-rraagwe. 
Matthew1:3 Juta le Thamare ba tsala Pherese le Sera; Pherese a tsala Heserone; Heserone a tsala Rame; 
Matthew1:4 Rame a tsala Aminatabe; Aminatabe a tsala Nasone; Nasone a tsala Salema; 
Matthew1:5 Salema le Rahabe ba tsala Boase; Boase le Ruthe ba tsala Obete. 
Matthew1:6 Obete a tsala Isai; Isai a tsala kgosi Dafita. Dafita le mogatsa-Uria ba tsala Salomo. 
Matthew1:7 Salomo a tsala Rehabeame; Rehabeame a tsala Abia; Abia a tsala Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asa a tsala Josafate; Josafate a tsala Jorame; Jorame a tsala Usia; 
Matthew1:9 Usia a tsala Jothame; Jothame a tsala Ahase; Ahase a tsala Hesekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hesekia a tsala Manase; Manase a tsala Amone; Amone a tsala Josia; 
Matthew1:11 Josia a tsala Jegonya le bomorwa-rraagwe ka sebaka sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone. 
Matthew1:12 E rile morago ga go hudusediwa kwa Babilone, Jegonya a tsala Salathiele; Salathiele a tsala Serubabele;" 
Matthew1:13 Serubabele a tsala Abiute; Abiute a tsala Eliakime; 
Matthew1:14 Eliakime a tsala Asore; Asore a tsala Satoke; Satoke a tsala Agime; Agime a tsala Eliute; 
Matthew1:15 Eliute a tsala Eleasare; Eleasare a tsala Mathane; Mathane a tsala Jakobe; 
Matthew1:16 Jakobe a tsala Josefa, monna wa ga Maria yo o belegeng Jesu yo o bidiwang Keresete." 
Matthew1:17 Jalo he ditshika tsotlhe, go simolola ka Aborahame go tla go fitlha mo go Dafita, ke ditshika di le 14; le go tswa mo go Dafita go tla go fitlha mo sebakeng sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone ke ditshika di le 14; le go tswa mo sebakeng sa go hudusediwa kwa Babilone go tla go fitlha mo go Keresete ke ditshika di le 14." 
Matthew1:18 Go tsalwa ga Jesu Keresete go ne go le jaana: E rile Maria mmaagwe a sena go beelelwa ke Josefa, ba ise ba kopane, a bonwa a le moimana ka Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:19 Josefa, lekau la gagwe, ka a siame, mme a sa rate go mo tlhabisa ditlhong, a ikaelela go mo tlhanogela mo sephiring." 
Matthew1:20 Ya re a ntse a akanya jalo, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go ene ka toro a re: “Josefa, morwa Dafita, se boife go tsaya Maria go nna mosadi wa gago; gonne boimana jwa gagwe bo tswa mo Moweng o o Boitshepo." 
Matthew1:21 O tla belega mosimane, mme wena o bitse leina la gagwe Jesu; gonne ke ene yo o tla gololang batho ba gagwe mo dibeng tsa bone.”" 
Matthew1:22 Gotlhe moo go dirafetse gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Morena ka moporofeti a re: 
Matthew1:23 “Bonang, lekgarebe le tla ima, le belega mosimane; mme ba tla bitsa leina la gagwe Imanuele.” Ka phetolo ke go re: “Modimo o na le rona.”" 
Matthew1:24 Ya re Josefa a tsoga mo borokong, a dira ka fa moengele wa Morena a mo laetseng ka teng, a tsaya mosadi wa gagwe;" 
Matthew1:25 mme a se ka a kopana nae ga tsamaya a belega ngwana wa ntlha wa gagwe wa mosimane; a ba a bitsa leina la gagwe Jesu. 
Matthew2:1 E rile Jesu a sena go tsalelwa kwa Betleheme wa Jutea mo malatsing a kgosi Herote, batlhalefi bangwe ba tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi, ba fitlha mo Jerusalema ba re:" 
Matthew2:2 “Kgosi ya Bajuta e e tsetsweng e fa kae? Gonne re bonye naledi ya yona, re le kwa botlhabatsatsi, mme re tsile go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:3 Ya re kgosi Herote a utlwa, a tshoga le botlhe ba Jerusalema nae." 
Matthew2:4 A ba a phutha baperesiti ba bagolo botlhe le Baitsedikwalo ba morafe, a tlhotlhomisa mo go bone gore Keresete o tla tsalelwa kae." 
Matthew2:5 Ba mo araba ba re: “Kwa Betleheme wa Jutea; gonne go kwadilwe jalo ke moporofeti ga twe: 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Wena Betleheme wa lefatshe la Juta; ga o mmotlana ka gope mo magosaneng a Juta; gonne mo go wena go tla tswa molaodi yo o tla disang morafe wa me wa Iseraele.’ ” 
Matthew2:7 Ke fa Herote a biletsa batlhalefi fa thoko, a ba botsa thata ka ga sebaka se naledi e bonetseng ka sona," 
Matthew2:8 a ba a ba romela kwa Betleheme a re: “Yaang lo tlhotlhomise sentle ka ga ngwana; mme e re lo sena go mmona, lo tle go mpolelela, gore le nna ke ye go mo obamela.”" 
Matthew2:9 Ya re ba sena go utlwa kgosi, ba tsamaya; ba akofa ba bona naledi e ba e bonyeng kwa botlhabatsatsi, ya ba etelela pele, ya ba ya fitlha ya ema e okame felo fa ngwana a leng teng." 
Matthew2:10 Ya re ba bona naledi, ba itumela thata ka boitumelo jo bogolo." 
Matthew2:11 Ba feta ba tsena mo ntlong, ba bona ngwana, a na le Maria, mmaagwe. Jaanong ba wela fa fatshe, ba mo obamela, ba be ba phutholola matlotlo a bone, ba mo ntshetsa dineo, e bong gouta le maswalo le mera." 
Matthew2:12 Mme ya re ka ba laetswe ke Modimo ka toro gore ba se ka ba boela kwa go Herote, ba boela kwa lefatsheng la ga bone ka tsela e sele." 
Matthew2:13 E rile ba sena go tloga, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go Josefa ka toro, a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o tsee ngwana le mmaagwe, o tshabele kwa Egepeto, o be o nne teng go tsamaya ke go itsise; gonne Herote o ikemiseditse go batla ngwana gore a mmolae.”" 
Matthew2:14 Ke fa a tsoga, a tsaya ngwana le mmaagwe bosigo, a tloga a ya kwa Egepeto;" 
Matthew2:15 a nna teng ga tsamaya Herote a swa, gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Morena ka moporofeti a re: “Ke biditse morwaake kwa Egepeto.”" 
Matthew2:16 E rile jaanong Herote a lemoga gore batlhalefi ba mo forile, a gakala thata, a ba a romela batlhanka go bolaya basimanyana botlhe kwa Betleheme le mo tikologong yotlhe ya teng, go simolola ka ba dinyaga tse pedi le bomonnaa-bone, ka fa sebakeng se o se tlhotlhomisitseng mo batlhalefing." 
Matthew2:17 Ka go dira jalo ga dirafala se se builweng ke moporofeti Jeremia a re: 
Matthew2:18 “Lentswe le ne la utlwala kwa Rama, selelo le khutsafalo e kgolo; Ragele a lelela bana ba gagwe, mme a gana go gomodiwa, gonne ga ba tlhole ba le teng.”" 
Matthew2:19 Jaanong ya re Herote a sena go swa, moengele wa Morena a bonala fa go Josefa kwa Egepeto ka toro a re:" 
Matthew2:20 “Tsoga o tsee ngwana le mmaagwe, o boele kwa lefatsheng la Iseraele; gonne ba ba neng ba batla go bolaya ngwana ba sule.”" 
Matthew2:21 A tsoga, a tsaya ngwana le mmaagwe, a boela kwa lefatsheng la Iseraele." 
Matthew2:22 Ya re a utlwa gore Aregelao o busa kwa Jutea mo boemong jwa ga Herote rraagwe, a boifa go ya teng; mme ya re a sena go laelwa ke Modimo ka toro, a fetela kwa lefatsheng la Galelea," 
Matthew2:23 a ba a fitlha a aga mo motseng o o bidiwang Nasaretha; ka go dira jalo ga dirafala se se builweng ke baporofeti ba re: “O tla bidiwa Monasaretha.” 
Matthew3:1 Mo malatsing ao ga tla Johane Mokolobetsi, a rera mo sekakeng sa Jutea a re:" 
Matthew3:2 “Tlhabologang; gonne puso ya magodimo e atametse!” 
Matthew3:3 Yoo ke ene yo moporofeti Jesaya o buileng ka ga gagwe a re: “Lentswe la mongwe yo o kuang mo sekakeng la re: ‘Baakanyang tsela ya Morena, siamisang mebila ya gagwe!’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johane yoo, seaparo sa gagwe e ne e le sa boboa jwa kammele, a itlamile letheka ka moitlamo wa letlalo; dijo tsa gagwe e ne e le tsie le dinotshe tsa naga." 
Matthew3:5 Ke fa go tswela go ene batho ba Jerusalema le ba Jutea yotlhe le ba naga yotlhe e e fa Joretane," 
Matthew3:6 mme a ba kolobetsa mo nokeng ya Joretane, ba ntse ba ipobola dibe tsa bone." 
Matthew3:7 Ya re a bona bontsi jwa Bafarisai le Basadukai ba tla kolobetsong, a ba raya a re: “Lotsalo lwa dinoga ke lona! Lo kaetswe ke mang gore lo falole bogaleng jo bo tlang?" 
Matthew3:8 Ungwang he maungo a a tshwanetseng tlhabologo. 
Matthew3:9 Lo se ka lwa ithaya lwa re: ‘Re na le Aborahame, ke ene rraetsho.’ Gonne ke lo raya ke re: Modimo o nonofile go ka tsosetsa Aborahame bana ka majwe a." 
Matthew3:10 Selepe se setse se beilwe fa meding ya ditlhare; mme setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se sa ungweng leungo le le siameng, se tla rengwa, se be se latlhelwa mo molelong." 
Matthew3:11 Nna ke lo kolobeletsa tlhabologo ka metsi; mme yo o tlang morago ga me o nonofile bogolo go nna, yo ke sa tshwanelang go mo tsholela ditlhako; ene o tla lo kolobetsa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo le ka molelo;" 
Matthew3:12 o tshwere seoloso ka letsogo, mme o tla feela seboana sa gagwe gotlhe; o tla phuthela mabele a gagwe mo sefaleng, mme moko a o tshuba ka molelo o o sa kakeng wa tingwa.”" 
Matthew3:13 Jaanong Jesu a tswa kwa Galelea, a ya kwa go Johane kwa Joretane gore a kolobediwe ke ene." 
Matthew3:14 Mme Johane a re o a gana, a mo raya a re: “Ke nna ke tshwanetseng go kolobediwa ke wena, mme a o tla go nna?”" 
Matthew3:15 Jesu a mo araba a re: “Letlelela go nne jalo; gonne go re tshwanetse jalo gore re dirafatse tshiamo yotlhe.” Ke fa a dumela. 
Matthew3:16 Ya re Jesu a sena go kolobediwa, a tswa mo metsing ka bonako. Foo magodimo a mmulegela, a bona Mowa wa Modimo o fologa jaaka lephoi, o tla mo go ene." 
Matthew3:17 Mme lentswe la utlwala, le tswa kwa magodimong le re: “Yoo ke Morwaake yo o rategang, yo ke mo itumelelang.”" 
Matthew4:1 Ya baa gona Jesu a gogelwang ke Mowa kwa sekakeng gore a raelwe ke Diabolo. 
Matthew4:2 E rile a sena go itima dijo malatsi a le 40 le masigo a le 40, a tshwarwa ke tlala." 
Matthew4:3 Jaanong moraedi a tla, a mo raya a re: “Fa o le Morwa Modimo, bua gore majwe a, a fetoge dinkgwe.”" 
Matthew4:4 Ene a fetola a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Motho ga a nke a phela ka senkgwe fela; o phela ka lefoko lengwe le lengwe le le tswang mo molomong wa Modimo.’ ” 
Matthew4:5 Jaanong Diabolo a mo isa kwa motseng o o boitshepo, a mmaya mo setlhoeng sa Tempele," 
Matthew4:6 a mo raya a re: “Fa ò le Morwa Modimo, itatlhele kwa tlase; gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: “ ‘O tla laela baengele ba gagwe ka ga gago; ba tla go kuka ka diatla, e se re gongwe dinao tsa gago tsa kgopiwa ke lentswe.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “E bile go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O se ka wa leka Morena, Modimo wa gago!’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Gape, Diabolo a mo isa kwa thabeng e e goletseng kwa godimo thata, a mmontsha magosi otlhe a lefatshe le bontle jwa ona," 
Matthew4:9 a mo raya a re: “Tsotlhe tse ke tla di go naya, fa o ka wela fa fatshe, wa nkobamela.”" 
Matthew4:10 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ntlogela, Satane! Gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O tshwanetse go obamela Morena, Modimo wa gago le go direla ene a le esi fela.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Ke fa Diabolo a mo tlogela; mme baengele ba tla, ba mo direla." 
Matthew4:12 E rile a utlwa gore Johane o golegilwe, a ngwegela kwa Galelea." 
Matthew4:13 A huduga kwa Nasaretha, a ya go nna kwa Kaperenaume yo o fa letsheng mo nageng ya Sebulone le Nafetale," 
Matthew4:14 gore go dirafale se se builweng ke moporofeti Jesaya a re: 
Matthew4:15 “Lefatshe la Sebulone le lefatshe la Nafetale, ntlheng ya letsha, moseja wa Joretane, Galelea wa Baditšhaba," 
Matthew4:16 morafe o o ntseng mo lefifing o bonye lesedi le legolo; ba ba dutseng mo lefatsheng la loso le mo moriting wa loso, lesedi le ba tlhabetse.”" 
Matthew4:17 Go tloga foo Jesu a simolola go rera a re: “Tlhabologang; gonne puso ya magodimo e atametse!” 
Matthew4:18 Ya re a tsamaya fa letsheng la Galelea, a bona bana ba motho ba le babedi, e bong Simone yo o bidiwang Petoro le Andrea morwa-rraagwe, ba digela letloa mo letsheng; gonne e ne e le batshwari ba ditlhapi." 
Matthew4:19 A ba raya a re: “Ntshalang morago, mme ke tla lo dira batshwari ba batho.”" 
Matthew4:20 Jaanong ba akofa ba tlogela matloa, ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew4:21 Ya re a fetela pele go tswa foo, a bona bana ba motho ba bangwe ba le babedi, e bong Jakobo, morwa Sebeteo, le Johane monnawe, ba na le Sebeteo rraabo mo mokorong, ba baakanya matloa a bone; a ba bitsa." 
Matthew4:22 Ba akofa ba tlogela mokoro le rraabo, ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew4:23 Jaanong Jesu a tsamaya le Galelea yotlhe, a ntse a ruta mo disenagogeng tsa bone a rera Efangele ya puso, a fodisa malwetse otlhe le makoa otlhe mo bathong." 
Matthew4:24 Tumo ya gagwe ya tswela kwa Siria yotlhe. Batho ba isa go ene botlhe ba ba lwalang, ba ba tshwerweng ke malwetse a mefutafuta le matlhoko, le ba ba tsenyweng ke medemone, le ba ba karalalang, le ba ba suleng mefama, a ba fodisa." 
Matthew4:25 Bontsintsi jwa mo latela, bo tswa kwa Galelea le Dekapoli le Jerusalema le Jutea le kwa moseja ga Joretane." 
Matthew5:1 E rile a bona bontsintsi, a tlhatlogela kwa thabeng; ya re a sena go nna fa fatshe, barutwa ba gagwe ba tla go ene." 
Matthew5:2 A tumolola molomo, a ba ruta a re:" 
Matthew5:3 “Go sego ba ba humanegileng mo moweng; gonne puso ya magodimo ke ya bone. 
Matthew5:4 Go sego ba ba hutsafetseng; gonne ba tla gomodiwa. 
Matthew5:5 Go sego ba ba pelonolo; gonne ba tla rua boswa jwa lefatshe. 
Matthew5:6 Go sego ba ba nang le tlala ya tshiamo, ba e nyorelwa; gonne ba tla kgorisiwa." 
Matthew5:7 Go sego ba ba kutlwelo-botlhoko; gonne ba tla utlwelwa botlhoko. 
Matthew5:8 Go sego ba ba pelo di itshekileng; gonne ba tla bona Modimo. 
Matthew5:9 Go sego badira-kagiso; gonne ba tla bidiwa bana ba Modimo. 
Matthew5:10 Go sego ba ba bogisediwang tshiamo; gonne puso ya magodimo ke ya bone. 
Matthew5:11 “Lo sego, fa batho ba lo kgoba, ba lo bogisa, ba bua bosula jotlhe ka ga lona ka maaka, ka ntlha ya me." 
Matthew5:12 Itumeleng lo ipele; gonne tuelo ya lona e kgolo kwa magodimong. Gonne ba bogisitse baporofeti jalo, ba ba neng ba le teng pele ga lona." 
Matthew5:13 “Lona lo letswai la lefatshe. Fa letswai le tswapogile, le tla lokwa ka eng? Ga le tlhole le na le tiro epe, fa e se go latlhelwa kwa ntle le go gatakwa ke batho." 
Matthew5:14 “Lona lo lesedi la lefatshe. Motse o o mo godimo ga thaba ga o ka ke wa fitlhega. 
Matthew5:15 Le gona ga go ke go tshujwa lobone, lwa bewa ka fa tlase ga kgamelo. Lo bewa mo setlhomong; foo lo tla bonegela botlhe ba ba mo ntlong." 
Matthew5:16 A lesedi la lona le bonegele batho jalo gore ba bone ditiro tsa lona tse di siameng, ba tle ba galaletse Rraalona yo o kwa magodimong." 
Matthew5:17 “Lo se ka lwa gopola gore ke tsile go dirolola molao gongwe baporofeti; ga ke a tla go dirolola, ke tsile go dirafatsa." 
Matthew5:18 Gonne, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Fa tsotlhe di ise di dirafale pele, ga go ka ke ga feta tlhakanyana epe, le fa e le letshwaonyana lepe la molao, go tsamaya go fete legodimo le lefatshe." 
Matthew5:19 Ka moo, le fa e le mang yo o tla dirololang nngwe ya ditaolo tse dipotlana tse le go ruta batho jalo, o tla bidiwa yo mmotlana mo pusong ya magodimo. Mme yo o tla di dirisang le go di ruta, ene o tla bidiwa yo mogolo mo pusong ya magodimo." 
Matthew5:20 Gonne ke lo raya ke re: Fa tshiamo ya lona e sa gaise ya Baitsedikwalo le ya Bafarisai, ga lo ka ke lwa tsena mo pusong ya magodimo ka gope." 
Matthew5:21 “Lo utlwile gore go reilwe ba bogologolo ga twe: ‘O se ka wa bolaya; mme le fa e le mang yo o bolayang o tla atlholelwa petso.’ 
Matthew5:22 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe le mongwe yo o galefelang mokaulengwe wa gagwe fela, o tla atlholelwa petso; yo o rayang mokaulengwe wa gagwe a re: ‘Selo ke wena!’ o tla tshwanelwa ke katlholo ya lekgotla le legolo; yo o reng: ‘Lesilo ke wena!’ o tla tshwanelwa ke go latlhelwa kwa moleteng wa molelo." 
Matthew5:23 Fa jaanong ò isa neo ya gago fa aletareng, mme ò gakologelwa teng gore mokaulengwe wa gago o ngongorega ka wena," 
Matthew5:24 foo tlogela neo ya gago teng fa pele ga aletare, ò ye o agisanye le mokaulengwe wa gago pele, e be gona ò ka tlang wa isa neo ya gago." 
Matthew5:25 “Akofa ò utlwane le moganetsi wa gago, o sa ntse o na nae mo tseleng, e se re gongwe moganetsi a go neela moatlhodi, mme moatlhodi a go neela motlhanka, mme wa latlhelwa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Matthew5:26 Ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Ga o ka ke wa tswa teng ka gope, o ise o lefe sente ya bofelo." 
Matthew5:27 “Lo utlwile gore go tilwe: ‘O se ka wa dira boaka.’ 
Matthew5:28 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe le mongwe yo o lebang mosadi ka go mo eletsa, o setse a dirile boaka nae mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Matthew5:29 Fa leitlho la gago le le jang le go kgopisa, ò le gonye, ò le latlhe; gonne go molemo mo go wena, fa nngwe ya ditokololo tsa gago e ka senyega, gore go se latlhelwe mmele otlhe wa gago mo moleteng wa molelo." 
Matthew5:30 Fa letsogo la gago le le jang le go kgopisa, ò le kgaole, ò le latlhe; gonne go molemo mo go wena, fa nngwe ya ditokololo tsa gago e ka senyega, gore go se latlhelwe mmele otlhe wa gago mo moleteng wa molelo." 
Matthew5:31 “Gape go tilwe: ‘Yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, a a mo nee lokwalo lwa tlhalo.’" 
Matthew5:32 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, e se ka ntlha ya boaka, o mo dira seaka; mme yo o nyalang yo o tlhadilweng, o dira boaka." 
Matthew5:33 “Gape, lo utlwile gore go reilwe ba bogologolo ga twe: ‘O se ka wa ikana ka maaka, mme o tshegeletse Morena maikano a gago.’" 
Matthew5:34 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Se ikaneng ka gope, le fa e le ka legodimo, ka e le sedulo sa Modimo sa bogosi," 
Matthew5:35 le fa e le ka lefatshe, ka e le sebeo sa ona sa dinao, le fa e le ka Jerusalema, ka e le motse wa kgosi e kgolo." 
Matthew5:36 Le gona, ò se ka wa ikana ka tlhogo ya gago, ka ò sa ka ke wa dira thiri epe tshweu gongwe ntsho." 
Matthew5:37 Mme a lefoko la lona la ‘Ee’ e nne ‘Ee’, la ‘Nnyaa’ e nne ‘Nnyaa’; mme se se fetang tseo se tswa mo go yo-o-bosula." 
Matthew5:38 “Lo utlwile gore go tilwe: ‘A leitlho le tswelwe ke leitlho le leino ke leino.’ 
Matthew5:39 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Se ganetsanyeng le yo o lo direlang bosula; mme fa mongwe a go faphola lesameng le le jang, mo neele le la molema." 
Matthew5:40 Yo o ratang go seka le wena go tsaya kojwana ya gago, mo leseletse go go tseela le kobo." 
Matthew5:41 Gape, fa motho a go pateletsa go tsamaya le ene mmaele e le nngwe, yaa nae tse pedi." 
Matthew5:42 Naya yo o go kopang; le yo o ratang go adima mo go wena, o se ka wa mo hularela." 
Matthew5:43 “Lo utlwile gore go tilwe: ‘Rata mongwe-ka-wena, mme o tlhoe mmaba wa gago.’" 
Matthew5:44 Mme nna ke lo raya ke re: Ratang baba ba lona, lo tshegofatseng ba ba lo hutsang; ba ba lo tlhoileng lo ba direleng molemo, lo rapelele ba ba lo kgobotlang, ba lo bogisa," 
Matthew5:45 gore lo nne bana ba ga Rraeno yo o kwa magodimong; gonne o tlhabisetsa ba ba bosula le ba ba molemo letsatsi la gagwe, o nesetsa basiami le basiamolodi pula." 
Matthew5:46 Gonne fa lo rata ba ba lo ratang, lo na le tuelo efe? Bakgethisi le bone a ga ba dire jalo?" 
Matthew5:47 Fa lo dumedisa bakaulengwe ba lona fela, lo gaisa ba bangwe ka eng? Baheitane a ga ba dire jalo le bone?" 
Matthew5:48 Ka moo he, siamang ka botlalo jaaka Rraeno wa legodimo a siame ka botlalo." 
Matthew6:1 “Itiseng gore lo se dire tshiamo ya lona fa pele ga batho gore lo bonwe ke bone; go seng jalo ga lo na tuelo mo go Rraeno yo o kwa magodimong. 
Matthew6:2 “Ka moo he, e re fa o dira tsa bopelotlhomogi, o se ka wa letsa lonaka fa pele ga gago, jaaka baitimokanyi ba tle ba dire mo disenagogeng le mo mebileng gore ba tlotlwe ke batho. Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Tuelo ya bone ba setse ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:3 Mme wena, e re fa ò ntsha dikatso, a letsogo la gago la molema le se ka la itse se se dirwang ke le le jang," 
Matthew6:4 gore dikatso tsa gago di nne mo bosaitsiweng; mme Rraago yo o bonang mo go fitlhegileng o tla go duela. 
Matthew6:5 “Gape fa lo rapela, lo se ka lwa nna jaaka baitimokanyi; gonne ba rata go rapela ba eme mo disenagogeng le fa makopanelong a mebila gore ba ipontshe batho. Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Tuelo ya bone ba setse ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:6 Mme wena, e re fa o rapela, o tsene mo ntlwaneng ya gago e e kwa teng; mme e re ò sena go tswala mojako, ò rapele Rraago yo o mo sephiring; mme Rraago yo o bonang mo go fitlhegileng o tla go duela." 
Matthew6:7 “Fa lo rapela, lo se ka lwa boaboela jaaka baheitane; gonne ba gopola gore ba tla utlwiwa ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa mafoko a bone." 
Matthew6:8 Ka moo he, se tshwaneng le bone; gonne Rraalona o itse tse lo di tlhokang, lo ise lo di mo kope." 
Matthew6:9 Mme lona lo rapele jaana lo re: “ ‘Rraetsho yo o kwa magodimong; leina la gago a le itshepisiwe; 
Matthew6:10 puso ya gago a e tle; thato ya gago a e dirafale mo lefatsheng jaaka kwa legodimong. 
Matthew6:11 Re fe gompieno sejo sa rona sa letsatsi. 
Matthew6:12 O re itshwarele melato ya rona, jaaka le rona re itshwarela ba ba melato le rona." 
Matthew6:13 O se re gogele mo thaelong, mme ò re golole mo bosuleng. Gonne bogosi ke jwa gago, le thata, le kgalalelo, ka bosenabokhutlo! Amen.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Gonne fa lo itshwarela batho ditlolo tsa bone, le lona Rraeno wa legodimo o tla lo itshwarela." 
Matthew6:15 Mme fa lo sa itshwarele batho ditlolo tsa bone, Rraeno le ene ga a kitla a lo itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona." 
Matthew6:16 “Gape fa lo itima dijo, lo se ka lwa tlhonya jaaka baitimokanyi; gonne ba itshenya difatlhego gore ba ipontshe batho, fa ba itima dijo. Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Tuelo ya bone ba setse ba e amogetse." 
Matthew6:17 Mme wena, e re fa ò itima dijo, ò iphotle tlhogo, o tlhape sefatlhego" 
Matthew6:18 gore batho ba tle ba se ka ba bona gore ò itima dijo; mme ò bonwe fela ke Rraago yo o mo sephiring; mme Rraago yo o bonang mo go fitlhegileng o tla go duela. 
Matthew6:19 “Se iphutheleng mahumo mo lefatsheng, kwa go senyang motoutwana le marale teng, le kwa magodu a phunyang, a utswa teng." 
Matthew6:20 Iphutheleng mahumo kwa legodimong, kwa motoutwana o sa senyeng teng, le fa e le marale, le kwa magodu a sa phunyeng go utswa teng." 
Matthew6:21 Gonne kwa letlotlo la gago le leng teng, pelo ya gago le yona e tla nna teng." 
Matthew6:22 “Leitlho ke lobone lwa mmele; ka moo, fa leitlho la gago le siame, mmele otlhe wa gago o tla sedifala." 
Matthew6:23 Mme fa leitlho la gago le le bosula, mmele otlhe wa gago o tla fifala. Fa jaanong lesedi le le mo go wena e le lefifi, kana lefifi le tla bo le le legolo jang!" 
Matthew6:24 “Ga go ope yo o ka direlang barena ba le babedi; gonne o tla tlhoa yo mongwe, mme a rate yo mongwe; gongwe o tla ngaparela yo mongwe, mme a nyatse yo mongwe. Ga lo ka ke lwa direla Modimo le Mamone." 
Matthew6:25 “Ke ka ntlha ya moo ke lo rayang ke re: Se tshwenyegeleng bophelo jwa lona gore lo tla ja eng, lo tla nwa eng, le fa e le mmele gore lo tla apara eng? Bophelo a ga bo gaise dijo, le mmele a ga o gaise diaparo?" 
Matthew6:26 Lebang dinonyane tsa leapi; ga di jwale, e bile ga di robe, le fa e le go phuthela mo difaleng; mme Rraalona wa legodimo o a di otla. Lona a ga lo di gaise segolo?" 
Matthew6:27 Ke ofe wa lona yo o ka ikoketsang boleele jwa letsogo le le lengwe fela ka go itlhofaelela? 
Matthew6:28 “Lo tlhofaelelelang diaparo? Elang dithunya tsa naga tlhoko ka fa di golang ka teng; ga di dire, ga di otlhe;" 
Matthew6:29 mme ke lo raya ke re: Le fa e le Salomo mo kgalalelong yotlhe ya gagwe o ne a sa kgaba jaaka sengwe sa tseo. 
Matthew6:30 Fa Modimo o apesa jalo bojang jwa naga, jo bo leng teng kajeno, mme ka moso bo latlhelwa mo leisong, a ga o kitla o lo apesa bogolo lona ba tumelo e potlana?" 
Matthew6:31 “Ka moo, se tshwenyegeng lwa re: ‘Re tla ja eng, gongwe, re tla nwa eng, gongwe, re tla apara eng?’" 
Matthew6:32 Gonne tsotlhe tseo di batlwa ke baheitane; kana Rraeno wa legodimo o itse gore tsotlhe tseo lo tshela ka tsona. 
Matthew6:33 Jalo he, batlang pele puso ya Modimo le tshiamo ya ona, mme tsotlhe tseo lo tla di okelediwa." 
Matthew6:34 Ka moo he, se tshwenyegeleng letsatsi la ka moso; gonne letsatsi la ka moso le tla itshwenyegela ka losi. Letsatsi le lekanywe ke tshwenyego ya lone." 
Matthew7:1 “Lo se ka lwa atlhola gore lo se atlholwe; 
Matthew7:2 gonne katlholo e lo ka atlholang ka yona, lo tla atlholwa ka yona, le selekanyo se lo ka lekanyang ka sona, lo tla lekanyediwa ka sona." 
Matthew7:3 O lebelang phatsana e e mo leitlhong la morwa-rraago, mme o sa lemoge kota e e mo leitlhong la gago?" 
Matthew7:4 Gape o ka raya morwa-rraago jang wa re: ‘Nte ke ntshe phatsana mo leitlhong la gago,’ etswe ò sa bone kota e e mo leitlhong la gago?" 
Matthew7:5 Moitimokanyi ke wena! Ntsha kota mo leitlhong la gago pele; ke gona ò tla bonang sentle go ntsha phatsana mo leitlhong la morwa-rraago. 
Matthew7:6 “Lo se ka lwa naya dintšwa se se itshepileng; le gona lo se ka lwa latlhela ditalama tsa lona fa pele ga dikolobe, e se re gongwe tsa di gataka ka ditlhako tsa tsona, tsa ba tsa retologa, tsa lo gagoganya." 
Matthew7:7 “Kopang, mme lo tla newa; batlang, mme lo tla bona; konyakonyang, mme lo tla bulelwa." 
Matthew7:8 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o kopang, o a amogela; le yo o batlang, o a bona; le yo o konyakonyang, o tla bulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 A kampo go na le motho mo go lona yo e ka reng fa morwawe a mo kopa senkgwe, a mo naya lentswe?" 
Matthew7:10 Gongwe fa a kopa tlhapi, a a ka mo naya noga?" 
Matthew7:11 Jaanong, fa lona, ba lo leng bosula, lo itse go naya bana ba lona dineo tse di molemo, bogolo jang Rraalona yo o kwa magodimong o tla naya ba ba mo kopang tse di siameng!" 
Matthew7:12 “Jaanong tsotlhe tse lo ratang batho ba di lo direla, lo ba direle tsona; gonne molao o a re jalo le baporofeti." 
Matthew7:13 “Tsenang ka kgoro e e pitlaganyeng; gonne kgoro e atlhame, le tsela e kgolo e e yang kwa tatlhegong, mme ba ba tsenang ka yona ba bantsi." 
Matthew7:14 Mme kgoro e pitlaganye, le tsela e tshesane e e yang botshelong, mme ba ba e bonang ga ba bantsi." 
Matthew7:15 “Itiseng mo baporofeting ba e seng bone, ba ba tlang go lona, ba apere diaparo tsa dinku, mme mo teng e le diphiri tse di garolang." 
Matthew7:16 Lo tla ba itse ka maungo a bone. A go a tle go fulwe leungo la moweine mo mitlweng, gongwe difeie mo mesitlwaneng?" 
Matthew7:17 Ka moo, setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se siameng se ungwa maungo a a monate; mme setlhare se se sa siamang se ungwa maungo a a botlhoko." 
Matthew7:18 Setlhare se se siameng ga se ka ke sa ungwa maungo a a botlhoko, le setlhare se se sa siamang ga se ka ke sa ungwa maungo a a monate." 
Matthew7:19 Setlhare sengwe le sengwe se se sa ungweng leungo le le monate se a rengwa, se latlhelwe mo molelong." 
Matthew7:20 Ka moo he, lo tla ba itse ka maungo a bone." 
Matthew7:21 “Ga se mongwe le mongwe yo o nthayang a re: ‘Morena, Morena!’ yo o tla tsenang mo pusong ya magodimo; go tla tsena fela yo o dirang thato ya ga Rre yo o kwa magodimong." 
Matthew7:22 Ba bantsi ba tla nthaya ka letsatsi leo ba re: ‘Morena, Morena, a ga re a ka ra rera Lefoko la Modimo ka leina la gago, ra ba ra leleka medemone ka leina la gago, ra ba ra dira ditiro tse dikgolo ka leina la gago?’" 
Matthew7:23 Foo ke tla ba raya ke re: ‘Ga ke ise nke ke lo itse; tlogang fa go nna, lona badiratshiamololo!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Jaanong mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang mafoko ao a me, a ba a a dirisa, o tla tshwana le monna yo o tlhoko, yo o agileng ntlo ya gagwe mo lefikeng;" 
Matthew7:25 mme pula ya fologa, le merwalela ya tla, le diphefo tsa foka, tsa itaya ntlo eo; mme ya se ka ya wa; gonne e ne e theilwe mo lefikeng." 
Matthew7:26 “Mme mongwe le mongwe yo o utlwang mafoko ao a me, mme a sa a dirise, o tla tshwana le monna yo o lesilo, yo o agileng ntlo ya gagwe mo mošaweng;" 
Matthew7:27 mme pula ya fologa, le merwalela ya tla, le diphefo tsa foka, tsa itaya ntlo eo, ya ba ya wa; mme go wa ga yona ga nna gogolo.”" 
Matthew7:28 Jaanong ya re Jesu a sena go fetsa mafoko ao, batho ba welwa ke letshogo le legolo ka ntlha ya thuto ya gagwe;" 
Matthew7:29 gonne o ne a ba ruta jaaka yo o nang le thata, e seng jaaka Baitsedikwalo ba bone." 
Matthew8:1 E rile a fologa mo thabeng, masomo a magolo a mo sala morago." 
Matthew8:2 Jaanong molepero a tla go ene, a mo obamela a re: “Morena, fa o rata, o ka mphepafatsa.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesu a ntsha letsogo, a mo ama a re: “Ke a rata, phepafala!” Mme a akofa a fola lepero la gagwe." 
Matthew8:4 Jesu a ba a mo raya a re: “O itise gore o se ka wa bolelela ope; mme yaa o ipontshe moperesiti, o be o ise neo e Moše o e laetseng, go nna tshupo mo go bone.”" 
Matthew8:5 E rile a tsena mo Kaperenaume, ga tla molaodi-wa-lekgolo go ene, a mo rapela a re:" 
Matthew8:6 “Morena, motlhanka wa me o letse fa fatshe mo ntlong, o sule mhama, o bile o tlhabegile mo go botlhoko.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke tla tla, ke mo fodisa.”" 
Matthew8:8 Molaodi a araba a re: “Morena, ga go a ntshwanela gore o tsene fa tlase ga ditlhomeso tsa me; bua lefoko fela, mme motlhanka wa me o tla fola;" 
Matthew8:9 gonne le nna ke motho yo o mo taolong, mme ke na le batlhabani fa tlase ga me; e a re fa ke raya yo ke re: ‘Tsamaya!’ a tsamae; le yo mongwe ke re: ‘Tlaa!’ a tle; le motlhanka wa me ke re: ‘Dira se!’ a se dire.”" 
Matthew8:10 Ya re Jesu a utlwa, a gakgamala, a raya ba ba mo setseng morago a re. “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga ke ise nke ke bone tumelo e e kana le fa e le mo Iseraele." 
Matthew8:11 Ke bile ke lo raya ke re: Ba bantsi ba tla tswa kwa botlhabatsatsi le kwa bophirimatsatsi, ba nna fa tafoleng le Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe mo pusong ya magodimo;" 
Matthew8:12 mme bana ba puso ba tla kgaramelediwa kwa lefifing le le kwa ntle; teng go tla nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno.” 
Matthew8:13 Jesu a ba a raya molaodi a re: “Tsamaya; a go go dirafalele ka fa o dumetseng ka teng.” Mme motlhanka wa gagwe a fola ka yona nako eo. 
Matthew8:14 E rile Jesu a tsena mo ntlong ya ga Petoro, a bona mogwagwadie a letse fa fatshe, a tuka bolelo;" 
Matthew8:15 ke fa a tshwara seatla sa gagwe; mme mogote wa mo tlogela, a ba a tsoga, a mo direla." 
Matthew8:16 Ya re go le maitsiboa, ba tsisa go ene ba le bantsi ba ba tsenyweng ke medemone; a kgarameletsa mewa kwa ntle ka lefoko, a fodisa botlhe ba ba lwalang," 
Matthew8:17 gore go dirafale se se builweng ke Jesaya moporofeti a re: “Ene o ithwesitse makoa a rona, a rwala malwetse a rona.”" 
Matthew8:18 E rile Jesu a bona lesomo la batho le mo dikanyeditse, a laola gore go tshelelwe kwa moseja." 
Matthew8:19 Foo ga tla moitsedikwalo, a mo raya a re: “Moruti, ke tla go sala morago gongwe le gongwe kwa o ka yang teng.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Diphokojwe di na le mesima le dinonyane tsa leapi di na le dintlhaga, mme Morwa-Motho ene ga a na fa a ka latsang tlhogo teng.”" 
Matthew8:21 Yo mongwe wa barutwa a mo raya a re: “Morena, ntetlelele, ke ye go fitlha rre pele.”" 
Matthew8:22 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Ntshale morago; a baswi ba fitlhe baswi ba bone!” 
Matthew8:23 E rile a palama mokoro, barutwa ba gagwe ba mo sala morago." 
Matthew8:24 Jaanong ga tsoga ledimo le legolo mo letsheng, mo mokoro o bileng wa khurumediwa ke makhubu, mme ene a bo a robetse." 
Matthew8:25 Ba ya go ene, ba mo tsosa ba re: “Morena, re pholose, re a nwela!”" 
Matthew8:26 A ba raya a re: “Lo boifelang, ba tumelonyana ke lona?” Ke fa a tsoga, a kgalemela diphefo le letsha, ga ba ga nna tidimalo e kgolo." 
Matthew8:27 Foo batho ba gakgamala ba re: “Yo ke yo o ntseng jang, ka le tsona diphefo le letsha di mo utlwa?”" 
Matthew8:28 E rile a fitlha kwa moseja mo lefatsheng la Bagatara, batho ba le babedi ba kgatlhana nae, ba ba tsenyweng ke mewa e e bosula, ba tswa kwa diphupung, ba le bogale thata, mo go neng go se ope yo o ka fetang ka tsela eo." 
Matthew8:29 Ba goa ba re: “Re na le kopano efe le wena, Morwa Modimo? A o tsile kwano go re tlhokofatsa e ise e nne nako?”" 
Matthew8:30 Jaanong ga bo go fula motlhape o mogolo wa dikolobe kgakalanyana le bone. 
Matthew8:31 Mewa e e bosula ya mo rapela ya re: “Fa o re kgarameletsa ntle, re romele kwa motlhapeng wa dikolobe.”" 
Matthew8:32 A e raya a re: “Yaang teng!” Foo ya tswa, ya tsena mo dikolobeng; motlhape otlhe wa ba wa itigela ka maokoriba mo letsheng, wa swela mo metsing." 
Matthew8:33 Jaanong badisa ba tshaba, ba ya kwa motseng, ba bolela tsotlhe, le tsona tsa ba ba neng ba tsenywe ke mewa e e bosula." 
Matthew8:34 Foo batho botlhe ba motse ba tswa ba ya go kopana le Jesu. Ya re ba mmona, ba mo rapela gore a tloge mo nageng ya bone." 
Matthew9:1 Jaanong a palama mokoro a tshela letsha, a boela kwa motseng wa ga gabo." 
Matthew9:2 Foo ba tsisa go ene mongwe yo o suleng mhama, a letse mo bolaong. Ya re Jesu a bona tumelo ya bone, a raya yo o suleng mhama a re: “Namatshega, ngwanaka; dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Ke fa bangwe ba Baitsedikwalo ba ithaya ba re: “Yo, o kgala Modimo.”" 
Matthew9:4 Ya re Jesu a lemoga megopolo ya bone, a ba raya a re: “Lo gopolelang tse di bosula mo dipelong tsa lona?" 
Matthew9:5 Se se botlhofo ke sefe, a ke go re: ‘Dibe tsa gago o di itshwaretswe,’ gongwe go re: ‘Tsoga o tsamae’?" 
Matthew9:6 Mme lo tla lemoga gore Morwa-Motho o na le thata mo lefatsheng go itshwarela dibe!” Ke fa a raya yo o suleng mhama a re: “Tsoga o tsee bolao jwa gago, o be o ye kwa ntlong ya gago!”" 
Matthew9:7 Mme a tsoga, a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe." 
Matthew9:8 Ya re batho ba bona, ba boifa, ba be ba galaletsa Modimo o o neileng batho thata e e ntseng jalo." 
Matthew9:9 E rile Jesu a tswa foo, mme a fetela pele, a bona motho yo o bidiwang Matheo, a dutse mo ntlong ya kgethelo; a mo raya a re: “Ntshala morago!” Yoo a nanoga, a mo sala morago." 
Matthew9:10 Ya re Jesu a ntse fa dijong mo ntlong, bakgethisi le baleofi ba le bantsi ba tla, ba nna nae fa dijong le barutwa ba gagwe." 
Matthew9:11 Ya re Bafarisai ba bona, ba raya barutwa ba gagwe ba re: “Moruti wa lona o jelang le bakgethisi le baleofi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Ya re a utlwa jalo, a ba raya a re: “Ngaka ga e batlwe ke ba ba itekanetseng, e batlwa ke ba ba lwalang." 
Matthew9:13 Jaanong tsamayang, lo ithute gore ke go reng, fa go twe: ‘Ke batla kutlwelo-botlhoko, e seng setlhabelo;’ gonne ke tsile go biletsa baleofi tlhabologong, e seng basiami.”" 
Matthew9:14 Ya baa gona barutwa ba ga Johane ba tlang go ene ba re: “Ke go reng, fa rona le Bafarisai re itima dijo gantsi, mme barutwa ba gago ba sa di itime?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesu a ba araba a re: “A baetsana ba ka lela, monyadi a sa ntse a na nabo? Mme malatsi a tla tla, a monyadi a tla tlosiwang mo go bone ka ona; ke gona ba tla itimang dijo." 
Matthew9:16 “Ga go ope yo o ka bitiang seaparo se se onetseng ka sebata se sešwa; gonne sebata sa sona se tla gagola seaparo, mme legago le oketsege." 
Matthew9:17 E bile ga go ke go tshelwa weine e ntšhwa mo makukeng a a onetseng. Fa go ka dirwa jalo, makuka a ka phanyega, weine ya tshologa, le makuka a senyega. Mme go a tle go tshelwe weine e ntšhwa mo makukeng a mašwa, mme di bolokege mmogo.”" 
Matthew9:18 Ya re a sa ntse a bua tseo nabo, mookamedi mongwe wa senagoge a tla, a mo obamela a re: “Morwadiake ke gona o swang; mme a o ko o tle, o mmee letsogo, mme o tla rula.”" 
Matthew9:19 Jesu a nanoga, a mo sala morago le barutwa ba gagwe." 
Matthew9:20 Jaanong mosadi yo o sa leng a nna le tshologo ya madi dinyaga di le 12, a tla fa morago ga gagwe, a ama kola ya kobo ya gagwe;" 
Matthew9:21 gonne o ne a dumela go re: “Fa nka ama kobo ya gagwe fela, ke tla fola.”" 
Matthew9:22 Jesu a retologa, a mmona, a mo raya a re: “Namatshega, morwadiaka; tumelo ya gago e go thusitse.” Mme mosadi a fola e sa le ka nako eo." 
Matthew9:23 Ya re Jesu a tsena mo ntlong ya mookamedi, mme a bona baletsi ba ditlhaka, le bontsi bo tsositse modumo," 
Matthew9:24 a ba raya a re: “Thibogang! Gonne morweetsana ga a swa, o thulametse.” Mme ba mo tshega." 
Matthew9:25 Ya re batho ba sena go ntshiwa, a tsena, a mo tshwara letsogo, mme morweetsana a tsoga." 
Matthew9:26 Tumo ya moo ya utlwala mo lefatsheng leo lotlhe. 
Matthew9:27 E rile Jesu a tloga foo, difofu tse pedi tsa mo sala morago, tsa goa tsa re: “Re utlwele botlhoko, Morwa Dafita!”" 
Matthew9:28 Ya re a sena go tsena mo ntlong, difofu tsa tla fa go ene. Jesu a ba raya a re: “A lo dumela gore ke nonofile go dira jalo?” Tsa mo raya tsa re: “Ee, Morena.”" 
Matthew9:29 Ke fa a ama matlho a bone a re: “A go lo dirafalele ka fa tumelong ya lona!” 
Matthew9:30 Foo matlho a bone a foufologa. Mme Jesu a ba laela thata a re: “Lo itise gore lo se itsise ope.” 
Matthew9:31 Mme ba tswa, ba mo tumisa mo lefatsheng leo lotlhe." 
Matthew9:32 Ya re ba tswa, ga tsisiwa go ene semumu se se tsenyweng ke modemone." 
Matthew9:33 Ya re modemone o sena go kgaramelediwa ntle, semumu sa bua; mme batho ba gakgamala ba re: “Ga go ise go ke go bonwe se se ntseng jalo mo Iseraele.”" 
Matthew9:34 Mme Bafarisai ba re: “O kgarameletsa medemone ntle ka molaodi wa medemone.” 
Matthew9:35 Jaanong Jesu a tlhatlologanya metse le metsana yotlhe, a ntse a ruta mo disenagogeng tsa bone, a rera Efangele ya puso, a fodisa malwetse otlhe le makoa otlhe." 
Matthew9:36 Ya re a bona bontsi jwa batho, a ba tlhomogela pelo; gonne ba ne ba bogisegile, ba lapile jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa." 
Matthew9:37 Ke fa a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Thobo e kgolo, mme badiri ba a tlhaela." 
Matthew9:38 Ka moo he, rapelang Morena wa thobo gore a romele badiri mo thobong ya gagwe.”" 
Matthew10:1 Jaanong a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe ba ba 12, a ba naya thata mo meweng e e itshekologileng go e kgarameletsa ntle, le go fodisa malwetse le makoa otlhe." 
Matthew10:2 Maina a baapostolo ba ba 12 ke a: Wa ntlha ke Simone yo o bidiwang Petoro, le Andrea morwa-rraagwe; le Jakobo wa ga Sebeteo, le Johane morwa-rraagwe;" 
Matthew10:3 le Filipo le Baretolomeo; le Thomase le Matheo, mokgethisi; le Jakobo wa ga Alefeo le Lebeo yo o bidiwang Thateo;" 
Matthew10:4 le Simone wa Kana le Jutase Isekariote, yo e leng ene o mo tshwarisitseng." 
Matthew10:5 Bone ba ba 12 ba, Jesu o ne a ba roma, a ba laela a re: “Lo se ka lwa tsaya ditsela tse di yang baheitaneng, le e seng go tsena mo motseng ope wa Basamaria;" 
Matthew10:6 mme bogolo lo ye kwa dinkung tse di timetseng tse e leng Baiseraele. 
Matthew10:7 Lo tsamae lo ntse lo rera lo re: ‘Puso ya Modimo e atametse.’ 
Matthew10:8 Fodisang balwetse, tsosang baswi, phepafatsang balepero, kgarameletsang medemone ntle. Lo amogetse fela, nayang fela!" 
Matthew10:9 Se tseeng gouta, le fa e le selefera, le fa e le kgotlho mo meitlamong ya lona," 
Matthew10:10 le fa e le kgwatlha ya leeto, le fa e le dikobo tse pedi, le fa e le ditlhako, le fa e le tsamma; gonne modiri o tshwanetse go newa dijo." 
Matthew10:11 “Fa lo tsena mo motseng gongwe motsaneng, le fa e ka nna ofe, lo tlhotlhomise gore yo o tshwanetseng mo go ona ke mang. Lo nne teng go tsamae lo be lo tswe teng." 
Matthew10:12 E re lo tsena mo ntlong, lo dumedise!" 
Matthew10:13 Fa e le ntlo e e tshwanetseng, a kagiso ya lona e tle mo go yona; mme fa e le e e sa tshwanelang, a kagiso ya lona e boele mo go lona." 
Matthew10:14 Le fa e le mang yo o sa lo tsholeng, le e seng go reetsa mafoko a lona, tswaang mo ntlong eo gongwe mo motseng oo, lo be lo itlhotlhore lorole mo dinaong." 
Matthew10:15 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: E tla re ka letsatsi la katlholo petso ya motse oo e nne bogale go feta ya lefatshe la Sotoma le Gomora. 
Matthew10:16 “Bonang, ke lo roma jaaka dinku mo gare ga diphiri; ka moo he, nnang botlhale jaaka dinoga, lo be lo nne ba nnete jaaka maeba." 
Matthew10:17 Itiseng mo bathong! Gonne ba tla lo neela mo makgotleng a magolo, ba lo seola mo disenagogeng tsa bone." 
Matthew10:18 Lo tla isiwa fa pele ga balaodi le dikgosi ka ntlha ya me, go nna tshupo mo go bone le mo baheitaneng." 
Matthew10:19 E re fa ba lo isa mo tshekong, lo se ka lwa tshwenyega lwa re: ‘Re tla bua jang’ gongwe ‘re tla bua eng’; gonne ka nako eo lo tla newa se lo tla se buang;" 
Matthew10:20 gonne ga e ne e nna lona ba lo buang, ke Mowa wa ga Rraeno o o buang ka lona." 
Matthew10:21 “Motho o tla neela morwa-rraagwe mo losong, le rra-motho ngwana wa gagwe; le bana ba tla tsogela batsadi ba bone, ba ba bolaisa batho." 
Matthew10:22 Lo tla tlhoiwa ke botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me; mme yo o itshokelang bokhutlong, ene o tla pholosiwa." 
Matthew10:23 Mme a e re fa ba lo bogisa mo motseng ono, lo tshabele kwa go o mongwe; gonne ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Morwa-Motho o tla tla, lo ise lo fetse metse ya Iseraele." 
Matthew10:24 “Morutwa ga a fete moruti wa gagwe, le motlhanka ga a fete morena wa gagwe." 
Matthew10:25 Go lekanye gore morutwa a nne jaaka moruti wa gagwe, le gore motlhanka a nne jaaka morena wa gagwe. Fa mong wa ntlo a biditswe Beelsebule, kana ba ntlo ya gagwe ba tla bidiwa jalo bogolo jang ne!" 
Matthew10:26 “Ka moo he, se ba boifeng; gonne ga go sepe se se bipilweng, se se se kitlang se senolwa, le fa e le se se fitlhegileng, se se se kitlang se itsiwe." 
Matthew10:27 Se ke se lo bolelelang mo lefifing, lo se bue mo leseding; le se lo se sebelwang, lo se utlwatse lo le mo godimo ga matlo." 
Matthew10:28 Le gona, lo se ka lwa boifa ba ba bolayang mmele, mme ba sa nonofa go bolaya mowa; mme bogolo lo boife ene yo o nonofileng go senya mowa le mmele mo moleteng wa molelo." 
Matthew10:29 A dirobele tse pedi ga di rekisiwe ka halfsent? Mme ga go sepe sa tsona se se welang fa fatshe kwa ntle ga go rata ga Rraeno. 
Matthew10:30 Mme le dithiri tsa ditlhogo tsa lona di badilwe tsotlhe. 
Matthew10:31 Ka moo, se boifeng; gonne lo gaisa dirobele di le dintsi." 
Matthew10:32 “Jaanong mongwe le mongwe yo o tla impolelang fa pele ga batho, le nna ke tla mo ipolela fa pele ga Rre yo o kwa magodimong." 
Matthew10:33 Mme yo o tla intatolang fa pele ga batho, le nna ke tla mo itatola fa pele ga Rre yo o kwa magodimong." 
Matthew10:34 “Lo se gopole gore ke tsisitse kagiso mo lefatsheng; ga ke a tsisa kagiso, fa e se tšhaka." 
Matthew10:35 Gonne ke tsile go lotlhanya motho le rraagwe, morwadi le mmaagwe, ngwetsi le matsalaagwe." 
Matthew10:36 Mme ba ntlo ya motho e tla nna baba ba gagwe. 
Matthew10:37 “Yo o ratang rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe bogolo go nna, ga a ntshwanela; le yo o ratang morwawe gongwe morwadie bogolo go nna, ga a ntshwanela." 
Matthew10:38 Le yo o se tseyeng sefapaano sa gagwe, a ntshala morago, ga a ntshwanela." 
Matthew10:39 Yo o bolokang bophelo jwa gagwe o tla latlhegelwa ke jona; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke bophelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me, o tla bo bona." 
Matthew10:40 “Yo o lo tsholang, o a ntshola; mme yo o ntsholang, o tshola yo o nthomileng." 
Matthew10:41 Yo o tsholang moporofeti, ka e le moporofeti, o tla bona tuelo ya moporofeti; le yo o tsholang mosiami, ka e le mosiami, o tla bona tuelo ya mosiami." 
Matthew10:42 Le yo o nosang mongwe wa ba babotlana ba metsi a a tsididi ka sego fela, ka e le ene morutwa, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga a kitla a latlhegelwa ke tuelo ya gagwe ka gope.”" 
Matthew11:1 E rile Jesu a sena go swetsa go laya barutwa ba gagwe ba ba 12, a tloga teng, a ya go ruta batho le go rera mo metseng ya bone." 
Matthew11:2 E rile Johane a le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, mme a utlwela ditiro tsa ga Keresete, a roma barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi," 
Matthew11:3 a mmotsa a re: “A ke wena yo o tlang, a kampo re lebelele o sele?”" 
Matthew11:4 Jesu a ba araba a re: “Tsamayang lo bolelele Johane tse lo di utlwang le tse lo di bonang: 
Matthew11:5 Difofu di a bona, batlhotsi ba a tsamaya, balepero ba a phepafadiwa, disusu di a utlwa, baswi ba a tsosiwa, bahumanegi ba rerelwa Efangele." 
Matthew11:6 Mme go sego yo o sa kgopisiweng ke nna.” 
Matthew11:7 Ya re bone ba tsamaya, Jesu a simolola go bua le batho ka ga Johane a re: “Lo ne lo tswela kwa sekakeng go bona eng? A e ne e le lotlhaka lo lo tshikinngwang ke phefo?" 
Matthew11:8 Gape, lo ne lo tswela go bona eng? A e ne e le motho yo o apereng tse di boleta? Kana ba ba apereng tse di boleta ba mo matlong a dikgosi." 
Matthew11:9 Gape, lo ne lo tswela eng? A e ne e le go bona moporofeti? Ee, ke lo raya ke re: Yo e bile o mogolo go moporofeti." 
Matthew11:10 Gonne ke ene go kwadilweng ka ga gagwe ga twe: ‘Bona, ke roma morongwa wa me fa pele ga gago, yo o tla go baakanyetsang tsela.’" 
Matthew11:11 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Mo go ba ba tsetsweng ke basadi ga go a tsoga ope yo o fetang Johane Mokolobetsi; mme yo mmotlana mo pusong ya magodimo o a mo feta. 
Matthew11:12 Go tloga mo malatsing a ga Johane Mokolobetsi go fitlha jaanong, puso ya magodimo e tlhaselwa ka thata, mme batlhasedi ba a e thopa." 
Matthew11:13 Gonne baporofeti botlhe le molao ba be ba bolelela pele go fitlha mo go Johane. 
Matthew11:14 Mme ke ene Elia yo o tshwanetseng go tla, fa lo rata go dumela jalo." 
Matthew11:15 Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa, a a utlwe!" 
Matthew11:16 “Batho ba gompieno ke tla ba tshwantsha le eng? Ba tshwana le bana ba ba ntseng mo dipatlelong, ba tlhaeletsa balekane ba bone ba re:" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Re lo leleditse ditlhaka, mme ga lo a ka lwa bina; ra tlhaba difela tsa bohutsana, mme ga lo a ka lwa lela!’" 
Matthew11:18 Gonne go tsile Johane, a sa je, a sa nwe; mme ba bua ba re: ‘O na le modemone.’" 
Matthew11:19 Go tsile Morwa-Motho, a ja, a nwa; mme ba re: ‘Bonang motho yo e leng sejabele le monwi wa weine, tsala ya bakgethisi le baleofi!’ Mme botlhale bo atlholetswe ke bana ba jona.”" 
Matthew11:20 Jaanong a simolola go kgoba metse e bontsi jwa dikgakgamatso tsa gagwe di dirilweng mo go yona, ka e se ka ya tlhabologa, a re:" 
Matthew11:21 “A tatlhego ya gago wee, Gorasine! A tatlhego ya gago wee, Betsaita! Gonne fa ditiro tsa nonofo tse di dirilweng mo go lona, di ka bo di dirilwe mo Tiro le Sitone, ba ka bo ba sa bolo go ikwatlhaya, ba apere kgetse, ba ntse mo moloreng." 
Matthew11:22 Mme ke lo raya ke re: E tla re ka letsatsi la katlholo petso ya lona e nne bogale go feta ya Tiro le Sitone. 
Matthew11:23 Le wena Kaperenaume yo o godiseditsweng kwa legodimong, o tla digelwa kwa felong ga baswi. Gonne fa ditiro tsa nonofo tse di dirilweng mo go wena, di ka bo di dirilwe kwa Sotoma, o ka bo a sa ntse a eme le kajeno." 
Matthew11:24 Mme ke lo raya ke re: E tla re ka letsatsi la katlholo petso ya gago e nne bogale go feta ya lefatshe la Sotoma.” 
Matthew11:25 Ka nako eo Jesu a bua a re: “Ke a go boka, Rara, Morena wa legodimo le lefatshe, ka ò fitlhetse ba ba botlhale le ba ba tlhaloganyang dilo tse, mme ò di senoletse ba ba sa rutegang." 
Matthew11:26 Ee, Rara; gonne e ne e le kgatlhego ya gago gore go nne jalo." 
Matthew11:27 “Tsotlhe ke di neilwe ke Rre; ga go ope yo o itseng Morwa, fa e se Rara; le gona ga go ope yo o itseng Rara, fa e se Morwa, le yo Morwa o ratang go mo mo senolela." 
Matthew11:28 “Tlaang kwano go nna lotlhe ba lo lapileng, ba lo imelwang; nna ke tla lo lapolosa." 
Matthew11:29 Ipeleseng jokwe ya me, lo ithute mo go nna; gonne ke bonolo le boikokobetso mo pelong, mme lo tla bonela mewa ya lona tapologo." 
Matthew11:30 Gonne jokwe ya me e bonolo, morwalo wa me o botlhofo.”" 
Matthew12:1 E rile ka nako eo Jesu a ralala masimo e le ka Sabata; barutwa ba gagwe ba bo ba tshwerwe ke tlala, ba simolola go kgetla diako le go ja." 
Matthew12:2 Ya re Bafarisai ba bona, ba mo raya ba re: “Bona, barutwa ba gago ba dira se se sa letlelelwang go dirwa ka Sabata.”" 
Matthew12:3 A ba fetola a re: “A ga lo a buisa se Dafita o kileng a se dira, jale fa a tshwerwe ke tlala, ene le ba ba nang nae," 
Matthew12:4 ka fa o neng a tsena mo ntlong ya Modimo ka teng, a ja dinkgwe tsa tshupo tse a sa letlelelwang go di ja, le fa e le ba ba neng ba na nae, fa e se baperesiti fela?" 
Matthew12:5 Kampo a ga lo ise lo buise mo molaong gore baperesiti ba tle ba itshepolole Sabata mo Tempeleng ka Sabata, mme ba se ke ba nne molato?" 
Matthew12:6 Mme ke lo raya ke re: Yo o leng mogolo go feta Tempele o fano. 
Matthew12:7 Fa lo ka bo lo tlhalogantse gore ke go reng, fa go twe: ‘Ke batla kutlwelo-botlhoko, e seng setlhabelo,’ lo ka bo lo sa sekise ba ba se nang molato." 
Matthew12:8 Gonne le Sabata Morwa-Motho ke Morena wa yona.” 
Matthew12:9 Ya re a sena go tloga teng, a tsena mo senagogeng sa bone." 
Matthew12:10 Ga bo go le motho teng yo o nang le seatla se se omeletseng. Ba mmotsa ba re: “A go letleletswe go fodisa ka Sabata?” Ba re jalo gore ba tle ba mmee molato. 
Matthew12:11 A ba fetola a re: “Motho e ka nna mang mo go lona yo o nang le nku e le nngwe fela yo e ka reng e wetse mo mokoleng ka Sabata, a se ka a e tshwara, a e ntsha?" 
Matthew12:12 Mme kana motho o gaisa nku thata jang ne! Ke ka moo go letleletsweng go dira se se molemo ka Sabata.” 
Matthew12:13 Ya baa gona o rayang motho yoo a re: “Otlolola seatla!” A se otlolola; sa boa sa fola sentle, sa nna jaaka se sengwe." 
Matthew12:14 Ke fa Bafarisai ba tswa, ba gakololana ka ga gagwe ka fa ba ka mmolayang ka teng." 
Matthew12:15 Ya re Jesu a lemoga, a tloga teng; mme ba bantsi ba mo sala morago, a ba fodisa botlhe." 
Matthew12:16 Mme a ba laela thata gore ba se ka ba mo tumisa," 
Matthew12:17 e le gore go tle go dirafale se se builweng ke Jesaya moporofeti, a re:" 
Matthew12:18 “Bonang Motlhanka wa me yo ke mo itlhaoletseng; moratwi wa me, yo pelo ya me e natefelwang ke ene. Ke tla baya Mowa wa me mo go ene, mme o tla bolelela merafe tshiamo." 
Matthew12:19 Ga a kitla a omana, le fa e le go goa; ga go ope yo o tla utlwang lentswe la gagwe mo mebileng." 
Matthew12:20 Lotlhaka lo lo phitsegileng ga a kitla a lo roba, le mogala wa lobone o o takatakang ga a kitla a o tima, go ya a be a neele tshiamo phenyo." 
Matthew12:21 Mme merafe e tla solofela mo leineng la gagwe.” 
Matthew12:22 Jaanong ga tlisiwa go ene mongwe yo o tsenyweng ke modemone, e le sefofu le semumu; mme a mo fodisa, mo semumu se bileng sa bua, sa ba sa bona." 
Matthew12:23 Ke fa batho botlhe ba gakgamala ba re: “A jaana yo ga se Morwa Dafita?” 
Matthew12:24 E rile Bafarisai ba utlwa, ba re: “Yo ga a lelekele medemone ntle ka sepe fa e se ka Beelsebule, molaodi wa medemone.”" 
Matthew12:25 Jaanong ya re ka a itse megopolo ya bone, a ba raya a re: “Bogosi bongwe le bongwe jo bo ikgaogantseng bo a senyega, le motse mongwe le mongwe, gongwe ntlo e e ikgaogantseng ga e ka ke ya ema." 
Matthew12:26 Fa Satane a kgarameletsa Satane kwa ntle, o tla bo a ikgaogantse; jaanong bogosi jwa gagwe bo ka ema jang?" 
Matthew12:27 Jaanong fa ke kgarameletsa medemone kwa ntle ka Beelsebule, bomorwaa-lona bone ba e kgarameletsa ntle ka mang? Ke ka ntlha ya moo ba tla nnang baatlhodi ba lona." 
Matthew12:28 Mme fa ke kgarameletsa medemone kwa ntle ka Mowa wa Modimo, foo puso ya Modimo e tla bo e tlile go lona." 
Matthew12:29 “Motho o ka tsena jang mo ntlong ya monna wa senatla, a thopa dithoto tsa gagwe, fa a sa golega senatla pele? Mme fa a sena go mo golega, ke gona o ka thopang tsa ntlo ya gagwe." 
Matthew12:30 “Yo o sa gogeng le nna o lwa le nna, le yo o sa phutheng le nna o a phatlalatsa." 
Matthew12:31 Ke ka moo ke lo rayang ke re: Sebe sengwe le sengwe le kgalo, batho ba ka di itshwarelwa; mme kgalo e e kgalang Mowa, yona ga e kitla e itshwarelwa." 
Matthew12:32 Le fa e le mang yo o tla buang lefoko le le nyefolang Morwa-Motho, o ka itshwarelwa; mme yo o tla buang le le nyefolang Mowa o o Boitshepo, ga a kitla a itshwarelwa mo metlheng eno le e seng mo go e e tlang." 
Matthew12:33 “Dirang gore setlhare se siame, foo le leungo la sona le tla siama; gongwe dirang gore setlhare e nne se se sa siamang, foo le leungo la sona e tla nna le le sa siamang; gonne setlhare se itsiwe ka leungo." 
Matthew12:34 Lotsalo lwa dinoga ke lona! Lo ka bua jang tse di molemo lo le bosula? Gonne molomo o bua tse di tletseng mo pelong. 
Matthew12:35 Motho yo o molemo o ntsha tse di molemo mo lohumong lo lo molemo; mme motho yo o bosula o ntsha tse di bosula mo lohumong lo lo bosula. 
Matthew12:36 “Ke lo raya ke re: Lefoko lengwe le lengwe la boithamako le batho ba tla le buang, ba tla ikarabela ka ga lone mo letsatsing la katlholo." 
Matthew12:37 Gonne o tla kaiwa mosiami ka mafoko a gago, gongwe o tla bonwa molato ka mafoko a gago.”" 
Matthew12:38 Ke fa bangwe ba Baitsedikwalo le Bafarisai ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, re rata go bona sesupo mo go wena.”" 
Matthew12:39 A ba fetola a re: “Morafe o o bosula wa boaka o batla sesupo; ga o kitla o newa sesupo sepe, fa e se sesupo sa ga Jona moporofeti;" 
Matthew12:40 gonne Morwa-Motho o tla nna mo teng ga lefatshe malatsi a mararo le masigo a mararo jaaka Jona a kile a nna mo mpeng ya leruarua malatsi a mararo le masigo a mararo. 
Matthew12:41 Banna ba Ninife ba tla ema ka letsatsi la katlholo, ba na le batho ba kajeno, ba ba bona molato; gonne bone ba ne ba ikwatlhaya ka ntlha ya thero ya ga Jona; mme itseng gore yo o fetang Jona o fano." 
Matthew12:42 Kgosi ya sesadi ya kwa borwa e tla nanoga ka letsatsi la katlholo, e na le batho ba kajeno, e ba bona molato; gonne yona e ne ya tswa kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe, ya tla go utlwa botlhale jwa ga Salomo; mme itseng gore yo o fetang Salomo o fano." 
Matthew12:43 “Mowa o o itshekologileng, e a re fa o dule mo mothong, o ralale mafelo a a se nang metsi, o batle tapologo, mme o se ke o e bone." 
Matthew12:44 Jaanong o re: ‘Ke tla boela kwa ntlong ya me e ke duleng mo go yona.’ E re o tla, o fitlhele e se na ope, e feetswe, e kgabisitswe." 
Matthew12:45 Foo o ye, o itseele mewa e sele e e supang, e e bosula go o feta, e be e tsene, e age teng; mme morago motho yoo a nne bosula go feta pele. Le batho ba ba bosula ba, ba tla dirafalelwa ke tse di ntseng jalo.”" 
Matthew12:46 Ya re a sa ntse a bua le batho, mmaagwe le bomonnawe ba bo ba eme kwa ntle, ba batla go bua nae." 
Matthew12:47 Mongwe a mo raya a re: “Bona, mmaago le bomonnao ba eme kwa ntle, ba batla go bua nao.”" 
Matthew12:48 A fetola yo o mmoleletseng a re: “Mmê ke mang, le bonnake ke bomang?”" 
Matthew12:49 A ba a ntsha letsogo, a supa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Bonang, mmê le bonnake ke ba." 
Matthew12:50 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang go rata ga Rre yo o kwa magodimong, ke ene nnake le kgaitsadiake le mmê.”" 
Matthew13:1 Ka letsatsi leo Jesu a tswa mo ntlong a ya go nna fa letsheng. 
Matthew13:2 Jaanong ga phuthegela masomo a magolo a batho kwa go ene, mo o bileng a tsena mo mokorong, a nna teng; batho botlhe ba bo ba eme fa losing." 
Matthew13:3 Foo a bua dilo tse dintsi nabo ka ditshwantsho a re: “Reetsang, mojwadi o kile a ya go jwala." 
Matthew13:4 Ya re a ntse a jwala, ditlhaka dingwe tsa wela mo tseleng; mme dinonyane tsa tla, tsa di ja." 
Matthew13:5 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo lekgwaraneng fa go se nang mmu o montsi teng; tsa akofa tsa tlhaba, ka di se na mmu o o boteng." 
Matthew13:6 Ya re letsatsi le sena go tlhaba, tsa swaba; mme ya re ka medi e tlhoka boteng, tsa omelela." 
Matthew13:7 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mitlweng; mme mitlwa ya gola ya di hupetsa. 
Matthew13:8 Tse dingwe tsa wela mo mmung o o siameng, tsa ungwa, tse dingwe ga 100, tse dingwe ga 60, tse dingwe ga 30." 
Matthew13:9 “Yo o nang le ditsebe a a utlwe!” 
Matthew13:10 Jaanong barutwa ba tla, ba mmotsa ba re: “O buelang nabo ka ditshwantsho?”" 
Matthew13:11 A araba a re: “Ke ka gonne lona lo neilwe go itse masaitsiweng a puso ya magodimo; bone ga ba a go newa. 
Matthew13:12 Gonne yo o nang le sengwe o tla newa, mme o tla nna le letlotlo; mme yo o se nang sepe, le se o nang naso o tla se amogwa." 
Matthew13:13 Ke ka moo ke buang nabo ka ditshwantsho; gonne le fa ba bona, ga ba bone; le fa ba utlwa, ga ba utlwe, le e seng go tlhaloganya." 
Matthew13:14 Polelelopele ya ga Jesaya e a ba dirafalela e e reng: “ ‘Go utlwa lo tla utlwa, mme ga lo na go tlhaloganya; le go leba le tla leba, mme ga lo na go bona;" 
Matthew13:15 gonne dipelo tsa morafe oo di thatafetse, ba kabetse ditsebe, ba buduladitse matlho, e se re gongwe ba lemoga ka matlho, ba utlwa ka ditsebe, ba tlhaloganya ka dipelo, mme ba sokologa, ka ba fodisa.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Mme matlho a lona a sego, ka gonne a a bona, le ditsebe tsa lona, ka gonne di a utlwa." 
Matthew13:17 Gonne ka nnete ke lo raya ke re: Baporofeti le basiami ba le bantsi ba ne ba eletsa go bona tse lo di bonang, mme ba se ka ba di bona, le go utlwa tse lo di utlwang, mme ba se ka ba di utlwa." 
Matthew13:18 “Jaanong he, utlwang setshwantsho sa mojwadi:" 
Matthew13:19 E a re fa motho a utlwa Lefoko la puso, a sa le tlhaloganye, go tle yo-o-bosula, a phamole se se jwetsweng mo pelong ya gagwe; ke ene wa peo e e jwetsweng mo tseleng." 
Matthew13:20 Wa peo e e jwetsweng mo lekgwaraneng ke ene yo o utlwang Lefoko, a be a akofe a le tshole ka boitumelo." 
Matthew13:21 Mme ga a na modi ka kwa teng, ke wa sebakanyana fela; e re fa go tsoga patiko gongwe pogiso ka ntlha ya Lefoko, a akofe a kgopege." 
Matthew13:22 Wa peo e e jwetsweng mo mitlweng ke ene yo o utlwang Lefoko; mme tshwenyego ya metlha eno le tsietso ya khumo di hupetse Lefoko, le be le tlhoke leungo." 
Matthew13:23 Wa peo e e jwetsweng mo mmung o o siameng ke ene yo o utlwang Lefoko, a be a le tlhaloganye. Ke ene yo o ungwang, peo e nngwe e ungwe ga lekgolo, e nngwe ga 60, e nngwe ga 30.”" 
Matthew13:24 A ba ruta ka setshwantsho se sengwe a re: “Puso ya magodimo e tshwana le motho yo o kileng a jwala peo e e siameng mo tshimong ya gagwe. 
Matthew13:25 Mme ya re batho ba robetse, mmaba wa gagwe a tla, a jwala mhoka mo gare ga mabele, a ba a tloga." 
Matthew13:26 Ya re mabele a sena go gola le go tsala, mhoka le ona wa itshupa." 
Matthew13:27 Jaanong batlhanka ba mong wa ntlo ba tla, ba mo raya ba re: ‘Morena, a ga o a jwala peo e e siameng mo tshimong ya gago? Mme jaanong mhoka o tswa kae?’" 
Matthew13:28 A ba raya a re: ‘Ke mmaba yo o dirileng jalo.’ Batlhanka ba mo raya ba re: ‘Fa go le jalo, a o rata gore re ye go o putuka?’" 
Matthew13:29 Mme a re: ‘Nnyaya, e ka re gongwe fa lo putuka mhoka, lwa o kumolela le mabele." 
Matthew13:30 Lesang, go gole mmogo go ya thobong; e tla re ka nako ya thobo ke ree barobi ke re: Phuthang mhoka pele, lo o bofe dingata go o fisa; mabele ona lo a phuthele kwa difaleng tsa me.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 A ba bolelela ka setshwantsho se sengwe a re: “Puso ya magodimo e tshwana le tlhaka ya peo ya mmasetete e motho a e tsereng, a e jwala mo tshimong ya gagwe," 
Matthew13:32 e e leng potlana mo dipeong tsotlhe; mme e re e sena go gola, e nne kgolo go feta merogo, e nne setlhare, mo dinonyane tsa leapi di a beng di tle, di age dintlhaga mo dikaleng tsa sona.”" 
Matthew13:33 A boa a ba bolelela setshwantsho se sengwe gape a re: “Puso ya magodimo e tshwana le matlhabego a mosadi o a tsereng, a a tsenya mo bupeng jwa dielo di le tharo, jwa ba jwa bela jotlhe.”" 
Matthew13:34 Tsotlhe tseo Jesu a di bua le batho ka ditshwantsho; ga a ka a bua sepe nabo, fa e se ka ditshwantsho," 
Matthew13:35 gore go dirafale se se builweng ke moporofeti a re: “Ke tla tumolola molomo wa me ka ditshwantsho; ke tla bolela dilo tse di sa leng di fitlhwa go tswa tlholegong ya lefatshe.” 
Matthew13:36 Jaanong Jesu a tlogela batho, a tsena mo ntlong. Barutwa ba gagwe ba ya go ene ba re: “Re phuthololele setshwantsho sa mhoka wa tshimo.”" 
Matthew13:37 A araba a re: “Yo o jwalang peo e e siameng ke Morwa-Motho. 
Matthew13:38 Tshimo ke lefatshe; peo e e siameng ke bana ba puso; mhoka ke bana ba yo-o-bosula. 
Matthew13:39 Mmaba yo o o jwetseng ke Diabolo; thobo ke bokhutlo jwa lefatshe; barobi ke baengele. 
Matthew13:40 Jaanong go tla nna mo bokhutlong jwa lefatshe jaaka mhoka o phuthwa, o fisiwa ka molelo:" 
Matthew13:41 Morwa-Motho o tla roma baengele ba gagwe, ba tla phutha mo pusong ya gagwe botlhe ba ba kgopisang le ba ba dirang boikepo." 
Matthew13:42 Ba tla ba latlhela mo molelong o mogolo. Teng go tla nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno. 
Matthew13:43 Foo basiami ba tla phatsima jaaka letsatsi mo pusong ya ga Rraabo. Yo o nang le ditsebe go utlwa a a utlwe! 
Matthew13:44 “Gape, puso ya magodimo e tshwana le lohumo lo lo fitlhilweng mo tshimong lo motho o neng a lo bona, a ba a lo loba; mme ka go lo itumelela a ya a rekisa tsotlhe tse a nang natso, a reka tshimo eo." 
Matthew13:45 “Gape, puso ya magodimo e tshwana le moreki yo o batlang diperela tse dintle." 
Matthew13:46 Ya re a sena go bona perela nngwe e e tlhwatlhwa e kgolo, a ya a rekisa tsotlhe tse a nang natso, a e reka." 
Matthew13:47 “Gape, puso ya magodimo e tshwana le letloa le le digetsweng mo lewatleng, la gogoretsa mefuta yotlhe ya ditlhapi." 
Matthew13:48 Ya re le sena go tlala, ba le gogela kwa losing lwa lewatle; mme ba nna, ba tlhophela tse di siameng mo megopong, tse di sa jeweng ba di latlha." 
Matthew13:49 Go tla nna jalo mo bokhutlong jwa lefatshe; baengele ba tla tswa, ba tlhaola ba ba bosula mo go ba ba siameng." 
Matthew13:50 Ba tla ba latlhela mo molelong o mogolo; teng go tla nna selelo le phuranyo ya meno. 
Matthew13:51 “A lo tlhalogantse tsotlhe tseo?” Ba mo araba ba re: “Ee.” 
Matthew13:52 A ba raya a re: “Ka moo moitsedikwalo mongwe le mongwe yo o rutilweng tsa puso ya magodimo o tshwana le mong wa ntlo yo o ntshang tse dintšhwa le tse dikgologolo mo lohumong lwa gagwe.” 
Matthew13:53 Ya re Jesu a sena go wetsa ditshwantsho tseo, a tloga teng." 
Matthew13:54 E rile a fitlha kwa motseng wa ga gabo, a ba ruta mo senagogeng sa bone, mo ba bileng ba gakgamala ba re: “Yo, o tsere kae botlhale jo le dinonofo tse?" 
Matthew13:55 A ga se ene morwa mmetli? Mmaagwe a ga a bidiwe Maria le bomonnawe Jakobo le Josefa le Simone le Juta? 
Matthew13:56 Le bokgaitsadie a ga ba nne le rona botlhe? Jaanong tsotlhe tse o di tsaya kae?” 
Matthew13:57 Mme ba kgopisega ka ga gagwe. Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Moporofeti ga a ke a tlhoka tlotlo gope fa e se mo lefatsheng la ga gabo le mo ntlong ya ga gabo.” 
Matthew13:58 Mme a se ka a dira ditiro tsa nonofo tse dintsi teng ka ntlha ya go sa dumeleng ga bone. 
Matthew14:1 Metlheng eo kgosi Herote a utlwela tumo ka ga Jesu," 
Matthew14:2 a ba a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: “Yo, ke Johane Mokolobetsi; o tsogile mo baswing, ke ka moo dinonofo di itshupang mo go ene.”" 
Matthew14:3 Herote a re jalo, gonne o ne a tshwere Johane, a mo golega, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya ga Herodia, mosadi wa ga Filipo morwa-rraagwe." 
Matthew14:4 Gonne Johane o ne a mo reile a re: “Ga o a letlelelwa go nna nae.” 
Matthew14:5 Mme le fa a ne a rata go mmolaya, a boifa batho; gonne ba ne ba mo kaya moporofeti." 
Matthew14:6 E rile ka letsatsi la botsalo jwa ga Herote, morwadia Herodia a bina fa pele ga bone, a kgatlha Herote." 
Matthew14:7 Ke ka moo a mo solofetsang ka ikano go mo naya se a tla se kopang, le fe e ka nna eng." 
Matthew14:8 Mme ya re a sena go tlhotlhelediwa ke mmaagwe, a re: “Nnaya fano tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi ka mogopo.”" 
Matthew14:9 Jaanong kgosi ya hutsafala; mme ka ntlha ya maikano le ka ntlha ya ba ba ntseng nayo fa dijong ya laela gore a e newe. 
Matthew14:10 A ba a roma motlhanka go kgaola Johane tlhogo kwa ntlong ya kgolegelo. 
Matthew14:11 Mme tlhogo ya gagwe ya tsisiwa ka mogopo, ya newa morweetsana, mme ene a e isa kwa go mmaagwe." 
Matthew14:12 Barutwa ba gagwe ba tla, ba tsaya serepa, ba se fitlha, ba be ba tla ba bolelela Jesu." 
Matthew14:13 E rile a utlwa, a tloga teng ka mokoro, a ya a le nosi felong gongwe kwa sekakeng; mme ya re batho ba utlwa, ba mo latela ka dinao, ba tswa mo metseng." 
Matthew14:14 Ya re a tswa teng, a bona lesomo le legolo la batho, a ba tlhomogela pelo, a ba a fodisa balwetse ba bone." 
Matthew14:15 Ya re go le maitsiboa, barutwa ba gagwe ba ya go ene ba re: “Felo fa ke sekaka, mme lobaka lo setse lo fetile; naya batho tsela gore ba ye metsaneng, ba ithekele dijo.”" 
Matthew14:16 Mme Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ga go batlege gore ba tsamae; lona ba feng, ba je!”" 
Matthew14:17 Bone ba re: “Fano ga re na sepe, fa e se dinkgwe tse tlhano le ditlhapi tse pedi.”" 
Matthew14:18 Ene a re: “Di tsiseng kwano go nna!” 
Matthew14:19 Ya re a sena go laela batho go nna mo bojannye, a tsaya dinkgwe tse tlhano le ditlhapi tse pedi, a lelala kwa legodimong, a leboga, a nathoganya dinkgwe, a di neela barutwa, mme barutwa ba di abela batho." 
Matthew14:20 Ba ja botlhe, ba kgora, ba be ba sela masadisa, a tlala ditlatla di le 12." 
Matthew14:21 Ba ba jeleng e ka nna banna ba ba dikete tse tlhano, go sa balwe basadi le bana." 
Matthew14:22 Jaanong a akofa a kgola barutwa gore ba palame mokoro, ba mo etelele pele ba ye kwa moseja, ene a sa ntse a phatlalatsa batho." 
Matthew14:23 E rile a sena go naya batho tsela, a tlhatlogela kwa thabeng a le esi go rapela; ya re go le maitsiboa, a bo a le teng a le esi." 
Matthew14:24 Mme mokoro wa bo o setse o le mo gare ga letsha, o tshwenngwa ke makhubu; gonne ba ne ba tlhabaganye le phefo." 
Matthew14:25 Ya re ka tebelo ya bone ya bosigo a tla kwa go bone, a tsamaya mo godimo ga letsha." 
Matthew14:26 Ya re barutwa ba mmona a tsamaya mo godimo ga letsha, ba tshoga ba re: “Ke sedimo!” ba be ba kua ka ntlha ya poifo." 
Matthew14:27 Jesu a akofa a bua nabo a re: “Namatshegang! Ke nna, se boifeng!”" 
Matthew14:28 Petoro a mo araba a re: “Morena, fa e le wena, ntaolela gore ke tle go wena mo godimo ga metsi.”" 
Matthew14:29 Jesu a re: “Tlaya!” Petoro a fologa mo mokorong, a tsamaya mo godimo ga metsi, a ya kwa go Jesu." 
Matthew14:30 Mme ya re a bona phefo e e thata, a boifa, mme ka a simolola go nwela, a goa a re: “Morena, nkinola!”" 
Matthew14:31 Jesu a akofa a ntsha letsogo, a mo tshwara, a mo raya a re: “Wena yo o tumelo e potlana, o ne o belaelelang?”" 
Matthew14:32 Ya re ba sena go palama mokoro, phefo ya didimala." 
Matthew14:33 Mme ba ba mo mokorong ba mo obamela ba re: “Ammaaruri, o Morwa Modimo!”" 
Matthew14:34 Ya re ba sena go tshela, ba fitlha kwa lefatsheng la Genesareta." 
Matthew14:35 Ya re banna ba felo foo ba mo lemoga, ba romela mo tikologong eo yotlhe; ke fa batho ba tsisa ba ba lwalang go ene," 
Matthew14:36 ba mo rapela gore ba ame kola fela ya kobo ya gagwe; mme botlhe ba ba neng ba e ama ba fola. 
Matthew15:1 Jaanong ga tla go Jesu Bafarisai le Baitsedikwalo, ba tswa kwa Jerusalema ba re:" 
Matthew15:2 “Ke go reng, fa barutwa ba gago ba tlhokomologa ngwao ya bagolo? Ka gonne ga ba tlhape diatla, fa ba ja.”" 
Matthew15:3 Ene a ba araba a re: “Ke go reng, fa le lona lo tlola taolo ya Modimo ka ntlha ya ngwao ya lona?" 
Matthew15:4 Gonne Modimo o rile: ‘Tlotla rraago le mmaago.’ Gape wa re: ‘Yo o hutsang rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe, o na le go swa.’" 
Matthew15:5 Mme lona lo a re: ‘Fa motho a raya rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe a re: Se nka bong ke go thusa ka sona, se abetswe Modimo,’" 
Matthew15:6 ga go batlege gore a tlotle rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe ka gope. Lo dirolotse Lefoko la Modimo ka ntlha ya ngwao ya lona. 
Matthew15:7 Baikaketsi ke lona! Jesaya o boleletse pele sentle ka ga lona a re: 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Batho ba, ba ntlotla ka melomo, mme dipelo tsa bone di kgakala le nna." 
Matthew15:9 Mme ba nkobamelela lefela, ka ba ruta dithuto tse e leng ditaelo tsa batho.’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Jaanong a ipiletsa batho, a ba raya a re: “Utlwang lo tlhaloganye:" 
Matthew15:11 Se se tsenang ka legano ga se sona se se itshekololang motho; mme se se tswang ka molomo ke sona se se itshekololang motho.” 
Matthew15:12 Ke fa barutwa ba tla go ene, ba mo raya ba re: “A o itse gore e rile Bafarisai ba utlwa lefoko leo, ba kgopega?”" 
Matthew15:13 A araba a re: “Setlhatshana sengwe le sengwe se Rre wa legodimo o sa se tlhomang, se tla kumolwa ka medi." 
Matthew15:14 Ba leseng; ke difofu tse di gogang difofu. Mme fa sefofu se goga sefofu, di tla wela mmogo mo kgatamping.”" 
Matthew15:15 Petoro a mo fetola a re: “Re ranolele setshwantsho se.” 
Matthew15:16 Ene a re: “A le lona lo sa ntse lo tlhoka tlhaloganyo? 
Matthew15:17 A ga lo lemoge gore tsotlhe tse di tsenang ka legano di fetela mo mpeng, di be di ye go latlhelwa kwa ntle?" 
Matthew15:18 Mme tse di tswang ka molomo di tswa mo pelong; ke tsona tse di itshekololang motho; 
Matthew15:19 gonne mo pelong go tswa dikakanyo tse di bosula, e bong dipolao le tsa boikanyologo jwa banyalani le tsa boaka le tsa bogodu le ditshupo tsa maaka le dikgalo." 
Matthew15:20 Ke tsona tse di itshekololang motho. Mme go ja ka diatla tse di sa tlhapiwang ga go itshekolole motho.” 
Matthew15:21 Foo Jesu a tloga teng, a ya ntlheng ya Tiro le Sitone." 
Matthew15:22 Mme teng ga tla mosadi wa Mokanana wa naga eo, a goa a re: “Nkutlwela botlhoko, Morena, Morwa Dafita! Morwadiake o tshwenngwa thata ke modemone.”" 
Matthew15:23 Mme a se ka a mo araba ka lefoko lepe. Barutwa ba gagwe ba tla go ene, ba mo rapela ba re: “Dira gore a tsamae; gonne o re goeletsa morago.”" 
Matthew15:24 A fetola a re: “Ga ke a rongwa gope, fa e se kwa dinkung tse di latlhegileng tsa ntlo ya Iseraele.”" 
Matthew15:25 Ke fa mosadi a tla, a mo obamela a re: “Morena, nthusa!”" 
Matthew15:26 Jesu a araba a re: “Ga go a tshwanela go tsaya senkgwe sa bana go se latlhela dintšwanyana.” 
Matthew15:27 Ene a fetola a re: “Ee, Morena, gonne le tsona dintšwanyana di a tle di je matlhotlhora a a wang mo tafoleng ya beng ba tsona.”" 
Matthew15:28 Foo Jesu a mo araba a re: “Mosadi, tumelo ya gago e kgolo! A go go dirafalele ka fa o eletsang ka teng.” Mme morwadie a fola e sa le ka nako eo." 
Matthew15:29 Jesu a tloga teng, a ya fa letsheng la Galelea, a ba a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a nna teng." 
Matthew15:30 Foo ga tla go ene masomo a magolo a batho, ba na le batlhotsi le digole le difofu le dimumu le balwetse ba bangwe ba le bantsi, ba ba baya fa dinaong tsa gagwe, mme a ba fodisa," 
Matthew15:31 mo batho ba bileng ba gakgamala, ka ba bona dimumu di bua, le digole di fodile, le batlhotsi ba tsamaya, le difofu di bona, ba be ba galaletsa Modimo wa Iseraele." 
Matthew15:32 Foo Jesu a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Ke tlhomogela batho ba pelo, ka gonne ba setse ba tlhotse le nna malatsi a mararo, ba se na se ba ka se jang. Mme ga ke rate go ba phatlalatsa ka tlala, e se re gongwe ba felelwa ke thata mo tseleng.”" 
Matthew15:33 Barutwa ba mo raya ba re: “Re ka bona kae dinkgwe mono sekakeng, tse di ka lekanang go kgorisa bontsi jo bo kanakana?”" 
Matthew15:34 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae?” Ba re: “Di a supa, le ditlhatswana di se kae.”" 
Matthew15:35 Ya re a sena go laela batho gore ba nne fa fatshe," 
Matthew15:36 a tsaya dinkgwe tse di supang le ditlhapi, a leboga, a di nathoganya, a di neela barutwa, mme barutwa ba di abela batho." 
Matthew15:37 Ba be ba ja botlhe, ba a kgora; ba sela masadisa, a tlala diroto tse di supang." 
Matthew15:38 Ba ba jeleng e ne e le banna ba ba dikete tse nne, go sa balwe basadi le bana." 
Matthew15:39 Ya re a sena go naya batho tsela, a palama mokoro, a ya kwa nageng ya Magatala." 
Matthew16:1 Jaanong Bafarisai le Basadukai ba tla go ene, ba mo raela, ba mo kopa gore a ba supetse sesupo se se tswang legodimong." 
Matthew16:2 Mme a ba fetola a re: “E a re fa go le maitsiboa, lo re: ‘Go tla tsoga go anogile; gonne legodimo le lehibidu.’" 
Matthew16:3 E re mo mosong lo re: ‘Go tla tlhola go le letlololo; gonne legodimo le lehibidu le bontsho.’ Fa e le ponalo ya legodimo, lo itse go e farologanya; mme ditshupo tsa dipaka tsona, a di a lo palela?" 
Matthew16:4 Morafe o o bosula wa boaka o batla sesupo; mme ga o kitla o newa sesupo sepe, fa e se sesupo sa ga Jona.” Mme a ba tlogela foo, a tsamaya." 
Matthew16:5 E rile barutwa ba fitlha kwa moseja, ba bo ba lebetse go tsaya dinkgwe." 
Matthew16:6 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlhokomelang, lo bo lo itise mo matlhabegong a Bafarisai le a Basadukai!”" 
Matthew16:7 Jaanong ba gopotsanya ba re: “O raya ka gore ga re a tsaya dinkgwe.” 
Matthew16:8 Mme Jesu a itse, a ba raya a re: “Lona ba tumelo e potlana, ke eng fa lo gopotsanya gore ke ka gonne lo se na dinkgwe?" 
Matthew16:9 A ga lo ise lo lemoge sepe, le fa e le go gakologelwa dinkgwe tse tlhano tsa ba ba dikete tse tlhano le ditlatla di le kae tse lo di bonyeng?" 
Matthew16:10 Le fa e le dinkgwe tse di supang tsa ba ba dikete tse nne le diroto di le kae tse lo di bonyeng? 
Matthew16:11 Ke ka ntlhang fa lo sa lemoge gore ke ne ke sa bue le lona ka ga dinkgwe? Mme ka re: Itiseng mo matlhabegong a Bafarisai le a Basadukai!” 
Matthew16:12 Ke fa ba tlhaloganya gore o ne a sa ree go itisa mo matlhabegong a senkgwe, mme a raya thuto ya Bafarisai le ya Basadukai." 
Matthew16:13 E rile Jesu a fitlha mo ntlheng ya Kaisarea-Filipi, a botsa barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Batho ba re, Morwa-Motho ke mang?”" 
Matthew16:14 Ba re: “Bangwe ba re, ke Johane Mokolobetsi; ba bangwe ba re, ke Elia; ba bangwe gape ba re, ke Jeremia gongwe yo mongwe wa baporofeti.”" 
Matthew16:15 A ba a ba botsa a re: “Mme lona lo a re, nna ke mang?”" 
Matthew16:16 Simone Petoro a araba a re: “O Keresete Morwa Modimo o o phelang.” 
Matthew16:17 Mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “O sego, Simone, morwa Jona; ka gonne ga se nama le madi tse di go senoletseng moo, mme ke Rre yo o kwa magodimong." 
Matthew16:18 E bile ke go raya ke re: O Petoro, mme ke tla aga phuthego ya me mo lefikeng le; mme dikgoro tsa felo ga baswi ga di kitla di e fenya." 
Matthew16:19 Ke tla be ke go neele dilotlele tsa puso ya magodimo; sengwe le sengwe se o tla se bofang mo lefatsheng, se tla bo se bofilwe kwa magodimong; mme se o tla se bofololang mo lefatsheng, se tla bo se bofolotswe kwa magodimong.”" 
Matthew16:20 Jaanong a laya barutwa ba gagwe gore ba se ka ba bolela ope, fa ene e le Keresete." 
Matthew16:21 Go tloga foo Jesu Keresete a simolola go sedimosetsa barutwa ba gagwe gore o tshwanetse go ya kwa Jerusalema, le go bogisiwa ka tse dintsi ke bagolo ba morafe le baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo, le go bolawa, le go tsosiwa ka letsatsi la boraro." 
Matthew16:22 Petoro a mo tseela kwa thoko, a simolola go mo kgalemela a re: “Morena, a Modimo o thibele moo! Go se ka ga go dirafalela jalo!”" 
Matthew16:23 Mme Jesu a retologa, a raya Petoro a re: “Ntlogele ò mpote morago, Satane! O sekgopi mo go nna; gonne ga ò gopole tsa Modimo, ò gopola tsa batho.”" 
Matthew16:24 Ke fa Jesu a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Fa mongwe a rata go ntshala morago, a a itlogele, a sikare sefapaano sa gagwe, a ntshale morago;" 
Matthew16:25 gonne yo o ratang go boloka bophelo jwa gagwe o tla latlhegelwa ke jona; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke bophelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me o tla bo bona. 
Matthew16:26 Gonne motho go ka mo thusang, le fa a ka bapala lefatshe lotlhe, mme a senyegelwa ke bophelo jwa gagwe jwa nnete? Gongwe motho o ka ntsha eng go nna segololo sa bophelo jwa gagwe?" 
Matthew16:27 Kana Morwa-Motho o tla tla ka kgalalelo ya ga Rraagwe, a na le baengele ba gagwe; mme foo o tla busetsa mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditirong tsa gagwe." 
Matthew16:28 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Go na le bangwe ba bone ba ba emeng fa, ba ba se kitlang ba utlwa loso ka gope ba ise ba bone Morwa-Motho a tla ka puso ya gagwe.”" 
Matthew17:1 Morago ga malatsi a marataro Jesu a tsaya Petoro le Jakobo le Johane, morwa-rraagwe, a tlhatlogela nabo mo thabeng e e kwa godimo ba le bosi." 
Matthew17:2 Foo a fetoga setshwano fa pele ga bone; sefatlhego sa gagwe sa phatsima jaaka letsatsi, diaparo tsa gagwe tsa nna ditshweu jaaka lesedi." 
Matthew17:3 Ke fa Moše le Elia ba bonala fa go bone, ba bua nae." 
Matthew17:4 Mme Petoro a simolola go bua, a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, go monate mo go rona go nna fano; fa ò rata, ke tla dira metlaagana e meraro fano, o mongwe e nne wa gago, o mongwe wa ga Moše, o mongwe wa ga Elia.”" 
Matthew17:5 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, leru le le lesedi la ba ritifalela ka tshoganyetso, le lentswe la tswa mo lerung la re: “Yoo ke Morwaake yo o rategang, yo ke mo itumelelang; mo utlweng!”" 
Matthew17:6 Ya re barutwa ba le utlwa, ba wela fa fatshe ka difatlhego, ba boifa segolo." 
Matthew17:7 Foo Jesu a tla, a ba ama a re: “Tsogang, se boifeng!”" 
Matthew17:8 Ya re ba tsholetsa matlho, ba se ka ba bona ope, fa e se Jesu a le esi." 
Matthew17:9 Ya re ba fologa mo thabeng, Jesu a ba laela a re: “Lo se ka lwa bolelela ope pono e, go tsamaya Morwa-Motho a tsosiwe mo baswing.”" 
Matthew17:10 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa ba re: “Ke go reng, fa Baitsedikwalo ba re, Elia o tshwanetse go tla pele?”" 
Matthew17:11 Mme a araba a re: “Ka nnete Elia o e tla, o tla tsosolosa tsotlhe." 
Matthew17:12 Mme ke lo raya ke re: Elia o setse a tsile, mme ga ba a ka ba mo itse, ba dirile ka ene ka fa ba ratileng ka teng. Morwa-Motho le ene ba tla mmogisa jalo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Ke fa barutwa ba gagwe ba tlhaloganya gore o bua nabo ka ga Johane Mokolobetsi. 
Matthew17:14 E rile ba sena go fitlha kwa bathong, ga tla motho mongwe kwa go ene, a mo khubamela a re:" 
Matthew17:15 “Morena, utlwela morwaake botlhoko; gonne o a karalala, o bogisega thata; ke gantsi a wela mo molelong le gantsi mo metsing." 
Matthew17:16 Ke ne ke mo tlisitse kwa barutweng ba gago, mme ba paletswe ke go mo fodisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Jesu a fetola a re: “A batho ba ba sa dumeleng, ba ba kgopo! Kana ke tla nna le lona go fitlhelela leng? Ke tla lo itshokela goleele go le kae? Mo tsiseng kwano go nna!”" 
Matthew17:18 Foo Jesu a kgalemela modemone, wa tswa mo go ene, mme mosimane a fola e sa le ka nako eo." 
Matthew17:19 Jaanong barutwa ba tla kwa go Jesu kwa thoko ba re: “Ke go reng, fa rona re reteletswe ke go o kgarameletsa ntle?”" 
Matthew17:20 A ba raya a re: “Ke ka gore lo tlhoka tumelo; gonne ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Fa lo na le tumelo, le fa e le e e kana ka tlhaka ya peo ya mmasetete fela, lo ka raya thaba e lo a re: ‘Tloga fa, o ye fale!’ mme e tla ya, go se na sepe se se ka lo palelang." 
Matthew17:21 Mme mofuta o ga o tswe, fa e se ka thapelo le ka go itima dijo.”" 
Matthew17:22 Ya re ba ntse ba kopana mo Galelea, Jesu a ba raya a re: “Morwa-Motho o tla neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho." 
Matthew17:23 Ba tla mmolaya; mme o tla tsosiwa ka letsatsi la boraro.” Foo ba hutsafala thata. 
Matthew17:24 E rile ba sena go fitlha kwa Kaperenaume, ba ba amogelang lekgetho la Tempele ba tla kwa go Petoro ba re: “A moruti wa lona ga a ntshe lekgetho la Tempele?”" 
Matthew17:25 Ene a re: “Nnyaya, o a le ntsha.” Ya re a tsena mo ntlong, Jesu a mo raka ka puo a re: “O gopolang, Simone? Dikgosi tsa lefatshe di amogela makgetho a kgwebo gongwe a tlhogo ya motho mo go bomang? A ke mo go bomorwaa-tsona gongwe mo bathong ba bangwe?”" 
Matthew17:26 Mme ya re a re: “Mo bathong ba bangwe,” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fa go le jalo, bomorwa ba gololesegile." 
Matthew17:27 Le gale a re se ba kgopise; yaa kwa letsheng, ò latlhele kobe mo teng, mme tlhapi e ò e tshwarang pele, o e tsee, ò e atlhamolose; ò tla fitlhela ledi la selefera; le tsee, ò le ba neele, e nne lekgetho la me le la gago.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ka nako eo barutwa ba ne ba tla go Jesu ba re: “Yo mogolo mo pusong ya magodimo ke mang?” 
Matthew18:2 Foo a ipiletsa ngwana, a mmaya mo gare ga bone" 
Matthew18:3 a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Fa lo sa fetoge, lwa nna jaaka bana, ga lo ka ke lwa tsena mo pusong ya magodimo ka gope." 
Matthew18:4 Ka moo, mongwe le mongwe yo o tla ingotlang jaaka ngwana yo, ke ene yo mogolo mo pusong ya magodimo." 
Matthew18:5 Yo o tsholang ngwana mongwe yo o ntseng jalo ka leina la me, o tshola nna." 
Matthew18:6 “Mme yo o kgopisang mongwe wa ba babotlana ba, ba ba dumelang mo go nna, go molemo mo go ene gore lelwala le legolo le golegelelwe mo molaleng wa gagwe, a be a nwediwe mo botennye jwa lewatle." 
Matthew18:7 Ijoo lefatshe ka ntlha ya dikgopiso! Dikgopiso di tshwanetse go tla; fela a tatlhego ya motho wee yo kgopiso e tlang ka ene! 
Matthew18:8 “Fa seatla gongwe lonao lwa gago lo go kgopisa, o di kgaole, o di latlhe; go molemo mo go wena go tsena mo bophelong o le segole gongwe setlhotsa, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo molelong o o sa khutleng, o na le diatla tse pedi gongwe dinao tse pedi." 
Matthew18:9 Gape fa leitlho la gago le go kgopisa, o le gonye, o le latlhe; go molemo mo go wena go tsena mo bophelong o le moitlho, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo moleteng wa molelo, o na le matlho a mabedi." 
Matthew18:10 “Itiseng gore lo se nyatse ope wa ba babotlana ba; gonne ke lo raya ke re: Baengele ba bone kwa magodimong ba bona ka gale sefatlhego sa ga Rre yo o kwa magodimong. 
Matthew18:11 Gonne Morwa-Motho o tsile go pholosa se se latlhegileng. 
Matthew18:12 “Lo gopolang? Fa motho mongwe a na le dinku di le lekgolo, mme nngwe ya tsona e timela, a ga ke re o tla tlogela tse di 99 kwa dithabeng, a ya go batla e e timetseng?" 
Matthew18:13 Mme fa a ka e bona, ruri, ke lo raya ke re: O tla itumelela bogolo go tse di 99 tse di se kang tsa timela." 
Matthew18:14 Fela jalo le ene Rraeno yo o kwa magodimong ga a rate gore ope wa ba babotlana ba a latlhege. 
Matthew18:15 “Fa mokaulengwe wa gago a go leofela, yaa ò mo kgalemele, lo le babedi fela. Fa a ka go utlwa, ò tla bo o iponetse mokaulengwe." 
Matthew18:16 Fa a sa utlwe, tsaya mongwe gongwe babedi nao gore lefoko lengwe le lengwe le tlhomamisiwe ka melomo ya basupi ba babedi gongwe ba bararo." 
Matthew18:17 Fa a gana go ba utlwa, o bolelele phuthego; fa a gana go utlwa le yona phuthego, a nne jaaka moheitane le mokgethisi mo go wena." 
Matthew18:18 “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Sengwe le sengwe se lo tla se bofang mo lefatsheng, se tla bo se bofilwe kwa legodimong; le se lo tla se bofololang mo lefatsheng, se tla bo se bofolotswe kwa legodimong." 
Matthew18:19 “Gape ke lo raya ke re: Fa ba le babedi ba lona ba ka dumalana mo lefatsheng ka ga sengwe se ba tla se kopang, le fa e ka nna eng, ba tla se direlwa ke Rre yo o kwa magodimong;"
