Mark5:13 A e letlelela. Jaanong mewa e e itshekologileng ya tswa, ya tsena mo dikolobeng, mme motlhape wa kgokologela ka fa makgotlhong mo letsheng, e ka nna di le 2 000, tsa betwa mo metsing." 
Mark5:14 Badisa ba tsona ba tshaba, ba bolela mo motseng le mo nageng. Batho ba tla go bona se se dirafetseng." 
Mark5:15 Ba tla kwa go Jesu, ba bona yo o ne a tsenywe ke medemone, a ntse fa fatshe, a apesitswe, a na le tlhaloganyo, e bong ene yo o neng a na le Mophato; mme ba boifa." 
Mark5:16 Ba ba bonyeng ba ba bolelela ka fa go dirafaletseng yo o neng a tsenywe ke medemone ka teng le ka ga dikolobe. 
Mark5:17 Ba be ba simolola go rapela Jesu gore a tloge mo dinageng tsa bone. 
Mark5:18 Ya re a tsena mo mokorong, yo o ne a tsenywe ke medemone a mo rapela gore a nne nae." 
Mark5:19 Mme Jesu a se ka a mo letlelela, mme a mo raya a re: “Yaa kwa ntlong ya gago kwa go ba ga eno, o ba bolele dilo tse dikgolo tse Morena a di go diretseng, fa a go utlwela botlhoko.”" 
Mark5:20 Yoo a ya a simolola go tumisa mo nageng ya Metse-e-e-lesome dilo tse dikgolo, tse Jesu a di mo diretseng; mme botlhe ba gakgamala." 
Mark5:21 E rile Jesu a sena go tshelela gape kwa moseja ka mokoro, batho ba bantsi ba phuthegela kwa go ene, a le fa letsheng." 
Mark5:22 Jaanong ga tla mongwe wa bagolo ba senagoge yo leina la gagwe e leng Jairo. Ya re a mmona, a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe," 
Mark5:23 a mo rapela thata a re: “Morwadiake yo monnye o gaufi le go swa; a ò ko o tle, o mmee diatla gore a fole, a phele.”" 
Mark5:24 A tloga nae, batho ba bantsi ba mo sala morago, ba mo pitlaganya." 
Mark5:25 Jaanong mosadi yo o sa leng a bolawa ke madi dinyaga di le 12," 
Mark5:26 mme a bogile thata mo dingakeng tse dintsi, a bile a feletswe ke tsotlhe tse a neng a na natso, a sa bona thusego epe, mme bolwetse bo ntse bo atela pele;" 
Mark5:27 ya re a utlwa ka ga Jesu, a mo tla kwa morago a le mo gare ga batho, a ama seaparo sa gagwe." 
Mark5:28 Gonne o ne a dumela gore fa nka ama le fa e le diaparo tsa gagwe fela, ke tla fola." 
Mark5:29 Ke fa kelelo ya madi a gagwe e kgala ka bonako, a ikutlwa mo mmeleng, fa a fodisitswe botlhoko jwa gagwe." 
Mark5:30 Jesu a akofa a itemoga, fa thata e dule mo go ene; a ba a retologa mo bathong a re: “Ke mang yo o amileng diaparo tsa me?”" 
Mark5:31 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “O a bona, fa bontsi bo go pitlagantse, mme ò a re: ‘Ke mang yo o nkamileng?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Jesu a batlisisa go bona yo o dirileng jalo. 
Mark5:33 Jaanong mosadi a boifa, a roroma, ka a itse se se mo dirafaletseng, a tla a wela fa pele ga gagwe, a mmolelela boammaaruri jotlhe." 
Mark5:34 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Morwadiaka, tumelo ya gago e go thusitse; tsamaya ka kagiso, ò folele ruri botlhoko jwa gago.”" 
Mark5:35 Ya re a sa ntse a bua, ga tla ba bangwe ba tswa kwa ntlong ya mogolo wa senagoge ba re: “Morwadio o sule; o sa tshwenyetsang Moruti?”" 
Mark5:36 Ya re Jesu a utlwa lefoko le le buiwang, a raya mogolo wa senagoge a re: “Se boife, dumela fela.”" 
Mark5:37 A se ka a letlela ope go mo sala morago, fa e se Petoro le Jakobo le Johane, morwa-rraagwe Jakobo." 
Mark5:38 Jaanong ba fitlha kwa ntlong ya mogolo wa senagoge; a bona khuduego, le ba ba lelang, ba goa thata." 
Mark5:39 Ke fa a tsena, a ba raya a re: “Lo huduegelang, lo lela? Ngwana ga a a swa, o robetse.”" 
Mark5:40 Mme ba mo tshega. Ya re a sena go ba ntshetsa botlhe kwa ntle, a tsaya rra-ngwana le mmaagwe, le ba ba nang nae, a ba a tsena kwa ngwana a leng teng." 
Mark5:41 A tshwara seatla sa ngwana, a mo raya a re: “Talita khumi!” Fa go fetolwa ke go re: “Mosetsana, ke go raya ke re: Tsoga!”" 
Mark5:42 Mme ka bonako mosetsana a tsoga, a tsamaya. O ne a na le dinyaga di le 12. Ba akofa ba gakgamala ka kgakgamalo e e fetisang." 
Mark5:43 Jesu a ba laela thata gore go se ka ga itse ope; a ba a re, ngwana a fiwe dijo." 
Mark6:1 Jesu a tloga teng, a ya kwa motseng wa ga gabo; barutwa ba gagwe ba mo sala morago." 
Mark6:2 E rile ka Sabata a simolola go ruta mo senagogeng; mme ba le bantsi, ya re ba utlwa, ba gakgamala ba re: “Yo, dilo tseo o di tsere kae, le botlhale jo o bo neilweng ke jo bo ntseng jang? Kana ditiro tsa thata tse a di dirang ka diatla tsa gagwe di kana kang!" 
Mark6:3 A yo ga se ene mmetli, morwa Maria, mogoloa boJakobo le Josefa le Juta le Simone? Le bokgaitsadie a ga ba nne le rona mono?” Ba be ba kgopisega ka ga gagwe." 
Mark6:4 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Moporofeti ga a nke a nyatsega gope, fa e se mo lefatsheng la ga gabo le mo lapeng la ga gabo.”" 
Mark6:5 Mme a palelwa ke go dira tiro ya kgakgamatso teng, fa e se go baya balwetse ba se kae diatla le go ba fodisa." 
Mark6:6 A gakgamalela go sa dumeleng ga bone. Jaanong a ralala metsana e e mo tikologong, a ntse a ruta." 
Mark6:7 Ya baa gona a ipiletsang ba ba 12, a simolola go ba roma ka bobedi le bobedi, a ba naya thata mo meweng e e itshekologileng." 
Mark6:8 A ba laela gore ba se ka ba tseela leeto sepe, fa e se tsamma fela; e seng senkgwe, le fa e le kgwatlha, le fa e le madi mo moitlamong." 
Mark6:9 Ba rwale ditlhako, mme ba se ka ba apara dikobo di le pedi." 
Mark6:10 A ba raya a re: “Gongwe le gongwe kwa lo tsenang mo ntlong teng, lo nne gona go tsamae lo tloge teng." 
Mark6:11 Mme gongwe le gongwe kwa lo sa tsholweng teng, ba sa lo utlwe, e re lo tswa teng, lo itlhotlhore lorole lo lo fa tlase ga dinao tsa lona, go nna tshupo mo go bone.”" 
Mark6:12 Ba bolola, ba rera gore batho ba tlhabologe." 
Mark6:13 Ba kgarameletsa medemone e mentsi ntle, ba tshasa balwetse ba bantsi lookwane, ba ba fodisa." 
Mark6:14 Kgosi Herote a utlwa ka ga Jesu; gonne leina la gagwe le ne le itsege. Mme a re: “Johane Mokolobetsi o tsogile mo baswing, ke ka moo dithata di itshupang mo go ene.”" 
Mark6:15 Ba bangwe ba re: “Ke Elia.” Ba bangwe ba re: “Ke moporofeti jaaka mongwe wa baporofeti.” 
Mark6:16 Mme Herote, ya re a utlwa, a re: “Ke ene Johane yo ke mo kgaotseng tlhogo; o tsogile.”" 
Mark6:17 Herote o ne a romile go tshwara Johane, a mo golega mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya ga Herodia, mosadi wa ga Filipo morwa-rraagwe; ka gonne o ne a mo nyetse." 
Mark6:18 Gonne Johane o ne a reile Herote a re: “Ga o a letlelelwa go nna le mosadi wa ga morwa-rraago.” 
Mark6:19 Mme Herodia a mo tlhoa, a batla go mmolaya, mme a palelwa;" 
Mark6:20 gonne Herote o ne a boifa Johane, ka a itse gore ke monna yo o siameng, yo o boitshepo; a ba a mo sireletsa. E ne ya re fa a mo utlwa, a akabale thata, mme a rate go mo utlwa." 
Mark6:21 E rile go tla letsatsi le le lebanyeng, e leng la botsalo jwa ga Herote, le a direlang dikgosana tsa gagwe le balaodi-ba-sekete le batlotlegi ba Galelea moletlo ka lone," 
Mark6:22 morwadia Herodia a tsena, a bina, a kgatlha Herote le ba ba ntseng nae fa dijong. Mme kgosi ya raya morweetsana ya re: “Nkopa se o se ratang, le fa e ka nna eng, ke tla se go naya.”" 
Mark6:23 A ba a mo ikanela a re: “Se o tla se nkopang ke tla se go naya, le fa e ka nna bontlhanngwe jwa puso ya me.”" 
Mark6:24 Mosetsana a tswa, a botsa mmaagwe a re: “Nka kopang?” Ene a re: “Tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi.”" 
Mark6:25 A tsena ka bonako, a itlhaganelela kwa kgosing, a kopa a re: “Ke rata gore o nnee tlhogo ya ga Johane Mokolobetsi e sa le jaanong ka mogopo.”" 
Mark6:26 Kgosi ya hutsafala thata, mme ka ntlha ya maikano le ka ntlha ya ba ba ntseng nayo fa dijong ya se ka ya rata go gana kopo ya gagwe." 
Mark6:27 Kgosi ya akofa ya roma motlhabani, ya laola gore a tsise tlhogo ya gagwe; a ya, a mo kgaola tlhogo mo ntlong ya kgolegelo," 
Mark6:28 a e tlisa ka mogopo, a e naya morweetsana, mme morweetsana a e naya mmaagwe." 
Mark6:29 Ya re barutwa ba gagwe ba utlwa, ba tla ba tsaya serepa sa gagwe, ba ya go se fitlha mo lebitleng." 
Mark6:30 Jaanong baapostolo ba phuthegela kwa go Jesu, ba mmolelela tsotlhe tse ba di dirileng le tse ba di rutileng." 
Mark6:31 Mme a ba raya a re: “Tlaang lona lo le losi, a re yeng kwa felong fa go senya, lo ikhutse go le gonnye.” A re jalo ka gonne go ne go le ba bantsi ba ba tlang le ba ba tlogang, e bile ba se na sebaka, le fa e le sa go ja." 
Mark6:32 Ke fa ba tloga ka mokoro, ba ya kwa thoko kwa felong gongwe fa go senya." 
Mark6:33 Mme ba bantsi ba ba bona ba tsamaya, ba ba lemoga, ba taboga ka dinao ba tswa kwa metseng yotlhe, ba phuthegela teng, ba ba raka." 
Mark6:34 Ya re Jesu a fologa, a ba bona e le bontsi jo bogolo, a ba tlhomogela pelo, ka ba ntse jaaka dinku tse di se nang modisa. A ba a simolola go ba ruta dilo tse dintsi." 
Mark6:35 Ya re letsatsi le setse le ngotlegile, barutwa ba gagwe ba ya go ene ba re: “Felo fa ke sekaka, le letsatsi le setse le ngotlegile." 
Mark6:36 Ba phatlalatse gore ba ye kwa merakeng le kwa metsaneng tikologong, ba ithekele se ba ka se jang.”" 
Mark6:37 A ba araba a re: “A ba fiwe ke lona, ba je!” Ba mo raya ba re: “A ò raya gore re ye go reka dinkgwe tsa diranta di le 20, re tle go ba fa, ba je?”" 
Mark6:38 A ba raya a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae? Yaang lo bone!” Ya re ba sena go bona, ba mo raya ba re: “Di tlhano le ditlhapi tse pedi.”" 
Mark6:39 Jaanong a ba laela gore ba nne botlhe mo bojannye jo botala ka masomo. 
Mark6:40 Ba nna fatshe e le ditlhopha tsa ba makgolo le ba masome a matlhano. 
Mark6:41 Foo a tsaya dinkgwe tse tlhano le ditlhapi tse pedi, a lelala legodimong, a leboga, a nathoganya dinkgwe, a di neela barutwa gore ba di ba bee pele; le ditlhapi tse pedi a di kgaoganyetsa botlhe." 
Mark6:42 Mme ba ja botlhe, ba kgora," 
Mark6:43 ba ba ba sela masadisa, a tlala ditlatla di le 12, le a ditlhapi." 
Mark6:44 Ba ba jeleng dinkgwe e ne e le banna ba ba dikete tse tlhano. 
Mark6:45 Jaanong a akofa a kgola barutwa ba gagwe go palama mokoro le go mo etelela pele kwa moseja kwa Betsaita, ene a sa ntse a phatlalatsa batho." 
Mark6:46 Ya re a sena go kgaogana nabo, a ya kwa thabeng go rapela." 
Mark6:47 Ya re go le maitsiboa, mokoro wa bo o le fa gare ga letsha, ene a le esi kwa lefatsheng." 
Mark6:48 A ba bona ba tshwere bothata ka go tsamaisa mokoro; gonne ba ne ba tlhabaganye le phefo. A tla kwa go bone, e ka ne e le ka tebelo ya bone bosigo, a tsamaya mo godimo ga letsha; a ba a rata go ba feta." 
Mark6:49 Ya re ba mmona a tsamaya mo godimo ga letsha, ba itlhoma e le sedimo, mme ba kua." 
Mark6:50 Gonne ba ne ba mmona botlhe, ba be ba tshoga. Mme a akofa a bua nabo, a ba raya a re: “Namatshegang! Ke nna: se boifeng!”" 
Mark6:51 A ba a tsena kwa go bone mo mokorong, phefo ya ba ya khutla; mme ba tseana thata thata." 
Mark6:52 Gonne ba ne ba sa rutega ka dinkgwe, dipelo tsa bone di ne di thatafetse." 
Mark6:53 Ya re ba sena go tshelela kwa lefatsheng, ba fitlha kwa Genesareta, ba be ba gokelela mokoro." 
Mark6:54 Ya re ba fologa mo mokorong, batho ba akofa ba mo lemoga," 
Mark6:55 ba taboga le lefatshe leo lotlhe, ba simolola go rwalela balwetse ka malao kwa ba mo utlwelang teng." 
Mark6:56 Le gongwe le gongwe kwa a tsenang teng, mo metsaneng gongwe mo metseng gongwe mo merakeng, ba baya balwetse mo patlelong, ba mo rapela gore ba ke ba ame le fa e ka bo e le kola ya seaparo sa gagwe fela, mme botlhe ba ba mo amileng ba fola." 
Mark7:1 Jaanong Bafarisai le bangwe ba Baitsedikwalo ba phuthegela kwa go ene, ba tswa Jerusalema." 
Mark7:2 Ya re ba bona gore bangwe ba barutwa ba gagwe ba ja dijo ka diatla tse di sa itshekang, ke go re tse di sa tlhapiwang, ba ba bona molato." 
Mark7:3 Gonne Bafarisai le Bajuta botlhe ga ba ke ba ja, ba sa tlhapa diatla sentle, ka ba tshegetsa ngwao ya bagolo." 
Mark7:4 E a re fa ba tswa kwa marekelong, ba se ke ba je, fa ba sa itsokotsa diatla. E bile go na le tse dintsi tse dingwe tse ba di amogetseng go di tshegetsa, jaaka go tlhatswa dinwelo le dipitsana le dijana tsa kgotlho le malao." 
Mark7:5 Ka moo Bafarisai le Baitsedikwalo ba mmotsa ba re: “Ke go reng, fa barutwa ba gago ba sa tshele ka fa ngwaong ya bagolo, ba ja senkgwe ka diatla tse di sa itshekang?”" 
Mark7:6 Mme a ba araba a re: “Jesaya o boleletse pele sentle ka ga lona baitimokanyi, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: “ ‘Morafe o, o ntlotla ka melomo, mme dipelo tsa bone di kgakala le nna." 
Mark7:7 Mme ba nkobamelela lefela, ka ba ruta dithuto tse e leng ditaolo tsa batho fela.’" 
Mark7:8 “Lo tlogela taolo ya Modimo, lo tlhokomela ngwao ya batho.”" 
Mark7:9 A ba a ba raya a re: “Lo itse sentle go dirolola taolo ya Modimo, lo tle lo tshegetse ngwao ya lona." 
Mark7:10 Gonne Moše o rile: ‘Tlotla rraago le mmaago’; a ba a re: ‘Yo o hutsang rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe o na le go swa.’ 
Mark7:11 Mme lona lo a re: ‘Fa motho a raya rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe a re: Se o ka bong o thusiwa ke nna ka sona ke Korban,’ ke go re, se abetswe Modimo," 
Mark7:12 ga a tlhole a letlelelwa go direla rraagwe gongwe mmaagwe sepe. 
Mark7:13 Lo dirolola Lefoko la Modimo ka ngwao ya lona e lo e beileng; le tse dingwe tse dintsi tse di ntseng jalo lo a di dira.” 
Mark7:14 Ya re a sena go ipiletsa bontsi gape, a ba raya a re: “Ntheetsang lotlhe, lo tlhaloganye!" 
Mark7:15 Ga go na sepe se se tswang kwa ntle ga motho, se se ka mo itshekololang ka go tsena mo go ene; tse di tswang mo mothong ke tsona tse di mo itshekololang." 
Mark7:16 Fa mongwe a na le ditsebe go utlwa, a a utlwe!”" 
Mark7:17 E rile a sena go tsena mo ntlong, a tlogetse bontsi, barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa ka ga setshwantsho seo." 
Mark7:18 A ba raya a re: “A e ntse jaana le lona ga lo na tlhaloganyo? A ga lo lemoge gore sengwe le sengwe se se tsenang mo mothong se tswa kwa ntle, ga se ka ke sa mo itshekolola?" 
Mark7:19 Gonne ga se tsene mo pelong ya gagwe, se tsena mo mpeng, se be se ye se tswele kwa ntle.” A raya gore dijo tsotlhe di itshekile." 
Mark7:20 A boa a re: “Se se tswang mo teng ga motho ke sona se se mo itshekololang. 
Mark7:21 Gonne mo teng, mo dipelong tsa batho, go tswa dikakanyo tse di bosula, e bong dikgokafalo le tsa bogodu le dipolao," 
Mark7:22 le tsa boikanyologo jwa banyalani le megagaru le tsa bokgopo le bolotsana le boitaolo le lefufa le go kgala le boikgantsho le bosilo. 
Mark7:23 Tsotlhe tse di bosula tseo di tswa mo teng, di itshekolola motho.”" 
Mark7:24 Jaanong a tloga teng, a ya kwa dinageng tsa Tiro le Sitone. A tsena mo ntlong, a sa rate gore go itse ope, mme a palelwa ke go fitlhega." 
Mark7:25 Ka bonako mosadi mongwe, yo morwadie yo monnye o neng a na le mowa o o itshekologileng, ya re a mo utlwela, a tla a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe." 
Mark7:26 Mosadi yoo e ne e le Mogerika, Mosirofenika ka fa botsalong. A mo rapela gore a leleke modemone mo go morwadie." 
Mark7:27 Jesu a mo raya a re: “A bana ba kgore pele; gonne ga go gontle go tseela bana senkgwe go se latlhela dintšwanyana.” 
Mark7:28 Ene a mo araba a re: “Ee, Morena; le tsona dintšwanyana tse di leng ka fa tlase ga tafole di ja matlhotlhora a bana.”" 
Mark7:29 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya ka ntlha ya lefoko leo; modemone o dule mo go morwadio.” 
Mark7:30 Yoo a tloga a ya kwa ntlong ya gagwe, a fitlhela ngwana a letse mo bolaong, le modemone o dule." 
Mark7:31 E rile a sena go tswa gape mo dinageng tsa Tiro le Sitone, a fitlha kwa letsheng la Galelea, mo gare ga dinaga tsa Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Foo ba tsisa kwa go ene motho wa sesusu yo o gweletlhang; ba mo rapela gore a mmee seatla. 
Mark7:33 Ya re a sena go mo ntsha mo bontsing, a mo isa fa thoko, a tsenya menwana ya gagwe mo ditsebeng tsa gagwe, a kgwa mathe, a ama loleme lwa gagwe" 
Mark7:34 a lelala kwa legodimong, a fegelwa, a mo raya a re: “Efatha!” Ke go re: “Kabologa.”" 
Mark7:35 Ditsebe tsa gagwe tsa kabologa ka bonako, le thapo ya loleme lwa gagwe ya funologa, a ba a bua sentle." 
Mark7:36 Jaanong a ba laela gore ba se ka ba bolelela ope; mme le fa a ba laetse thata, bone ba ya ba bolela bogolo thata." 
Mark7:37 Ba gakgamala thata ba re: “O dirile tsotlhe sentle; o utlwisa disusu, o buisa dimumu.”" 
Mark8:1 Mo malatsing ao ga bo go le batho ba bantsi gape fa go Jesu, mme ba se na se ba ka se jang. A ipiletsa barutwa, a ba raya a re:" 
Mark8:2 “Ke utlwela batho ba botlhoko, ka gonne jaanong ba setse ba tlhotse le nna malatsi a mararo, mme ga ba na se ba ka se jang." 
Mark8:3 Fa nka ba phatlalatsa go ya kwa magaeng a bone ka tlala, ba ka felelwa ke thata mo tseleng; gonne bangwe ba bone ba tswa kgakala.”" 
Mark8:4 Barutwa ba gagwe ba mo araba ba re: “Dinkgwe di ka tswa kae tse motho o ka kgorisang batho ba ka tsona mono sekakeng?” 
Mark8:5 Jesu a ba botsa a re: “Lo na le dinkgwe di le kae?” Ba re: “Di supa.” 
Mark8:6 Jaanong a laela batho gore ba nne fa fatshe, a tsaya dinkgwe tse di supang, a leboga, a di nathoganya, a di neela barutwa ba gagwe, gore ba di ba bee pele; ba di baya batho pele." 
Mark8:7 Mme ba bo ba na le ditlhatswana di se kae; ya re a sena go di lebogela, a re le tsona ba di bewe pele." 
Mark8:8 Ba ja ba kgora, ba be ba sela masadisa, a tlala ditlatla di supa." 
Mark8:9 E ne e ka nna ba ba dikete tse nne; jaanong a ba naya tsela. 
Mark8:10 A akofa a palama mokoro le barutwa ba gagwe, a ba a fitlha kwa dinageng tsa Dalemanutha." 
Mark8:11 Jaanong ga tla Bafarisai, ba simolola go ganetsanya nae, ba batla sesupo mo go ene se se tswang kwa legodimong, mme e le go mo leka." 
Mark8:12 Mme a fegelwa thata mo moweng wa gagwe a re: “Losika lo, lo batlelang sesupo? Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Losika lo ga lo kitla lo newa sesupo sepe!”" 
Mark8:13 A ba tlogela, a boa a palama mokoro, a tshelela kwa moseja." 
Mark8:14 Ba bo ba lebetse go tsaya dinkgwe; le mo mokorong ba se na sepe, fa e se senkgwe se le sengwe fela." 
Mark8:15 Jesu a ba tlhagisa a re: “Tlhokomelang, lo itise mo matlhabegong a Bafarisai le mo matlhabegong a ga Herote.”" 
Mark8:16 Ke fa ba akanya mmogo ba re: “Ke ka gonne re se na dinkgwe.” 
Mark8:17 Ya re ka Jesu a itse, a ba raya a re: “Lo akanyetsang gore ga lo na dinkgwe? A ga lo ise lo lemoge, le fa e le go tlhaloganya? A dipelo tsa lona di sa ntse di siregile?" 
Mark8:18 A ga lo bone, le fa lo na le matlho? A ga lo utlwe, le fa lo na le ditsebe? A ga lo gakologelwe gore" 
Mark8:19 e rile ke nathoganyetsa ba ba dikete tse tlhano dinkgwe tse tlhano, lwa tsholetsa ditlatla di le kae, di tletse masadisa?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Di le 12.”" 
Mark8:20 “Gape e rile ke nathoganyetsa ba ba dikete tse nne dinkgwe tse di supang, lwa tsholetsa ditlatla di le kae, tse di tletseng masadisa?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Di supa.”" 
Mark8:21 A ba raya a re: “Mme go ntse jang, fa lo ise lo tlhaloganye?”" 
Mark8:22 Jaanong ba fitlha mo Betsaita. Foo batho ba tsisa sefofu kwa go ene, ba mo rapela gore a se ame." 
Mark8:23 A tshwara sefofu seatleng, a se gogela kwa ntle ga motsana, a se kgwela mathe mo matlhong, a se baya diatla, a se botsa a re: “A o bona sengwe?”" 
Mark8:24 Sa lelala sa re: “Ke bona batho; mme ke ba bona ba tsamaya, e kete ke ditlhare.”" 
Mark8:25 A boa a se baya diatla gape mo matlhong, sa ba sa leba thata, sa fodisiwa, sa bonela tsotlhe sentle kwa kgakala." 
Mark8:26 Jaanong a se romela kwa ntlong ya sona a re: “O se ka wa tsena mo motsaneng le e seng go bolelela ope mo go ona.” 
Mark8:27 Jesu a tloga foo, a ya kwa metsaneng ya Kaisarea-Filipi, a na le barutwa ba gagwe; a ba botsa mo tseleng a re: “Batho ba re, nna ke mang?”" 
Mark8:28 Ba mo araba ba re: “Bangwe ba re, o Johane Mokolobetsi; ba bangwe ba re, o Elia; ba bangwe gape ba re, o mongwe wa baporofeti.”" 
Mark8:29 A ba botsa gape a re: “Mme lona lo a re, ke mang?” Petoro a mo araba a re: “O Keresete.”" 
Mark8:30 Foo a ba laela thata gore ba se ka ba bolelela ope ka ga gagwe. 
Mark8:31 Jaanong a simolola go ba ruta gore Morwa-Motho o tshwanetse go boga dilo tse dintsi, le go latlhwa ke bagolo ba morafe le baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo, le go bolawa, le go tsoga morago ga malatsi a mararo." 
Mark8:32 Lefoko le a le bua ka phuthologo. Ke fa Petoro a mo tseela kwa thoko, a simolola go mo kgalemela." 
Mark8:33 Mme Jesu a retologa, a leba barutwa ba gagwe, a kgalemela Petoro a re: “Mpota morago, Satane! Gonne ga ò batle tsa Modimo, ò batla tsa batho.”" 
Mark8:34 Jaanong a ipiletsa batho ba ba leng teng mmogo le barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Fa mongwe a rata go ntshala morago, a a itlogele, a sikare sefapaano sa gagwe, a ntshale morago!" 
Mark8:35 Gonne yo o ratang go boloka bophelo jwa gagwe o tla latlhegelwa ke jona; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke bophelo jwa gagwe ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya Efangele o tla bo boloka. 
Mark8:36 Gonne go ka thusa motho eng, fa a ka bapala lefatshe lotlhe, mme a senyegelwa ke bophelo jwa gagwe jwa nnete?" 
Mark8:37 Kampo motho o ka ntsha eng go nna segololo sa botshelo jwa gagwe? 
Mark8:38 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhajwang ke ditlhong ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya mafoko a me mo losikeng loo lwa boikepo le boleo, Morwa-Motho le ene o tla tlhajwa ke ditlhong ka ntlha ya gagwe, mogang a tlang ka kgalalelo ya ga Rraagwe, a na le baengele ba ba boitshepo.”" 
Mark9:1 A boa a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Go na le bangwe mo go ba ba emeng fano, ba ba se kitlang ba utlwa loso ka gope, go tsamaya ba bone puso ya Modimo e tsile ka thata.”" 
Mark9:2 Morago ga malatsi a le marataro Jesu a tsaya Petoro le Jakobo le Johane, a tlhatlogela nabo mo thabeng e e kwa godimo kwa thoko ba le bosi. Jaanong a fetoga setshwano fa pele ga bone." 
Mark9:3 Diaparo tsa gagwe tsa phatsima, tsa nna ditshweu thata jaaka semathana, mo go se nang mosweufatsi ope mo lefatsheng yo o ka sweufatsang jalo." 
Mark9:4 Ga ba ga bonala fa go bone Elia a na le Moše, ba bua le Jesu." 
Mark9:5 Petoro a simolola go bua, a raya Jesu a re: “Moruti, go monate mo go rona go nna fano; nte re dire metlaagana e le meraro, mongwe e nne wa gago, o mongwe wa ga Moše, o mongwe wa ga Elia.”" 
Mark9:6 Mme o ne a sa itse se a se buang, ka ba ne ba boifa thata." 
Mark9:7 Foo ga tla leru, la ba ritifalela; ga ba ga tswa lentswe mo lerung la re: “Yoo ke Morwaake yo o rategang; mo utlweng!”" 
Mark9:8 Ka bonako ya re ba šebašeba, ba se ka ba tlhola ba bona ope, fa e se Jesu a le esi, a na le bone." 
Mark9:9 Ya re ba fologa mo thabeng, a ba laela gore ba se bolelele ope tse ba di bonyeng, Morwa-Motho a ise a tsoge mo baswing." 
Mark9:10 Ba boloka lefoko leo mo go bone, ba botsanya gore go tsoga mo baswing ke go reng." 
Mark9:11 Jaanong ba mmotsa ba re: “Ke go reng, fa Baitsedikwalo ba re, Elia o tshwanetse go tla pele?”" 
Mark9:12 A ba raya a re: “Ee, Elia o tla tla pele go siamisa tsotlhe; mme go kwadilwe jang ka ga Morwa-Motho gore a boge dilo tse dintsi, a be a nyadiwe?" 
Mark9:13 Mme ke lo raya ke re: Elia o setse a tsile, mme ba dirile ka ene ka fa ba ratileng ka teng, fela jaaka go kwadilwe ka ga gagwe.”" 
Mark9:14 Ya re ba fitlha kwa barutweng, ba bona batho ba bantsi ba ba dikanyeditse le Baitsedikwalo ba ganetsanya nabo." 
Mark9:15 Ka bonako ya re bontsi joo bo mmona, jwa gakgamala, jwa tabogela kwa go ene, jwa mo dumedisa." 
Mark9:16 Ene a ba botsa a re: “Lo ganetsanyang nabo?” 
Mark9:17 Mongwe wa batho a mo araba a re: “Moruti, ke tsisitse morwaake kwa go wena, o na le mowa o o semumu." 
Mark9:18 Mme gongwe le gongwe kwa o mo tshwarang teng, o a mo rutlarutla, a phoke mafulo, a phuranye meno, a kwatlalale. Ke buile le barutwa ba gago gore ba o kgarameletse ntle, mme ba paletswe.”" 
Mark9:19 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Mofuta wa batho ba ba sa dumeleng ke lona! Ke tla nna le lona go fitlhelela leng? Ke tla lo itshokela sebaka se se kana kang? Mo tsiseng kwano go nna!” 
Mark9:20 Ba mo isa kwa go ene; ya re ngwana a mmona, mowa wa akofa wa mo rutlarutla, a wela fa fatshe, a bidikama, a phoka mafulo." 
Mark9:21 Jesu a botsa rraagwe a re: “Ke sebaka se se kae a ntse a ntse jaana?” Yoo a re: “Go tswa bonyaneng jwa gagwe. 
Mark9:22 Mme gantsi o mo digetse mo molelong le mo metsing go mmolaya. Jaanong fa o nonofile go dira sengwe, re tlhomogele pelo, o re thuse!”" 
Mark9:23 Jesu a mo raya, a re: “A o a re: ‘Fa o nonofile’? Tsotlhe di ka dirafalela ene yo o dumelang.”" 
Mark9:24 Ke fa rra-ngwana a goa ka dikeledi a re: “Ke a dumela! Thusa go tlhoka-tumelo ga me!” 
Mark9:25 Mme ya re Jesu a bona batho ba tabogela mmogo teng, a kgalemela mowa o o itshekologileng, a o raya a re: “Wena mowa o o semumu, o o bosusu, ke a go laola: Tswaa mo go ene, mme o se ka wa tlhola o boela mo go ene!”" 
Mark9:26 Ke fa o goa, o mo rutlarutla thata, o tswa; mosimane a nna jaaka moswi, mo ba bantsi ba bileng ba re: “O sule.”" 
Mark9:27 Mme Jesu a mo tshwara seatla, a mo kakatlolola, a ba a tsoga." 
Mark9:28 Ya re a tsena mo ntlong, barutwa ba gagwe ba mmotsa kwa thoko ba re: “Ke go reng, fa rona re paletswe ke go o kgarameletsa ntle?”" 
Mark9:29 A ba raya a re: “Mofuta o ga o ka ke wa tswa ka sepe, fa e se ka thapelo le ka go itima dijo.”" 
Mark9:30 Jaanong ba tloga teng, ba ralala Galelea; mme a sa rate gore go itse ope." 
Mark9:31 Gonne o ne a ruta barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Morwa-Motho o tla neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho, mme ba tla mmolaya; mme e tla re a sena go bolawa, a tsoge morago ga malatsi a le mararo.”" 
Mark9:32 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya polelo eo, ba be ba boifa go mmotsa." 
Mark9:33 Jaanong ba fitlha kwa Kaperenaume. Ya re a le mo ntlong, a ba botsa a re: “Lo ne lo buisanya ka ga eng mo tseleng?”" 
Mark9:34 Mme ba didimala; gonne ba ne ba ganetsantse mo tseleng gore yo mogolo ke mang. 
Mark9:35 Jesu a nna fa fatshe, a bitsa ba ba 12, a ba raya a re: “Fa mongwe a rata go nna wa pele, a a nne wa morago mo go botlhe, le modiredi wa botlhe.”" 
Mark9:36 A ba a tsaya ngwana, a mo emisa mo gare ga bone, a mo diketsa ka mabogo, a ba raya a re:" 
Mark9:37 “Yo o tsholang mongwe wa bana ba ba ntseng jaana ka ntlha ya leina la me, o a ntshola; mme yo o ntsholang, ga a tshole nna, o tshola ene yo o nthomileng.”" 
Mark9:38 Johane a mo raya a re: “Moruti, re bonye mongwe yo o sa re lateleng, a kgarameletsa medemone ntle ka leina la gago: mme ra mo iletsa, ka a sa re latele.”" 
Mark9:39 Mme Jesu a re: “Lo se ka lwa mo iletsa; gonne ga go ope yo e ka reng a dira kgakgamatso ka leina la me, a akofa a bua bosula ka ga me." 
Mark9:40 Kana yo o sa lweng le rona o goga le rona. 
Mark9:41 Le gona yo o tla lo nosang metsi ka sego ka leina la me, ka lo le ba ga Keresete, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga a nke a latlhegelwa ke tuelo ya gagwe ka gope." 
Mark9:42 “Yo o tla kgopisang mongwe wa ba babotlana ba, ba ba dumelang mo go nna, go molemo mo go ene, fa lolwala lo logolo lo ka bo lo gokeletswe mo molaleng wa gagwe, mme a latlhelwa mo lewatleng." 
Mark9:43 Fa seatla sa gago se go kgopisa, o se kgaole; gonne go molemo go wena go tsena mo bophelong, o le segole, bogolo go ya mo moleteng, e bong mo molelong o o sa ka keng wa tingwa, o na le diatla tse pedi," 
Mark9:44 kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng le molelo o sa timeng teng. 
Mark9:45 Fa lonao lwa gago lo go kgopisa, o lo kgaole; gonne go molemo go wena go tsena mo bophelong, o le setlhotsa, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo moleteng, o na le dinao tse pedi," 
Mark9:46 kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng le molelo o sa timeng teng. 
Mark9:47 Fa leitlho la gago le go kgopisa, o le gonye; gonne go molemo go wena go tsena mo pusong ya Modimo, o le moitlho, bogolo go go latlhelwa mo moleteng wa molelo, o na le matlho a mabedi," 
Mark9:48 ‘kwa seboko sa bone se sa sweng le molelo o sa timeng teng.’ 
Mark9:49 “Gonne mongwe le mongwe o tla lokwa ka molelo; le setlhabelo sengwe le sengwe se tla lokwa ka letswai. 
Mark9:50 “Letswai le molemo; mme fa letswai le tswapogile, lo tla le tswaisa ka eng? “Nnang le letswai mo go lona, lo agisanye.”" 
Mark10:1 Jaanong a tloga teng, a ya kwa nageng ya Jutea ka tsela e e kwa moseja ga Joretane; mme batho ba bantsi ba phuthegela gape kwa go ene, a ba a ba ruta ka fa a tlwaetseng ka teng." 
Mark10:2 Bafarisai ba tla go ene, ba mmotsa gore a monna o letleletswe go tlhala mosadi wa gagwe. Mme ya bo e le go mo lalela." 
Mark10:3 A ba araba a re: “Moše o lo laotse jang?” 
Mark10:4 Ba re: “Moše o re letleletse go ka kwala lokwalo lwa tlhalo le go tlhala.” 
Mark10:5 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Taolo eo, o e lo kwaletse ka ntlha ya bopeloethata jwa lona." 
Mark10:6 Fela e sa le ka tshimologo ya tlholego ‘Modimo o ba dirile monna le mosadi.’ 
Mark10:7 ‘Ke ka ntlha ya moo monna o tla tlogelang rraagwe le mmaagwe, a ngaparela mosadi wa gagwe," 
Mark10:8 mme ba babedi ba, ba tla nna nama e le nngwe fela;’ ka moo ga ba tlhole ba le babedi, ke nama e le nngwe fela." 
Mark10:9 Jaanong se Modimo o se kopantseng, a motho a se se kgaoganye.”" 
Mark10:10 Mo ntlong barutwa ba mmotsa gape ka ga tseo. 
Mark10:11 A ba raya a re: “Fa motho a tlhala mosadi wa gagwe, a nyala o sele, o mo senyetsa nyalano." 
Mark10:12 Le mosadi, fa a tlhala monna wa gagwe, a nyalwa ke o sele, o senya nyalano.”" 
Mark10:13 Tsatsi lengwe ga tsisiwa bana kwa go ene gore a ba ame; mme barutwa ba kgalemela ba ba ba tsisitseng. 
Mark10:14 Ya re Jesu a bona, a gakala, a ba raya a re: “Lesang bana ba tle go nna, lo se ka lwa ba iletsa; gonne puso ya Modimo ke ya ba ba ntseng jalo." 
Mark10:15 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Motho yo o sa tsholeng puso ya Modimo jaaka ngwana, ga a ka ke a tsena mo go yona ka gope.”" 
Mark10:16 A be a ba diketsa ka mabogo, a ba baya diatla, a ba tshegofatsa." 
Mark10:17 Ya re a tswela mo tseleng, ga tabogela mongwe kwa go ene, a mo khubamela, a mmotsa a re: “Moruti yo o molemo, nka dirang gore ke tle ke rue bophelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Mark10:18 Jesu a mo raya a re: “O mpiletsang yo o molemo? Ga go ope yo o molemo, fa e se a le mongwe fela, e bong Modimo." 
Mark10:19 Ditaolo o a di itse tse di reng: ‘O se ka wa bolaya; o se ka wa dira boaka; o se ka wa utswa; o se ka wa supa tshupo ya kako; o se ka wa tsietsa; tlotla rraago le mmaago.’ ” 
Mark10:20 Ene a mo raya a re: “Moruti, tsotlhe tse ke di tlhokometse go tloga bonyaneng jwa me.”" 
Mark10:21 Jesu a mo leba, a mo rata, a mo raya a re: “O tlhoka selo se le sengwe fela; yaa o rekise tsotlhe tse o nang natso, o abele bahumanegi, mme o tla nna le lehumo kwa legodimong, o be o tle, o sikare sefapaano, o ntshale morago.”" 
Mark10:22 Yoo a swaba ka ntlha ya lefoko leo, a tloga a hutsafetse; gonne o ne a na le dithuo tse dintsi." 
Mark10:23 Jesu a šebašeba, a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Kana go thata jang mo go ba ba nang le mahumo go ka tsena mo pusong ya Modimo!”" 
Mark10:24 Barutwa ba gakgamalela mafoko a gagwe ka letshogo. Jesu a boa a ba raya gape a re: “Banaka, kana go thata jang mo go ba ba ikantseng mahumo go ka tsena mo pusong ya Modimo!" 
Mark10:25 Go ka nna botlhofo go kammele go tsena ka letshoba la lomao, bogolo go mohumi go tsena mo pusong ya Modimo.”" 
Mark10:26 Mme ba rerega mo go fetisang, ba raana ba re: “Gona go ka pholosiwa mang?”" 
Mark10:27 Jesu a ba leba a re: “Mo bathong go a pala, mme e seng mo Modimong; gonne mo Modimong tsotlhe di ka kgonega.”" 
Mark10:28 Jaanong Petoro a simolola go mo raya a re: “Bona, rona re tlogetse tsotlhe, ra go sala morago.”" 
Mark10:29 Jesu a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga go na ope yo o tlogetseng ntlo gongwe bomorwa-rraagwe gongwe bokgaitsadie gongwe mmaagwe gongwe rraagwe gongwe bana gongwe masimo ka ntlha ya me le ka ntlha ya Efangele," 
Mark10:30 yo jaanong mo sebakeng seno a se kitlang a bona ga lekgolo matlo le bomorwa-rraagwe le bokgaitsadie le bommaagwe le bana le masimo mmogo le dipogiso, le go bona bophelo jo bo sa khutleng mo lefatsheng le le tlang." 
Mark10:31 Mme ba bantsi ba e leng ba pele ba tla nna ba morago, le ba e leng ba morago ba tla nna ba pele.”" 
Mark10:32 Jaanong ba ne ba le mo tseleng, ba ya kwa Jerusalema; Jesu a bo a ba eteletse pele, mme ba gakgamala, le ba ba mo latetseng ba boifa. Ke fa a tsaya ba ba 12 gape, a ba bolelela tse di tla mo dirafalelang" 
Mark10:33 a re: “Bonang, re tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema; mme Morwa-Motho o tla neelwa baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo, ba tla mo atlholela loso, ba be ba mo neela baheitane." 
Mark10:34 Ba tla mo sotla, ba mo kgwela mathe, ba mo seola, ba mmolaya; mme o tla tsoga morago ga malatsi a le mararo.”" 
Mark10:35 Jaanong ga tla go ene Jakobo le Johane, bomorwa Sebeteo, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, re rata gore o re direle se re tla se go kopang.”" 
Mark10:36 A ba botsa a re: “Lo rata ka lo direla eng?” 
Mark10:37 Ba mo araba ba re: “Re nee gore re tle re nne, mongwe ka fa letsogong le le jang la gago, yo mongwe ka fa go la molema, mo kgalalelong ya gago.”" 
Mark10:38 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Ga lo itse se lo se kopang. A lo nonofile go nwa senwelo se ke yang go se nwa, gongwe go kolobediwa ka kolobetso e ke yang go kolobediwa ka yona?”" 
Mark10:39 Ba mo araba ba re: “Re nonofile.” Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Senwelo se ke se nwang lo tla se nwa, le kolobetso e ke kolobediwang ka yona lo tla kolobediwa ka yona.”" 
Mark10:40 Mme go nna ka fa letsogong le le jang la me le ka fa go la molema ga se ga me go go naya, go tla newa bone ba ba go baakanyeditsweng." 
Mark10:41 Ya re ba ba lesome ba utlwa, ba simolola go ngongoregela Jakobo le Johane." 
Mark10:42 Jesu a ba ipiletsa, a ba raya a re: “Lo itse gore ba ba kaiwang balaodi ba merafe, ba e busa ka thata, le bagolo ba yona ba a e laola." 
Mark10:43 Mme go se ka ga nna jalo mo go lona; yo o ratang go nna mogolo mo go lona, a a nne modiredi wa lona;" 
Mark10:44 le gona, yo o ratang go nna wa kwa pele mo go lona, a a nne motlhanka wa botlhe." 
Mark10:45 Gonne le ene Morwa-Motho ga a tla go direlwa, mme o tsile go direla le go ntsha bophelo jwa gagwe go nna segololo sa ba bantsi.”" 
Mark10:46 Jaanong ba fitlha kwa Jerigo. Mme ya re a tswa mo Jerigo, a na le barutwa ba gagwe le batho ba bantsi, mokopi wa sefofu, e bong Baratimeo, morwa Timeo, a bo a ntse fa tseleng." 
Mark10:47 Ya re a utlwa, fa e le Jesu wa Nasaretha, a simolola go goa a re: “Morwa Dafita, Jesu, nkutlwela botlhoko?”" 
Mark10:48 Ba bantsi ba mo kgalemela ba re, a didimale; mme ene a goa bogolo bogolo a re: “Morwa Dafita, nkutlwele botlhoko!”" 
Mark10:49 Ke fa Jesu a ema a re: “Mmitseng!” Ba bitsa sefofu, ba se raya ba re: “Namatshega o nanoge; o a go bitsa.”" 
Mark10:50 Foo a latlha kobo ya gagwe, a supuga, a tla go Jesu." 
Mark10:51 Jesu a tswa molomo, a mmotsa a re: “O rata ka go direla eng?” Sefofu sa mo araba sa re: “Rabuni, dira gore ke boe ke bone.”" 
Mark10:52 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya; tumelo ya gago e go fodisitse.” Ka bonako a boa a bona, a ba a mo sala morago mo tseleng." 
Mark11:1 E rile ba atamela Jerusalema, kwa Bethefage le Bethania, fa Thabeng ya Diolefa, a roma barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi," 
Mark11:2 a ba raya a re: “Yaang kwa motsaneng o lo lebaganyeng nao; e tla re lo tsena mo go ona, lo akofe lo fitlhele eselana e golegilwe, e e iseng e ke e palangwe ke motho ope; e gololeng, lo e tsise." 
Mark11:3 Fa mongwe a ka lo raya a re: ‘Lo direlang jalo?’ lo re: ‘Morena o a e batla, mme o tla akofa a e busetsa kwano.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Ba tsamaya, ba fitlhela eselana e golegilwe fa mojako ka fa ntle mo mmileng, ba be ba e golola." 
Mark11:5 Bangwe ba ba emeng teng ba ba raya ba re: “Lo dirang, fa lo golola eselana?”" 
Mark11:6 Barutwa ba ba araba jaaka Jesu a ba laetse, mme ba ba lesa." 
Mark11:7 Ba isa eselana kwa go Jesu, ba baya dikobo tsa bone mo go yona; mme a e palama." 
Mark11:8 Jaanong batho ba bantsi ba ala dikobo tsa bone mo tseleng; ba bangwe ba rema dikala mo ditlhareng, ba di ala mo tseleng." 
Mark11:9 Mme ba ba eteletseng pele le ba ba setseng morago ba tlhaba mokgosi ba re: “Hosana! A go bakwe yo o tlang mo leineng la Morena! 
Mark11:10 A go bakwe puso ya ga Rraetsho Dafita e e tlang; Hosana kwa magodimodimong!” 
Mark11:11 Mme Jesu a tsena mo Jerusalema, a ya kwa Tempeleng. Ya re a sena go sekaseka tsotlhe, a tswela kwa Bethania, ka e ne e setse e le nako ya maitsiboa, a na le ba ba 12." 
Mark11:12 Ya re kamoso ba tswa mo Bethania, a tshwarwa ke tlala." 
Mark11:13 Mme a bonela mofeie kgakajana kwa pele o na le matlhare, a fitlha teng a re, e tla re gongwe a fitlhele sengwe mo go ona; ya re a fitlha fa go ona, a se ka a bona sepe, fa e se matlhare fela; gonne e ne e se sebaka sa difeie." 
Mark11:14 Mme Jesu a tswa molomo, a o raya a re: “A go se nne ope yo o tlholang a ja leungo mo go wena le ka bosakhutleng.” Barutwa ba gagwe ba utlwa." 
Mark11:15 Jaanong ba fitlha mo Jerusalema; mme a tsena mo Tempeleng, a simolola go lelekela ba ba rekisang le ba ba rekang mo Tempeleng kwa ntle, a menola ditafole tsa ba ba ananyang madi, le ditulo tsa ba ba rekisang maphoi;" 
Mark11:16 mme a se ka a letlelela ope go ralala Tempele a tshotse sepe. 
Mark11:17 A ba a ba ruta a re: “A ga go a kwalwa ga twe: ‘Ntlo ya me e tla bidiwa Ntlo ya thapelo ya ditšhaba tsotlhe’? Mme lona lo e dirile legaga la dinokwane.” 
Mark11:18 Baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo ba utlwa, ba be ba batla ka fa ba ka mo nyeletsang ka teng; gonne ba ne ba mmoifa, ka batho botlhe ba gakgamaletse thuto ya gagwe." 
Mark11:19 E ne e a tle e re go le maitsiboa a tswele kwa ntle ga motse. 
Mark11:20 Jaanong ya re ka moso phakela ba feta, ba bona mofeie o omeletse go tloga kwa meding." 
Mark11:21 Foo Petoro a gakologelwa, a mo raya a re: “Rabbi, bona mofeie o ò o hutsitseng o omeletse.”" 
Mark11:22 Jesu a ba araba a re: “Nnang le tumelo mo Modimong. 
Mark11:23 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Le fa e le mang yo o rayang thaba e a re: ‘Manologa o itatlhele mo lewatleng!’ a sa belaele mo pelong ya gagwe, a dumela gore se a se buang se tla dirafala, o tla direlwa jalo." 
Mark11:24 Ke ka moo ke lo rayang ke re: Tsotlhe tse lo di kopang, lo rapela, le fa e ka nna eng, lo dumele gore lo di amogetse, mme lo tla di bona." 
Mark11:25 E ne e re fa lo rapela lo eme, lo itshwarela yo lo gopolang molato wa gagwe, gore Rraeno yo o kwa magodimong le ene a lo itshwarele ditlolo tsa lona." 
Mark11:26 Mme fa lona lo sa itshwarele, le ene Rraeno yo o kwa magodimong ga a nke a lo itshwarela ditlolo tsa lona.”" 
Mark11:27 Jaanong ba fitlha gape kwa Jerusalema; ya re a tsamaya mo Tempeleng, ga tla baperesiti ba bagolo go ene, le Baitsedikwalo le bagolo ba morafe," 
Mark11:28 ba mmotsa ba re: “Dilo tse o di dira ka thata efe? Gongwe ke mang yo o go neileng thata ya go dira dilo tse?” 
Mark11:29 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke tla lo botsa lefoko le le lengwe fela; lo nkarabe, mme ke tla lo bolelela thata e ke dirang dilo tse ka yona:" 
Mark11:30 Kolobetso ya ga Johane a e ne e tswa kwa legodimong, gongwe mo bathong? Nkarabang!”" 
Mark11:31 Ba akanya mo go bone ba re: “Fa re ka re: ‘Kwa legodimong,’ o tla re: ‘Mme ke ka ntlhaang, fa lo ne lo sa mo dumele?’" 
Mark11:32 Mme fa re ka re: ‘Mo bathong.’ ” Foo ba be ba boifa batho; gonne botlhe ba ne ba kaya Johane moporofeti tota. 
Mark11:33 Ba araba Jesu ba re: “Ga re itse.” Jesu a ba raya a re: “Foo le nna ga ke lo bolelele gore ke dira dilo tse ka thata efe.” 
Mark12:1 Ke fa a simolola go bua nabo ka dipapiso a re: “Motho o ne a dira tshimo ya moweine, a e agelela ka logora, a epa setlhotlhelo sa weine, a aga serala, a e neela barapi, a eta." 
Mark12:2 Ka nako ya teng a roma motlhanka kwa baraping gore a amogele kabelo ya gagwe ya maungo a tshimo ya moweine mo go bona. 
Mark12:3 Mme ba mo tshwara, ba mmetsa, ba mo koba a se na sepe." 
Mark12:4 A boa a roma motlhanka yo mongwe kwa go bona; le ene ba mo ntsha dintho mo tlhogong, ba mo dira tse di tlhabisang ditlhong." 
Mark12:5 Jaanong a roma yo mongwe, mme ene ba mmolaya; le ba bangwe ba le bantsi; ba bangwe ba ba betsa, ba bangwe ba ba bolaya." 
Mark12:6 O ne a sa na le a le mongwe, morwawe yo o rategang, a mo roma kwa go bona e le wa bofelo, a re: ‘Ka e le morwaake, ba tla mo tlotla.’" 
Mark12:7 Mme balemi bao ba rayana ba re: ‘Yo ke moja-boswa; tlayang, re mmolaeng, boswa e tle e nne jwa rona.’" 
Mark12:8 Ba be ba mo tshwara, ba mmolaya, ba mo latlhela kwa ntle ga tshimo ya moweine." 
Mark12:9 “Jaanong, morena wa tshimo o tla dirang? O tla tla, a bolaya balemi, tshimo ya moweine o tla e neela ba sele." 
Mark12:10 A ga lo a buisa Lokwalo lo lo reng: “ ‘Lentswe le baagi ba le latlhileng ke lone le le dirilweng letlapa la sekhutlo; 
Mark12:11 seo se dirilwe ke Morena, se bile se gakgamatsa mo matlhong a rona’?”" 
Mark12:12 Foo ba batla go mo tshwara; gonne ba ne ba lemoga, fa a buile setshwantsho se ka ga bona; mme ba boifa batho, ba be ba mo tlogela, ba tsamaya." 
Mark12:13 Jaanong ba roma bangwe ba Bafarisai le ba ga Herote kwa go ene gore ba mo tshware ka lefoko. 
Mark12:14 Ya re ba tla, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, re itse gore o boammaaruri, mme ga o re ope sepe; gonne ga o gobelele motho, mme o ruta tsela ya Modimo ka boammaaruri. A go letleletswe go kgethela Kaisara gongwe nnyaya? A ke re ntshe lekgetho gongwe re se ka ra le ntsha?”" 
Mark12:15 Mme ene, ka a itse boitimokanyo jwa bone, a ba raya a re: “Lo nthaelelang? Ntsisetsang ledi la lekgetho gore ke le bone!”" 
Mark12:16 Ba le tsisa. A ba botsa a re: “Setshwantsho se le sekwalo se ke tsa ga mang?” Ba mo araba ba re: “Tsa Kaisara.” 
Mark12:17 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ka moo, ntshetsang Kaisara tse e leng tsa Kaisara le Modimo tse e leng tsa Modimo.” Mme ba mo gakgamalela thata." 
Mark12:18 Jaanong Basadukai ba ba reng, ga go na tsogo ya baswi, ba tla kwa go ene, ba mmotsa ba re:" 
Mark12:19 “Moruti, Moše o re kwaletse a re: ‘Fa morwa-rra-motho a swa, a tlogela mosadi, mme a se na ngwana, a morwa-rraagwe a tsee mosadi yoo, a tsosetse morwa-rraagwe losika.’" 
Mark12:20 Go ne go le bomorwa motho ba ba supang; wa ntlha a tsaya mosadi; mme a swa, a sa tlogele losika." 
Mark12:21 Wa bobedi a mo tsaya, le ene a swa a sa tlogele losika; le wa boraro fela jalo." 
Mark12:22 Ka bosupa jwa bone ba mo tsaya, mme go se yo o tlogetseng losika. Morago ga bone botlhe mosadi le ene a swa." 
Mark12:23 Jaanong mo tsogong, fa ba tsoga, mosadi e tla nna wa ga mang mo go bone? Kana ba ne ba mo tsere ka bosupa jwa bone.”" 
Mark12:24 Jesu a ba araba a re: “A ga ke re, lo a timela, ka lo sa itse Dikwalo le fa e le thata ya Modimo?" 
Mark12:25 Kana e tla re ba tsoga mo baswing, ba se ke ba nyale le e seng go nyalwa, mme ba tla nna jaaka baengele mo magodimong." 
Mark12:26 Mme fa e le baswi gore ba tla tsosiwa, a ga lo a buisa mo Lokwalong lwa ga Moše ka fa Modimo o buileng nae ka teng fa setlhareng sa mitlwa wa re: ‘Ke nna Modimo wa ga Aborahame, Modimo wa ga Isaka, Modimo wa ga Jakobe’?" 
Mark12:27 Modimo ga se wa baswi, ke wa baphedi; lo timetse thata.”" 
Mark12:28 Foo mongwe wa Baitsedikwalo a tla, a ba utlwa ba botsanya, mme ka a lemoga gore o ba arabile sentle, a mmotsa a re: “Taolo e kgolo mo go tsotlhe ke efe?”" 
Mark12:29 Jesu a mo araba a re: “E kgolo ke e: ‘Utlwa, wena Iseraele! Morena, Modimo wa rona, ke Morena a le esi fela;" 
Mark12:30 o rate Morena, Modimo wa gago, ka pelo yotlhe le ka mowa otlhe le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe le ka thata yotlhe ya gago. Ke yona taolo ya ntlha.’" 
Mark12:31 Ya bobedi ke e: ‘Rata mongwe-ka-wena jaaka o ithata.’ Ga go na taolo epe e sele e e fetang tse.” 
Mark12:32 Moitsedikwalo a mo raya a re: “Ruri, Moruti, o buile sentle; gonne Modimo o mongwe fela, mme ga go ope o sele, fa e se ona." 
Mark12:33 Le go o rata ka pelo yotlhe le ka tlhaloganyo yotlhe le ka thata yotlhe, le motho go rata mongwe-ka-ene jaaka a ithata, ke mo go gaisang ditlhabelo tsa phiso le ditlhabelo tsotlhe.”" 
Mark12:34 Ya re Jesu a bona, fa a arabile ka tlhaloganyo, a mo raya a re: “Ga o kgakala le puso ya Modimo.” Mme ga bo go sa tlhole go le ope yo o betang pelo go mmotsa." 
Mark12:35 Ya re Jesu a ruta mo Tempeleng, a botsa a re: “Ke eng fa Baitsedikwalo ba bua ba re: ‘Keresete ke morwa Dafita’?" 
Mark12:36 Kana Dafita o buile ka esi ka Mowa o o Boitshepo a re: “ ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Nna ka fa letsogong la me le le jang, go tle go tsamae ke bee baba ba gago fa tlase ga dinao tsa gago.’" 
Mark12:37 “Dafita ka esi o mmitsa ‘Morena’; o ka nna morwawe jang?” Mme batho ba bantsi ba mo utlwa ka boitumelo. 
Mark12:38 Mo thutong ya gagwe a bua a re: “Lo itise mo go Baitsedikwalo ba ba ratang go tsamaya ka dikobo tse di kgokgothang, le ditumediso mo dipatlelong," 
Mark12:39 le ditulo tse di kwa pele mo disenagogeng, le manno a a kwa pele mo meletlong;" 
Mark12:40 ba metsa matlo a batlholagadi, ba itimokanya ka go rapela go le goleele. Bone ba tla bona katlholo e kgolo bogolo.”" 
Mark12:41 Ya re Jesu a ntse go lebagana le letlole la dikabelo, a bona ka fa batho ba tsenyang madi mo letloleng ka teng; bahumi ba bantsi ba tsenya a magolo." 
Mark12:42 Mme ga tla motlholagadi mongwe yo o humanegileng, a tsenya madinyana a le mabedi a a dirang sente." 
Mark12:43 Jaanong a ipiletsa barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Motlholagadi yo, yo o humanegileng, o tsentse go feta botlhe ba ba tsentseng mo letloleng la dikabelo." 
Mark12:44 Gonne bone botlhe ba tsentse tsa letlotlo la bone mme ene o tsentse tsa lehuma la gagwe tsotlhe tse a nang natso, tsotlhe tse a phelang ka tsona.”" 
Mark13:1 E rile a tswa mo Tempeleng, mongwe wa barutwa ba gagwe a mo raya a re: “Moruti, bona majwe a, le dikago tse, di dintle jang ne!”" 
Mark13:2 Jesu a mo raya a re: “A o bona dikago tse dikgolo tse? Ga go nke go lesiwa lentswe lepe le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe, le le se kitlang le digwa.”" 
Mark13:3 Ya re a ntse mo Thabeng ya Diolefa, go lebagana le Tempele, Petoro le Jakobo le Johane le Andrea ba mmotsa kwa thoko ba re:" 
Mark13:4 “Re bolelele gore dilo tse, di tla nna leng? Gape sesupo sa nako e dilo tsotlhe tse, di tla dirafalang ka botlalo ka yona ke sefe?”" 
Mark13:5 Mme Jesu a simolola go bua nabo a re: “Lo itise gore lo se ka lwa timediwa ke ope. 
Mark13:6 Ba bantsi ba tla tla ka leina la me, mongwe le mongwe a ipitsa a re: ‘Ke nna ene Keresete;’ mme ba tla timetsa ba bantsi." 
Mark13:7 Mme e re lo utlwela dintwa le medumo ya dintwa, lo se ka lwa tshoga; dilo tse, di tshwanetse go dirafala; mme e tla bo e ise e nne bokhutlo." 
Mark13:8 Gonne setšhaba se tla tsogela setšhaba, le bogosi bo tla tsogela bogosi; go tla nna dithoromo tsa lefatshe kwa le kwa le ditlala le dikhuduego; dilo tse ke tshimologo fela ya maralalo." 
Mark13:9 “Mme lona lo itise; gonne ba tla lo tsenya mo makgotleng; lo tla bediwa mo disenagogeng, lo tla emisiwa fa pele ga balaodi le dikgosi ka ntlha ya me go nna tshupo mo go bone." 
Mark13:10 Mme Efangele e tshwanetse go rerelwa merafe yotlhe pele. 
Mark13:11 E re fa ba lo isa go lo tsenya mo lekgotleng, lo se ka lwa itshwenya go sa le kwa pele ka ga se lo tla se buang; se lo tla se newang ka nako eo, lo se bue. Gonne e tla bo e se lona ba lo buang, mme e le Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Mark13:12 Motho o tla neela morwa-rraagwe mo losong, le rra-ngwana o tla neela ngwana wa gagwe, le bana ba tla tsogela batsadi ba bone, ba ba neela polaong." 
Mark13:13 Lo tla tlhoiwa ke botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me; mme yo o itshokelang go ya bofelong, ke ene yo o tla pholosiwang." 
Mark13:14 “E re fa lo bona makgapha a tshenyego, e bong mongwe yo o emeng fa a sa tshwanelang go ema teng” – a yo o buisang a ele tlhoko – “foo ba ba mo Jutea a ba tshabele kwa dithabeng." 
Mark13:15 Le yo o mo godimo ga ntlo a a se fologe, le fa e le go tsena mo teng go tsaya sengwe mo ntlong ya gagwe." 
Mark13:16 Le yo o kwa tshimong a a se boele kwa morago go tsaya kobo ya gagwe. 
Mark13:17 “A tatlhego wee ya ba baimana le ba ba amusang ka malatsi ao! 
Mark13:18 Mme lo rapele gore dilo tse, di se dirafale go le mariga." 
Mark13:19 Gonne malatsi ao e tla nna a pitlagano, jaaka go ise go ke go nne go tloga ka tshimologo ya tlholego e Modimo o e tlhodileng go tla nakong eno; le gona ga go nke go tlhola go nna jalo ka motlha ope." 
Mark13:20 Mme fa Morena a ka bo a sa khutshwafatse malatsi ao, go ka bo go sa pholosiwe motho ope; mme o khutshwafaditse malatsi ka ntlha ya baitlhaolelwi ba o ba itlhaoletseng." 
Mark13:21 “Metlheng eo e re fa mongwe a lo raya a re: ‘Bonang, Keresete ke yo; bonang, ke yole!’ lo se ka lwa dumela." 
Mark13:22 Gonne go tla tsoga bokeresete ba maaka le baporofeti ba maaka; ba tla dira ditshupo le dikgakgamatso gore fa go ka kgonega ba timetse batlhaolwi. 
Mark13:23 Mme lona lo itise! Ke lo boleletse tsotlhe go sa le gale. 
Mark13:24 “Mo malatsing ao, morago ga pitlagano eo, letsatsi le tla fifala, le ngwedi ga o nke o ntsha lesedi la ona." 
Mark13:25 Le dinaledi di tla wa kwa legodimong, le dithata tse di mo magodimong di tla reketlisiwa." 
Mark13:26 Ke gona ba tla bonang Morwa-Motho a tla mo marung ka thata e kgolo le ka kgalalelo. 
Mark13:27 Foo o tla roma baengele ba gagwe, a phutha batlhaolwi ba gagwe kwa ntlheng tse nne, go tswa sekhutlong sa lefatshe go ya sekhutlong sa legodimo." 
Mark13:28 “Ithuteng setshwantsho ka mofeie: E a re fa dikala tsa ona di setse di le dinana, di kukunya matlhare, lo a bo lo itse gore selemo se gaufi." 
Mark13:29 Le gona jalo e re fa lo bona tseo di dirafala, itseng gore o gaufi fa mejako." 
Mark13:30 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Mofuta o ga o nke o fela, go tsamae dilo tsotlhe tse, di dirafale." 
Mark13:31 Legodimo le lefatshe di tla fela, mme mafoko a me ga a nke a fela." 
Mark13:32 Ka ga letsatsi la teng le nako ya teng ga go itse ope, le e seng baengele legodimong, le e seng Morwa, fa e se Rara fela." 
Mark13:33 “Itiseng lo se itebale, lo rapele; gonne ga lo itse gore go tla dirafala leng." 
Mark13:34 Go tshwana le motho yo o ileng leetong, a tlogela ntlo ya gagwe, a neela batlhanka ba gagwe go laola, mongwe le mongwe tiro ya gagwe, a laela molebeledi wa kgoro gore a dise." 
Mark13:35 Ka moo disang; gonne ga lo itse gore morena wa ntlo o tla tla leng, a maitsiboa gongwe bosigogare, gongwe fa mokoko o lela, gongwe ka masa," 
Mark13:36 e se re gongwe a tla ka tshoganyetso, a fitlhela lo robetse." 
Mark13:37 Mme se ke se lo rayang ke se raya botlhe, ka re: Disang!”" 
Mark14:1 E rile moletlo wa Paseka, wa Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang o saletswe ke malatsi a mabedi, baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo ba batla ka fa ba ka mo tshwarang ka teng ka maano le go mmolaya." 
Mark14:2 Fela ba re: “E seng mo moletlong, e se re gongwe ga nna pheretlhego mo bathong.”" 
Mark14:3 E rile a le kwa Bethania mo ntlong ya ga Simone wa molepero, a ntse fa dijong, ga tla mosadi, a tshotse lebotlolonyana la alabasetere le na le setlolo sa lookwane lwa narete lo lo sa pekwang sa tlhotlhwa e e kwa godimo, a thuba lebotlolonyana, a se tshela mo tlhogong ya gagwe." 
Mark14:4 Mme ga bo go le bangwe teng ba ba ngongoregang, ba raana ba re: “Tshenyo e ya setlolo ke ya go reng?" 
Mark14:5 Kana setlolo se, se ka bo se rekisitswe ka diranta di le 100, tsa newa bahumanegi.” Ba be ba mo nyatsa." 
Mark14:6 Mme Jesu a re: “Mo leseng! Lo mo tshwenyetsang? O dirile tiro e e molemo mo go nna. 
Mark14:7 Kana bahumanegi lo na nabo ka metlha yotlhe, mme fa lo rata, lo ka ba direla molemo; mme nna ga lo na le nna ka gale." 
Mark14:8 O dirile ka fa a kgonang ka teng; o tloleditse mmele wa me phitlho go sa le kwa pele. 
Mark14:9 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Gongwe le gongwe kwa Efangele e tla rerwang teng mo lefatsheng lotlhe, le sona se ene a se dirileng se tla bolelwa teng gore a gopolwe ka sona.”" 
Mark14:10 Jaanong Jutase Isekariote, mongwe wa ba ba 12, a tloga a ya kwa baperesiting ba bagolo gore a tle a mo ba neele." 
Mark14:11 Ya re bone ba utlwa, ba itumela, ba mo solofetsa gore ba tla mo naya madi. Jaanong a batla sebaka se se lebanyeng sa go mo tshwarisa." 
Mark14:12 E rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang la go tlhajwa ga kwana ya Tlolaganyo, barutwa ba gagwe ba mo raya ba re: “O rata ra ya go baakanya kae gore ò jele Tlolaganyo teng?”" 
Mark14:13 Ke fa a roma ba le babedi ba barutwa ba gagwe, a ba raya a re: “Yaang mo motseng, mme motho mongwe o tla kgatlhana le lona, a rwele nkgo ya metsi; lo mo sale morago," 
Mark14:14 mme kwa a tla tsenang teng, lo ree mong wa ntlo lo re: ‘Moruti a re: Ntlwana ya me ya baeti e kae, kwa nka jelang Tlolaganyo teng le barutwa ba me?’" 
Mark14:15 Ene o tla lo supetsa ntlwana e kgolwane e e fa godimo, e beilwe mesamo, e baakantswe; lo re baakanyetse teng.”" 
Mark14:16 Barutwa ba ya, ba fitlha mo motseng, ba fitlhela go ntse fela jaaka a ba boleletse, ba be ba baakanyetsa Tlolaganyo." 
Mark14:17 Ya re go le maitsiboa, a tla le ba ba 12." 
Mark14:18 Ya re ba ntse fa dijong ba ja, Jesu a bua a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Mongwe wa lona o tla ntshwarisa, e bong yo o jang le nna.”" 
Mark14:19 Ba simolola go hutsafala, ba mmotsa ka tatelano ba re: “A ke nna?”" 
Mark14:20 A ba araba a re: “Ke mongwe wa ba ba 12 yo o inang thathana le nna mo mogopong. 
Mark14:21 Fa e le Morwa-Motho, o tsamaya fela ka fa go kwadilweng ka ga gagwe ka teng; mme go latlhega motho yoo, yo o tshwarisang Morwa-Motho! Go ka bo go le botoka mo go ene, fa a ka bo a se ka a tsalwa.”" 
Mark14:22 Jaanong ya re ba ja, a tsaya senkgwe, a leboga, a se nathoganya, a se ba naya a re: “Tsayang lo je! Se ke mmele wa me.”" 
Mark14:23 A ba a tsaya senwelo, a leboga, a se ba neela, mme ba nwa botlhe ka sona." 
Mark14:24 A ba raya a re: “Se ke madi a me a kgolagano e ntšhwa a a tshololwang ka ntlha ya ba bantsi. 
Mark14:25 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga nke ke tlhola ke nwa ga leungo la moweine, go ya go fitlha mo letsatsing leo, le ke tla le nwang le le lešwa ka lone mo pusong ya Modimo.”" 
Mark14:26 Ya re ba sena go opela difela tsa Tlolaganyo, ba tswela kwa Thabeng ya Diolefa." 
Mark14:27 Jaanong Jesu a ba raya a re: “Lo tla kgotšwa lotlhe; gonne go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ke tla itaya modisa, mme dinku di tla faladiwa.’" 
Mark14:28 Mme e tla re ke sena go tsosiwa, ke lo etelele pele go ya kwa Galelea.”" 
Mark14:29 Petoro a mo raya a re: “Le fa botlhe ba ka kgotšwa, nna ga nka ke.”" 
Mark14:30 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Kajeno mo bosigong jono, wena o tla intatola gararo, mokoko o ise o lele gabedi.”" 
Mark14:31 Mme ene a gatelela thata a re: “Le fa ke tshwanetse go swa nao, ga nkitla ke go itatola ka gope.” Mme botlhe ba bua fela jalo le bone." 
Mark14:32 Jaanong ba fitlha felong fa go bidiwang Getsemane; mme a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Salang fa, ke sa ntse ke ya go rapela.”" 
Mark14:33 A ba a tsaya Petoro le Jakobo le Johane, a ya nabo; a simolola go rerega le go tlalelwa." 
Mark14:34 A ba raya a re: “Mowa wa me o hutsafetse thata mo go isang losong; salang fa, lo se robale.”" 
Mark14:35 Jaanong a ya fa pelenyana, a wela fa fatshe, a rapela gore fa go ka kgonega, nako e, e mo fete." 
Mark14:36 A ba a re: “Abba, Rra, dilo tsotlhe o a di kgona; tlosa senwelo se fa go nna. Fela go se nne ka fa go rateng ga me, go nne ka fa go rateng ga gago.”" 
Mark14:37 Jaanong a tla, a fitlhela ba robetse; a raya Petoro a re: “Simone, a o robetse? A o ne o sa kgone go itisa ka nako e le nngwe fela?" 
Mark14:38 Tlhokomelang, lo rapele, gore lo se tsene mo thaelong; mowa ona o tlhaga, mme nama e bokoa.”" 
Mark14:39 A boa a ya gape, a rapela, a bua ona mafoko ao." 
Mark14:40 A ba a tla gape, a ba fitlhela ba robetse, gonne matlho a bone a ne a bokaletse, ba sa itse se ba ka se mo arabang." 
Mark14:41 A tla lwa boraro, a ba raya a re: “A lo sa ntse lo robetse le go ikhutsa? Go lekanye, nako e fitlhile; bonang, Morwa-Motho o neelwa mo diatleng tsa baleofi." 
Mark14:42 Tsogang, re tsamaeng! Bonang, yo o ntshwarisang o atametse.”" 
Mark14:43 Ya re ka bonako, a sa ntse a bua, ga tla Jutase, mongwe wa ba ba 12, a na le ba bantsi, ba tshotse ditšhaka le melamu, ba romilwe ke baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo le bagolo ba morafe." 
Mark14:44 Jaanong motshwarisi o ne a ba neile sekao a re: “Yo ke tla mo atlang ke ene; lo mo tshware, lo tsamae ka ene, a a se tšhomoge.”" 
Mark14:45 Ya re a fitlha, a akofa a tla kwa go ene a re: “Rabbi!” a ba a mo atla." 
Mark14:46 Ke fa ba mo tsenya diatla, ba mo tshwara." 
Mark14:47 Mme mongwe wa ba ba emeng teng a somola tšhaka, a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe." 
Mark14:48 Jesu a ba raya a re: “A lo bolotse ka ditšhaka le melamu go ntshwara, jaaka e kete ke senokwane?" 
Mark14:49 Ke ne ke na le lona ka malatsi otlhe mo Tempeleng, ke ruta, mme ga lo a ka lwa ntshwara; mme go direga gore Dikwalo di dirafale.”" 
Mark14:50 Foo barutwa ba mo tlogela botlhe, ba tshaba." 
Mark14:51 Lekau lengwe la mo latela, le apere lesela fela, mme ba le tshwara." 
Mark14:52 La ba la tlogela lesela, la tshaba le sa apara." 
Mark14:53 Jaanong ba gogela Jesu kwa moperesiting yo mogolo; baperesiti ba bagolo botlhe le bagolo ba morafe le Baitsedikwalo ba phuthegela fa go ene. 
Mark14:54 Petoro a latela Jesu a le kgakala nae, a tsena mo teng ga lelapa la moperesiti yo mogolo; a feta a nna le batlhanka, a ikomosa fa molelong." 
Mark14:55 Mme baperesiti ba bagolo le botlhe ba lekgotla ba batla tshupo ka ga Jesu gore ba tle ba mmolae; mme ba se ka ba e bona. 
Mark14:56 Gonne ba bantsi ba ne ba supa maaka ka ga gagwe, fela ditshupo tsa bone tsa bo di fapaana." 
Mark14:57 Ke fa go ema bangwe, ba supa maaka ka ga gagwe ba re:" 
Mark14:58 “Re mo utlwile a re: ‘Ke tla senya Tempele e, e e dirilweng ka diatla, ke aga e sele malatsing a le mararo e e sa dirweng ka diatla.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Mme le ka mokgwa oo ditshupo tsa bone tsa se ka tsa utlwana. 
Mark14:60 Foo moperesiti yo mogolo a ema fa gare, a botsa Jesu a re: “A ga o arabe sepe? Ke eng se bao ba se supang ka ga gago?”" 
Mark14:61 Mme a didimala, a se ka a araba sepe. Gape moperesiti yo mogolo a mmotsa a re: “A o Keresete, Morwaa-ona o o bakwang?”" 
Mark14:62 Jesu a re: “Ke nna; mme lo tla bona Morwa-Motho a ntse ka fa letsogong le le jang la thata ya Modimo, a tla ka maru a legodimo.”" 
Mark14:63 Foo moperesiti yo mogolo a ikgagola diaparo a re: “Re sa batlelang basupi? 
Mark14:64 Lo utlwile kgalo e; lo gopolang?” Mme botlhe ba mo atlhola ba re, o tshwanetswe ke loso." 
Mark14:65 Bangwe ba simolola go mo kgwela mathe le go mo fapa sefatlhego le go mo kata ka matswele le go mo raya ba re: “Re bolelele!” Le batlhanka ba mo faphola marama. 
Mark14:66 Ya re Petoro a le kwa tlase mo lapeng, ga tla lengwe la malata a moperesiti yo mogolo;" 
Mark14:67 ya re le bona Petoro a ikomosa, la mo leba la re: “Le wena o ne o na le Jesu wa Nasaretha.”" 
Mark14:68 Mme a latola a re: “Ga ke itse se o se buang, le fa e le go se tlhaloganya.” A ba a tswela kwa lapeng la ka fa ntle; mme mokoko wa lela." 
Mark14:69 Ya re letata le mmona gape, la simolola go raya ba ba emeng teng la re: “Yo ke mongwe wa bone.”" 
Mark14:70 A boa a latola. Gape ya re morago ga sebakanyana ba ba emeng teng ba raya Petoro ba re: “Ammaaruri o mongwe wa bone; gonne le wena o Mogalelea.” 
Mark14:71 Jaanong a simolola go rogaka, a ba a ikana a re: “Ga ke itse motho yo lo buang ka ga gagwe.”" 
Mark14:72 Mme mokoko wa akofa wa lela lwa bobedi. Ke fa Petoro a gakologelwa lefoko la ga Jesu, le a le mo reileng a re: “E tla re mokoko o ise o lele gabedi, o bo o intatotse gararo.” Ya re a akanya jalo, a lela." 
Mark15:1 E rile ka moso phakela baperesiti ba bagolo ba na le bagolo ba morafe le Baitsedikwalo le botlhe ba lekgotla ba akofa ba dumelana; mme ya re ba sena go golega Jesu, ba ya go mo neela Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Pilato a mmotsa a re: “A ke wena kgosi ya Bajuta?” A mo araba a re: “O bolela jalo.” 
Mark15:3 Baperesiti ba bagolo ba mmaya melato ka dilo tse dintsi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato a mmotsa gape a re: “A ga o arabe sepe? Kana ba go baya melato e e kana kang!” 
Mark15:5 Mme Jesu a se ka a tlhola a araba sepe, Pilato a ba a tla a gakgamala." 
Mark15:6 Jaanong e ne e a tle e re ka moletlo a ba gololele mogolegwi yo ba mo kopang. 
Mark15:7 Ga bo go le mongwe yo o bidiwang Barabase, a golegilwe le ba ba dirileng khuduo, ba e rileng mo khuduong ba bolaya motho." 
Mark15:8 Jaanong lesomo la tlhatlogela teng, la simolola go mo kopa gore a dire ka fa a tle a ba direle ka teng." 
Mark15:9 Pilato a ba fetola a re: “A lo rata ka lo gololela kgosi ya Bajuta?” 
Mark15:10 A re jalo, gonne o ne a itse gore baperesiti ba bagolo ba mo neetse tshekisong ka lefufa." 
Mark15:11 Mme baperesiti ba bagolo ba tlhotlheletsa batho gore bogolo a ba gololele Barabase. 
Mark15:12 Pilato a ba fetola gape a re: “Mme jaanong ke tla dirang ka ene yo lo mmitsang Kgosi ya Bajuta?” 
Mark15:13 Ba goa gape ba re: “Mmapolele sefapaanong!” 
Mark15:14 Mme Pilato a ba raya a re: “Naare o dirile bosula bofe?” Ba goa thata thata ba re: “Mmapolele sefapaanong!” 
Mark15:15 Ya re ka Pilato a rata go kgatlha bontsi, a ba gololela Barabase; mme ya re a sena go seola Jesu, a mo neela gore a bapolwe." 
Mark15:16 Ke fa batlhabani ba mo isa kwa teng ga lelapa, e bong kwa kagong ya molaodi, ba be ba phutha mophato otlhe." 
Mark15:17 Ba mo apesa kobo e khibidu, ba loga serwalo sa mitlwa, ba se mo rwesa;" 
Mark15:18 ba simolola go mo dumedisa ba re: “Dumela, Kgosi ya Bajuta!”" 
Mark15:19 Le gona ba mmetsa mo tlhogong ka lotlhaka, ba mo kgwela mathe, ba wa ka mangole, ba mo obamela." 
Mark15:20 Ya re ba sena go mo sotla, ba mo apola kobo e khibidu, ba boa ba mo apesa diaparo tsa gagwe. Jaanong ba mo gogela kwa ntle, gore ba mmapole." 
Mark15:21 Foo ba pateletsa mongwe yo o fetang a tswa kwa nageng, e bong Simone wa Kirene, rraagwe Aleksantere le Rufo, gore a mo sikarele sefapaano." 
Mark15:22 Ba mo isa kwa felong fa go tweng Golegotha, mo phetolong ke go re: “Felo ga logata.”" 
Mark15:23 Ba mo naya weine e tlhakantswe le mera; mme a se ka a e nwa. 
Mark15:24 Jaanong ba mmapola, ba be ba kgaogana diaparo tsa gagwe ka go di tlhamela tengwa gore mongwe le mongwe a tsee sa gagwe." 
Mark15:25 E ne e le nako ya borobongwe fa ba mmapola. 
Mark15:26 Sekwalo sa molato wa gagwe sa bo se kwadilwe fa godimo se re: “KGOSI YA BAJUTA.” 
Mark15:27 Ba bapola dinokwane di le pedi nae, sengwe ka fa letsogong la gagwe le le jang, se sengwe ka fa go la molema." 
Mark15:28 Lokwalo lwa ba lwa dirafala lo lo reng: O baletswe le baikepi. 
Mark15:29 Ba ba fetang ba mo kgala, ba thukhutha ditlhogo ba re: “Auwi, wena yo o senyang Tempele, o be o e age ka malatsi a le mararo," 
Mark15:30 ipholose, o fologe mo sefapaanong.”" 
Mark15:31 Baperesiti ba bagolo le bone le Baitsedikwalo ba sotla fela jalo, ba raana ba re: “O ne a thusa ba bangwe, mme o palelwa ke go ithusa." 
Mark15:32 A Keresete, Kgosi ya Iseraele, a fologe jaanong mo sefapaanong gore re bone, re tle re dumele.” Le ba ba bapotsweng nae ba mo kgoba." 
Mark15:33 Ya re ka nako ya motshegare ga nna lefifi mo lefatsheng lotlhe go ya nakong ya boraro thapama. 
Mark15:34 Ya re ka nako ya boraro thapama Jesu a kua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabagathani?” fa go fetolwa ke go re: “Modimo wa me, Modimo wa me, o ntlogeletseng?”" 
Mark15:35 Ba bangwe ba bone ba ba emeng teng, ya re ba utlwa, ba bua ba re: “Utlwang, o bitsa Elia.”" 
Mark15:36 Mongwe a taboga, a ina ngami mo motatseng, a e tlhomela mo lotlhakeng, a mo nosa a re: “Lesang, re boneng gore a Elia o tla tla go mo pagolola.”" 
Mark15:37 Mme Jesu a goa ka lentswe le legolo, a ntsha mowa." 
Mark15:38 Ke fa lesire la Tempele le gagoga, go simolola kwa godimo go ya kwa tlase." 
Mark15:39 Mme molaodi-wa-lekgolo yo o emeng fa teng a lebaganye nae, ya re a bona gore o ntshitse mowa ka mokgwa oo, a bua a re: “Ammaaruri, motho yo e ne e le Morwa Modimo.”" 
Mark15:40 Le gona ga bo go le basadi teng, ba lebile ba le kwa kgakala; mo go bone go le Maria Magtalena le Maria mmaagwe Jakobo yo mmotlana le Jose, le Salome," 
Mark15:41 ba e rileng a le kwa Galelea, ba mo sala morago, ba mo direla; le basadi ba bangwe ba bantsi ba ba ileng kwa Jerusalema le ene." 
Mark15:42 E rile jaanong go setse go le maitsiboa, ka e le la iketleetso, e bong letsatsi le le latelwang ke la Sabata," 
Mark15:43 ga tla Josefa wa Arimathea, e le mongwe yo o tlotlegang wa lekgotla, yo le ene o ne a lebeletse puso ya Modimo; a tsena ka bopelokgale kwa go Pilato, a kopa serepa sa ga Jesu." 
Mark15:44 Pilato a gakgamala, fa a setse a sule. A bitsa molaodi-wa-lekgolo, a mmotsa gore a e setse e le sebaka a ntse a sule." 
Mark15:45 Ya re a sena go utlwa mo molaoding-wa-lekgolo, a neela Josefa serepa." 
Mark15:46 Yo a reka lesela, a mo pagolola, a mo phuthela ka lone, a ba a mmaya mo lebitleng le le neng le gabilwe mo lefikeng; a ba a pitikela lentswe mo mojakong wa lone." 
Mark15:47 Maria Magtalena le Maria mma Jose ba bona fa a fitlhilweng teng. 
Mark16:1 E rile Sabata a sena go feta, Maria Magtalena le Maria, mma Jakobo, le Salome ba reka ditlolo tse di nkgang monate gore ba ye go mo tlotsa." 
Mark16:2 Ya re ka moso phakela, ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, ba fitlha fa lebitleng, letsatsi le tlhaba." 
Mark16:3 Foo ba raana ba re: “Ke mang yo o tla re pitikololelang lentswe fa mojakong wa lebitla?” 
Mark16:4 Mme ya re ba leba, ba bona lentswe le pitikolotswe; gonne le ne le le legolo thata." 
Mark16:5 Ya re ba tsena mo lebitleng, ba bona lekau le ntse ka fa ntlheng ya le le jang, le apere kobo e tshweu; ba be ba rerega." 
Mark16:6 La ba raya la re: “Se reregeng; lo batla Jesu wa Nasaretha yo o neng a bapotswe. O tsogile, ga a yo fa! Bonang felo fa ba ne ba mmeile teng!" 
Mark16:7 Jaanong yaang lo bolelele barutwa ba gagwe le Petoro gore o lo etelela pele go ya kwa Galelea; lo tla mmona teng, ka fa a lo boleletseng ka teng.”" 
Mark16:8 Ke fa ba tswa mo lebitleng, ba tshaba; gonne thoromo le therego di ne di ba tshwere; mme ba se ka ba bua sepe le ope, ka gonne ba boifa." 
Mark16:9 Ya re a sena go tsoga e sa le ka moso ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, a bonala pele kwa go Maria Magtalena yo a kileng a kgarameletsa medemone e e supang ntle mo go ene." 
Mark16:10 Ene a ya a bolelela bone ba ba neng ba na le Jesu, ba hutsafetse, ba lela." 
Mark16:11 Mme bone, ya re ba utlwa gore o a phela, e bile o bonywe ke ene, ba se ka ba dumela." 
Mark16:12 Morago ga moo a iponatsa go ba le babedi ba bone ka popego e sele, fa ba tsamaya ba ya kwa nageng." 
Mark16:13 Le bone ba ya ba bolelela ba bangwe; mme le bone ba se ka ba ba dumela. 
Mark16:14 La bofelo a iponatsa go ba ba 11, ba ntse fa dijong, a kgalemela go sa dumeleng ga bone le bopeloethata jwa bone, ka ba se ka ba dumela ba ba mmonyeng a sena go tsosiwa." 
Mark16:15 A ba a ba raya a re: “Yaang le lefatshe lotlhe, lo rerele lobopo lotlhe Efangele." 
Mark16:16 Yo o dumelang, a ba a kolobediwa, o tla pholosiwa; yo o sa dumeleng ene o tla atlholwa." 
Mark16:17 Ditshupo tse di tla supelang ba ba dumelang ke tse: Ba tla kgarameletsa medemone ntle ka leina la me; ba tla bua ka diteme tse dintšhwa. 
Mark16:18 Ba tla tsholetsa dinoga; mme le fa ba ka nwa se se bolayang, ga se nke se ba dira sepe. Ba tla baya balwetse diatla, mme ba tla fola.”" 
Mark16:19 Jaanong e rile Morena Jesu a sena go bua nabo, a tsholelediwa kwa legodimong, a nna ka fa ntlheng ya le le jang la Modimo." 
Mark16:20 Mme bone ba tswa, ba rera mo dintlheng tsotlhe, Morena a ntse a dira nabo, a tlhomamisa Lefoko ka ditshupo tse di le latelang." 
Luke1:1 Batho ba le bantsi ba setse ba dirile letsapa la go kwala ka thulaganyo polelo ya tse di dirafetseng mo go rona, tse di tlhomameng," 
Luke1:2 fela jaaka re di neilwe ke ba ba di bonyeng ka matlho go tswa kwa tshimologong, mme ba nna badiredi ba Lefoko." 
Luke1:3 Le nna, ya re ke sena go tlhotlhomisa tsotlhe ka botlalo go tswa tshimologong, ka gopola gore go ka nna molemo go di go kwalela ka thulaganyo, wena Theofilo yo o tlotlegang segolo," 
Luke1:4 gore ò tle ò itse boikanyego jwa mafoko a ò a rutilweng. 
Luke1:5 Mo malatsing a ga Herote, kgosi ya Jutea, go ne go le moperesiti mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Sagaria, wa lesomo la ga Abia; mosadi wa gagwe e ne e le wa bomorwadia Arone, leina la gagwe e le Elisabete." 
Luke1:6 Ba bo ba siame fa pele ga Modimo ka bobedi jwa bone, ba tsamaya mo ditaolong tsotlhe le mo ditaong tsa Morena, ba se na molato." 
Luke1:7 Mme ba bo ba se na ngwana, ka Elisabete e le moopa, ba bile ba setse ba tsofetse ka bobedi jwa bone." 
Luke1:8 Ya re a dira tiro ya boperesiti fa pele ga Modimo ka fa thulaganyong ya lesomo la gagwe," 
Luke1:9 a tshwarwa ke tengwa ka fa tlwaelong ya boperesiti go tsena mo Tempeleng ya Morena gore a tshube maswalo. 
Luke1:10 Mme phuthego yotlhe ya batho ya bo e rapela, e le ka fa ntle ka nako ya go tshuba maswalo." 
Luke1:11 Ke fa go bonala fa go ene moengele wa Morena, a eme ka fa ntlheng ya le le jang ya aletare ya maswalo." 
Luke1:12 Ya re Sagaria a mmona, a rerega, mme poifo ya mo wela." 
Luke1:13 Moengele a mo raya a re: “Sagaria, ò se ka wa boifa; gonne thapelo ya gago e utlwilwe. Elisabete, mosadi wa gago, o tla go belegela ngwana wa mosimane, mme ò bitse leina la gagwe Johane." 
Luke1:14 O tla nna le boitumelo le boipelo; mme ba bantsi ba tla itumelela go tsalwa ga gagwe; 
Luke1:15 ka gonne o tla nna mogolo fa pele ga Morena. Ga a nke a nwa weine, le fa e le seno se se tagang, mme o tla tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo go tloga sebopelong sa ga mmaagwe." 
Luke1:16 Ba bantsi ba bomorwa Iseraele o tla ba sokololela go Morena, Modimo wa bone." 
Luke1:17 O tla mo etelela pele mo moweng le mo thateng ya ga Elia go sokololela dipelo tsa borra-bana mo baneng, le ba ba sa utlweng go ba sokololela mo maikutlong a basiami, go baakanyetsa Morena setšhaba se se etleeditseng.”" 
Luke1:18 Sagaria a raya moengele a re: “Seo ke tla se lemoga ka eng? Gonne ke monna mogolo, le mosadi wa me o tsofetse.”" 
Luke1:19 Moengele a mo araba a re: “Ke nna Gaberiele yo ke emeng fa pele ga Modimo; mme ke romilwe go bua nao le go go bolelela mafoko ao a boitumelo. 
Luke1:20 Mme bona, o tla nna semumu, o retelelwa ke go bua go fitlha mo letsatsing le dilo tseo di tla dirafalang ka lone, ka o sa dumela mafoko a me a a tla dirafadiwang ka sebaka sa ona.”" 
Luke1:21 Mme batho ba bo ba lebeletse Sagaria, jaanong ba gakgamalela tiego ya gagwe mo Tempeleng." 
Luke1:22 Ya re a tswa, a retelelwa ke go bua nabo; ba lemoga gore o bonye pontsho mo Tempeleng. Mme a nna a ba gwetlha, a fela a le semumu." 
Luke1:23 Ya re malatsi a tirelo ya gagwe a sena go feta, a ya kwa gae." 
Luke1:24 E rile morago ga malatsi ao, Elisabete, mosadi wa gagwe, a ithwala, a ba a iphitlha dikgwedi tse tlhano a re:" 
Luke1:25 “Morena o ntiretse jalo mo malatsing a o nkgopotseng ka ona go ntlosa kgobo mo bathong.” 
Luke1:26 E rile ka kgwedi ya borataro moengele Gaberiele a rongwa ke Modimo kwa motseng wa Galelea o leina la ona e leng Nasaretha," 
Luke1:27 kwa lekgarebeng le le beeletsweng ke monna yo leina la gagwe e leng Josefa, wa kgotla yoora Dafita, leina la lekgarebe e le Maria." 
Luke1:28 Ya re moengele a tsena kwa go ene, a mo raya a re: “Dumela, yo o tlhogonolofaditsweng, Morena o na nao; o tshegofaditswe mo basading.”" 
Luke1:29 Ya re a mmona, a rerega thata ka lefoko leo, a akanya tumediso eo gore ke e ntseng jang." 
Luke1:30 Moengele a mo raya a re: “Maria, ò se ka wa boifa; gonne ò bonye bopelotlhomogi mo Modimong." 
Luke1:31 Reetsa: O tla ithwala, ò belega ngwana wa mosimane, leina la gagwe ò le bitse Jesu." 
Luke1:32 Ene yoo o tla nna mogolo, a bidiwa Morwa Mogodimodimo. Morena Modimo o tla mo naya sedulo sa bogosi sa ga Dafita rraagwe." 
Luke1:33 O tla nna kgosi mo ntlong ya ga Jakobe ka bosakhutleng; bogosi jwa gagwe ga bo nke bo nna le bokhutlo.” 
Luke1:34 Maria a raya moengele a re: “Seo se tla dirafala jang, ka ke sa itse monna?”" 
Luke1:35 Moengele a mo araba a re: “Mowa o o Boitshepo o tla tla mo go wena, le thata ya Mogodimodimo e tla go ritifalela; mme ka ntlha ya moo ngwana yo o boitshepo yo o tla belegwang ke wena o tla bidiwa Morwa Modimo." 
Luke1:36 Bona, Elisabete wa ga eno le ene o ithwele ngwana wa mosimane mo botsofeng jwa gagwe; kgwedi eno ke ya borataro ya gagwe, ene yo o neng a bidiwa moopa." 
Luke1:37 Gonne ga go na sepe se se ka palelang Modimo.” 
Luke1:38 Foo Maria a re: “Bona, ke lelata la Morena; a go ntirafalele ka fa lefokong la gago.” Jaanong moengele a mo tlogela." 
Luke1:39 Mo malatsing ao Maria a nanoga, a ya ka potlako kwa lefatsheng la makgabana, kwa motseng mongwe wa Juta," 
Luke1:40 a feta a tsena mo ntlong ya ga Sagaria, a dumedisa Elisabete." 
Luke1:41 Ya re Elisabete a utlwa tumediso ya ga Maria, ngwana a tlola mo mpeng ya gagwe. Mme Elisabete a tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo," 
Luke1:42 a tlhatlosa lentswe a re: “O tshegofaditswe mo basading, go bile go tshegofaditswe leungo la mmele wa gago." 
Luke1:43 Seo se ntswela kae, fa mma Morena wa me a ka tla kwano go nna?" 
Luke1:44 Gonne bona, e rile lentswe la tumediso ya gago le tsena mo ditsebeng tsa me, ngwana a tlola ka boipelo mo mpeng ya me." 
Luke1:45 Mme go sego yo o dumetseng, ka gonne tse ò di boleletsweng ke Morena di tla dirafala.”" 
Luke1:46 Maria a re: “Pelo ya me e godisa Morena," 
Luke1:47 mowa wa me o ipelela Modimo, Mopholosi wa me." 
Luke1:48 Gonne o ne a leba bobotlana jwa lelata la gagwe. Bona, go tloga jaanong ditshika tsotlhe di tla mpitsa yo o sego;" 
Luke1:49 ka gonne Yo-o-thata o ntiretse tse dikgolo; leina la gagwe le boitshepo. 
Luke1:50 Boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe bo mo go ba ba mmoifang mo ditshikatshikeng. 
Luke1:51 O dirile ka thata ya letsogo la gagwe; a falatsa ba ba ikgodisang mo kakanyong ya dipelo tsa bone. 
Luke1:52 O digile dikgosi tse di thata mo ditulong tsa tsona tsa bogosi; a godisa ba babotlana. 
Luke1:53 Ba ba tshwerweng ke tlala o ba kgorisitse tse di molemo; mme bahumi a ba tsamaisa ba iphotlhere. 
Luke1:54 O thusitse Iseraele, motlhanka wa gagwe, a gopola boutlwelo-botlhoko," 
Luke1:55 fela jaaka a buile le borraetsho, e leng Aborahame le losika lwa gagwe ka bosakhutleng.”" 
Luke1:56 Mme Maria a nna nae, e ka nna dikgwedi tse tharo, a ba a boela kwa gae." 
Luke1:57 Jaanong lobaka lwa ga Elisabete lwa go belega lwa fitlha, mme a belega ngwana wa mosimane." 
Luke1:58 E rile baaga-mmogo le ba ga gabo ba utlwa gore Morena o mo godiseditse boutlwelo-botlhoko jwa gagwe, ba itumela nae." 
Luke1:59 Ya re ka letsatsi la robobedi ba tla go rupisa ngwana, mme ba re ba mmitsa Sagaria ka leina la ga rraagwe." 
Luke1:60 Mme mmaagwe a araba a re: “E seng jalo! O tla bidiwa Johane.” 
Luke1:61 Ba mo raya ba re: “Ga go na ope mo go ba ga eno yo o bidiwang ka leina leo.” 
Luke1:62 Ba gwetlha rraagwe, ba mmotsa gore o rata ngwana a bidiwe mang?" 
Luke1:63 Ya re a sena go lopa letlapa, a kwala a re: “Leina la gagwe ke Johane.” Mme ba gakgamala botlhe." 
Luke1:64 Foo molomo wa gagwe wa bulega ka bonako, le loleme lwa gagwe lwa funologa, a ba a bua, a baka Modimo." 
Luke1:65 Poifo ya wela botlhe ba ba agileng tikologong ya bone; dikgang tsotlhe tseo tsa bolelwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe la makgabana la Jutea. 
Luke1:66 Botlhe ba ba di utlwang ba di tshola ka pelo ba re: “Kana ngwana yo, o tla nna eng?” Gonne letsogo la Morena le ne le na nae." 
Luke1:67 Jaanong Sagaria rraagwe a tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo, a bua ka ona a re:" 
Luke1:68 “A go bakwe Morena, Modimo wa Iseraele; gonne o lekotse morafe wa ona, wa o direla kgololo." 
Luke1:69 O re emiseditse lonaka lwa pholoso mo ntlong ya ga Dafita, motlhanka wa ona," 
Luke1:70 jaaka o buile ka melomo ya baporofeti ba ona ba ba boitshepo go tswa metlheng ya bogologolo 
Luke1:71 wa re: O tla re namolela mo babeng ba rona, le mo mabogong a botlhe ba ba re tlhoileng," 
Luke1:72 gore o direle borraetsho boutlwelo-botlhoko, o be o gopole kgolagano e e boitshepo ya ona," 
Luke1:73 e bong ikano e o e ikanetseng Aborahame rraetsho," 
Luke1:74 go re naya gore e re re golotswe mo mabogong a baba ba rona, re o direle re se na poifo," 
Luke1:75 re le mo boitshepong le mo tshiamong fa pele ga ona ka malatsi otlhe a rona. 
Luke1:76 Mme le wena, ngwana, o tla bidiwa moporofeti wa Mogodimodimo; gonne o tla etelela Morena pele go baakanya ditsela tsa gagwe," 
Luke1:77 go naya morafe wa gagwe kitso ya pholoso ka go itshwarelwa dibe tsa ona," 
Luke1:78 ka ntlha ya boutlwelo-botlhoko jo bo boteng jwa Modimo wa rona, jo tlhabo ya lesedi e e tswang kwa godimo e tla re lekolang ka jona," 
Luke1:79 go sedimosetsa ba ba ntseng mo lefifing le mo moriting wa loso, go siamisetsa dinao tsa rona mo tseleng ya kagiso.”" 
Luke1:80 Mme ngwana a gola, a tia mo moweng; a ba a nna mo dikakeng go fitlha mo letsatsing la go ipontsha mo go Iseraele." 
Luke2:1 E rile mo malatsing ao ga tswa taolo kwa go Kaisara Auguseto gore lefatshe lotlhe le kwalwe. 
Luke2:2 Go kwalwa moo ga ntlha go dirilwe fa Kirenio a le molaodi wa Siria. 
Luke2:3 Botlhe ba ya go kwalwa, mongwe le mongwe a ya kwa motseng wa ga gabo." 
Luke2:4 Josefa le ene a tswa kwa Galelea mo motseng wa Nasaretha, a tlhatlogela kwa Jutea kwa motseng wa ga Dafita o o bidiwang Betleheme, ka a le wa kgotla yoora Dafita;" 
Luke2:5 a ya go kwalwa le Maria, mosadi yo a mmeeletseng, a le moimana." 
Luke2:6 Ya re ba le koo, ga fitlha malatsi a o tla belegang ka ona," 
Luke2:7 a ba a belega morwawe wa ntlha, a mo phutha ka masela, a mo latsa mo segopong sa dipitse; ka gonne ba ne ba se na bonno mo ntlong ya baeti." 
Luke2:8 Go ne go le badisa mo lefatsheng leo, ba le kwa nageng, ba tlhokometse letsomane la bone bosigo." 
Luke2:9 Mme moengele wa Morena a ema fa go bone, le kgalalelo ya Morena ya bonega dintlheng tsotlhe tsa bone; mme ba boifa ka poifo e kgolo." 
Luke2:10 Moengele a ba raya a re: “Se boifeng; gonne bonang, ke lo tsiseditse mafoko a a molemo a boitumelo jo bogolo jo e tla nnang jwa batho botlhe;" 
Luke2:11 ka gonne gompieno lo tsaletswe Mogolodi mo motseng wa ga Dafita, yo e leng Keresete Morena." 
Luke2:12 “Mme se e tla nnang sesupo mo go lona ke se: Lo tla fitlhela lesea le phuthilwe ka masela, le letse mo segopong sa dipitse.”" 
Luke2:13 Ka tshoganyetso bontsi jwa masomo a legodimo jwa nna le moengele, jwa baka Modimo jwa re:" 
Luke2:14 “Tlotlo a e nne ya Modimo kwa magodimong le kagiso mo lefatsheng mo bathong ba o ba itumelelang.” 
Luke2:15 Ya re baengele ba sena go ba tlogela ba ya legodimong, badisa ba raana ba re: “A re yeng tlhe kwa Betleheme, re bone selo se, se se dirafetseng, se Morena o se re itsisitseng.”" 
Luke2:16 Ba ya ka bonako, ba fitlhela Maria le Josefa le lesea le letse mo segopong sa dipitse." 
Luke2:17 Ya re ba sena go bona, ba bega lefoko le ba le boleletsweng ka ga ngwana yo." 
Luke2:18 Mme botlhe ba ba utlwang ba gakgamalela tse ba di boleletsweng ke badisa. 
Luke2:19 Maria a boloka dipolelo tsotlhe tseo, a di akanya mo pelong ya gagwe." 
Luke2:20 Jaanong badisa ba boa, ba galaletsa Modimo, ba o boka ka ntlha ya tsotlhe tse ba di utlwileng le tse ba di bonyeng, fela jaaka ba ne ba boleletswe." 
Luke2:21 E rile malatsi a a robedi a sena go feta a gore ngwana a rupisiwe, leina la gagwe la bidiwa Jesu, le a le teilweng ke moengele, a ise a ithwalwe." 
Luke2:22 Ya re malatsi a phepafatso ya gagwe a sena go feta ka fa molaong wa ga Moše, ba mo isa kwa Jerusalema go mo supa fa pele ga Morena," 
Luke2:23 fela jaaka go kwadilwe mo molaong wa Morena ga twe: “Mosimane mongwe le mongwe wa maitibolo o tla bidiwa moitshepi wa Morena.” 
Luke2:24 Ba ya go ntsha setlhabelo ka fa go builweng mo molaong wa Morena ka teng, e bong sa maphoi a le mabedi, gongwe maebana a le mabedi." 
Luke2:25 Go ne go le motho mo Jerusalema yo leina la gagwe e leng Simeone; motho yoo a bo a siame, e le mmoifa-Modimo, a lebeletse kgomotso ya Iseraele, mme Mowa o o Boitshepo o le mo go ene." 
Luke2:26 O kile a senolelwa ke Mowa o o Boitshepo gore ga a nke a bona loso, a ise a bone Motlodiwa wa Morena." 
Luke2:27 A isiwa ke Mowa kwa Tempeleng. Ya re batsadi ba tsisa ngwana Jesu go mo direla ka fa mokgweng wa molao," 
Luke2:28 a mo tshola ka mabogo, a boka Modimo a re:" 
Luke2:29 “Morena, jaanong o naya motlhanka wa gago tsela, ka fa lefokong la gago, go ya ka kagiso;" 
Luke2:30 ka gonne matlho a me a bonye pholoso ya gago 
Luke2:31 e o e etleeditseng mo matlhong a merafe yotlhe," 
Luke2:32 e bong lesedi le le tla senogelang baheitane le go galaletsa morafe wa gago wa Iseraele.” 
Luke2:33 Mme rraagwe le mmaagwe ba gakgamalela dilo tse di buiwang ka ga gagwe. 
Luke2:34 Jaanong Simeone a ba tshegofatsa, a raya Maria mmaagwe a re: “Bona, ngwana yo o beetswe go wa le go tsoga ga ba bantsi mo go Iseraele, le go nna sesupo se se ganediwang." 
Luke2:35 Le wena ka wesi lerumo le tla phunyeletsa mowa wa gago, gore megopolo ya dipelo tse dintsi e senolwe.”" 
Luke2:36 Le gona ga bo go le Hana moporofeti, morwadia Fanuele, wa lotso lwa ga Asere; yoo a bo a tsofetse thata, mme o ne a phedile le monna wa gagwe dinyaga tse di supang go tloga mo bokgarebeng jwa gagwe." 
Luke2:37 E ne e le motlholagadi yo o ka nnang dinyaga di le 84, yo o sa tlogeng mo Tempeleng, a direla Modimo ka go itima dijo le ka merapelo bosigo le motshegare." 
Luke2:38 Yoo a tla ka yona nako eo, a leboga Modimo, a bua ka ga gagwe le botlhe ba ba lebeletseng kgololo ya Jerusalema." 
Luke2:39 Ya re ba sena go swetsa tsotlhe ka fa molaong wa Morena, ba boela kwa Galelea kwa motseng wa ga bone wa Nasaretha." 
Luke2:40 Ngwana ene a gola, a tia, a tlala botlhale, mme tshegofatso ya Modimo e ne e le mo go ene."
