Luke15:12 Yo mmotlana a raya rraagwe a re: ‘Rra, mphe kabelo ya boswa e e ntshwanetseng.’ Mme rraagwe a ba kgaoganya tse ba phelang ka tsona." 
Luke15:13 Morago ga malatsi a se kae morwa yo mmotlana a phutha tsotlhe, a hudugela kwa lefatsheng le le kwa kgakala; teng a senya khumo ya gagwe ka bophelo jo bo maswe." 
Luke15:14 Ya re a sena go senya tsotlhe, ga nna leuba mo lefatsheng leo, mme a simolola go tlhoka." 
Luke15:15 Jaanong a ya a ikopanya le mongwe wa baagi ba lefatshe leo. Yoo a mo romela kwa magoleng a gagwe go disa dikolobe. 
Luke15:16 A ba a eletsa go ikgorisa ka maungo a ditlhare a a jewang ke dikolobe, mme a se ka a fiwa ke ope." 
Luke15:17 Ke fa a itharabologelwa a re: ‘Barapiwa ba ga rre ba bantsi jang, ba ba nang le dijo tse dintsi, mme nna fano ke swa ka tlala." 
Luke15:18 Ke tla nanoga ke ya kwa go rre, ke mo raya ke re: Rra, ke leofetse legodimo le wena;" 
Luke15:19 ga ke tlhole ke tshwanela go bidiwa morwao; ntire jaaka mongwe wa batlhanka ba gago.’ 
Luke15:20 A ba a nanoga, a ya kwa go rraagwe. “Ya re a sa ntse a le kgakala, rraagwe a mmona, a tlhomoga pelo, a taboga, a wela mo thamong ya gagwe, a mo atla." 
Luke15:21 Morwawe a mo raya a re: ‘Rra, ke leofetse legodimo, ka ba ka leofela wena; ga ke tlhole ke tshwanela go bidiwa morwao.’" 
Luke15:22 Mme rraagwe a raya batlhanka ba gagwe a re: ‘Akofang lo ntshe seaparo se sentlentle, lo mo apese, lo mo rwese palamonwana mo monwaneng, le ditlhako mo dinaong;" 
Luke15:23 lo be lo tsiseng namane e e nontshitsweng, lo e tlhabe; mme a re jeng, re itumele;" 
Luke15:24 ka gonne morwaake yo o ne a sule, mme o bile o tsogile; o ne a latlhegile, mme o bonywe.’ Mme ba simolola go itumela." 
Luke15:25 “Morwawe yo mogolo a bo a le kwa tshimong. Ya re a tla a atamela ntlo, a utlwa kopelo le dipina." 
Luke15:26 A ipiletsa mongwe wa batlhanka, a mmotsa gore go direlwang jaana." 
Luke15:27 Yoo a mo raya a re: ‘Monnao o gorogile, mme rraago o tlhabile namane e e nontshitsweng, ka a mmonye a sa phela.’" 
Luke15:28 “Ke fa a galefa, a gana go tsena. Foo rraagwe a tswa, a mo rapela." 
Luke15:29 Ene a araba rraagwe a re: ‘Bona, ke ntse ke go direla dinyaga tse dintsi. Ga ke ise nke ke tlole taolo ya gago; mme nna ga o ise o ke o mphe potsane gore ke itumele le ditsala tsa me." 
Luke15:30 Mme e rile morwao yo a tla, yo o jeleng dithuo tsa gago le diaka, wa mo tlhabela namane e e nontshitsweng.’" 
Luke15:31 Rraagwe a mo raya a re: ‘Ngwanaka, o na le nna ka metlha, mme tsotlhe tsa me ke tsa gago." 
Luke15:32 Mme e ne e le tshwanelo go ipela le go itumela; ka gonne monnao yo o ne a sule, mme o tsogile; o ne a latlhegile, mme o bonywe.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Le gona a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Go ne go le motho mongwe yo o humileng, a na le mookamedi wa ditiro; mme yo, o ne a latofadiwa fa pele ga gagwe gore o senya di-tsa-gagwe." 
Luke16:2 A mmitsa, a mo raya a re: ‘Ke eng se ke se utlwang ka ga gago? Ikarabele ka ga bookamedi jwa gago; gonne ga o ka ke wa tlhola o nna mookamedi.’" 
Luke16:3 Mookamedi a ikakanya a re: ‘Ke tla dirang, ka e le fa morena wa me a tlosa bookamedi mo go nna? Ga ke itse go otola, mme go kopa go ntlhabisa ditlhong." 
Luke16:4 Ke lemogile se ke tla se dirang gore e tle e re ke ntshiwa mo bookameding, ba tle ba ntsholele mo matlong a bone.’" 
Luke16:5 “Jaanong a bitsa mongwe le mongwe wa ba ba molato le morena wa gagwe, a raya wa ntlha a re: ‘O molato o le kae le morena wa me?’" 
Luke16:6 Yoo a re: ‘Makokoko a le 200 a lookwane.’ Mookamedi a mo raya a re: ‘Tsaya lokwalo lwa gago lwa molato, o nne fa fatshe, o kwale ka bonako o re: A le 100.’" 
Luke16:7 A tloga a raya yo mongwe a re: ‘Wena o molato o le kae?’ Yoo a re: ‘Dikgetse tsa mabele di le 300.’ Mookamedi a mo raya a re: ‘Tsaya lokwalo lwa gago lwa molato, o kwale o re: Di le 240.’" 
Luke16:8 “Morena a boka mookamedi wa tshiamololo, ka a dirile ka botlhale; gonne bana ba lefatshe leno mo losikeng lwa bone ba tlhalefile go gaisa bana ba lesedi.”" 
Luke16:9 Gape ke lo raya ke re: “Itireleng ditsala ka Mamone wa tshiamololo gore e tle e re a fela, di lo tsholele mo maagong a a sa khutleng." 
Luke16:10 Yo o ikanyegang mo go se sennye o ikanyega le mo go se segolo; mme yo o sa siamang mo go se sennye, ga a siama le mo go se segolo." 
Luke16:11 Jaanong fa lo ne lo sa ikanyege ntlheng ya Mamone yo o sa siamang, ke mang yo o tla lo ikanyang mo khumong ya boammaaruri?" 
Luke16:12 Fa lo ne lo sa ikanyege mo go sa boeng, ke mang yo o tla lo nayang se e leng sa lona?" 
Luke16:13 “Ga go motlhanka ope yo o ka direlang barena ba le babedi; gonne o tla tlhoa yo mongwe, mme a rate yo mongwe; gongwe o tla ngaparela yo mongwe, mme a nyatse yo mongwe. Ga lo ka ke lwa direla Modimo le Mamone.”" 
Luke16:14 Jaanong le Bafarisai, ba ba neng ba rata madi, ba utlwa tsotlhe tse, ba be ba mo sonya." 
Luke16:15 Mme Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ke lona ba lo itshiamisang fa pele ga batho, mme Modimo o itse dipelo tsa lona; gonne se se tlotlomaditsweng ke batho, ke makgapha fa pele ga Modimo." 
Luke16:16 “Molao le baporofeti ba felela ka Johane; go tloga foo go rerwa Efangele ya puso ya Modimo, mme mongwe le mongwe o itshukunyetsa mo go yona." 
Luke16:17 Go feta ga legodimo le lefatshe go ka nna botlhofo bogolo go go wela fa fatshe ga lotshwaonyana longwe lwa molao. 
Luke16:18 “Mongwe le mongwe yo o tlhalang mosadi wa gagwe, a nyala o sele, o dira kgokafalo; le yo o nyalang mosadi yo o tlhadilweng ke monna, o dira kgokafalo." 
Luke16:19 “Go ne go le motho mongwe yo o humileng, a apere seaparo se sehibidu le lesela le lentle la letseta, a nna a itumela ka letsatsi le letsatsi mo bontlengtleng." 
Luke16:20 Mme mokopi mongwe yo o bidiwang Lasaro, o ne a beilwe fa kgorong ya gagwe, a tletse dintho." 
Luke16:21 A eletsa go kgorisiwa ka tse di wang mo tafoleng ya mohumi: gape ga tla dintšwa, tsa latswa dintho tsa gagwe." 
Luke16:22 “Ya re mokopi a swa, a belegelwa ke baengele kwa sehubeng sa ga Aborahame. Mohumi le ene a swa, a fitlhwa." 
Luke16:23 Ya re a le mo felong ga baswi, a tsholetsa matlho a le mo ditlhokofatsong, a bona Aborahame kgakala le Lasaro a le mo sehubeng sa gagwe." 
Luke16:24 Ke fa a kua a re: ‘Rara Aborahame, nkutlwele botlhoko, o rome Lasaro gore a ine ntlha ya monwana wa gagwe mo metsing, a ntsidifatse loleme; gonne ke utlwa botlhoko mo kgabong e.’" 
Luke16:25 “Mme Aborahame a re: ‘Ngwanaka, gopola gore o amogetse tse di molemo tsa gago mo bophelong jwa gago, mme Lasaro ene tse di bosula jalo; mme jaanong mono ene o a gomodiwa, mme wena o a tlhokofadiwa." 
Luke16:26 Mme kwa ntle ga tsotlhe tseo go na le kgophu e kgolo fa gare ga rona le lona, gore ba ba kwano ba ba ratang go fetela go lona, ba retelelwe, le ba ba koo, ba ba ratang go tla kwano go rona, ba palelwe.’" 
Luke16:27 Mohumi a re: ‘Rra, fa go le jalo, ke go rapela gore o mo rome kwa ntlong ya ga rre;" 
Luke16:28 gonne ke na le bomorwa-rre ba le batlhano; a ye teng, a ba tlhagise, e se re gongwe le bone ba tla felong fano ga tlhokofatso.’" 
Luke16:29 “Aborahame a mo fetola a re: ‘Ba na le Moše le baporofeti; a ba utlwe bone!’ 
Luke16:30 Mme mohumi a re: ‘Nnyaya, Aborahame rra, mme fa mongwe a tswa mo baswing, a ya kwa go bone, ba tla sokologa.’" 
Luke16:31 Foo Aborahame a mo raya a re: ‘Fa ba sa utlwe Moše le baporofeti, ga ba ka ke ba kgonega, le fa mongwe a ka tsoga mo baswing.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Jaanong a raya barutwa ba gagwe a re: “Dikgopiso ga di ka ke tsa thibelwa go tla; mme go latlhega yo di tlang ka ene. 
Luke17:2 Go ka nna botoka mo go ene, fa lolwala lo ka gokelelwa mo molaleng wa gagwe, mme a digelwa mo lewatleng, bogolo go gore a kgopise mongwe wa ba babotlana ba." 
Luke17:3 Itiseng! “E re fa mokaulengwe wa gago a leofa, o mo kgalemele; mme fa a ikwatlhaya, o mo itshwarele." 
Luke17:4 Fa a go leofela gasupa ka letsatsi, mme a boela gasupa kwa go wena a re: ‘Ke a ikwatlhaya,’ o mo itshwarele.”" 
Luke17:5 Jaanong baapostolo ba raya Morena ba re: “Re okeletse tumelo!” 
Luke17:6 Mme Morena a re: “Fa lo ka bo lo na le tumelo e e kana ka tlhaka ya peo ya mmasetete, lo ne lo ka raya setlhare se sa mmurubele lo a re: ‘Kumoga o itlhome mo lewatleng!’ mme se ka lo utlwa." 
Luke17:7 “Ke ofe wa lona yo e ka reng a na le motlhanka yo o lemang, gongwe yo o disang, ya re a tswa kwa tshimong, a mo raya a re: ‘Akofa o tle, o nne fa dijong’?" 
Luke17:8 Mme ga ke re, o ka mo raya a re: ‘Baakanya se ke tla lalelang ka sona, o itlame, o ntirele, ke tle ke je, ke nwe pele; mme morago ga moo o ka ja, wa nwa’?" 
Luke17:9 A o a tle a leboge motlhanka, ka a dirile tse a di laetsweng? Ga ke gopole jalo." 
Luke17:10 Le lona jalo e ne e re lo sena go dira tsotlhe tse lo di laetsweng, lo re: ‘Re batlhanka ba re se nang molemo; re dirile fela se re neng re tshwanetse go se dira.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 E rile ba etela kwa Jerusalema, a ralala naga e e fa gare ga Samaria le Galelea." 
Luke17:12 Ya re a tsena mo motsaneng mongwe, banna ba le some ba balepero ba mo kgatlhantsha, ba emetse kgakala;" 
Luke17:13 ba tsholetsa mantswe ba re: “Jesu, Moruti, re utlwele botlhoko!”" 
Luke17:14 Ya re a ba bona, a ba raya a re: “Yaang lo itshupetse baperesiti!” Ya re ba tsamaya, ba phepafala." 
Luke17:15 Fa jaanong mongwe wa bone a bona gore o fodisitswe, a boa, a galaletsa Modimo ka lentswe le legolo," 
Luke17:16 a ba a wela fa fatshe ka sefatlhego fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a mo leboga; mme yoo ya bo e le Mosamaria." 
Luke17:17 Mme Jesu a araba a re: “A ga go a fodisiwa ba le some? Ba ba robongwe ba kae? 
Luke17:18 A ga go a bonwa ope mo go bone yo o boileng go naya Modimo tlotlo, fa e se moeng yo?”" 
Luke17:19 Jaanong a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o tsamae; tumelo ya gago e go pholositse.” 
Luke17:20 E rile a bodiwa ke Bafarisai gore puso ya Modimo e tla tla leng, a ba araba a re: “Puso ya Modimo ga e tle mo e ka lejwang ka matlho;" 
Luke17:21 le gona ga ba nke ba re: ‘Bonang, ke e!’ gongwe: ‘Ke ele!’ Gonne itseng gore puso ya Modimo e teng mo go lona.”" 
Luke17:22 A ba a raya barutwa a re: “Metlha e tla tla e lo tla eletsang go bona lengwe la malatsi a Morwa-Motho ka yona, mme ga lo nke lo le bona." 
Luke17:23 Ba tla lo raya ba re: ‘Bonang, ke yole!’ gongwe ‘Bonang, ke yo!’ Se tsamaeng le e seng go ba ela tlhoko." 
Luke17:24 Gonne Morwa-Motho, mo letsatsing la gagwe, o tla nna jaaka legadima le le gadimang, le tswa ntlheng nngwe ya legodimo, le phatsimela kwa ntlheng e nngwe." 
Luke17:25 Mme pele o tshwanetse go boga di le dintsi le go latlhwa ke ba metlha eno. 
Luke17:26 Mo malatsing a Morwa-Motho go tla nna fela jaaka go kile ga dirafala mo malatsing a ga Noa: 
Luke17:27 Ba ne ba ja, ba nwa, ba nyala, ba nyalwa, go tla go fitlha mo letsatsing le Noa o tsenyeng mo arekeng ka lone, mme morwalela wa tla, wa ba nyeletsa botlhe." 
Luke17:28 Le gona go tla nna fela jaaka go kile ga dirafala mo malatsing a ga Lote: Ba ne ba ja, ba nwa, ba reka, ba rekisa, ba tlhoma, ba aga;" 
Luke17:29 mme ka letsatsi le Lote o duleng mo Sotoma ka lone, ga na molelo le sebabole di tswa kwa legodimong, tsa ba laila botlhe." 
Luke17:30 Mme go tla nna fela jalo ka letsatsi le Morwa-Motho o bonatsegang ka lone. 
Luke17:31 “Ka letsatsi leo, a yo o tla nnang mo godimo ga ntlo, mme di-tsa-gagwe di le ka mo ntlong, a se ka a fologa go di tsaya; le ene jalo yo o kwa tshimong, a se ke a boela kwa go tse di kwa morago." 
Luke17:32 Ikgakololeng tsa mosadi wa ga Lote. 
Luke17:33 Motho yo o batlang go boloka bophelo jwa gagwe o tla latlhegelwa ke jona; mme yo o latlhegelwang ke jona, o tla bo tsalelwa sešwa." 
Luke17:34 Ke lo raya ke re: Mo bosigong joo, ba le babedi ba tla re ba le mo bolaong bo le bongwe fela, mongwe a tsewe, yo mongwe a tlogelwe." 
Luke17:35 Basadi ba le babedi ba tla re ba sila mo felong go le gongwe, mongwe a tsewe, yo mongwe a tlogelwe." 
Luke17:36 Ba le babedi ba tla re ba le mo tshimong, mongwe a tsewe, yo mongwe a tlogelwe.”" 
Luke17:37 Ke fa ba mmotsa ba re: “Kae, Morena?” A ba raya a re: “Kwa setoto se leng teng, manong a tla phuthegela teng.”" 
Luke18:1 A ba a bua nabo ka setshwantsho sa gore motho o tshwanetse go rapela ka metlha, a sa lape," 
Luke18:2 a re: “Go ne go le moatlhodi mo motseng mongwe yo o sa boifeng Modimo, le motho a sa re sepe ka ene." 
Luke18:3 Mo motseng oo go ne go le motlholagadi yo o neng a ntse a tla kwa go ene a re: ‘Ntsheka mo moganetsing wa me!’ 
Luke18:4 Mme a gana sebaka se seleele; morago ga moo a akanya a re: ‘Le fa ke sa boife Modimo, le motho ke sa re sepe ka ene," 
Luke18:5 le fa go ntse jalo, ka motlholagadi yo a ntapisa, ke tla mo seka gore a se ka a mphatlola tlhogo ka go boaboa ga gagwe.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Morena a ba a re: “Lo utlwile se moatlhodi yo o sa siamang o se buileng. 
Luke18:7 A Modimo ona ga o nke o atlholela baitlhaolelwi ba ona ba ba o tlhaeletsang bosigo le motshegare, gongwe a o ka ba diegela?" 
Luke18:8 Ke lo raya ke re: O tla ba atlholela ka bonako. Fela a e tla re Morwa-Motho a tla, a fitlhele tumelo mo lefatsheng?”" 
Luke18:9 Le gona a bua ka setshwantsho se le bangwe ba ba iikanyang gore ba siame, mme ba nyatsa ba bangwe, a re:" 
Luke18:10 “Batho ba babedi ba kile ba ya kwa Tempeleng go rapela, mongwe e le Mofarisai, yo mongwe e le mokgethisi." 
Luke18:11 “Mofarisai a ema, a ithapelela jaana a re: ‘Modimo, ke a go leboga ka ke sa tshwane le batho ba bangwe, e bong dinokwane le basiamolodi le bagokafadi, gongwe jaaka mokgethisi yo." 
Luke18:12 Ke itima dijo gabedi ka beke; ke kgetha bosome jwa tsotlhe tse ke di amogelang.’ 
Luke18:13 “Mokgethisi ene a emela kgakala, le matlho a se ka a rata go a tsholeletsa kwa legodimong, mme a itshwara seledu a re: ‘Modimo, intshwarele nna moleofi!’" 
Luke18:14 Ke lo raya ke re: Yo, o fologetse kwa ntlong ya gagwe a siamisitswe, e seng yole; gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o ikgodisang o tla kokobediwa, mme yo o ikokobetsang o tla godisiwa.”" 
Luke18:15 Jaanong batho ba tsisa le bana ba bannye go ene gore a ba ame; ya re barutwa ba bona, ba ba kgalemela." 
Luke18:16 Mme Jesu a ipiletsa bana, a raya barutwa a re: “Lesang bana ba tle go nna, lo se ka lwa ba iletsa; gonne puso ya Modimo ke ya ba ba ntseng jalo." 
Luke18:17 Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Motho yo o sa amogeleng puso ya Modimo jaaka ngwana, ga a nke a tsena mo go yona ka gope.”" 
Luke18:18 Jaanong molaodi mongwe a mmotsa a re: “Moruti yo o molemo, nka dirang gore ke rue bophelo jo bo sa khutleng?”" 
Luke18:19 Mme Jesu a mo araba a re: “O mpiletsang yo o molemo? Ga go ope yo o molemo, fa e se a le mongwe fela, e bong Modimo." 
Luke18:20 Ditaolo o a di itse, tse di reng: ‘O se ka wa akafala; o se ka wa bolaya; o se ka wa utswa; o se ka wa supa tshupo ya kako; tlotla rraago le mmaago.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Ene a re: “Tsotlhe tse ke di tshegeditse go tloga mo bonyaneng jwa me.” 
Luke18:22 Ya re Jesu a utlwa, a mo raya a re: “O sa ntse o tlhoka selo se le sengwe fela: Rekisa tsotlhe tse o nang natso, o abele bahumanegi, mme o tla nna le lehumo kwa magodimong, o be o tle, o ntshale morago.”" 
Luke18:23 Ya re yoo a utlwa jalo, a hutsafala segolo, ka a ne a humile thata." 
Luke18:24 Mme ya re Jesu a mmona a hutsafetse segolo, a bua a re: “Go thata jang mo go ba ba nang le mahumo go tsena mo pusong ya Modimo!" 
Luke18:25 Gonne go botlhofo gore kammele e tsene ka letshoba la lomao, bogolo go mohumi go tsena mo pusong ya Modimo.”" 
Luke18:26 Ba ba utlwileng ba botsa ba re: “Mme go ka pholosiwa mang?” 
Luke18:27 Ene a re: “Tse di palelang batho ga di palele Modimo.” 
Luke18:28 Foo Petoro a re: “Bona, rona re tlogetse di-tsa-rona, re bile re go setse morago.”" 
Luke18:29 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Ga go ope yo o tlogetseng ntlo gongwe mosadi gongwe bana ba ga rraagwe gongwe bagolo gongwe bana, ka ntlha ya puso ya Modimo," 
Luke18:30 yo o se kitlang a di amogela gantsi mo sebakeng seno, le go amogela botshelo jo bo sa khutleng mo lefatsheng le le tlang.”" 
Luke18:31 Jaanong a itseela ba ba 12, a ba raya a re: “Bonang, re tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema, mme tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng ka ga Morwa-Motho ke baporofeti, di tla dirafala;" 
Luke18:32 gonne o tla neelwa baheitane, a sotlwa, a direlwa maswe, a kgwelwa mathe." 
Luke18:33 Ba tla mo seola, ba mmolaya. Mme o tla tsoga ka letsatsi la boraro.”" 
Luke18:34 Mme ba se ka ba tlhaloganya sepe sa tseo, lefoko leo le ne le ba fitlhegetse, ba se ka ba lemoga tse di buiwang." 
Luke18:35 E rile a atamela Jerigo, sefofu sengwe sa bo se ntse fa tseleng, se kopa." 
Luke18:36 Ya re a utlwa bontsi bo feta, a botsa gore ke eng seo." 
Luke18:37 Ba mmolelela gore Jesu wa Nasaretha o a feta. 
Luke18:38 Ke fa a goa a re: “Jesu, Morwa Dafita, nkutlwele botlhoko!”" 
Luke18:39 Foo ba ba eteletseng pele ba mo kgalemela ba re, a didimale; mme ene a kua bogolobogolo a re: “Morwa Dafita, nkutlwele botlhoko!”" 
Luke18:40 Jesu a ema, a laola gore a tsisiwe go ene. Ya re a sena go mo atamela, Jesu a mmotsa a re:" 
Luke18:41 “O rata gore ke go direle eng?” Yoo a re: “Morena, dira gore ke boe ke bone.”" 
Luke18:42 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Boa o bone! Tumelo ya gago e go thusitse.” 
Luke18:43 A boa a bona ka bonako, a ba a mo sala morago, a galaletsa Modimo. Batho botlhe, ya re ba bona, ba naya Modimo pako." 
Luke19:1 Jaanong a fitlha kwa Jerigo, a ralala motse." 
Luke19:2 Ga bo go le monna teng, leina la gagwe e le Sakeo, e le mogolo wa bakgethisi, mme a humile." 
Luke19:3 Yoo a batla go bona gore Jesu ke mang, mme a palelwa ka ntlha ya batho ba bantsi, ka a ne a le mokhutshwane." 
Luke19:4 Ka moo a tabogela kwa pele, a palama setlhare sa motlhatsa gore a mmone, ka a tla feta ka tsela eo." 
Luke19:5 Ya re Jesu a fitlha felong foo, a lelala, a mo raya a re: “Sakeo, akofa o fologe! Gonne ke tshwanetse go tlhola mo ntlong ya gago kajeno.”" 
Luke19:6 Yoo a akofa a fologa, a ba a mo tshola ka boitumelo." 
Luke19:7 Ya re botlhe ba bona, ba ngongorega ba re: “O gorogetse kwa monneng wa moleofi go tlhola teng.”" 
Luke19:8 Sakeo a ema, a raya Morena a re: “Bona, Morena, bontlhanngwe jwa tse ke nang natso ke bo naya bahumanegi; mme fa ke tseetse mongwe sengwe ka patiko, ke tla se mmusetsa gane.”" 
Luke19:9 Mme Jesu a mo raya a re: “Kajeno pholoso e dirafaletse ntlo e, ka le ene e le morwa Aborahame:" 
Luke19:10 gonne Morwa-Motho o tsile go batla le go pholosa se se latlhegileng.” 
Luke19:11 Ya re ba ntse ba utlweletse, a oketsa a bolela setshwantsho, ka a le gaufi le Jerusalema, mme bone ba itlhoma gore puso ya Modimo e tla akofa e bonala." 
Luke19:12 Jaanong a re: “Motho mongwe yo o tlotlegang o kile a etela kwa lefatsheng le le kgakala, a ya go ikamogelela bogosi, a itse go boa." 
Luke19:13 A bitsa batlhanka ba gagwe ba ba lesome, a neela mongwe le mongwe diranta di le some, a ba raya a re: ‘Bapalang ka tsona go tsamae ke tle.’" 
Luke19:14 Mme ba motse wa ga gabo ba bo ba mo tlhoile, ba roma barongwa go mo latela ba re: ‘Ga re rate gore yo a re buse.’" 
Luke19:15 “Ya re a boa, a sena go amogela bogosi, a laola gore batlhanka bao ba bidiwe, ba o ba neetseng madi, gore a tle a itse se mongwe le mongwe a se bapetseng." 
Luke19:16 Wa ntlha a tla a re: ‘Morena, diranta tsa gago tse di some di bapetse diranta tse dingwe di le lekgolo.’" 
Luke19:17 Morena a mo raya a re: ‘Ahee, motlhanka yo o siameng ke wena; e re ka o ne wa ikanyega mo go se sennye, o nne molaodi wa metse e le some.’" 
Luke19:18 Wa bobedi a tla a re: ‘Morena, diranta tsa gago tse di some di bapetse diranta tse dingwe di le 50.’" 
Luke19:19 Le ene a mo raya a re: ‘Le wena, o laole metse e le metlhano.’" 
Luke19:20 “Yo mongwe a tla a re: ‘Morena, bona, diranta tsa gago tse di some ke tse; ke di bolokile mo leseleng la mofufutso;" 
Luke19:21 gonne ke ne ke go boifa, ka o le motho yo o bogale; o tsaya se o sa se bayang, o robe se o sa se jwalang.’" 
Luke19:22 Kgosi ya mo raya ya re: ‘Motlhanka yo o bosula ke wena! Ke tla go atlhola ka se se tswang mo molomong wa gago. A o itsile gore ke motho yo o bogale, ke tsaya se ke sa se bayang, ke robe se ke sa se jwalang?" 
Luke19:23 O ne o sa tsenyetseng madi a me mo bankeng? Mme nna ya re ke tla, nka bo ke a amogela le dinamane tsa ona.’" 
Luke19:24 “Jaanong a raya ba ba emeng teng a re: ‘Mo amogeng diranta tse di some tseo, lo di nee yo o nang le diranta di le lekgolo.’" 
Luke19:25 Ba mo raya ba re: ‘Morena, kana o na le diranta di le lekgolo.’" 
Luke19:26 Ke lo raya ke re: ‘Mongwe le mongwe yo o nang le sengwe o tla fiwa; mme yo o se nang sepe, le se o nang naso o tla se amogwa." 
Luke19:27 Fa e le baba bao ba me ba ba ganneng ke ba busa, ba tsiseng kwano, lo ba bolaele fa pele ga me.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a fetela pele a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema." 
Luke19:29 E rile a atamela Bethefage le Bethania, fa thabeng e e bidiwang ya Diolefa, a roma barutwa ba le babedi ba gagwe" 
Luke19:30 a re: “Yaang kwa motsaneng o lo lebaganyeng nao, o e tla reng lo tsena mo go ona, lo fitlhele eselana e golegilwe, e e iseng e ke e palangwe ke motho ope; e gololeng, lo e tsise." 
Luke19:31 Mme fa mongwe a lo botsa a re: ‘Lo e gololelang?’ lo mo ree lo re: ‘Morena o a e batla.’ ” 
Luke19:32 Ba ba romilweng ba ya, ba fitlhela go ntse fela jaaka a ba boleletse." 
Luke19:33 Ya re ba golola eselana, beng ba yona ba ba botsa ba re: “Lo gololelang eselana eo?”" 
Luke19:34 Ba re: “Morena o a e batla.” 
Luke19:35 Jaanong ba e tsisa go Jesu, ba baya dikobo tsa bone mo eselaneng, ba mo palamisa." 
Luke19:36 Ya re a tsamaya ba ala diaparo tsa bone mo tseleng. 
Luke19:37 Jaanong ya re a setse a atamela fa mhapheng wa Thaba ya Diolefa, lesomo lotlhe la barutwa la simolola go baka Modimo ka boitumelo ka lentswe le legolo ka ntlha ya ditiro tsa nonofo tsotlhe tse ba di bonyeng" 
Luke19:38 ba re: “A go bakwe Kgosi e e tlang mo leineng la Morena! Kagiso e nne kwa legodimong le kgalalelo kwa magodimodimong!” 
Luke19:39 Foo bangwe ba Bafarisai ba ba mo bontsing ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, kgalemela barutwa ba gago!”" 
Luke19:40 Mme a araba a re: “Ke a lo bolelela ka re: Fa ba, ba ka didimala, majwe a tla kua.”" 
Luke19:41 Ya re a atamela, mme a bona motse, a o lelela" 
Luke19:42 a re: “Ntlha le wena mo letsatsing leno la gago o ka bo o lemoga tse di go isang kagisong! Mme jaanong di fitlhetswe matlho a gago; 
Luke19:43 gonne malatsi a tla tla mo go wena, a baba ba gago ba tla kgobelang mmu tikologong ya gago ka ona, ba go dikanyetsa ka ntwa, ba go pitlaganya ntlheng tsotlhe:" 
Luke19:44 Ba tla go gatakelela fa fatshe le bana ba gago ba ba mo teng ga gago, mme ga ba nke ba tlogela mo go wena lentswe lepe le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe, ka o se ka wa lemoga nako e Modimo o go etetseng ka yona.”" 
Luke19:45 Jaanong a tsena mo Tempeleng, a simolola go leleka ba ba rekisang le ba ba rekang mo go yona." 
Luke19:46 A ba raya a re: “Go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘Ntlo ya me e tla nna Ntlo ya thapelo.’ Mme lona lo e dirile logaga lwa dinokwane.” 
Luke19:47 Jaanong a ruta ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe mo Tempeleng. Mme baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo le bagolo ba morafe ba batla go mmolaya; 
Luke19:48 fela ba se ka ba bona se ba ka se dirang; gonne batho botlhe ba ne ba mo kgomaretse, ba mo reetsa." 
Luke20:1 Ka lengwe la malatsi ao, ya re a ruta batho mo Tempeleng, a rera Efangele, baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo ba tla go ene, ba na le bagolo ba morafe," 
Luke20:2 ba bua nae ba re: “Re bolelele gore dilo tse o di dira ka thata efe? Gongwe ke mang yo o go neileng thata eo?” 
Luke20:3 A ba araba a re: “Le nna ke tla lo botsa lefoko lengwe; mpolelelang: 
Luke20:4 Kolobetso ya ga Johane a e ne e tswa kwa legodimong gongwe mo bathong?” 
Luke20:5 Ba ikakanya ba re: “Fa re ka re: ‘Kwa legodimong,’ o tla re: ‘Lo ne lo sa mo dumeleleng?’" 
Luke20:6 Mme fa re ka re: ‘Mo bathong,’ batho botlhe ba tla re kgobotletsa; gonne ba dumetse ruri gore Johane e ne e le moporofeti.”" 
Luke20:7 Foo ba araba ba re: “Ga re itse gore e ne e tswa kae.” 
Luke20:8 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Gona le nna ga ke lo bolelele thata e ke dirang dilo tse ka yona.” 
Luke20:9 Jaanong a simolola go bolelela batho setshwantsho se a re: “Motho mongwe o ne a lema tshimo ya moweine, a e neela balemi, a ba a eta sebaka se seleele." 
Luke20:10 Ya re ka nako ya teng a roma motlhanka kwa baleming gore ba mo nee mangwe a maungo a tshimo ya moweine. Mme balemi ba mo itaya, ba mmusa a iphotlhere." 
Luke20:11 A boa a roma motlhanka yo mongwe; mme le ene ba mo itaya, ba mo dira mo go tlhabisang ditlhong, ba mmusa a iphotlhere." 
Luke20:12 A boa a roma wa boraro; mme le yoo ba mo ntsha dintho, ba mo lelekela kwa ntle." 
Luke20:13 Foo mong wa tshimo ya moweine a ikakanya a re: ‘Ke tla dirang? Ke tla roma morwaake yo o rategang. E ka re gongwe ba mo tlotla.’ 
Luke20:14 Mme ya re balemi ba mmona, ba ikakanya ba re: ‘Yo ke ene moja-boswa; tlaang re mmolaeng gore boswa e nne jwa rona.’" 
Luke20:15 Mme ba mo kgarameletsa kwa ntle ga tshimo ya moweine, ba mmolaya. “Jaanong mong wa tshimo ya moweine o tla ba dirang?" 
Luke20:16 O tla tla, a bolaya balemi bao; mme tshimo ya moweine o tla e neela ba sele.” Ya re ba utlwa, ba re: “A go se nne jalo!”" 
Luke20:17 Mme a ba leba a re: “Go kaya eng fa go kwadilwe ga twe: “ ‘Lentswe le baagi ba le latlhileng ke lone le le dirilweng letlapa la sekhutlo’? 
Luke20:18 “Mongwe le mongwe yo o welang mo letlapeng leo o tla thubagana; mme yo le tla mo welang le tla mo tšhwetlakanya.” 
Luke20:19 Ka yona nako eo Baitsedikwalo le baperesiti ba bagolo ba batla go mo tshwara, mme ba boifa batho, ka gonne ba ne ba lemoga gore o iteisa bone ka setshwantsho se." 
Luke20:20 Jaanong ba mo lepa, ba roma balaledi ba ba itimokanyang ka go ipaya basiami, gore ba mo tshware mo lefokong lengwe, ba be ba mo neele mmuso, e bong mo thateng ya molaodi." 
Luke20:21 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Moruti, re itse gore o bua, o ruta ka tshiamo, o sa gobelelele ope, mme o ruta tsela ya Modimo ka boammaaruri." 
Luke20:22 A re letleletswe go neela Kaisara lekgetho gongwe nnyaya?” 
Luke20:23 Ya re ka a lemoga bolotsana jwa bone, a ba raya a re:" 
Luke20:24 “Ntshupetseng ledi la lekgetho! Le na le setshwantsho le sekwalo sa ga mang?” Ba re: “Sa Kaisara.” 
Luke20:25 A ba raya a re: “Ka moo he, ntshetsang Kaisara tse e leng tsa Kaisara, le Modimo tse e leng tsa Modimo.”" 
Luke20:26 Mme ba retelelwa ke go mo tshwara mo polelong ya gagwe fa pele ga batho, ba be ba gakgamalela karabo ya gagwe, ba didimala." 
Luke20:27 Jaanong ga tla go ene Basadukai bangwe ba ba latolang tsogo ya baswi, ba mmotsa ba re:" 
Luke20:28 “Moruti, Moše o re laetse go re: ‘Fa motho a swa, a na le mosadi, mme a se na ngwana, a morwa-rraagwe a tsee mosadi yoo, a tsosetse morwa-rraagwe losika.’" 
Luke20:29 Jaanong go kile ga bo go le bomorwa monna ba ba supang. Wa ntlha a tsaya mosadi; mme a swa a se na ngwana. 
Luke20:30 Le wa bobedi a tsaya mosadi yoo," 
Luke20:31 le wa boraro a mo tsaya; ga nna fela jalo mo go bone ka bosupa jwa bone; ba se ka ba tlogela bana, mme ba swa." 
Luke20:32 La bofelo mosadi le ene a swa. 
Luke20:33 Mosadi yoo jaanong mo tsogong ya baswi e tla nna mosadi wa ga mang mo go bone? Ka gonne ba ne ba mo nyetse ka bosupa jwa bone.” 
Luke20:34 Jesu a ba araba a re: “Bana ba lefatshe leno ba a nyala, ba a nyalwa;" 
Luke20:35 mme ba ba kaiwang ba siametse go abelwa lefatshe lele le tsogo ya baswi ga ba nyale, ga ba nyalwe," 
Luke20:36 le gona ga ba ka ke ba tlhola ba a swa; gonne ba tshwana le baengele, e bile ke bana ba Modimo, ka e le bana ba tsogo ya baswi." 
Luke20:37 Mme fa e le gore baswi ba a tsosiwa, Moše le ene o supile jalo fa setlhareng sa mitlwa, fa a bitsa ‘Morena Modimo wa ga Aborahame, Modimo wa ga Isaka, Modimo wa ga Jakobe.’" 
Luke20:38 Ke go re, Modimo ga se wa baswi, ke wa baphedi; gonne botlhe ba phelela ona.”" 
Luke20:39 Foo bangwe ba Baitsedikwalo ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, o buile sentle.”" 
Luke20:40 Gonne ba ne ba tshaba go mmotsa sengwe gape. 
Luke20:41 Jaanong a ba botsa a re: “Ba raya jang, fa ba re: Keresete ke morwa Dafita?" 
Luke20:42 Kana Dafita ka esi o bua mo lokwalong lwa Dipesalome a re: “ ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Dula ka fa letsogong la me le le jang," 
Luke20:43 go ya ke be ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.’ 
Luke20:44 “Jaanong he, fa Dafita a mmitsa ‘Morena’, e ka nna morwawe jang?”" 
Luke20:45 Ya re batho botlhe ba utlweletse, a raya barutwa a re:" 
Luke20:46 “Itiseng mo go Baitsedikwalo ba ba ratang go tsamaya ka dikobo tse di kgokgothang, ba bile ba rata ditumediso mo dipatlelong, le ditulo tse di kwa pele mo disenagogeng, le manno a a kwa pele mo meletlong;" 
Luke20:47 ba metsa matlo a batlholagadi, mme ba itimokanya ka go rapela go le goleele. Bone ba tla bona petso e kgolo bogolo mo katlholong.”" 
Luke21:1 Ya re Jesu a tsholetsa matlho, a bona bahumi ba latlhela dikabelo tsa bone mo letloleng la Modimo." 
Luke21:2 A ba a bona motlholagadi yo o humanegileng a latlhela madinyana a le mabedi teng. 
Luke21:3 Jaanong a re: “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Motlholagadi yo o humanegileng yo, o latlhetse go feta botlhe;" 
Luke21:4 gonne botlhe ba, ba latlhetse tsa letlotlo la bone mo dikabelong tsa Modimo, mme ene o latlhetse tsa lehuma la gagwe, e bong tsotlhe tse a nang natso, a phelang ka tsona.”" 
Luke21:5 Ya re bangwe ba bua ka ga Tempele gore e kgabisitswe ka majwe a mantle le ka dineo tse di neetsweng Tempele, a bua a re:" 
Luke21:6 “Fa e le tse lo di bonang tseo, malatsi a tla tla a go se kitlang go lesiwa lentswe lepe ka ona le tlhatlaganye le le lengwe, le le se kitlang le digwa.”" 
Luke21:7 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Moruti, kana dilo tse di tla nna leng? Gape sesupo sa nako e di tla dirafalang ka yona ke sefe?”" 
Luke21:8 Mme a re: “Lo itise gore lo se timediwe! Gonne ba bantsi ba tla tla ka leina la me, ba ipitsa ba re: ‘Ke nna Keresete’; gape ba re: ‘Nako e atametse.’ Lo se ka lwa ba sala morago." 
Luke21:9 Mme mogang lo utlwelang dintwa le dikhuduego, lo se ka lwa rerega; gonne tseo di tshwanetse go dirafala pele. Mme bokhutlo ga bo nke bo tla ka pele.”" 
Luke21:10 Gape a ba raya a re: “Morafe o tla tsogela morafe, le bogosi bo tla tsogela bogosi." 
Luke21:11 Go tla nna dithoromo tse dikgolo tsa lefatshe, le malwetse a leroborobo, le ditlala kwa le kwa. Go tla nna dipoitshego le ditshupo tse dikgolo di tswa mo legodimong." 
Luke21:12 Fela, pele ga dilo tsotlhe tseo ba tla lo tshwara, ba lo bogisa, ba lo neela mo disenagogeng le mo matlong a kgolegelo, ba lo gogela fa pele ga dikgosi le balaodi ka ntlha ya leina la me." 
Luke21:13 Mme moo go tla lo dirafalela gore go supege ka ga me. 
Luke21:14 Ka moo, elang tlhoko gore lo se ka lwa akanyetsa kwa pele ka fa lo tla ikarabelang ka teng;" 
Luke21:15 gonne nna ke tla lo naya molomo le botlhale o baganetsi botlhe ba lona ba se kitlang ba kgona go emelana najo, le fa e le go bo ganetsa." 
Luke21:16 Mme le gona lo tla tshwarisiwa ke bagolo ba lona le bomorwa-rraalona le ba ga lona le ditsala; ba bile ba tla bolaya bangwe ba lona. 
Luke21:17 Lo tla nna ba ba ilegang mo go botlhe ka ntlha ya leina la me. 
Luke21:18 Mme le fa e le thiri e le nngwe ya ditlhogo tsa lona, ga e nke e nyelela." 
Luke21:19 Lo tla bona maphelo a lona ka tshwarelelo ya lona. 
Luke21:20 “E re lo bona Jerusalema o dikanyeditswe ka ntwa ke mephato, lo be lo itse gore go senngwa ga ona go atametse." 
Luke21:21 Foo ba ba mo Jutea a ba tshabele kwa dithabeng; ba ba mo teng ga motse a ba tswe; ba ba kwa nageng a ba se tsene mo go ona. 
Luke21:22 Gonne ‘ao ke Malatsi a Pusoloso’ gore tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng di dirafale. 
Luke21:23 Go latlhega ba baimana le ba ba amusang mo malatsing ao! Gonne go tla nna tlalelo e kgolo mo lefatsheng le petso e e bogale mo morafeng o. 
Luke21:24 Ba tla wa ka bogale jwa tšhaka, ba isiwa botshwarong kwa merafeng yotlhe; Jerusalema o tla gatakwa ke baheitane go tle go tsamae metlha ya baheitane e tlale." 
Luke21:25 “Foo go tla nna ditshupo mo letsatsing le mo ngweding le mo dinaleding; le mo lefatsheng go tla nna tlalelo ya merafe e le mo tharaanong, go le mesumo ya lewatle le makhubu a lone." 
Luke21:26 Batho ba tla idibadiwa ke poifo le tebelelo ya dilo tse di tlang mo lefatsheng; gonne dithata tsa magodimo di tla reketlisiwa. 
Luke21:27 Foo ba tla bona Morwa-Motho a tla ka leru ka thata le kgalalelo e kgolo. 
Luke21:28 Mme e re tseo di simolola go dirafala, lo inamologe, lo tsholetse ditlhogo, ka gonne kgololo ya lona e a atamela.”" 
Luke21:29 A ba a ba bolelela setshwantsho a re: “Bonang mofeie le ditlhare tsotlhe; 
Luke21:30 fa lo di bona di setse di tlhoga, lo be lo itse ka losi gore selemo se setse se le gaufi." 
Luke21:31 Le lona jalo, e re lo bona dilo tseo di dirafala, lo itse gore puso ya Modimo e gaufi." 
Luke21:32 “Ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Losika lo ga lo nke lo fela ka gope, dilo tsotlhe di ise di dirafale." 
Luke21:33 Legodimo le tla feta le lefatshe, mme mafoko a me ga a nke a feta ka gope." 
Luke21:34 “Lo itise, e se re gongwe dipelo tsa lona tsa imafadiwa ke bojabobe le botagwa le ditshwenyegelo tsa botshelo, mme letsatsi leo la lo wela ka tshoganyetso jaaka seru;" 
Luke21:35 gonne le tla wela botlhe ba ba agileng mo lefatsheng lotlhe. 
Luke21:36 Disang he, lo rapele ka nako nngwe le nngwe gore lo tle lo kgone go falola mo go tsotlhe tseo tse di tla dirafalang le go ema fa pele ga Morwa-Motho.”" 
Luke21:37 E ne ya re motshegare a tlhole a ruta mo Tempeleng, mme e re bosigo a tswele kwa ntle, a ye go lala kwa thabeng e e bidiwang ya Diolefa." 
Luke21:38 Mme batho botlhe ba phakelele kwa go ene mo Tempeleng go mo utlwa. 
Luke22:1 Jaanong moletlo wa Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang o o bidiwang Tlolaganyo wa bo o atametse. 
Luke22:2 Mme baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo ba batla ka fa ba ka mmolayang ka teng; gonne ba ne ba boifa morafe. 
Luke22:3 Jaanong Satane a tsena mo go Jutase yo o bidiwang Isekariote, e le mongwe wa ba ba 12." 
Luke22:4 Yoo a ya a bua le baperesiti ba bagolo le balaodi ba Tempele ka fa a ka mo ba neelang ka teng. 
Luke22:5 Bone ba itumela, ba be ba dumelana go mo naya madi." 
Luke22:6 A ba a dumela. Jaanong a batla nako e e lebanyeng ya go mo ba neela, bontsi bo se yo." 
Luke22:7 Jaanong ga tla letsatsi la Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang, le kwana ya Tlolaganyo e tshwanetseng go tlhajwa ka lone." 
Luke22:8 Jesu a roma Petoro le Johane a re: “Yaang lo re baakanyetse Tlolaganyo gore re e je.” 
Luke22:9 Ba mmotsa ba re: “O rata gore re e baakanyetse kae?” 
Luke22:10 A ba raya a re: “Bonang, e tla re lo sena go tsena mo motseng, lo kgatlhane le monna a rwele nkgwana ya metsi; lo mo sale morago go ya mo ntlong e o tsenang mo go yona," 
Luke22:11 lo ree mong wa ntlo lo re: ‘Moruti o a go botsa a re: Ntlwana ya baeti e kae, kwa nka jelang Tlolaganyo teng le barutwa ba me?’" 
Luke22:12 Ene o tla lo supetsa ntlwana e kgolo e e fa godimo, e e adilweng mesamo; lo baakanyetse teng.”" 
Luke22:13 Ba ya ba fitlhela go ntse fela jaaka a ba boleletse, ba baakanyetsa Tlolaganyo." 
Luke22:14 Ya re nako e sena go fitlha, a rapama fa dijong, a na le baapostolo ba ba 12." 
Luke22:15 Jaanong a ba raya a re: “Ke eleditse thata go ja Tlolaganyo e le lona, ke ise ke boge;" 
Luke22:16 gonne ke lo raya ke re: Ga nke ke tlhola ke e ja ka gope, go tle go tsamae e dirafale ka botlalo mo pusong ya Modimo.”" 
Luke22:17 Ke fa a tsaya senwelo, a leboga a re: “Se tseeng, lo se hupalane." 
Luke22:18 Gonne ke lo raya ke re: Go tloga jaanong ga nke ke tlhola ke nwa leungo la moweine, go tle go tsamae puso ya Modimo e tle.”" 
Luke22:19 A ba a tsaya senkgwe, a leboga, a se nathoganya, a se ba naya a re: “Se ke mmele wa me o o neelwang lona; dirang jalo gore e nne go nkgopola.”" 
Luke22:20 Fela jalo le sona senwelo a se tsaya morago ga selalelo a re: “Senwelo se ke kgolagano e ntšhwa ka madi a me a lo a tshololelwang. 
Luke22:21 “Mme itseng, seatla sa yo o ntswang se na le nna mo tafoleng." 
Luke22:22 Tota Morwa-Motho o tsamaya jaaka go laotswe; fela go latlhega motho yoo yo o mo tswang.” 
Luke22:23 Ke fa ba simolola go botsanya gore e ka nna ofe wa bone yo o tla dirang jalo. 
Luke22:24 Le gona ga tsoga kgang mo go bone ya gore ke ofe wa bone yo o ka kaiwang yo mogolo. 
Luke22:25 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Dikgosi tsa merafe di a e busa, e bile ba ba setlhogo mo go bone ba bidiwa ‘Bababaledi ba bone.’" 
Luke22:26 Fela lona lo se nne jalo, mme yo mogolo mo go lona a a nne jaaka yo mmotlana, le yo e leng moeteledipele a a nne jaaka modiredi." 
Luke22:27 Kana yo mogolo ke ofe? A ke yo o ntseng fa dijong, gongwe yo o direlang? A ga se yo o ntseng fa dijong? Mme nna ke mo gare ga lona jaaka yo o direlang." 
Luke22:28 “Ke lona ba lo itshokileng le nna mo dipitlaganong tsa me. 
Luke22:29 Mme ke lo abela puso fela jaaka Rre a e nkabetse," 
Luke22:30 gore lo je lo nwe fa tafoleng ya me mo pusong ya me. Lo tla nna mo ditulong tsa bogosi, lo atlhola ditso tse di 12 tsa Iseraele.”" 
Luke22:31 Jaanong Morena a re: “Simona, Simona, bona, Satane o lo ipatletse gore a lo olose jaaka mabele;" 
Luke22:32 mme nna ke go rapeletse gore tumelo ya gago e se khutle. Mme wena e re o sena go sokologa, o tiise bakaulengwe ba gago.”" 
Luke22:33 Ene a mo fetola a re: “Morena, fa ke na nao, ke iketleeditse go ya le mo ntlong ya kgolegelo le mo losong.”" 
Luke22:34 Mme Jesu a re: “Ke a go bolelela, Petoro, mokoko ga o nke o lela kajeno, wena o ise o intatole gararo o re, ga o nkitse.”" 
Luke22:35 A boa a ba raya a re: “E rile ke lo roma, lo se na sekgwama le kgwatlha le ditlhako, a lo ne lwa tlhoka sengwe?” Ba re: “Le e seng sepe.”" 
Luke22:36 A ba raya a re: “A jaanong yo o nang le sekgwama, a se tsee, le kgwatlha jalo. Yo o tlhokang, a a rekise kobo ya gagwe, a reke tšhaka." 
Luke22:37 Gonne ke lo raya ke re: Se se kwadilweng se se reng: ‘O baletswe le baikepi’ se sa ntse se tshwanetse go wediwa mo go nna. Gonne tse di kwadilweng ka ga me di a dirafala.” 
Luke22:38 Foo ba re: “Morena, bona, ditšhaka tse pedi ke tse.” A ba raya a re: “Go lekanye.”" 
Luke22:39 Jaanong a tswa, a ya kwa Thabeng ya Diolefa ka fa a tlwaetseng ka teng, barutwa ba mo sala morago." 
Luke22:40 Ya re a sena go fitlha felong foo, a ba raya a re: “Rapelang gore lo se tsene mo thaelong!”" 
Luke22:41 A ba a katogana nabo, go ka nna kana ka makonopelo a lentswe, a khubama ka mangole, a rapela" 
Luke22:42 a re: “Rara, fa o rata, tlosa senwelo se mo go nna; fela a go se dirafale thato ya me, mme go dirafale ya gago!”" 
Luke22:43 Jaanong ga bonala moengele kwa go ene, a tswa legodimong, a mo thatafatsa." 
Luke22:44 Ya re a le mo tlalelong e kgolo, a rapela ka bojotlhe jwa gagwe; mofufutso wa gagwe wa nna jaaka marothodi a madi a a rothelang fa fatshe." 
Luke22:45 Ya re a tsoga mo thapelong, a tla kwa barutweng, a fitlhela ba robetse ka ntlha ya bohutsana." 
Luke22:46 A ba raya a re: “Lo robaletseng? Tsogang lo rapele go re lo se tsene mo thaelong.” 
Luke22:47 E rile a sa ntse a bua, ba bona go tla letshuti la batho, mme yo o bidiwang Jutase, mongwe wa ba 12, a bo a ba eteletse pele, a ba a atamela Jesu go mo atla." 
Luke22:48 Ke fa Jesu a mo raya a re: “Jutase, a o tshwarisa Morwa-Motho ka katlo?”" 
Luke22:49 Ya re ba ba mo dikanyeditseng ba bona se se tla dirafalang, ba botsa ba re: “Morena, a ke re reme ka tšhaka?”" 
Luke22:50 Mme mongwe wa bone a rema motlhanka wa moperesiti yo mogolo, a mo kgaola tsebe ya le le jang." 
Luke22:51 Mme Jesu a araba a re: “Lesang, go lekanye.” A ba a ama tsebe ya gagwe, a mo fodisa." 
Luke22:52 Jaanong Jesu a raya baperesiti ba bagolo le balaodi ba Tempele le bagolo ba morafe ba ba tsileng go ene a re: “A lo bolotse ka ditšhaka le melamu, jaaka e kete lo tsoma senokwane?" 
Luke22:53 E rile ke ntse ke na le lona ka malatsi otlhe mo Tempeleng, lwa se ka lwa ntshetsa diatla; mme nako eno ke nako ya lona le thata ya lefifi.”" 
Luke22:54 Foo ba mo tshwara, ba tsamaya ka ene, ba mo isa kwa ntlong ya moperesiti yo mogolo. Petoro a ba latela a le kgakala." 
Luke22:55 Ya re ba sena go gotsa molelo fa gare ga lelapa, ba ntse mmogo, Petoro a nna mo gare ga bone." 
Luke22:56 Jaanong ya re lelata lengwe le mmona a dutse fa molelong, la tlhoma matlho mo go ene, la bua la re: “Yo le ene o ne a na nae.”" 
Luke22:57 Mme a mo itatola a re: “Mosadi, ga ke mo itse.”" 
Luke22:58 Morago ga sebakanyana yo mongwe a mmona a re: “Le wena o mongwe wa bone.” Mme Petoro a re: “Monna, ga ke ene.”" 
Luke22:59 Ya re go sena go feta e ka nna nako e le nngwe fela, yo mongwe a tlhomamisa a re: “Ammaaruri, yo le ene o ne a na nae, gonne le ene ke Mogalelea.”" 
Luke22:60 Mme Petoro a re: “Monna, ga ke itse se o se buang.” Mme ka bonako, ya re a sa ntse a bua, mokoko wa lela." 
Luke22:61 Ke fa Morena a retologa, a leba Petoro, mme Petoro a gakologelwa lefoko la Morena ka fa a mo reileng ka teng a re: “E tla re mokoko o ise o lele kajeno, o intatole gararo.”" 
Luke22:62 Petoro a tswela kwa ntle, a lela mo go botlhoko." 
Luke22:63 Jaanong banna ba ba tshwereng Jesu ba mo sotla, ba mo itaaka," 
Luke22:64 ba be ba mo fapa matlho, ba mo faphola sefatlhegong, ba mmotsa ba re: “Bolela gore ke mang yo o go iteileng?”" 
Luke22:65 Le dilo tse dingwe tse dintsi ba mo kgoba ka tsona, ba mo kgala." 
Luke22:66 E rile bo sena go sa, ga phuthega bagolo ba morafe, e bong baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo, ba mo isa kwa lekgotleng la bone," 
Luke22:67 ba re: “Fa o le Keresete, re bolelele.” A ba raya a re: “Le fa nka lo bolelela, ga lo nke lo dumela;" 
Luke22:68 mme fa nka botsa, ga lo nke lo nkaraba, le fa e le go nkgolola." 
Luke22:69 Mme go tlogeng fano Morwa-Motho o tla nna ka fa letsogong le le jang la thata ya Modimo.” 
Luke22:70 Botlhe ba re: “Mme a o Morwa Modimo?” A ba araba a re: “Lo a bolela, ke nna ene.”" 
Luke22:71 Bone ba re: “Re sa batlelang tshupo? Gonne re e utlwile ka rosi ka molomo wa gagwe.” 
Luke23:1 Jaanong lekoko lotlhe la bone la nanoga, la mo isa go Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Ba simolola go mo latofatsa ba re: “Re bonye yo, a timetsa morafe wa rona, a o iletsa go ntshetsa Kaisara lekgetho, a ipolela, fa e le ene Keresete, kgosi.”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato a mmotsa a re: “A ke wena Kgosi ya Bajuta?” A mo araba a re: “O bolela jalo.” 
Luke23:4 Foo Pilato a raya baperesiti ba bagolo le matshutitshuti a batho a re: “Ga ke bone molato ope mo mothong yo.” 
Luke23:5 Mme bone ba tatalala ba re: “O hudua batho ka go rutaruta mo Jutea yotlhe; o simolotse kwa Galelea go fitlha fano.” 
Luke23:6 Ya re Pilato a utlwa ka ga Galelea, a botsa gore a motho yo ke Mogalelea." 
Luke23:7 Ya re a sena go tlhaloganya gore ke wa taolo ya ga Herote, a mo romela go Herote, yo le ene o ne a le mo Jerusalema ka malatsi ao." 
Luke23:8 E rile Herote a bona Jesu, a itumela thata; gonne o ne a sa bolo go eletsa go mmona, ka a ne a utlwile ka ga gagwe; mme a solofela gore o tla bona sesupo sengwe se dirwa ke ene." 
Luke23:9 A mmotsa mafoko a mantsi; mme ene a se ka a mo araba sepe. 
Luke23:10 Baperesiti ba bagolo le Baitsedikwalo ba ema ba mo latofatsa ka kgakalo. 
Luke23:11 Herote a mo nyatsa mmogo le badiredi ba gagwe, a mo sotla; a ba a mo apesa seaparo se se phatsimang, a mmusetsa kwa go Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Mme Herote le Pilato ba tsalana ka letsatsi leo; gonne e rile pele ba bo ba tlhoanye. 
Luke23:13 E rile Pilato a sena go phutha baperesiti ba bagolo le banna ba lekgotla le legolo le morafe," 
Luke23:14 a ba raya a re: “Lo tsisitse motho yo kwano go nna, jaaka mongwe yo o faposang batho. Kana ke mmotsoloditse fa pele ga lona, mme ka se ka ka bona molato ope mo go ene wa tse lo mo latofatsang ka tsona." 
Luke23:15 Nnyaya, le e seng Herote; gonne o mmuseditse kwano go rona; mme bonang, ga go sepe se a se dirileng se se tshwanetseng loso." 
Luke23:16 Ka moo ke tla mo watlhaya ke be ke mo golola.” 
Luke23:17 Kana o ne a tshwanetse go ba gololela mongwe ka moletlo. 
Luke23:18 Jaanong ba goela gongwe ba re: “Tlosa yo, mme o re gololele Barabase.”" 
Luke23:19 Yoo o ne a tsentswe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya pheretlho nngwe e e dirilweng mo motseng, le ka ntlha ya polao." 
Luke23:20 Mme Pilato a bua nabo gape, ka a rata go golola Jesu." 
Luke23:21 Fela ba goa gape ba re: “Mmapole, mmapole!”" 
Luke23:22 A boa a ba raya lwa boraro a re: “Kana yo, o dirile bosula bofe? Ga ke a bona molato ope o o tshwanetseng loso mo go ene; ka moo ke tla mo watlhaya ke be ke mo golola.”" 
Luke23:23 Mme ba mo emelela ka mantswe a magolo, ba mo pateletsa gore a bapolwe, mme mantswe a bone le a baperesiti ba bagolo a fenya." 
Luke23:24 Ke fa Pilato a atlhola gore go dirwe ka fa ba batlang ka teng. 
Luke23:25 A ba a golola yo o ne a tsentswe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka ntlha ya pheretlho le polao, yo ba mo lopileng; mme Jesu ene a mo neela mo thatong ya bone." 
Luke23:26 E rile ba mo isa polaong, ba tshwara mongwe, e bong Simone wa Kirene, a tswa kwa tshimong, ba mmelesa sefapaano gore a se sikare fa morago ga Jesu." 
Luke23:27 Jaanong lekoko le legolo la batho la mo sala morago, le la basadi ba ba bileng ba ithwele megono, ba mo lelela." 
Luke23:28 Foo Jesu a retologela kwa go bone a re: “Bomorwadia Jerusalema, se nteleleng, bogolo lo itelele, lo be lo lelele bana ba lona;" 
Luke23:29 gonne itseng, malatsi a e tla, a ba tla buang ka ona ba re: ‘Go sego meopa le mebele e e iseng e ke e belege le mabele a a iseng a ke a amuse.’" 
Luke23:30 Foo ba tla simolola go raya dithaba ba re: ‘Re weleng godimo!’ le makgabana ba re: ‘Re khurumetseng!’ 
Luke23:31 Gonne fa ba dira dilo tse mo setlhareng se setala, go tla dirafalang mo go se se omeletseng?”" 
Luke23:32 Ga ba ga isiwa basenyi bangwe ba le babedi go bolawa nae. 
Luke23:33 E rile ba fitlha mo felong fa go bidiwang “Logata”, ba mmapolela teng le basenyi bao, mongwe ka fa letsogong le le jang, yo mongwe ka fa go la molema." 
Luke23:34 Jesu a bua a re: “Rara, ba itshwarele; gonne ga ba itse se ba se dirang.” Mme ba kgaogana diaparo tsa gagwe ka go tlhama tengwa." 
Luke23:35 Batho ba eme ba lebile. Mme banna ba lekgotla le legolo ba nna ba mo kgoba ba re: “O pholositse ba bangwe, a a ipholose, fa e le ene Keresete, Motlhaolwi wa Modimo.”" 
Luke23:36 Le batlhabani ba mo sotla, ba tla go ene, ba mo tsisetsa motatsa" 
Luke23:37 ba re: “Fa o le Kgosi ya Bajuta, ipholose.”" 
Luke23:38 Mme ga bo go le sekwalo fa godimo ga gagwe, se se kwadilweng ka ditlhaka tsa Segerika le Seroma le Sehebere se re: “YO KE KGOSI YA BAJUTA.”" 
Luke23:39 Mongwe wa basenyi ba ba pegilweng a mo kgala a re: “A ga o Keresete ne? Ipholose, le rona o re pholose.”" 
Luke23:40 Yo mongwe a fetola, a mo kgalemela a re: “A le wena ga o boife Modimo, etswe o atlhotswe fela jaaka ene?" 
Luke23:41 Kana, fa e le rona, go re siametse; gonne re bona tse di tshwanetseng tse re di dirileng; mme yo, ene ga a dira sepe se se sokameng.”" 
Luke23:42 A ba a raya Jesu a re: “Morena, o nkgopole motlhang o tsenang mo bogosing jwa gago.”" 
Luke23:43 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Kajeno o tla nna le nna mo Parateiseng.” 
Luke23:44 Jaanong e ne e setse e ka nna nako ya motshegare; mme ga nna lefifi mo lefatsheng lotlhe go ya nakong ya boraro thapama," 
Luke23:45 letsatsi la fifala; lesire la Tempele la gagoga ka bogare. 
Luke23:46 Foo Jesu a goa ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Rara, ke neela mowa wa me mo diatleng tsa gago!” Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ntsha mowa." 
Luke23:47 E rile molaodi-wa-lekgolo a bona se se dirafetseng, a galaletsa Modimo a re: “Ruri, motho yo e ne e le mosiami.”" 
Luke23:48 Mme batho botlhe ba ba neng ba phuthegetse go bona pono e, ya re ba bona tse di dirafetseng, ba itshôla, ba boa." 
Luke23:49 Botlhe ba ba itsanyeng nae, le basadi ba ba neng ba mo setse morago ba tswa Galelea, ba ne ba emetse kgakala, ba lebile dilo tseo." 
Luke23:50 Jaanong go ne go le monna mongwe, leina la gagwe e le Josefa yo e leng monna wa lekgotla, e le monna yo o molemo, yo o siameng" 
Luke23:51 – ene o ne a sa dumelana le katlholo ya bona le tiro ya bona – e le wa Arimathea, motse wa Bajuta, yo o neng a letetse puso ya Modimo." 
Luke23:52 Yoo a ya kwa go Pilato, a kopa setoto sa ga Jesu." 
Luke23:53 Ya re a sena go se pagolola, a se phuthela ka lesela le lesweu, a se baya mo lebitleng le le gabilweng mo lefikeng, le go iseng go ke go ladiwe ope mo go lone." 
Luke23:54 E ne e le letsatsi la Iketleetso, mme Sabata o ne a atametse." 
Luke23:55 Basadi ba ba neng ba dule nae kwa Galelea, ba bo ba mo setse morago, ba bona phupu le ka fa serepa sa gagwe se laditsweng ka teng." 
Luke23:56 Ya re ba sena go boa, ba baakanya makga le ditlolo; mme ba ikhutsa ka Sabata ka fa molaong." 
Luke24:1 E rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, e sa le phakela, ba tla kwa phupung, ba tshotse makga a ba a baakantseng." 
Luke24:2 Ba fitlhela lentswe le pitikolotswe mo phupung. 
Luke24:3 Ya re ba tsena mo teng, ba se ka ba fitlhela setoto sa Morena Jesu." 
Luke24:4 Ya re ba sa ntse ba akabetse ka ntlha ya moo, ba bona banna ba le babedi ba eme fa go bone, ba apere diaparo tse di phatsimang." 
Luke24:5 Mme ya re ka ba boifa, mme ba obela difatlhego fa fatshe, banna bao ba ba raya ba re: “Lo batlelang mophedi mo baswing?" 
Luke24:6 Ga a yo fa, mme o tsositswe. Gakologelwang ka fa a buileng le lona ka teng, a sa ntse a le kwa Galelea" 
Luke24:7 a re: ‘Morwa-Motho o tshwanetse go neelwa mo diatleng tsa batho ba ba boleo, le go bapolwa le go tsoga ka letsatsi la boraro.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Foo ba gakologelwa dipolelo tsa gagwe. 
Luke24:9 Ya re ba sena go boa kwa phupung, dilo tsotlhe tseo ba di bolelela ba ba 11 le ba bangwe botlhe." 
Luke24:10 E ne e le Maria Magtalena le Johana le Maria mma Jakobo le ba bangwe ba ba nang nabo, ba ba boleletseng baapostolo dilo tseo." 
Luke24:11 Mme dipolelo tse tsa utlwala mo go bone jaaka e kete ke ditlotlo fela mme ba se ka ba dumela basadi. 
Luke24:12 Petoro a nanoga, a sianela kwa phupung. Ya re a okomela mo teng, a bona masela a masweu a beilwe a le osi, a ba a boela kwa gae, a gakgamaletse se se dirafetseng." 
Luke24:13 Jaanong ka lone letsatsi leo ba babedi ba bone ba ya kwa motsaneng wa Emause, o bokgakala jwa ona go tswa Jerusalema e neng e le dimaele tse di le robedi." 
Luke24:14 Ba buisanya ka ga dilo tsotlhe tseo tse di dirafetseng. 
Luke24:15 Ya re ba ntse ba buisanya, ba botsanya, Jesu ka esi a atamela, a tsamaya nabo." 
Luke24:16 Mme matlho a bone a bo a siregile, mo ba se kang ba mo itse." 
Luke24:17 A ba raya a re: “Mafoko a ke afe a lo a buisanyang lo ntse lo tsamaya?” Mme ba ema, ba hutsafetse." 
Luke24:18 Yo mongwe wa bone, e bong Keleopa, a mo araba a re: “A ke wena moeng o le wesi mo Jerusalema yo o sa itseng tse di dirafetseng teng mo malatsing ano?”" 
Luke24:19 A ba raya a re: “Dilo dife?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Tsa ga Jesu wa Nasaretha, yo e neng e le monna wa moporofeti yo o thata mo tirong le mo lefokong fa pele ga Modimo le batho botlhe," 
Luke24:20 ka fa baperesiti ba bagolo le ba lekgotla le legolo ba rona ba mo neetseng ka teng go atlholelwa loso, ba mmapola." 
Luke24:21 Mme rona re ne re solofetse gore ke ene yo o tla gololang Iseraele. Le gona, kwa ntle ga dilo tsotlhe tse, kajeno e setse e le letsatsi la boraro, dilo tse di ntse di dirafetse." 
Luke24:22 E bile basadi bangwe ba ga rona ba re gakgamaditse, ba ba neng ba phaketse, ba ya kwa phupung." 
Luke24:23 Mme e rile ba sa fitlhele setoto sa gagwe, ba boa ba re, ba bonye pono ya baengele ba ba reng: ‘O phedile.’" 
Luke24:24 Mme bangwe ba bone ba ba nang le rona ba ya kwa phupung, ba fitlhela go ntse fela jaaka basadi ba boletse; mme ene ba se ka ba mmona.”" 
Luke24:25 Foo Jesu a ba raya a re: “Ao, basena-tlhaloganyo ke lona, ba lo pelo di bonya go dumela tsotlhe tse baporofeti ba di buileng!" 
Luke24:26 A Keresete o ne a sa tshwanela go boga dilo tseo le go tsena mo kgalalelong ya gagwe.” 
Luke24:27 Jaanong a simolola ka Moše le ka baporofeti botlhe, a ba rarabololela tse di builweng ka ga gagwe mo Dikwalong tsotlhe." 
Luke24:28 Jaanong ya re ba atamela motsana o ba yang go ona, mme ene a dira jaaka e kete o fetela pele," 
Luke24:29 ba mo emelela ba re: “Lala le rona; gonne go maitsiboa, letsatsi le setse le fetile.” Foo a tsena, a nna nabo." 
Luke24:30 Ya re a ntse nabo fa dijong, a tsaya senkgwe, a leboga, a se nathoganya, a se ba abela." 
Luke24:31 Ke fa matlho a bone a sirologa, mme ba mo itse; a ba a nyelela mo ponong ya bone." 
Luke24:32 Jaanong ba raana ba re: “A dipelo tsa rona ga di a ka tsa tuka mo teng ga rona, fa a ntse a bua le rona mo tseleng, a re tlhalosetsa Dikwalo?”" 
Luke24:33 Mme ba nanoga ka yona nako eo, ba boela kwa Jerusalema, ba fitlhela ba ba 11 ba phuthegile le ba ba nang nabo," 
Luke24:34 ba ba reng: “Ruri, Morena o tsogile, o bonywe ke Simone!”" 
Luke24:35 Jaanong bone ba babedi ba bolela tse di dirafetseng mo tseleng le ka fa ba mo itsileng ka teng ka go nathoganya senkgwe. 
Luke24:36 E rile ba ntse ba bua dilo tseo, ene ka esi a ema mo gare ga bone, a ba raya a re: “A kagiso e nne le lona!”" 
Luke24:37 Mme ba tshoga, ba boifa, ba itlhoma ba bona sedimo." 
Luke24:38 A ba a ba raya a re: “Lo huduegelang? Dipelaelo di tsogelang mo dipelong tsa lona? 
Luke24:39 Lebang diatla tsa me le dinao tse me; gonne ke nna ka nosi; mphopholeng lo bone. Sedimo ga se na nama le marapo, jaaka lo mpona ke na le tsona.”" 
Luke24:40 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a ba bontsha diatla le dinao." 
Luke24:41 Ya re ba ise ba dumele ka ntlha ya boitumelo, mme ba gakgametse, a ba raya a re: “A lo na le se se jewang fano?”" 
Luke24:42 Ba mo naya lenatho la tlhapi e e besitsweng le la lomepe lwa dinotshe. 
Luke24:43 A di tsaya, a di ja fa pele ga bone." 
Luke24:44 A ba a ba raya a re: “Mafoko a me a ke a buileng le lona, fa ke sa na le lona, ke a go re: Tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng ka ga me mo molaong wa ga Moše le mo baporofeting le mo dipesalomeng di tshwanetse go dirafala.”" 
Luke24:45 Ya baa gona o sedimosang tlhaloganyo ya bone gore ba tlhaloganye Dikwalo. 
Luke24:46 A ba raya a re: “Go kwadilwe jalo, mme go ne go tshwanetse gore Keresete a boge, a be a tsoge mo baswing ka letsatsi la boraro," 
Luke24:47 le gore go rerelwe merafe yotlhe boikwatlhao jo bo isang boitshwarelong jwa dibe ka leina la gagwe, go simolola mo Jerusalema." 
Luke24:48 Lona lo basupi ba dilo tse. 
Luke24:49 Mme itseng, ke lo romela mpho e lo e solofeditsweng ke Rre. Lona lo nne mo motseng wa Jerusalema go tle go tsamae lo newe nonofo e e tswang kwa bogodimong.”" 
Luke24:50 Jaanong a ba gogela kwa ntle go fitlha go lebagana le Bethania; a tsholetsa mabogo a gagwe, a ba tshegofatsa." 
Luke24:51 Ya re a ntse a ba tshegofatsa, a kgaogana nabo, a tlhatlosediwa kwa legodimong." 
Luke24:52 Foo ba mo obamela, ba be ba boela kwa Jerusalema ka boitumelo jo bogolo;" 
Luke24:53 ba nna mo Tempeleng ka gale, ba leboga Modimo, ba o baka." 
John1:1 E rile mo tshimologong Lefoko la bo le ntse le le teng; Lefoko le ne le na le Modimo, mme Lefoko e ne e le Modimo." 
John1:2 Le ne le na le Modimo mo tshimologong. 
John1:3 Dilo tsotlhe di dirilwe ka lone, mme kwa ntle ga lone ga go a dirwa sepe sa tse di dirilweng." 
John1:4 Bophelo bo ne bo le mo go lone; mme bophelo e ne e le lesedi la batho. 
John1:5 Lesedi le ntse le phatsima mo lefifing mme lefifi ga le a ka la le amogela. 
John1:6 Go ne ga tla motho, a romilwe ke Modimo, leina la gagwe e le Johane." 
John1:7 Yoo o ne a tla go supa gore a supe ka ga lesedi, gore botlhe ba tle ba dumele ka ene." 
John1:8 E ne e se ene lesedi, mme a tla go supa ka ga lesedi." 
John1:9 Lesedi la boammaaruri le le bonegelang motho mongwe le mongwe e ne e le ene yo o tlang mo lefatsheng. 
John1:10 O ne a le mo lefatsheng, mme lefatshe le dirilwe ka ene; fela lefatshe ga le a ka la mo itse." 
John1:11 O ne a tla kwa ga gagwe, mme ba gagwe ba se ka ba mo tshola." 
John1:12 Le gale, botlhe ba ba neng ba mo tshola, a ba naya tshiamelo ya go nna bana ba Modimo, e bong ba ba dumelang mo leineng la gagwe;" 
John1:13 ke ba ba sa tsalwang ka madi, le e seng ka thato ya nama, le e seng ka thato ya monna, mme ba tsetswe ke Modimo." 
John1:14 Lefoko leo la nna nama, la aga mo go rona, ra ba ra bona kgalalelo ya lone, e le kgalalelo e e lebanyeng yo o tsetsweng a le esi, e tswa mo go Rara, a tletse bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri." 
John1:15 Johane o ne a supa ka ga gagwe, a kua a re: “Yo ke ene ke buileng ka ga gagwe ka re: ‘Yo o tlang morago ga me o a mpheta; gonne o ne a le teng, ke ise ke nne teng.’ ”" 
John1:16 Gonne rona rotlhe re bonye bopelotlhomogi godimo ga bopelothomogi mo botlalong jwa gagwe. 
John1:17 Kana molao o neilwe ka Moše, mme bopelotlhomogi le boammaaruri di tsile ka Jesu Keresete." 
John1:18 Ga go ope yo o kileng a bona Modimo ka motlha ope; Morwa yo o tsetsweng a le esi, yo o fa sehubeng sa ga Rara, ke ene yo o o boletseng." 
John1:19 Tshupo ya ga Johane ke e: E rile Bajuta ba roma baperesiti le Balefi go ene, ba tswa Jerusalema go mmotsa gore: “O mang?”" 
John1:20 A ipolela, a se ka a itatola, a ipolela a re: “Ga ke Keresete.”" 
John1:21 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Mme o eng? A o Elia?” A re: “Ga ke ene.” “A ke wena moporofeti yole?” A araba a re: “Nnyaya.” 
John1:22 Ke fa ba mo raya ba re: “O mang ne? Gore re tle re ba fe karabo ba ba re romileng. O a reng ka ga gago?” 
John1:23 A re: “ ‘Ke nna lentswe la mongwe yo o kuang mo sekakeng la re: Siamisang tsela ya Morena!’ ” jaaka Jesaya moporofeti a kile a bua. 
John1:24 Ba ba neng ba romilwe e ne e le ba Bafarisai. 
John1:25 Jaanong ba mmotsa ba re: “O kolobeletsang, fa o se Keresete, le e seng Elia le e seng moporofeti yole?”" 
John1:26 Johane a ba araba a re: “Nna ke kolobetsa ka metsi; mme go eme mongwe mo gare ga lona yo lo sa mo lemogeng. 
John1:27 Ke ene yo o tlang morago ga me, yo ke sa tshwanelang go funolola kgole ya setlhako sa gagwe.”" 
John1:28 Dilo tseo di dirafetse kwa Bethania kwa moseja ga Joretane, kwa Johane o neng a le teng, a kolobetsa." 
John1:29 E rile ka letsatsi le le latelang a bona Jesu a tla go ene a re: “Bonang, Kwana ya Modimo e e tlosang boleo jwa lefatshe!" 
John1:30 Yo ke ene ke buileng ka ga gagwe ka re: ‘Monna o e tla morago ga me, yo o mphetang; gonne o ne a le teng, ke ise ke nne teng.’" 
John1:31 Le nna ke ne ke sa mo lemoge, mme ke tlile go kolobetsa ka metsi gore ene a tle a senolelwe Iseraele.”" 
John1:32 Johane a ba a supa a re: “Ke bonye Mowa o fologa jaaka lephoi, o tswa legodimong, wa nna mo go ene." 
John1:33 Le nna ke ne ke sa mo lemoge; mme ene yo o nthomileng go kolobetsa ka metsi a nthaya a re: ‘Ene yo ò tla bonang Mowa o fologela go ene, o nna mo go ene, ke ene yo o kolobetsang ka Mowa o o Boitshepo.’" 
John1:34 Ke bonye, ka ba ka supa gore yo ke Morwa Modimo.”" 
John1:35 Ya re ka moso Johane a bo a eme gape, a na le barutwa ba gagwe ba le babedi;" 
John1:36 a leba Jesu a ntse a tsamaya, a ba a re: “Bonang, Kwana ya Modimo!”" 
John1:37 Barutwa ba babedi bao ba mo utlwa a bua, ba be ba sala Jesu morago." 
John1:38 Jesu a retologa, a ba bona ba mo setse morago, a ba raya a re: “Lo batlang?” Ba mo raya ba re: “Rabbi,” (mo phetolelong ke go re: Moruti) “o nna kae?”" 
John1:39 A ba raya a re: “Tlaang lo bone.” Ba tla, ba bona fa a nnang teng, ba be ba tlhola nae letsatsi leo. Nako e ne e ka nna ya bone thapama." 
John1:40 Andrea, morwa-rraagwe Simone Petoro, e ne e le mongwe wa ba babedi ba ba neng ba utlwile Johane, ba mo sala morago." 
John1:41 Yo a bona Simone morwa-rraagwe pele, a mo raya a re: “Re bonye Mesia,” mo phetolelong ke go re: Motlodiwa (Keresete)." 
John1:42 A ba a mo isa go Jesu. Jesu a mo leba a re: “O Simone, morwa Jona; o tla bidiwa Kefa,” mo phetolelong ke go re: Lefika (Petoro)." 
John1:43 Ya re ka moso Jesu a rata go ya kwa Galelea, a bona Filipo, a mo raya a re: “Ntshale morago!”" 
John1:44 Filipo e ne e le wa kwa Betsaita, motse wa ga gabo Andrea le Petoro." 
John1:45 Filipo a bona Nathanaele, a mo raya a re: “Re bonye yo Moše a kwadileng ka ga gagwe mo molaong, le bone baporofeti, e bong Jesu, morwa Josefa wa Nasaretha.”" 
John1:46 Nathanaele a mo raya a re: “A sengwe se se molemo se ka tswa kwa Nasaretha?” Filipo a mo raya a re: “Tlaa o bone!” 
John1:47 Jesu a bona Nathanaele a tla go ene, a bua ka ga gagwe a re: “Bonang, Moiseraele wa nnete yo go se nang boferefere mo go ene!”" 
John1:48 Nathanaele a mo raya a re: “O nkitse jang?” Jesu a mo araba a re: “Ke go bonye o le fa tlase ga setlhare sa mofeie, Filipo a ise a go bitse.”" 
John1:49 Nathanaele a mo fetola a re: “Moruti, ke wena Morwa Modimo, ke wena kgosi ya Iseraele.”" 
John1:50 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “A o dumela ka gonne ke go reile ka re: ‘Ke go bonye fa tlase ga mofeie’? O tla bona dilo tse dikgolo bogolo go tse.” 
John1:51 A ba a mo raya a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Go tloga jaanong lo tla bona legodimo le bulegile, le baengele ba Modimo ba tlhatloga, ba be ba fologela mo go Morwa-Motho.”" 
John2:1 Ka letsatsi la boraro go ne go le lenyalo kwa Kana wa Galelea, mma Jesu a le teng." 
John2:2 Jesu le ene a lalelediwa lenyalo le barutwa ba gagwe. 
John2:3 Jaanong ya re weine e tlhaela, mma Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ga ba na weine.”" 
John2:4 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, ke tlhakanetseng nao? Nako ya me ga e ise e tle.”" 
John2:5 Mmaagwe a raya badiredi a re: “Se a ka se lo rayang, lo se dire.”" 
John2:6 Jaanong ga bo go le ditsaga tsa majwe di le thataro, tse di beilweng ka fa mokgweng wa Bajuta wa go tlhapa, nngwe le nngwe e ka tshola dikgamelo di le tlhano gongwe di supa." 
John2:7 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlatsang ditsaga tseo metsi!” Ba di tshela, tsa ba tsa tlala." 
John2:8 Jaanong a ba raya a re: “Gayang jaanong, lo ise kwa go morulaganyi wa modiro.” Ba a isa." 
John2:9 Ya re morulaganyi wa modiro a utlwa metsi a a fetogileng weine, a sa itse kwa e tswang teng, go itse badiredi fela ba ba gileng metsi, a bitsa monyadi," 
John2:10 a mo raya a re: “Motho mongwe le mongwe o a tle a ntshe weine e e monate pele, mme fa ba sena go kgora, go ntshiwe e e seng monate. Wena o bolokile weine e e monate go fitlha jaanong.”" 
John2:11 Sesupo seo sa ntlha Jesu o se dirile kwa Kana wa Galelea, a bonatsa kgalalelo ya gagwe, mme barutwa ba gagwe ba dumela mo go ene." 
John2:12 Morago ga moo a ya kwa Kaperenaume, ene le mmaagwe le bomonnawe le barutwa ba gagwe, ba tlhola teng malatsi a se kae." 
John2:13 Jaanong Tlolaganyo ya Bajuta ya bo e le gaufi, mme Jesu a ya kwa Jerusalema." 
John2:14 A fitlhela ba ba rekisang dikgomo le dinku le maeba le baananyi ba madi ba ntse mo Tempeleng. 
John2:15 Ya re a sena go dira seitei ka megala, a ba kobela kwa ntle ga Tempele botlhe, le tsona dinku le dikgomo; madi a baananyi a a tshololela fa fatshe, le dipati a di menola." 
John2:16 A raya bone ba ba bapatsang maeba a re: “Tlosang dilo tse fa! Se direng Ntlo ya ga Rre ntlo ya thekelo.” 
John2:17 Foo barutwa ba gagwe ba gakologelwa gore go kwadilwe ga twe: “Go tlhoafalela Ntlo ya gago go tla nja.” 
John2:18 Ke fa Bajuta ba mmotsa ba re: “O ka re bontsha sesupo sefe gore ò ka dira dilo tseo?” 
John2:19 Jesu a ba araba a re: “Digang Tempele e, nna ke tla e tsosa ka malatsi a le mararo.”" 
John2:20 Foo Bajuta ba re: “Tempele e, e agilwe dinyaga di le 46, mme ke eng fa wena o re, o tla e tsosa ka malatsi a le mararo?”" 
John2:21 Mme ene o ne a bua ka ga Tempele ya mmele wa gagwe. 
John2:22 Jaanong e rile a sena go tsosiwa mo baswing, barutwa ba gagwe ba gakologelwa gore o kile a bua jalo, ba be ba dumela Lokwalo le lefoko le Jesu a le buileng." 
John2:23 E rile a le mo Jerusalema ka moletlo wa Tlolaganyo, batho ba bantsi ba dumela mo leineng la gagwe, ka ba bona ditshupo tsa gagwe tse a ntseng a di dira." 
John2:24 Mme Jesu ka esi a se ka a ba ikanya, mo a ka ba ipolelelang, ka a ba itse botlhe," 
John2:25 a sa tlhoke go bolelelwa sepe ka ga motho; gonne ene ka esi o ne a itse se se mo mothong. 
John3:1 Go ne go le motho wa Bafarisai yo o bidiwang Nikotemo, mongwe wa lekgotla la Bajuta." 
John3:2 Yoo a tla go Jesu bosigo, a mo raya a re: “Moruti, re itse gore o moruti yo o tswang kwa Modimong; gonne ga go ope yo o ka dirang ditshupo tse wena o di dirang, fa Modimo o se na nae.”" 
John3:3 Jesu a mo araba a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Fa motho a sa tsalwe go tswa godimo, ga a ka ke a lemoga puso ya Modimo.”" 
John3:4 Nikotemo a mo fetola a re: “Motho yo o godileng a ka tsalwa jang? A a ka ba a tsena la bobedi mo mmeleng wa ga mmaagwe, a boa a tsalwa?”" 
John3:5 Jesu a araba a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Fa motho a sa tsalwe ka metsi le Mowa, ga a ka ke a tsena mo pusong ya Modimo." 
John3:6 Se se tsetsweng ke nama, ke nama; mme se se tsetsweng ke Mowa, ke mowa." 
John3:7 O se gakgamale, fa ke go reile ka re: Lo tshwanetse go tsalwa go tswa godimo." 
John3:8 Phefo e fokela kwa e ratang teng, o utlwa mosumo wa yona, mme ga o itse kwa e tswang teng le kwa e yang teng. Mongwe le mongwe yo o tsetsweng ke Mowa o ntse jalo.”" 
John3:9 Nikotemo a mo fetola a re: “Dilo tse, di ka dirafala jang?”" 
John3:10 Jesu a mo araba a re: “O moruti wa Iseraele, mme dilo tse ke eng, fa o sa di tlhaloganye?" 
John3:11 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: Re bolela se re se itseng, re bile re supa se re se bonyeng; mme lona ga lo tshole tshupo ya rona." 
John3:12 Fa ke lo boleletse dilo tsa lefatshe, mme lo sa dumele, lo ka dumela jang, fa ke lo bolelela tsa legodimo?" 
John3:13 Ga go ope yo o kileng a tlhatlogela kwa legodimong, fa e se ene yo o fologileng kwa legodimong, e bong Morwa-Motho yo o mo legodimong." 
John3:14 “Mme Morwa-Motho o tshwanetse go tlhatlosiwa, jaaka Moše a kile a tlhatlosa noga kwa sekakeng," 
John3:15 gore mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang mo go ene, a se latlhege, mme a nne le bophelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John3:16 Gonne Modimo o ratile lefatshe mo go kalo, mo o bileng wa le neela Morwaa-ona yo o tsetsweng a le esi, gore mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang mo go ene a se ka a latlhega, mme a nne le bophelo jo bo sa khutleng." 
John3:17 Kana Modimo ga o a roma Morwaa-ona mo lefatsheng gore a atlhole lefatshe, mme e le gore lefatshe le pholosiwe ka ene." 
John3:18 “Yo o dumelang mo go ene ga a atlholwe. Yo o sa dumeleng o setse a atlhotswe, ka a se ka a dumela mo leineng la Morwa Modimo yo o tsetsweng a le esi." 
John3:19 Mme katlholo ke e: Lesedi le tsile mo lefatsheng, mme batho ba ratile lefifi bogolo go lesedi; gonne ditiro tsa bone di ne di le bosula." 
John3:20 Gonne mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang bosula o ila lesedi, le gona ga a tle mo leseding, gore ditiro tsa gagwe di se ka tsa kgalemelwa." 
John3:21 Mme yo o dirang boammaaruri o tla kwa leseding gore ditiro tsa gagwe di bonatsege gore di dirilwe ka Modimo.” 
John3:22 Morago ga dilo tse Jesu le barutwa ba gagwe ba fitlha mo lefatsheng la Jutea; a nna nabo teng, a ba a kolobetsa." 
John3:23 Johane le ene o ne a kolobetsa kwa Enone, gaufi le Salime; gonne metsi a ne a le mantsi teng, mme batho ba ya teng, ba kolobediwa." 
John3:24 Gonne Johane o ne a ise a tsenngwe mo ntlong ya kgolegelo. 
John3:25 Jaanong ga tsoga kganetsanyo fa gare ga barutwa ba ga Johane le Mojuta mongwe ka ga phepafatso. 
John3:26 Ba ya kwa go Johane, ba mo raya ba re: “Moruti, yo o neng a na nao kwa moseja ga Joretane, yo ò supileng ka ga gagwe, bona, o a kolobetsa, mme botlhe ba ya go ene.”" 
John3:27 Johane a araba a re: “Motho ga a ka ke a amogela sepe, fa a sa se newa ke Modimo." 
John3:28 Lona ka losi lo basupi ba me ba gore ke boletse ka re: ‘Nna ga ke Keresete, mme ke romilwe go mo etelela pela fela.’" 
John3:29 Yo o nang le monyalwa ke monyadi; mme tsala ya monyadi e e mo direlang e a mo utlwa, e itumelela lentswe la monyadi thata. Boitumelo joo jwa me bo tletse jaanong." 
John3:30 Ene o tshwanetse go gola, mme nna ka ngotlafala." 
John3:31 “Yo o tswang kwa godimo o godimo ga botlhe. Yo o tswang mo lefatsheng ke wa lefatshe, o bile o bua ka ga lefatshe. Yo o tswang kwa legodimong o godimo ga botlhe." 
John3:32 Se o se bonyeng, a ba a se utlwa, ke sona se a se supang; mme tshupo ya gagwe ga e amogelwe ke ope." 
John3:33 Yo o amogetseng tshupo ya gagwe o tlhomamisitse gore Modimo o boammaaruri. 
John3:34 Gonne yo Modimo o mo romileng o bua mafoko a Modimo; gonne o aba Mowa kwa ntle ga selekanyo. 
John3:35 Rara o rata Morwa, mme dilo tsotlhe o di tsentse mo seatleng sa gagwe." 
John3:36 Yo o dumelang mo go Morwa o na le bophelo jo bo sa khutleng; yo o sa utlweng Morwa ga a ka ke a bona bophelo, mme bogale jwa Modimo bo mo okame.”" 
John4:1 E rile Morena a lemoga gore Bafarisai ba utlwile go twe, Jesu o dira barutwa ba le bantsi, e bile o kolobetsa bogolo go Johane," 
John4:2 – le fa Jesu ka esi a ne a sa kolobetse, mme e le barutwa ba gagwe –" 
John4:3 a tloga mo Jutea, a ba a boela kwa Galelea." 
John4:4 Mme o ne a tshwanetse go ralala Samaria. 
John4:5 Jaanong a fitlha kwa motseng mongwe wa Samaria o o bidiwang Sigare, gaufi le tshimo e Jakobe a neng a e file Josefa morwawe." 
John4:6 Foo ga bo go le sediba sa ga Jakobe. Jaanong ya re ka Jesu a lapisitswe ke leeto, a nna fa sedibeng, e ne e ka nna ka nako ya motshegare." 
John4:7 Ga tla mosadi wa Samaria go ga metsi. Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mphe ke nwe!” 
John4:8 Gonne barutwa ba gagwe ba ne ba ile kwa motseng go reka dijo. 
John4:9 Jaanong mosadi wa Mosamaria a mo raya a re: “Wena yo o leng Mojuta o ka kopa jang metsi mo go nna ke le mosadi wa Mosamaria?” A re jalo ka gonne Bajuta ba ne ba sa tsalane le Basamaria. 
John4:10 Jesu a mo araba a re: “Fa ò ka bo o itse neo ya Modimo le gore ke mang yo o go rayang a re: Mphe ke nwe! ke wena o ka bong o mo kopile, mme a ka bo a go naya metsi a a phelang.”" 
John4:11 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, ga o na segelelo, mme sediba se boteng; metsi a a phelang o ka a tsaya kae?" 
John4:12 A o mogolo go rraetsho Jakobe yo o re neileng sediba se, yo o neng a nwa mo go sona ka esi le bomorwawe le diruiwa tsa gagwe?”" 
John4:13 Jesu a mo fetola a re: “Mongwe le mongwe yo o nwang metse a, o tla nyorwa gape;" 
John4:14 mme yo o ka nwang metsi a nna ke tla a mo nayang, ga a ka ke a tlhola a nyorwa ka bosenabokhutlo; mme metsi a ke tla a mo nayang a tla nna motswedi mo go ene o o elelang go isa bophelong jo bo sa khutleng.”" 
John4:15 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, a o ko o mphe metsi ao, gore ke se tlhole ke nyorwa, le e seng go tla kwano go ga.”" 
John4:16 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Yaa o bitse monna wa gago, lo tle kwano!”" 
John4:17 Mosadi a fetola a re: “Ga ke na monna.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “O buile sentle, fa o re, ga o na monna;" 
John4:18 gonne ke banna ba batlhano ba ba neng ba go nyala, mme yo ò nang nae kajeno ga se monna wa gago; moo o buile nnete.”" 
John4:19 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Morena, ke lemoga gore o moporofeti." 
John4:20 Borraetsho ba ne ba obamela mo thabeng e, mme lona lo a re: Jerusalema ke felogosi fa go tshwanetseng ga obamelwa teng.”" 
John4:21 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Mosadi, o ntumele, nako e e tla e lo se kitlang lo obamela Rara ka yona mo thabeng e, le fa e le kwa Jerusalema." 
John4:22 Lona lo obamela se lo sa se itseng; rona re obamela se re se itseng; gonne pholoso e tswa mo Bajuteng. 
John4:23 Mme nako e e tla, le jaanong e setse e tsile, e baobamedi ba nnete ba tla obamelang Rara ka yona ka Mowa le ka boammaaruri; gonne Rara o batla baobamedi ba ba ntseng jalo." 
John4:24 Modimo ke Mowa; mme ba ba o obamelang ba tshwanetse go o obamela ka Mowa le ka boammaaruri.” 
John4:25 Mosadi a mo raya a re: “Ke itse gore Mesia yo o bidiwang Keresete o e tla; e tla re a sena go tla, a re bolelele dilo tsotlhe.”" 
John4:26 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Ke nna yo ke buang nao.” 
John4:27 Ke fa barutwa ba gagwe ba tla; mme ba gakgamala, ka a bua le mosadi. Le fa go ntse jalo ga se ka ga nna ope yo o reng: “Ò batlang?” gongwe go Jesu: “O buelang nae?”" 
John4:28 Jaanong mosadi a tlogela nkgwana ya gagwe, a ya kwa motseng, a raya batho a re:" 
John4:29 “Tlaang lo bone motho yo o mpoleletseng tsotlhe tse ke di dirileng; a jaana ga se ene Keresete?” 
John4:30 Ba tswa mo motseng, ba tla go ene." 
John4:31 Barutwa ba sala ba mo rapela ba re: “Moruti, a o ko o je!”" 
John4:32 Ene a ba raya a re: “Ke na le sejo se ke se jang, se lo sa se itseng.”" 
John4:33 Jaanong barutwa ba botsanya ba re: “A mongwe o mo tsiseditse dijo?” 
John4:34 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Sejo sa me ke go dira thato ya yo o nthomileng le go wetsa tiro ya gagwe. 
John4:35 A ga lo re: ‘Go setse dikgwedi tse nne go ya thobong’? Bonang, ke lo raya ke re: Tsholetsang matlho, lo lebe masimo; gonne a setse a sweufaletse thobo." 
John4:36 Yo o robang o amogela tuelo, mme leungo o le phuthela bophelo jo bo sa khutleng, gore yo o jwalang a itumele mmogo le yo o robang." 
John4:37 Gonne fano lefoko le le reng: ‘Mongwe o a jwala, yo mongwe o a roba,’ ke la nnete." 
John4:38 Ke lo romile go roba fa lo ne lo sa dira teng; go dirile ba bangwe, mme lona lo tsenye mo tirong tsa bone.”" 
John4:39 Basamaria ba bantsi ba motse oo ba dumela mo go ene ka ntlha ya lefoko la mosadi yo o supileng a re: “O mpoleletse tsotlhe tse ke di dirileng.” 
John4:40 E rile jaanong Basamaria ba tla go ene, ba mo rapela gore a tlhole nabo. A tlhola teng malatsi a le mabedi." 
John4:41 Ga ba ga dumela ba bantsi go feta ba pele ka ntlha ya lefoko la gagwe. 
John4:42 Ba raya mosadi ba re: “Jaanong ga re tlhole re dumela ka ntlha ya polelo ya gago; gonne rona ka rosi re mo ikutlwetse, mme re itse gore ke ene Keresete tota, Mopholosi wa lefatshe.”" 
John4:43 Morago ga malatsi a mabedi a tswa teng, a ya kwa Galelea;" 
John4:44 gonne Jesu ka esi o ne a supile gore moporofeti ga a na tlotlo epe mo lefatsheng la ga gabo. 
John4:45 E rile jaanong a fitlha kwa Galelea, Bagalelea ba mo tshola, ka ba bonye tsotlhe tse a di dirileng kwa Jerusalema mo moletlong; gonne le bone ba ne ba ile moletlong." 
John4:46 Jaanong Jesu a fitlha gape kwa Kana wa Galelea, kwa a kileng a fetola metsi weine teng. Ga bo go le tona ya kgosi, e morwaa-yona a neng a lwala kwa Kaperenaume." 
John4:47 E rile ene a utlwa gore Jesu o dule kwa Jutea, mme o tsile kwa Galelea, a ya go ene, a mo rapela gore a tle go fodisa morwawe; gonne o ne a le gaufi le go swa." 
John4:48 Jaanong Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fa lo sa bone ditshupo le dikgakgamatso, ga lo dumele ka gope.”" 
John4:49 Tona ya mo raya ya re: “Morena, a o ko o tle, ngwanake a ise a swe.”" 
John4:50 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsamaya, morwao o phedile.” Motho yoo a dumela lefoko le Jesu a le mo rayang, a ba a tsamaya." 
John4:51 Ya re a sa ntse a le mo tseleng, batlhanka ba gagwe ba mo kgatlhantsha, ba mmolelela gore morwawe o phedile." 
John4:52 Foo a ba botsa nako e o fodileng ka yona. Ke fa ba mo raya ba re: “E rile maabane ka nako ya motshegare go fisa ga mo tlogela.” 
John4:53 Jaanong rraagwe a lemoga gore ke yona nako e Jesu a mo reileng ka yona a re: “Morwao o phedile.” Mme a dumela le ba lapa la gagwe botlhe. 
John4:54 Sesupo seo ke sa bobedi se Jesu o se dirileng, a sena go tswa kwa Jutea, a ya kwa Galelea." 
John5:1 Morago ga tseo ga nna moletlo mongwe wa Bajuta, mme Jesu a ya Jerusalema." 
John5:2 Jaanong go na le bodiba mo Jerusalema fa Kgorong ya Dinku jo bo bidiwang Bethesta ka Sehebere, bo na le maobo a le matlhano." 
John5:3 Mo go ona go ne go letse balwetse ba bantsi le difofu le batlhotsi le baomeledi, ba ntse ba letetse kgobero ya metsi." 
John5:4 Gonne moengele o ne a tle a fologele mo bodibeng ka dinako tse dingwe, a hudue metsi; yo jaanong a tsenang pele, metsi a sena go huduiwa, a fole, le fa e ka nna bolwetse bofe jo bo mo tshwereng." 
John5:5 Jaanong go ne go le motho mongwe teng yo e setseng e le dinyaga di le 38 a ntse a lwala. 
John5:6 E rile Jesu a mmona a letse, mme a utlwa gore ga a bolo go nna jalo, a mo raya a re: “A o rata go fola?”" 
John5:7 Molwetse a mo araba a re: “Morena, ga ke na motho ope yo o ka ntsenyang mo bodibeng, fa metsi a huduiwa; e a re ke sa ntse ke tla, go fologele yo mongwe pele ga me.”" 
John5:8 Jesu a mo raya a re: “Tsoga o tsee bolao jwa gago, o tsamae!”" 
John5:9 Ke fa motho yoo a fola e sa le ka nako eo, a tsaya bolao jwa gagwe, a tsamaya. Mme letsatsi leo e le la Sabata." 
John5:10 Ya baa gona Bajuta ba rayang yo o fodisitsweng ba re: “Ke Sabata; ga go a letlelelwa gore o rwale bolao.” 
John5:11 Yoo a ba fetola a re: “Yo o mphodisitseng ke ene yo o ntheileng a re: ‘Tsaya bolao jwa gago, o tsamae.’ ”" 
John5:12 Ba mmotsa ba re: “Motho yoo ke mang yo o go reileng a re: ‘Bo tsee o tsamae’?” 
John5:13 Mme yo o fodisitsweng o ne a sa mo itse; gonne Jesu o ne a ngwangwaetse, go le batho ba bantsi mo felong foo." 
John5:14 Morago ga moo Jesu a mmona mo Tempeleng, a mo raya a re: “Bona, o fodile; o se tlhole o leofa, gore se se bosula bogolo se se go dirafalele.”" 
John5:15 Motho yoo a ya a bolelela Bajuta gore ke Jesu yo o mo fodisitseng. 
John5:16 Ka ntlha ya moo Bajuta ba tlhomara Jesu, ba batla go mmolaya, ka a dirile dilo tseo ka Sabata." 
John5:17 Jesu a ba fetola a re: “Rre o sa dira le ka nako eno, le nna ke a dira.”" 
John5:18 Ke ka ntlha ya moo Bajuta ba ne ba batla bogolo go mmolaya, e seng fela ka a sentse Sabata, mme le gona e le ka a rile, Modimo ke rraagwe, a itekanya le Modimo." 
John5:19 Ya baa gona Jesu a ba fetolang a re: “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Morwa o palelwa ke go dira sengwe ka bogagagwe, fa a sa bone Rara a se dira; gonne tse ene o di dirang, Morwa le ene o di dira jalo." 
John5:20 Kana Rara o rata Morwa, o mmontsha tsotlhe tse o di dirang, e bile o tla mmontsha ditiro tse dikgolo bogolo go tse gore lo gakgamale." 
John5:21 Gonne Morwa o phedisa ba o ratang go ba phedisa, jaaka Rara a tsosa baswi, a ba phedisa." 
John5:22 Le gona Rara ga a atlhole ope, mme katlholo yotlhe o e neetse Morwa" 
John5:23 gore botlhe ba tlotle Morwa, fela jaaka ba tlotla Rara. Yo o sa tlotleng Morwa, ga a tlotle Rara yo o mo romileng." 
John5:24 “Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Yo o utlwang lefoko la me, a dumela ene yo o nthomileng, o na le bophelo jo bo sa khutleng, mme ga a tsene mo katlholong; o dule mo losong, a tshelela botshelong." 
John5:25 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke lo raya ke re: Nako e e tla, le jaanong e setse e tsile, e baswi ba tla utlwang lentswe la Morwa Modimo ka yona, mme ba ba le utlwang ba tla phela." 
John5:26 Gonne Rara o neile Morwa go nna le bophelo mo go ene ka esi, jaaka ene a na le botshelo mo go ene ka esi." 
John5:27 O bile o mo neetse thata ya go atlhola, ka e le ene Morwa-Motho." 
John5:28 Se gakgamaleleng moo; gonne nako e e tla e botlhe ba ba mo diphupung ba tla utlwang lentswe la gagwe ka yona. 
John5:29 Ba tla tswa, ba ba dirileng tse di molemo go ya tsogong ya bophelo, ba ba dirileng tse di bosula bone go ya tsogong ya katlholo." 
John5:30 “Ga nka ke ka dira sepe ka bogame. Ke atlhola ka fa ke utlwang ka teng, mme katlholo ya me ke ya tshiamo; gonne ga ke batle thato ya me, ke batla thato ya yo o nthomileng." 
John5:31 “Fa ke supa ka ga me, tshupo ya me e ka se nne nnete." 
John5:32 Ke o sele yo o supang ka ga me, mme ke itse gore tshupo e o e supang ka ga me ke nnete." 
John5:33 Lo romile batho kwa go Johane, mme o supile boammaaruri." 
John5:34 Nna ga ke amogele tshupo mo mothong, mme dilo tse ke di bua gore lo pholosiwe." 
John5:35 Ene e ne e le lobone lo lo tukang, lo lo phatsimang, mme lona lo ne lwa rata go itumelela lesedi la gagwe ka nakonyana fela." 
John5:36 “Nna ke na le tshupo e e fetang ya ga Johane; gonne ditiro tse Rara o di nneetseng go di wetsa, e bong tsona ditiro tse ke di dirang, di supa ka ga me gore Rara o nthomile." 
John5:37 Rara yo o nthomileng le ene o supile ka ga me. Ga lo ise lo utlwe lentswe la gagwe ka motlha ope, le fa e le go bona gore o ntse jang." 
John5:38 Le Lefoko la gagwe ga le nne mo go lona; gonne ga lo dumele yo a mo romileng. 
John5:39 Lo batlisisa Dikwalo; gonne lo itlhoma lo ka nna le botshelo jo bo sa khutleng ka tsona, e tswe e le tsona tse di supang ka ga me." 
John5:40 Mme lo gana go tla kwa go nna, gore lo tle lo nne le bophelo." 
John5:41 “Ga ke newe tlotlo ke batho. 
John5:42 Mme ke itse gore ga lo na lorato lwa Modimo mo go lona. 
John5:43 Nna ke tsile mo leineng la ga Rre, mme ga lo ntshole; fa o sele a ka itlela ka leina la gagwe, ene lo tla mo tshola." 
John5:44 Lo ka dumela jang lona ba lo tlotlanang, mme tlotlo e e tswang mo Modimong o le osi yona lo sa e batle?" 
John5:45 Lo se ka lwa gopola gore nna ke tla lo baya molato mo go Rara. Moše ke ene yo o lo bayang molato, yo lo solofetseng mo go ene." 
John5:46 Gonne fa lo ka bo lo dumetse Moše, le nna lo ka bo lo ntumetse; gonne ene o kwadile ka ga me." 
John5:47 Mme fa lo sa dumele dikwalo tsa gagwe, mafoko a me lo ka a dumela jang?”" 
John6:1 E rile morago ga tseo Jesu a tshelela kwa moseja ga letsha la Galelea, le e leng la Tiberia." 
John6:2 Bontsi jo bogolo jwa batho jwa mo latela, ka ba bonye ditshupo tse a di dirileng mo balwetseng." 
John6:3 Jaanong Jesu a tlhatlogela mo thabeng, a nna teng le barutwa ba gagwe." 
John6:4 Mme Tlolaganyo, moletlo wa Bajuta, ya bo e le gaufi."
