John21:2 Go ne go le Simone Petoro le Thomase yo o bidiwang Lefatlha le Nathanaele wa Kana wa Galelea le bomorwa Sebeteo le ba babedi ba bangwe ba barutwa ba gagwe, ba le mmogo." 
John21:3 Simone Petoro a ba raya a re: “Ke ya go tshwara ditlhapi.” Ba mo raya ba re: “Le rona re ya nao.” Ba tswa ba ya ba palama mokoro; mme ba se ka ba tshwara sepe mo bosigong joo. 
John21:4 Ya re e setse e le mo mosong, Jesu a ema fa losing lwa letsha, fela barutwa ba se ka ba itse fa e le Jesu." 
John21:5 Jesu a ba botsa a re: “Banaka, a ga lo na sešabo?” Ba mo araba ba re: “Nnyaya.”" 
John21:6 A ba raya a re: “Digelang letloa ntlheng ya le le lo tla tshwara.” Ya re ba dira jalo, ba se ka ba tlhola ba kgona go le goga ka ntlha ya bontsi jwa ditlhapi." 
John21:7 Ke fa morutwa yo Jesu a mo ratang a raya Petoro a re: “Ke Morena.” Ya re Simone Petoro a utlwa gore ke Morena, a ikgatlha ka kobo e kgolo, ka a ne a sa apara, a ba a tlolela mo letsheng." 
John21:8 Mme barutwa ba bangwe ba tla ka mokoro; gonne ba ne ba se kgakala le lefatshe, e ka nna dikgato di le 100, ba goga letloa la ditlhapi." 
John21:9 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa lefatsheng, ba bona molelo wa magala teng, le ditlhapi di besitswe mo go ona le senkgwe." 
John21:10 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tsisang ditlhapi tse dingwe tsa tse lo di tshwereng jaanong.” 
John21:11 Simone Petoro a palama mokoro, a gogela letloa kwa lefatsheng, le tletse ditlhapi tse dikgolo di le 153; mme le fa di ne di le kalo, letloa la se ka la gagoga." 
John21:12 Jesu a ba raya a re: “Tlaang lo fitlhole.” Mme go ne go se ope wa barutwa yo o betang pelo go mmotsa go re: “O mang?” ka ba itse gore ke Morena. 
John21:13 Jaanong Jesu a tla a tsaya senkgwe, a se ba naya, le ditlhapi jalo." 
John21:14 E ne e setse e le la boraro Jesu a iponatsa go barutwa, a sena go tsosiwa mo baswing." 
John21:15 E rile ba sena go fitlhola, Jesu a botsa Simone Petoro a re: “Simone, morwa Jona, a o nthata bogolo go ba?” A mo araba a re: “Ee, Morena, o itse gore ke a go rata.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fudisa dikwanyana tsa me!”" 
John21:16 A boa a mmotsa lwa bobedi a re: “Simone, morwa Jona, a o a nthata?” A mo araba a re: “Ee, Morena, o itse gore ke a go rata.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Disa dinku tsa me!”" 
John21:17 A mmotsa lwa boraro a re: “Simone, morwa Jona, a o a nthata?” Petoro a hutsafala, ka a mmotsa lwa boraro a re: “A o a nthata?” A ba a mo araba a re: “Morena, o itse dilo tsotlhe, o itse gore ke a go rata.” Jesu a mo raya a re: “Fudisa dinku tsa me!" 
John21:18 Ammaaruri, ammaaruri ke go raya ke re: E rile o sa le yo mošwa, wa itlama, wa itsamaela kwa o ratang teng; mme e tla re o sena go tsofala, o otlolole mabogo, mme yo mongwe a go tlame, a go gogele kwa o sa go rateng.”" 
John21:19 O ne a bua jalo go supa gore o tla galaletsa Modimo ka loso lo lo ntseng jang. Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a mo raya a re: “Ntshale morago!”" 
John21:20 Ya re Petoro a retologa, a bona morutwa yo Jesu a mo ratang, a ba setse morago, ene yo o neng a rapame fa sehubeng sa gagwe mo selalelong, a ba a re: “Morena, ke mang yo o go tshwarisang?”" 
John21:21 Ya re Petoro a mmona, a botsa Jesu a re: “Morena, go tla nna jang ka ga yo?”" 
John21:22 Jesu a mo araba a re: “Fa ke rata gore a sale go fitlhelela ke tla, go go tshwenya ka eng? Wena ntshale morago!”" 
John21:23 Ka moo ga tuma mo bakaulengweng polelo e e reng: Morutwa yoo ga a nke a swa. Fela Jesu ga a a ka a mo raya a re: “Ga a nke a swa,” mme o rile: “Fa ke rata gore a sale go fitlhelela ke tla, go go tshwenya ka eng?”" 
John21:24 Morutwa yoo ke ene yo o supang ka ga dilo tseo, o bile o di kwadile; mme re itse gore tshupo ya gagwe ke boammaaruri." 
John21:25 Le gona go na le dilo tse dintsi di sele tse Jesu a di dirileng, tse e ka reng fa di ka bo di kwadilwe ka tatelano, ke gopola gore lefatshe le ne le sa ka ke la lekana go tshola dikwalo tse di ka bong di kwadilwe." 
Acts1:1 Lokwalo lwa pele ke lo kwadile, wena Theofilo, ka ga tsotlhe tse Jesu o simolotseng go di dira le go di ruta," 
Acts1:2 go fitlha mo letsatsing le a tlhatlositsweng ka lone, a sena go laola baapostolo ka Mowa o o Boitshepo ba a ba itlhaoletseng." 
Acts1:3 Ke bone ba morago ga go boga ga gagwe a bileng a ba ipontsha e le yo o phelang ka ditshupo tse dintsi, a bonala mo go bone malatsi a le 40, a ntse a bolela tsa puso ya Modimo." 
Acts1:4 E rile ba phuthegile nae, a ba laela gore ba se ka ba tloga mo Jerusalema, mme ba lebelele tsholofetso ya Rara, e o reng: “Lo e utlwile mo go nna." 
Acts1:5 Gonne fa e le Johane, o ne a kolobetsa ka metsi, mme lona lo tla kolobediwa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo go ise go fete malatsi a mantsi.”" 
Acts1:6 Jaanong ba ba neng ba phuthegile ba mmotsa ba re: “Morena, a o tla boa o tsosetsa Iseraele bogosi ka sebaka seno?”" 
Acts1:7 A ba araba a re: “Ga go a lo tshwanela go itse metlha gongwe dinako tse Rara o di beileng ka thata ya gagwe. 
Acts1:8 Mme lo tla bona nonofo ya Mowa o o Boitshepo, motlhang o tlang mo go lona; lo tla nna basupi ba me mo Jerusalema le mo Jutea yotlhe le mo Samaria le go ya kwa bokhutlong jwa lefatshe.”" 
Acts1:9 Ya re a sena go bua dilo tse, a tlhatlosiwa, ba ntse ba lebile; mme leru la mo tlosa mo ponong ya bone." 
Acts1:10 Ya re ba sa ntse ba leletse kwa legodimong a ntse a tlhatloga, ga ema banna ba le babedi fa go bone, ba apere diaparo tse ditshweu," 
Acts1:11 ba re: “Lona banna ba Galelea, lo emetseng lo leletse kwa legodimong? Jesu yole yo o tsholeleditsweng kwa legodimong, a tswa mo go lona, o tla boa a tla fela jaaka lo mmonye a ya kwa legodimong.”" 
Acts1:12 Ya baa gona ba boelang kwa Jerusalema, ba tswa mo thabeng e e bidiwang ya Diolefa e e gaufi le Jerusalema, e bokgakala jwa yona e leng leeto la Sabata." 
Acts1:13 Ya re ba sena go tsena, ba tlhatlogela kwa ntlwaneng e e kwa godimo, kwa ba ne ba nna teng, e bong Petoro le Johane le Jakobo le Andrea le Filipo le Thomase le Baretolomeo le Matheo le Jakobo wa ga Alefeo le Simone-Selote le Juta wa ga Jakobo." 
Acts1:14 Botlhe bao ba nnela ruri mo thapelong ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ba na le basadi bangwe le Maria, mma Jesu, le bomonnaa Jesu." 
Acts1:15 E rile mo malatsing ao Petoro a ema mo gare ga bakaulengwe ba ba ka nnang 120 ba ba neng ba le mmogo a re: 
Acts1:16 “Banna ba ga etsho, Lokwalo lo ne lo tshwanetse go dirafala, lo Mowa o o Boitshepo o buileng pele ka lone ka molomo wa ga Dafita ka ga Jutase yo o neng a nna mogogi wa ba ba tshwereng Jesu;" 
Acts1:17 gonne o na a baletswe mo go rona, a ba a abelwa tirelo e ya boapostolo.”" 
Acts1:18 Fa e le ene, o rekile setsha ka tuelo ya tshiamololo, a wa ka tlhogo, a phanyega ka bogare, mateng a gagwe a ba a gorometsega otlhe;" 
Acts1:19 ga ba ga itsiwe ke botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema, mo setsha seo se bileng sa bidiwa Akeledama mo puong ya bone, ke go re: Setsha sa madi." 
Acts1:20 “Gonne go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa Dipesalome ga twe: “ ‘A boago jwa gagwe bo fetoge lesope, a go se nne ope yo o agang mo go lone!’ “Gape ga twe: “ ‘A o sele a tsee tirelo ya gagwe!’" 
Acts1:21 “Jaanong fa e le banna ba ba sa leng ba tsamaya le rona ka sebaka sotlhe se Morena Jesu o neng a tsena a tswa mo go rona ka sona," 
Acts1:22 go simolola ka kolobetso ya ga Johane go fitlha mo letsatsing le o tlhatlositsweng mo go rona ka lone, mongwe wa bone o tshwanetse go nna mosupi le rona wa tsogo ya gagwe.”" 
Acts1:23 Jaanong ba emisa ba le babedi, e bong Josefa yo o bidiwang Baresaba, a okelediwa leina la Juseto, le Mathia." 
Acts1:24 Ba be ba rapela ba re: “Morena, wena moitsi wa dipelo tsa botlhe, supa yo ò mo itlhaoletseng mo go ba babedi ba" 
Acts1:25 gore a tle a tsee boemo jwa tirelo e jwa boapostolo jo Jutase o oleng mo go jona, gore a ye felong ga gagwe.”" 
Acts1:26 Jaanong ba ba tlhamela ditengwa, mme tengwa ya supa Mathia; a tlhophiwa jalo go nna mongwe wa baapostolo ba ba 11." 
Acts2:1 E rile letsatsi la Pentekoste le tla, ba bo ba le mmogo botlhe felong go le gongwe." 
Acts2:2 Ga utlwala ka tshoganyetso mosumo o o tswang legodimong, e kete wa ledimo le le tsubutlang, wa tlala ka ntlo yotlhe e ba nnang mo go yona." 
Acts2:3 Ga ba ga bonala mo go bone diteme tse di kgaoganang, e kete dikgabo tsa molelo, tsa nna mo go mongwe le mongwe wa bone." 
Acts2:4 Mme botlhe ba tlala Mowa o o Boitshepo, ba simolola go bua ka diteme di sele ka fa Mowa o ba buisang ka teng." 
Acts2:5 Jaanong ga bo go agile Bajuta mo Jerusalema, e le banna ba ba boifang Modimo, ba tswa morafeng mongwe le mongwe o o fa tlase ga legodimo." 
Acts2:6 Ya re mosumo oo o utlwala, batho ba bantsi ba phuthega, ba be ba feretlhega, ka mongwe le mongwe a utlwa ba bua ka puo ya ga gabo." 
Acts2:7 Botlhe ba tseana, ba gakgamala, ba raana ba re: “Kana, ba ba buang ba, a ga se Bagalelea botlhe?" 
Acts2:8 Mme go ntse jang, fa mongwe le mongwe wa rona a utlwa ba bua mo puong ya gagwe e a tsaletsweng mo go yona?" 
Acts2:9 Re le Bapharatha le Bamedia le Baelame le ba ba agileng mo Mesopotamia le mo Jutea le mo Kapatokia le mo Ponto le mo Asia 
Acts2:10 le mo Feregia le mo Pamefilia le mo Egepeto le kwa dintlheng tsa Lebia tikologong ya Kirene le baeng ba ba tswang kwa Roma," 
Acts2:11 Bajuta le batlhabologi le Bakereta le Baarabia, re ba utlwa ba bua ditiro tse dikgolo tsa Modimo ka diteme tsa rona.”" 
Acts2:12 Ba tseana botlhe, ba akabala, ba raana ba re: “Kana dilo tse, di kaela kae?”" 
Acts2:13 Mme ba bangwe ba sotla ba re: “Ba kgotshe weine e e botshe.” 
Acts2:14 Ke fa Petoro a ema le ba ba 11, a tsholetsa lentswe, a bua nabo a re: “Lona banna ba Jutea le lona lotlhe ba lo agileng mo Jerusalema, itseng selo se, lo tlhwaele mafoko a me tsebe:" 
Acts2:15 Gonne banna ba ga ba a tagwa jaaka lo itlhoma; kana e sa ntse e le nako ya robongwe mo mosong. 
Acts2:16 Mme se ke se se builweng ke moporofeti Joele a re: 
Acts2:17 ‘Modimo wa re: E tla re ka malatsi a bofelo ke tshele Mowa wa me mo bathong botlhe; bomorwaa-lona le bomorwadia-lona ba tla itsise thato ya Modimo, makau a lona a tla lora ditoro." 
Acts2:18 Ee, le mo batlhankeng ba me le mo malateng a me ke tla tshela Mowa wa me mo malatsing ao, mme ba tla itsise thato ya Modimo pele." 
Acts2:19 Ke tla dira dikgakgamatso kwa godimo mo legodimong le ditshupo kwa tlase mo lefatsheng, e bong madi le molelo le dipinagare tsa musi." 
Acts2:20 Letsatsi le tla fetolwa lefifi, ngwedi o tla fetolwa madi, letsatsi le legolo la Morena le le galalelang le ise le tle." 
Acts2:21 Mme mongwe le mongwe yo o tla bitsang leina la Morena o tla pholosiwa.’ 
Acts2:22 “Lona banna ba Iseraele, utlwang mafoko a: Jesu wa Nasaretha, monna yo lo mo supeditsweng ke Modimo ka dinonofo le dikgakgamatso le ditshupo tse Modimo o di dirileng ka ene mo gare ga lona jaaka lo itse ka losi," 
Acts2:23 ene yoo yo o neetsweng losong ka maikaelelo a a beilweng ke Modimo le ka kitsetsopele ya ona, lona lo mmapotse, lwa mmolaya ka diatla tsa baikepi;" 
Acts2:24 ke ene yo Modimo o mo tsositseng, o sena go funolola maralalo a loso; gonne go ne go sa kgonege gore lo mo golegele ruri." 
Acts2:25 Gonne Dafita o ne a bua ka ga gagwe a re: “ ‘Ke ne ke bona Morena fa pele ga me ka gale, ka a le ka fa letsogong la me le le jang, gore ke se theekele." 
Acts2:26 Ka moo pelo ya me e ne ya itumela, loleme lwa me lwa ipela, le yona nama ya me e tla ikhutsa mo tsholofelong;" 
Acts2:27 gonne ga o kitla o tlogelela felo ga baswi mowa wa me, le gona ga o nke o leseletsa Moitshepi wa gago a senngwa ke go bola." 
Acts2:28 O nkitsisitse ditsela tsa bophelo, o tla ntlatsa boitumelo ka sefatlhego sa gago.’" 
Acts2:29 “Banna ba ga etsho, nka bua le lona ka maikutlo a a phuthologileng ka ga Dafita rraetsho-mogolo gore o sule, a ba a fitlhwa, mme phupu ya gagwe e sa le mo go rona le gompieno." 
Acts2:30 Jaanong e re ka e ne e le ene moporofeti, mme a itse gore Modimo o kile wa mo ikanela gore o tla nnisa Keresete yo e leng wa leungo la letheka la gagwe ka fa nameng mo sedulong sa gagwe sa bogosi," 
Acts2:31 a bua ka ga tsogo ya ga Keresete ka go e bona pele gore mowa wa gagwe ga o a tlogelwa mo felong ga baswi, le yona nama ya gagwe ga e a senngwa ke go bola." 
Acts2:32 Jesu yoo Modimo o mo tsositse, mme rona rotlhe re basupi ba gona." 
Acts2:33 Jaanong o godisitswe ka letsogo le le jang la Modimo, a amogela Mowa o o Boitshepo mo go Rara o a o solofeditseng, a tshêla se jaanong lo se bonang, lo se utlwang." 
Acts2:34 Gonne Dafita ga a a ka a tlhatlogela kwa magodimong, mme o bua a re: “ ‘Morena o reile Morena wa me a re: Nna ka fa letsogong la me le le jang," 
Acts2:35 go ya ke be ke dire baba ba gago sebeo sa dinao tsa gago.’ 
Acts2:36 “Jaanong a lelapa lengwe le lengwe la Iseraele le itse ruri gore ene Jesu yo lo mmapotseng, Modimo o mo dirile Morena le Keresete.”" 
Acts2:37 E rile ba utlwa, ba tlhabega mo pelong, ba be ba raya Petoro le baapostolo ba bangwe ba re: “Banna ba ga etsho, re ka dirang?”" 
Acts2:38 Petoro a ba raya a re: “Tlhabologang, mme a mongwe le mongwe wa lona a kolobediwe ka leina la ga Jesu Keresete go bona boitshwarelo jwa dibe tsa lona, mme lo tla amogela neo ya Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
Acts2:39 gonne tsholofetso e raya lona le bana ba lona le botlhe ba ba kwa kgakala, e bong botlhe ba Morena, Modimo wa rona, o tla ba ipiletsang.”" 
Acts2:40 A supa, a ba a ba kaela ka mafoko a mantsi a mangwe a re: “Ineeleng go pholosiwa, lo tswe mo mofuteng ono o o kgopo!”" 
Acts2:41 Ke fa ba ba amogetseng lefoko la gagwe ba kolobediwa, mme ka letsatsi leo phuthego ya oketsega ka batho ba ba ka nnang 3 000." 
Acts2:42 Ba nnela ruri mo thutong ya baapostolo le mo kopanong le mo nathoganyong ya senkgwe le mo merapelong. 
Acts2:43 Poifo ya tshwara dipelo tsotlhe; dikgakgamatso le ditshupo di le dintsi di ne di dirwa ke baapostolo. 
Acts2:44 Mme botlhe ba ba dumetseng ba utlwana, ba tlhakanela di-tsa-bone tsotlhe;" 
Acts2:45 ba rekisa dithuo le di-tsa-bone, ba abela botlhe ka fa mongwe le mongwe a tlhokang ka teng." 
Acts2:46 Ba nnela ruri ka malatsi otlhe ka bongwefela jwa pelo mo Tempeleng, ba nathoganya senkgwe kwa le kwa mo matlong a bone, ba ja dijo ka boitumelo le bopelophepa," 
Acts2:47 ba baka Modimo, ba bona botsalano mo bathong botlhe. Mme Morena a oketsa phuthego ka letsatsi le letsatsi ka ba ba pholosiwang." 
Acts3:1 Petoro le Johane ba ne ba ya kwa Tempeleng ka nako ya thapelo, e bong ka nako ya boraro thapama." 
Acts3:2 Ke fa monna mongwe yo o tsetsweng a golafetse maoto a rwalwa a tsisiwa; ba ne ba tle ba mmee ka malatsi otlhe fa mojakong o o bidiwang “O montle” wa Tempele gore a kope dikatso mo go ba ba tsenang mo Tempeleng. 
Acts3:3 Ya re ene a bona Petoro le Johane ba re ba tsena mo Tempeleng, a kopa katso." 
Acts3:4 Petoro a mo tlhoma matlho, a na le Johane, a re: “Re lebe!”" 
Acts3:5 Yoo a ba leba, a solofetse go amogela sengwe mo go bona." 
Acts3:6 Mme Petoro a mo raya a re: “Selefera le gouta ga ke na natso; mme se ke nang naso ke a se go naya: Mo leineng la ga Jesu Keresete wa Nasaretha, nanoga o tsamae!”" 
Acts3:7 A ba a mo tshwara letsogo le le jang, a mo emisa; mme dinao tsa gagwe le malengana tsa akofa tsa tia." 
Acts3:8 A ragoga, a ema ka dinao, a tsamaya; a ba a tsena nabo mo Tempeleng, a tsamaya, a tlolaka, a baka Modimo." 
Acts3:9 Mme batho botlhe ba mmona a tsamaya, a baka Modimo;" 
Acts3:10 ba bile ba bona gore ke ene yo o ne a tle a nnele dikatso fa mojakong o montle wa Tempele. Ba tlala kgakgamalo le tseano ka ga se se mo dirafaletseng. 
Acts3:11 Ya re a ntse a ngaparetse Petoro le Johane, batho botlhe ba taboga, ba ba kgobokanela kwa leobong le le bidiwang la ga Salomo ba gakgametse thata." 
Acts3:12 Ya re Petoro a bona jalo, a simolola go bua le batho a re: “Lona banna ba Iseraele, lo gakgamaleletseng motho yo? Lo tlhometseng matlho mo go rona, jaaka e kete re mo tsamaisitse ka thata gongwe poifo-Modimo ya rona?" 
Acts3:13 Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe, Modimo wa borraetsho, o galaleditse Jesu, motlhanka wa ona, yo lona lo mo neetseng katlholong, lwa mo itatola fa pele ga sefatlhego sa ga Pilato, ene a ikaeletse go mo golola." 
Acts3:14 Mme lona lwa itatola Moitshepi le Mosiami, lwa kopa gore lo gololelwe monna wa mmolai," 
Acts3:15 lwa bolaya Moeteledipele go ya botshelong. Ke ene yo Modimo o mo tsositseng mo baswing, mo re leng basupi ba gona." 
Acts3:16 Ke ka go dumela mo leineng la gagwe, fa leina la gagwe le tiisitse monna yo, yo lo mmonang, lo mo itseng. Mme tumelo e e tlang ka ene Jesu e mo neile boitekanelo jo bo tletseng jo fa pele ga lona lotlhe." 
Acts3:17 “Mme jaanong, ba ga etsho, ke itse gore lo dirile jalo ka go tlhoka go itse, fela jaaka le bone balaodi ba lona." 
Acts3:18 Mme tse Modimo o di boleletseng pele ka melomo ya baporofeti botlhe gore Keresete wa ona o tla bogisega, o di dirafaditse jalo." 
Acts3:19 Jaanong he, fetogang pelo lo sokologe gore dibe tsa lona di phimolwe," 
Acts3:20 gore go tle go tle metlha ya tapologo e e tswang sefatlhegong sa Morena, mme a rome yo o beilweng go nna Keresete wa lona, e bong Jesu," 
Acts3:21 yo legodimo le tshwanetseng go mo tshola go fitlha metlheng ya go siamisa dilo tsotlhe, e Modimo o buileng ka ga yona ka melomo ya baporofeti ba ona ba ba boitshepo go tloga bogologolo." 
Acts3:22 Moše o kile a raya borraetsho a re: ‘Morena, Modimo wa lona, o tla lo tsosetsa moporofeti yo o tshwanang le nna, a tswa mo losikeng lwa lona; ene yoo lo mo reetse mo go tsotlhe tse o tla di buang le lona." 
Acts3:23 Mme go tla dirafala gore mongwe le mongwe yo o se kitlang a utlwa moporofeti yoo, a bolawe, a kumolwe mo morafeng.’" 
Acts3:24 Le bone baporofeti botlhe ba ba buileng go simolola ka Samuele le ba ba tsileng morago, ba boletse ka ga ona malatsi ano." 
Acts3:25 Ke lona bana ba baporofeti le ba kgolagano e Modimo o e dirileng le borraeno, fa o raya Aborahame o re: ‘Ditšhaba tsotlhe tsa lefatshe di tla tshegofadiwa ka losika lwa gago.’" 
Acts3:26 Ke lona ba Modimo o lo tsoseditseng Motlhanka wa ona, wa mo romela go tshegofatsa lona pele ka go sokolola mongwe le mongwe wa lona mo bosuleng jwa gagwe.”" 
Acts4:1 Ya re ba ntse ba bua le batho, baperesiti le molaodi wa Tempele le Basadukai ba tla go bone," 
Acts4:2 ba betilwe ke pelo, ka ba ruta batho, ba rera tsogo ya baswi ka Jesu." 
Acts4:3 Ba ba tshwara, ba ba latsa mo kgolegong go fitlhelela ka moso; gonne go ne go setse go le maitsiboa." 
Acts4:4 Mme ba bantsi ba bone ba ba utlwileng Lefoko ba dumela; palo ya banna e ne e ka re gongwe ya nna dikete tse tlhano. 
Acts4:5 Ya re ka moso ba lekgotla le legolo ba bone le bagolo ba morafe le Baitsedikwalo ba phuthega mo Jerusalema," 
Acts4:6 ba na le Hanase, moperesiti yo mogolo, le Kaifase le Johane le Aleksantere le botlhe ba losika lwa boperesiti jo bogolo." 
Acts4:7 Ya re ba sena go ba emisa fa gare, ba ba botsa ba re: “Tiro e, lo e dirile ka thata efe, gongwe ka leina lefe?”" 
Acts4:8 Ke fa Petoro a ba araba, a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a re: “Lona balaodi ba morafe le bagolo ba Iseraele," 
Acts4:9 fa kajeno re lotolodiwa ka ga tiro e e molemo e e diretsweng motho wa molwetse, e o fodisitsweng ka yona," 
Acts4:10 a go itsiwe ke lona lotlhe le morafe otlhe wa Iseraele gore ke ka leina la ga Jesu Keresete wa Nasaretha, yo lo neng lwa mmapola, yo Modimo o mo tsositseng mo baswing; ke ka ene, fa motho yo a eme fa, fa pele ga lona, a fodile." 
Acts4:11 Jesu ke ene lentswe le le nyaditsweng ke lona baagi, le le duleng letlapa la sekhutlo." 
Acts4:12 Mme ga go na pholoso mo go ope o sele; le gona ga go na leina lepe le sele fa tlase ga legodimo, le le neilweng batho, le re tshwanetseng go pholosiwa ka lone.”" 
Acts4:13 Ya re ba bona bopelokgale jwa ga Petoro le Johane, mme ba lemoga gore ga ba a rutega, ke batho fela, ba gakgamala, ba bile ba itse sentle gore ba ne ba ntse ba na le Jesu." 
Acts4:14 Mme ya re ka ba bona motho yo o fodisitsweng a eme nabo, ba tlhoka ka fa ba ka ganelang ka teng." 
Acts4:15 Ya re ba sena go laola gore ba tswele kwa ntle ga lekgotla, ba gakololana" 
Acts4:16 ba re: “Batho ba, re ka ba reng? Gonne go itsegile mo go botlhe ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema gore sesupo se se bonatsegang se dirilwe ke bone, mme ga re ka ke ra se latola." 
Acts4:17 Fela, a re ba kgalemeleng gore ba se tlhole ba bua le motho ope ka leina le, gore go se ka ga tlhola go anamela mo bathong.”" 
Acts4:18 Jaanong ba ba bitsa, ba ba laola gore ba se ka ba tlhola ba bua ka gope, le fa e le go ruta ka leina la ga Jesu." 
Acts4:19 Mme Petoro le Johane ba ba fetola ba re: “A go atlhole lona gore a go siame fa pele ga Modimo go utlwa lona bogolo go Modimo; 
Acts4:20 gonne rona ga re ka ke ra kgona go lesa go bua tse re di bonyeng le tse re di utlwileng.” 
Acts4:21 Ya re ba sena go ba kgalemela thata, ba ba naya tsela, ka ba tlhoka ka fa ba ka ba betsang ka teng ka ntlha ya batho; gonne botlhe ba ne ba galaletsa Modimo ka ntlha ya se se dirilweng." 
Acts4:22 Gonne motho yo sesupo se sa phodiso se dirilweng mo go ene, dinyaga tsa gagwe di ne di fetile 40." 
Acts4:23 Ya re ba sena go gololwa, ba ya kwa go ba ga bone, ba bolela tsotlhe tse baperesiti ba bagolo le bagolo ba morafe ba di buileng nabo." 
Acts4:24 Ya re bone ba sena go utlwa, ba tlhatlosetsa mantswe kwa Modimong ka bongwefela jwa pelo ba re: “Morena, wena yo o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe le lewatle le tsotlhe tse di mo go tsona;" 
Acts4:25 o kile wa bua ka Mowa o o Boitshepo ka molomo wa ga Dafita rraetsho, motlhanka wa gago, wa re: “ ‘Ditšhaba di ne di gakalelang, merafe e ne e akanyetsang dilo tsa boithamako?" 
Acts4:26 Dikgosi tsa lefatshe di ikemisitse, balaodi ba phuthegetse go lwantsha Morena le Motlodiwa wa gagwe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Gonne ruri, mo motseng o, Herote le Pontio Pilato mmogo le baheitane le ditso tsa Iseraele, ba ikopantse go lwantsha Jesu, Motlhanka wa gago yo o boitshepo, yo ò mo tloditseng," 
Acts4:28 mme tota e le go dira tsotlhe tse letsogo la gago le thato ya gago di laotseng pele gore di dirafale. 
Acts4:29 Jaanong Morena, ela go bôpa ga bone tlhoko, o nee batlhanka ba gago go bua Lefoko la gago ka bopelokgale jotlhe," 
Acts4:30 ka go ntsha letsogo go fodisa, mme a ditshupo le dikgakgamatso di dirwe ka leina la ga Jesu, Motlhanka wa gago yo o boitshepo.”" 
Acts4:31 Ya re ba sena go rapela, felo fa ba phuthegetseng teng ga reketla, botlhe ba tlala Mowa o o boitshepo, ba be ba bua Lefoko la Modimo ka bopelokgale." 
Acts4:32 Botlhe ba ba dumetseng ba bo ba le pelo nngwe fela le mowa mongwe fela; mme ga bo go se ope yo o reng, tse a nang natso ke tsa gagwe, tsotlhe ba ne ba di tlhakanetse." 
Acts4:33 Baapostolo ba supa ka ga tsogo ya Morena Jesu ka bonatla jo bogolo; bopelotlhomogi jo bogolo jwa Morena bo ne bo na le bone botlhe. 
Acts4:34 Le gona ga bo go se ope mo go bone yo o tlhokang; gonne botlhe ba ba neng ba na le masimo gongwe matlo, ba a rekisa, ba tsisa madi a tse di rekisitsweng," 
Acts4:35 ba a baya fa dinaong tsa baapostolo, mme ga abelwa mongwe le mongwe ka fa a tlhokang ka teng." 
Acts4:36 Jose yo baapostolo ba neng ba mo okeletsa leina la Baranaba, fa go fetolwa, ke go re: Morwa-kgomotso, Molefi wa kwa Kipero ka fa losikeng," 
Acts4:37 le ene o ne a na le tshimo, a e rekisa, a tsisa madi, a a baya fa dinaong tsa baapostolo." 
Acts5:1 Monna mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Anania, a na le Safira, mosadi wa gagwe, a rekisa naga;" 
Acts5:2 mme a ngobetsa madi a mangwe, mosadi le ene a itse, a tsisa a mangwe, a a baya fa dinaong tsa baapostolo." 
Acts5:3 Mme Petoro a re: “Anania, ke eng fa Satane a tladitse pelo ya gago go aketsa Mowa o o Boitshepo le go ngobetsa madi a mangwe a naga?" 
Acts5:4 E rile e sa ntse e le teng, a e ne e se ya gago? Mme ya re e sena go rekisiwa, a madi a ne a se mo thateng ya gago? O tsenyeditseng tiro e mo pelong ya gago? Ga o a aketsa batho, o akeditse Modimo.”" 
Acts5:5 Ya re Anania a utlwa mafoko a, a wela fa fatshe, a swa. Foo poifo e kgolo ya tlela batho botlhe ba ba utlwang." 
Acts5:6 Makau a nanoga, a mo phutha, a mo rwalela kwa ntle, a mo fitlha." 
Acts5:7 Ya re morago ga sebaka sa dinako tse di ka nnang tharo, mosadi wa gagwe le ene a tsena, a sa itse se se dirafetseng." 
Acts5:8 Petoro a mmotsa a re: “Mpolelele, a naga lo e rekisitse ka bokalo?” Ene a re: “Ee, ka bokalo.”" 
Acts5:9 Ke fa Petoro a mo raya a re: “Ke go reng, fa lo dumalanye go leka Mowa wa Morena? Bona, dinao tsa ba ba fitlhileng monna wa gago di fa mojako, le wena ba tla go rwalela kwa ntle.”" 
Acts5:10 Ka bonako a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a swa; makau a tsena, a mo fitlhela a sule, a mo rwalela kwa ntle, a mo fitlha fa monneng wa gagwe." 
Acts5:11 Foo poifo e kgolo ya tlela phuthego yotlhe le botlhe ba ba utlwang dilo tse. 
Acts5:12 Ditshupo le dikgakgamatso tse dintsi di ne di dirwa mo bathong ka diatla tsa baapostolo. Ba nna mmogo botlhe mo leobong la ga Salomo ka bongwefela jwa pelo. 
Acts5:13 Mme mo go ba bangwe ga bo go se ope yo o betang pelo go ikopanya nabo; mme morafe o ne o ba tlotla thata. 
Acts5:14 Mme ba ba dumelang mo Moreneng ba nna ba oketsega segolo, e le masomo a banna le basadi;" 
Acts5:15 mo ba bileng ba ntshetsa balwetse mo mebileng, ba ba baya mo diphateng le mo malaong gore e re Petoro a tla, le fa e ka bo e le moriti wa gagwe fela, o ritifalele mongwe wa bone." 
Acts5:16 Le gona ga phuthega bontsi jo bo tswang mo metseng e e mo tikologong ya Jerusalema, ba tsisa balwetse le ba ba tshwenngwang ke mewa e e itshekologileng, mme ba fodisiwa botlhe." 
Acts5:17 Ke fa moperesiti yo mogolo a ema le botlhe ba ba nang nae, ba e leng lekoko la Basadukai, ba be ba tlala lefufa," 
Acts5:18 ba tshwara baapostolo, ba ba tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ya motse." 
Acts5:19 Mme moengele wa Morena a bula mejako ya ntlo ya kgolegelo bosigo, a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle a re:" 
Acts5:20 “Yaang lo eme, lo bolelele batho mo Tempeleng mafoko otlhe a bophelo jo jwa tumelo!”" 
Acts5:21 Ya re ba sena go utlwa, ba tsena mo Tempeleng ka masa, ba ruta. Jaanong moperesiti yo mogolo, ya re a sena go fitlha le ba ba nang nae, ba bitsa lekgotla le legolo, e bong bagolo botlhe ba Baiseraele, ba be ba roma kwa ntlong ya kgolegelo gore ba tsisiwe." 
Acts5:22 Ya re batlhanka ba fitlha teng, ba fitlhela ba se yo mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba be ba boa, ba bolela" 
Acts5:23 ba re: “Re fitlhetse ntlo ya kgolegelo e tswetswe ka tlhomamo, le badisa ba eme fa mejako; mme e rile re sena go bula, ra se ka ra fitlhela ope mo teng.”" 
Acts5:24 Ya re molaodi wa Tempele le baperesiti ba bagolo ba utlwa mafoko a, ba botsanya ka kgakgamalo gore selo se, se tla felela kae." 
Acts5:25 Mme ga fitlha mongwe, a ba bolelela a re: “Bonang, banna ba lo letseng lo ba tsentse mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ba eme mo Tempeleng, ba ruta batho.”" 
Acts5:26 Ya baa gona molaodi a tsamayang le batlhanka, ba ba tsisa, mme e seng ka thata; gonne ba ne ba boifa batho, e se re gongwe ba kgobotlediwa." 
Acts5:27 Ya re ba sena go ba tlisa, ba ba emisa fa pele ga lekgotla le legolo. Jaanong moperesiti yo mogolo a ba arabisa" 
Acts5:28 a re: “A ga re a ka ra lo laya thata gore lo se tlhole lo ruta mo leineng le? Mme bonang, lo tladitse Jerusalema thuto ya lona, lo bile lo rata go baya madi a motho yoo mo go rona.”" 
Acts5:29 Petoro le baapostolo ba araba ba re: “Ke tshwanelo go utlwa Modimo bogolo go batho. 
Acts5:30 Modimo wa borraetsho o tsositse Jesu yo lona lo mmolaileng ka go mo pega mo logonnye. 
Acts5:31 Ene yoo, Modimo o mo godisitse ka letsogo la ona le le jang, go nna Moeteledipele le Mopholosi gore a nee Iseraele tlhabologo le boitshwarelo jwa dibe." 
Acts5:32 Mme rona re basupi ba dilo tseo, le ona Mowa o o Boitshepo o Modimo o o neileng bone ba ba o utlwang.”" 
Acts5:33 Ya re bone ba utlwa, ba betwa ke dipelo, ba rata go ba bolaya." 
Acts5:34 Jaanong ga ema mongwe mo lekgotleng le legolo, e le Mofarisai yo leina la gagwe e leng Gamaliele, moruta-molao yo o tlotliwang ke batho botlhe, a laela gore baapostolo ba name ba sa ntshediwe kwa ntle." 
Acts5:35 A ba a ba raya a re: “Lona banna ba Iseraele, lo itise ntlheng ya batho bao gore lo tla dira eng." 
Acts5:36 Gonne mo sebakeng sa pele go kile ga tsoga Theotase, a itira yo mogolo yo palo ya banna ba ba neng ba goga nae e neng e ka nna 400. Mme a bolawa, le botlhe ba ba neng ba mo utlwa ba faladiwa, ba nyelela." 
Acts5:37 Morago ga yoo ga tsoga Jutase wa Galelea ka malatsi a batho ba badilweng ka ona, a feretlha, a itatedisa lesomo la batho. Le ene a nyelela, le botlhe ba ba neng ba mo utlwa ba faladiwa." 
Acts5:38 Mme jaanong ke lo raya ke re: Tlogelang batho bao, lo ba lese; gonne fa kgakololo e gongwe tiro e, e tswa mo bathong, e tla senyega." 
Acts5:39 Mme fa e tswa mo Modimong, lo tla palelwa ke go senya tiro ya bone, e se re gongwe lwa fitlhelwa lo lwantsha Modimo.” Foo ba mo utlwa." 
Acts5:40 Ya re ba sena go bitsa baapostolo, ba ba betsa, ba ba iletsa gore ba se tlhole ba bua mo leineng la ga Jesu; ba be ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Acts5:41 Ke fa bone ba tswa fa pele ga lekgotla le legolo, ba itumela ka ba kailwe ba na le tshwanelo ya go tlotlololwa ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe." 
Acts5:42 Mme ba se ka ba khutla, ba ruta ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe mo Tempeleng le mo matlong, ba rera Efangele ya ga Jesu, fa e le ene Keresete." 
Acts6:1 E rile mo malatsing ao, fa barutwa ba ntsifala, ga tsoga ngongorego ya ba ba buang Segerika, ba ngongoregela ba ba buang Sehebere, ka batlholagadi ba bone ba sa tlhokomelwe mo tlamelong ya malatsi." 
Acts6:2 Foo ba ba 12 ba bitsa barutwa botlhe ba re: “Ga go a tshwanela gore re ka tlogela Lefoko la Modimo, ra ya go aba dijo." 
Acts6:3 Ka moo, bakaulengwe, itlhopheleng banna ba supa mo go lona, ba ba supelwang gore ba siame, ba ba tletseng Mowa le botlhale, ba re ka ba laodisang tiro e e batlegang eo." 
Acts6:4 Mme rona re tla tshwarelela mo thapelong le mo tirelong ya Lefoko.” 
Acts6:5 Lefoko le la kgatlha botlhe pitsong, mme ba tlhopha Setefane, monna yo o tletseng tumelo le Mowa o o Boitshepo, le Filipo le Porogoro le Nikanore le Timone le Paremena le Nikolao, motlhabologi wa kwa Antiogia;" 
Acts6:6 ba ba emisa fa pele ga baapostolo. Ya re ba sena go rapela, ba ba baya diatla." 
Acts6:7 Lefoko la Modimo la tota, palo ya barutwa ya ntsifala thata mo Jerusalema, lesomo le legolo la baperesiti la ineela mo tumelong." 
Acts6:8 Mme Setefane, e le yo o tletseng tumelo le thata, a dira dikgakgamatso le ditshupo tse dikgolo mo bathong." 
Acts6:9 Jaanong ga tsoga bangwe ba e leng ba senagoge se se bidiwang sa Balibertine le Bakirene le Baaleksanteria, le ba ba tswang kwa Kilekia le Asia, ba ganetsanya le Setefane." 
Acts6:10 Mme ba ne ba sa nonofa go emelana le botlhale le Mowa o a buang ka ona. 
Acts6:11 Ke fa ba tlhotlheletsa banna ba ba reng: “Re mo utlwile a bua mafoko a kgalo ka ga Moše le Modimo.” 
Acts6:12 Ba be ba hudua batho le bagolo ba morafe le Baitsedikwalo, ba mo wela, ba mo tshwara ka thata, ba mo isa lekgotleng le legolo." 
Acts6:13 Ba emisa basupi ba maaka ba ba reng: “Motho yo ga a khutle go bua mafoko a go nyefola Felo-fa-go-Boitshepo ga mono le molao; 
Acts6:14 gonne re mo utlwile a re: Jesu yoo wa Nasaretha o tla senya Felo fa, a ba a fetola mekgwa e Moše o e re neileng.”" 
Acts6:15 Ya re botlhe ba ba dutseng mo lekgotleng le legolo ba mo tsepile matlho, ba bona sefatlhego sa gagwe se tshwana le sa moengele." 
Acts7:1 Ke fa moperesiti yo mogolo a mmotsa a re: “A dilo tse, di ntse jalo?”" 
Acts7:2 Ene a re: “Banna ba ga etsho le borra, reetsang! Modimo wa kgalalelo o ne wa bonala kwa go rraetsho Aborahame, a le kwa Mesopotamia, a ise a age kwa Harane," 
Acts7:3 wa mo raya wa re: ‘Tswaa mo lefatsheng la ga eno le mo go ba ga eno, o ye kwa lefatsheng le ke tla le go supetsang.’" 
Acts7:4 Ya baa gona a tswang mo lefatsheng la Bakalatea, a ya go aga kwa Harane. Go tloga teng, fa rraagwe a sena go swa, wa mo hudusetsa kwano lefatsheng leno le kajeno go agileng lona mo go lone." 
Acts7:5 Wa se ka wa mo naya boswa bope mo go lone, le fa e le kgato e le nngwe fela; mme wa mo solofetsa gore o tla le mo naya go le rua, le losika lwa gagwe morago ga gagwe, le fa a ne a ise a nne le ngwana." 
Acts7:6 Modimo wa mmolelela jaana gore losika lwa gagwe e tla nna bajaki mo lefatsheng la boeng, ba tla ba dira batlhanka, ba ba gatelela dinyaga di le 400." 
Acts7:7 ‘Mme setšhaba se ba tla nnang batlhanka ba sona, nna ke tla se betsa,’ go bua Modimo; ‘morago ga moo ba tla tswa, ba ntirela mo felong fa.’" 
Acts7:8 Wa mo naya kgolagano ya go rupa. Aborahame a tsala Isaka jalo, a ba a mo rupisa ka letsatsi la borobedi; Isaka a tsala Jakobe, Jakobe a tsala borraa-ditso tsa rona ba ba 12." 
Acts7:9 “E rile ka borraa-ditso tsa rona ba fufegela Josefa, ba mo rekisa, a isiwa kwa Egepeto; mme Modimo wa bo o na nae," 
Acts7:10 wa mo golola mo dipitlaganong tsotlhe tsa gagwe, wa mo naya botlhale fa pele ga Farao, kgosi ya Egepeto, le bopelontle jwa gagwe, a mo dira molaodi wa Egepeto le wa ntlo yotlhe ya gagwe." 
Acts7:11 Foo ga tla tlala mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Egepeto le Kanana, le tlalelo e kgolo; mme borraetsho ba tlhoka dijo." 
Acts7:12 Ya re Jakobe a sena go utlwa gore go na le mabele kwa Egepeto, a roma borraetsho teng la ntlha." 
Acts7:13 Fa ba ya la bobedi, Josefa a ikitsise bomorwa-rraagwe, lotso lwa ga Josefa lwa ba lwa itsege mo go Farao." 
Acts7:14 Josefa a roma, a bitsa Jakobe rraagwe le losika lotlhe lwa gagwe, e le batho ba ba 75." 
Acts7:15 Jakobe a ya kwa Egepeto, a swa, ene le borraetsho." 
Acts7:16 Ba rwalelwa kwa Sigeme, ba fitlhwa mo legageng le Aborahame o ne a le rekile ka madi mo go bomorwa Hemore, mo Sigeme." 
Acts7:17 “E rile sebaka se atamela sa tsholofetso e Modimo o e solofeditseng Aborahame, batho ba ata ba ntsifala kwa Egepeto," 
Acts7:18 go fitlhelela ga tsoga kgosi e sele mo Egepeto, e e neng e sa itse Josefa." 
Acts7:19 Ene yoo a direla losika lwa rona ka bolotsana, a tlhorisa borraetsho mo go botlhoko, a laola gore go latlhwe masea a bone, a tle a se ka a phela." 
Acts7:20 Ka sebaka seo Moše a tsalwa, a bo a le montle fa pele ga Modimo. A ba a otliwa mo ntlong ya ga rraagwe dikgwedi di le tharo." 
Acts7:21 Ya re a sena go bewa kwa nokeng, morwadia Farao a mo tshola, a mo ikgodisetsa gore a nne morwawe." 
Acts7:22 Moše a rutwa botlhale jotlhe jwa Baegepeto, a nonofa mo mafokong le mo ditirong tsa gagwe." 
Acts7:23 “E rile a le dinyaga di le 40, ga mo tlela mo pelong go lekola ba ga gabo, e bong Baiseraele." 
Acts7:24 Ya re a bona yo mongwe a siamololelwa, a mo femela, a busolosetsa yo o patikwang ka go bolaya Moegepeto." 
Acts7:25 A ba a itlhoma gore ba ga gabo ba tla lemoga, fa Modimo o ba naya pholoso ka letsogo la gagwe; mme ba se ka ba lemoga." 
Acts7:26 Ya re ka letsatsi le le latelang a bonala mo go bone ba lwa, a leka go ba tsereganya a re: ‘Banna, lo bana ba motho; lo siamololanelang?’" 
Acts7:27 Foo yo o siamololelang mongwe-ka-ene a mo kgarametsa a re: ‘Ke mang yo o go dirileng molaodi le moatlhodi mo go rona? 
Acts7:28 A kampo o rata go mpolaya jaaka o letse o bolaile Moegepeto?’ 
Acts7:29 Ke fa Moše a tshaba ka ntlha ya lefoko leo, a ba a ya go nna lekgwelwa kwa lefatsheng la Midiane, kwa o tsaletseng bomorwawe ba babedi teng." 
Acts7:30 “E rile dinyaga di le 40 di sena go feta, moengele a bonala mo go ene kwa sekakeng sa thaba ya Sinai, a le mo kgabong ya molelo wa setlhare se se mitlwa." 
Acts7:31 Ya re Moše a bona, a gakgamalela pono; mme ya re a atamela go leba, ga tla lentswe la Morena la re:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Ke nna Modimo wa borraago, Modimo wa ga Aborahame le Isaka le Jakobe.’ Foo Moše a roroma, a tshaba go leba." 
Acts7:33 Morena a mo raya a re: ‘Rola ditlhako mo dinaong tsa gago; gonne felo fa o emeng teng foo ke lefatshe le le itshepileng. 
Acts7:34 Tota ke bonye pogisego ya morafe wa me o o kwa Egepeto, ke utlwile phegelo ya ona, ke bile ke fologetse go ba golola. Jaanong tlaya, ke tla go roma kwa Egepeto.’" 
Acts7:35 “Moše yoo, yo ba neng ba mo itatola ba re: ‘Ke mang yo o go dirileng molaodi le moatlhodi?’ ke ene yo Modimo o neng wa mo roma go nna molaodi le mogolodi ka letsogo la moengele yo o bonetseng fa go ene kwa setlhareng se se mitlwa." 
Acts7:36 Ke ene yo o ba ntshitseng, a dira dikgakgamatso le ditshupo kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto le kwa Lewatleng le Lehibidu le kwa sekakeng dinyaga di le 40." 
Acts7:37 Moše ke ene yo o reileng Baiseraele a re: ‘Modimo o tla lo tsosetsa moporofeti mo go bomorwa-rraalona jaaka nna; ene lo mo utlweng.’ 
Acts7:38 “Yo ke ene yo o neng a na le moengele kwa sekakeng, yo o neng a bua nae kwa thabeng ya Sinai a le mo phuthegong ya borraetsho, a amogela mafoko a a phelang go a re naya;" 
Acts7:39 yo borraetsho ba ganneng go mo utlwa, mme ba mo kgorometsa ba boela kwa Egepeto ka dipelo tsa bone," 
Acts7:40 ba raya Arone ba re: ‘Re direle medimo e e tla re etelelang pele; gonne Moše yole, yo o re ntshitseng kwa lefatsheng la Egepeto, ga re itse se se mo dirafaletseng.’" 
Acts7:41 Malatsing ao ba dira namane, ba ntshetsa setshwantsho se se bopilweng setlhabelo, ba itumelela ditiro tsa diatla tsa bone." 
Acts7:42 Mme Modimo wa hulara, wa ba neelela go direla lesomo la legodimo, jaaka go kwadilwe mo lokwalong lwa baporofeti ga twe: “ ‘Lona Baiseraele, a lo ne lo ntlisetsa diruiwa tse di tlhajwang le ditlhabelo dinyaga di le 40 kwa sekakeng?" 
Acts7:43 Lo ne lwa rwala motlaagana wa ga Mologe le naledi ya modimo o o bidiwang Refane, ditshwantsho tse lo di dirileng go di obamela. Ke tla lo hudusetsa ka kwa pele ga Babilone.’" 
Acts7:44 “Borraetsho ba ne ba na le Tente ya Boipontsho kwa sekakeng, fela jaaka go laotse yo o buileng le Moše gore a e dire ka fa setshwantshong se o neng a se bona;" 
Acts7:45 ya re borraetsho ba sena go e amogela mo go borraabo, ba tsena nayo mo dinageng tsa baheitane ba Modimo o neng wa ba leleka fa pele ga borraetsho, ba na le Jošua, (ya nna teng) go tla go fitlha malatsing a ga Dafita," 
Acts7:46 yo o bonyeng bopelotlhomogi fa pele ga Modimo, a ba a kopa gore a bonele Ntlo ya Modimo wa ga Jakobe bonno." 
Acts7:47 Mme Salomo ke ene yo o neng a o agela Ntlo. 
Acts7:48 “Mme Mogodimodimo ga a nne mo dikagong tse di agilweng ka diatla, jaaka go bua moporofeti a re:" 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Legodimo ke sedulo sa me sa bogosi, lefatshe ke sebeo sa dinao tsa me. Lo ka nkagela ntlo e e ntseng jang, go bua Morena, gongwe felo ga boikhutso jwa me e ka nna gofe?" 
Acts7:50 A seatla sa me ga se sona se se dirileng tsotlhe tse?’ 
Acts7:51 “Lona ba lo thamo di thata, ba lo sa rupisiwang mo dipelong le mo ditsebeng, ka metlha lo ganetsa Mowa o o Boitshepo; le lona lo tshwana fela le borraeno." 
Acts7:52 Ke ofe wa baporofeti yo borraeno ba se kang ba mmogisa? Mme ba bolaile ba ba boleletseng pele ka ga go tla ga Mosiami; jaanong lo mo tshwarisitse, lwa mmolaya," 
Acts7:53 lona ba lo amogetseng molao wa Modimo ka thuso ya baengele, mme lwa se ka lwa o tshegetsa.”" 
Acts7:54 E rile ba utlwa jalo, ba betwa ke pelo, ba mo phuranyetsa meno." 
Acts7:55 Mme ene, ka a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a fela a ntse a leletse kwa legodimong, a bona kgalalelo ya Modimo le Jesu a eme ka fa ntlheng ya le le jang ya Modimo." 
Acts7:56 A ba a re: “Lebang, ke bona magodimo a bulegile, le Morwa-Motho a eme ka fa ntlheng ya le le jang ya Modimo.”" 
Acts7:57 Foo ba goa ka lentswe le legolo, ba ithiba ditsebe, ba mo ragogela ka bongwefela jwa pelo," 
Acts7:58 ba mo kgoromeletsa kwa ntle ga motse, ba mo kgobotletsa ka majwe. Basupi ba baya dikobo tsa bone fa dinaong tsa lekau lengwe le le bidiwang Saule." 
Acts7:59 Ba kgobotletsa Setefane ka majwe, a ntse a rapela a re: “Morena Jesu, amogela mowa wa me!”" 
Acts7:60 Jaanong a khubama, a kua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Morena, o se ka wa ba balela sebe se!” Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a robala." 
Acts8:1 Saule le ene a kgatlhwa ke polao ya gagwe. Ya re ka letsatsi leo pogiso e kgolo ya tsogela phuthego e e mo Jerusalema, mme botlhe ba falalediwa kwa dinageng tsa Jutea le Samaria, fa e se baapostolo." 
Acts8:2 Mme banna bangwe ba ba boifang Modimo ba fitlha Setefane, ba mo lelela segolo." 
Acts8:3 Mme Saule a nna a tlhorisa phuthego, a tlhomaganya matlo, a swatola banna le basadi, a ba tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo." 
Acts8:4 Jaanong ba ba faladitsweng ba ya le naga, ba eta ba rera lefoko la Efangele." 
Acts8:5 Filipo a ya kwa motseng mongwe wa Samaria, a ba rerela Keresete." 
Acts8:6 Batho ba tlhokomela dilo tse di bolelwang ke Filipo ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ka ba utlwa le go bona ditshupo tse a di dirang;" 
Acts8:7 gonne ba bantsi ba ne ba na le mewa e e itshekologileng; yona e ne e tswa e goa ka lentswe le legolo. Mme ba bantsi ba ba suleng mefama le ba ba golafetseng maoto ba fodisiwa. 
Acts8:8 Ga ba ga nna boitumelo jo bogolo mo motseng oo. 
Acts8:9 Monna mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Simone o ne a le mo motseng oo pele ga foo, a dira tsa bongaka, a tseanya setšhaba sa Samaria ka go bua a re: “Ke nna yo mogolo.”" 
Acts8:10 Botlhe ba ne ba mo setse morago, ba bannye le ba bagolo, ba re: “Ke ene nonofo ya Modimo e e bidiwang ‘E kgolo’.”" 
Acts8:11 Ba ne ba mo sala morago, ka a sa bolo go ba tseanya ka tsa bongaka sebaka se seleele." 
Acts8:12 E rile ba dumela Filipo yo o neng a ba rerela Efangele ya puso ya Modimo le leina la ga Jesu Keresete, ba kolobediwa, banna le basadi." 
Acts8:13 Le Simone ka esi a dumela, mme ya re a sena go kolobediwa, a nna a nna le Filipo ka gale; ya re a bona ditshupo le ditiro tsa nonofo tse dikgolo di dirwa, a tseana." 
Acts8:14 E rile baapostolo ba ba kwa Jerusalema ba utlwa gore Basamaria ba amogetse Lefoko la Modimo, ba roma Petoro le Johane kwa go bone." 
Acts8:15 Ya re ba sena go fitlha teng, ba ba rapelela gore ba amogele Mowa o o Boitshepo;" 
Acts8:16 gonne o ne o ise o wele mo go ope wa bone, ba ne ba kolobeditswe mo leineng la Morena Jesu fela." 
Acts8:17 Ba ba baya diatla, mme ba amogela Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Acts8:18 Ya re Simone a bona gore Mowa o o Boitshepo o newa ka peo ya diatla tsa baapostolo, a ba tlisetsa madi" 
Acts8:19 a re: “Le nna, nnayang nonofo eo gore e tle e re mongwe le mongwe yo ke mmayang diatla, a amogele Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Acts8:20 Mme Petoro a mo fetola a re: “A madi a gago a nyelele nao, ka gonne o gopotse gore neo ya Modimo e ka bonwa ka madi." 
Acts8:21 Ga o na kabelo, le e seng tshiamelo mo neong eo; gonne pelo ya gago e kgopo fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts8:22 Ka moo he, ikwatlhaele bosula jo jwa gago, o be o rapele Morena, e tle e re gongwe maikaelelo ao a pelo ya gago o a itshwarelwe;" 
Acts8:23 gonne ke go bona o tletse santlhokwe wa bogalaka, e bile o bofilwe ka tshiamololo.”" 
Acts8:24 Simone a araba a re: “Nthapeleleng Morena e le lona gore ke se ka ka welwa ke sepe sa dilo tse lo di buileng.” 
Acts8:25 Ya re jaanong ba sena go supa le go bolela Lefoko la Morena, ba boela kwa Jerusalema, ba eta ba rera Efangele mo metsaneng e mentsi ya Basamaria." 
Acts8:26 Jaanong moengele wa Morena a bua le Filipo a re: “Nanoga o ye kwa ntlheng ya borwa kwa tseleng e e tswang Jerusalema, e ya kwa Gasa;” ke tsela e e senya." 
Acts8:27 A nanoga a tsamaya, a ba a fitlhela monna mongwe wa Moethiopia teng, e le modiredi le tona ya ga Kantase, kgosi ya sesadi ya Baethiopia, yo o neng a okametse khumo yotlhe ya gagwe. O ne a tsile kwa Jerusalema go obamela teng." 
Acts8:28 Jaanong a boela gae ka koloi ya gagwe, a buisa lokwalo lwa moporofeti Jesaya." 
Acts8:29 Mowa wa raya Filipo wa re: “Yaa o kopane le koloi ele!” 
Acts8:30 Filipo a tabogela teng, a mo utlwa a buisa moporofeti Jesaya, a ba a re: “A o tlhaloganya se o se buisang?”" 
Acts8:31 Ene a re: “Nka tlhaloganya jang, fa ke sa tlhalosediwe ke ope?” A ba a rapela Filipo gore a pagame, a nne nae." 
Acts8:32 Kgaolo e a neng a e buisa e ne e le e e reng: “O ne a gogelwa tlhabong jaaka nku; a se ka a bula molomo wa gagwe jaaka kwana e didimetse fa pele ga mmeodi wa yona. 
Acts8:33 Ya re ka a le mo boikokobetsong, a timiwa katlholo e e siameng; losika lwa gagwe lo tla bolelwa ke mang? Gonne bophelo jwa gagwe bo tlosiwa mo lefatsheng.”" 
Acts8:34 Jaanong modiredi a botsa Filipo a re: “Ke a go rapela, moporofeti o bua jalo ka ga mang, a ke ka ga gagwe gongwe ka ga mongwe o sele?”" 
Acts8:35 Ke fa Filipo a tswa molomo, a simolola ka lokwalo loo, a mo rerela Efangele ya ga Jesu." 
Acts8:36 Ya re ba ntse ba tswelela pele mo tseleng, ba fitlha fa metsing mangwe, mme modiredi a re: “Bona, metsi ke ale; ke kgorelediwa ke eng go ka kolobediwa?”" 
Acts8:37 Filipo a araba a re: “Fa o dumela ka pelo yotlhe, go ka nna jalo.” Ene a araba a re: “Ke dumela gore Jesu Keresete ke Morwa Modimo.”" 
Acts8:38 Jaanong a laola gore koloi e eme, ba fologela kwa metsing ka bobedi jwa bone, Filipo le modiredi, mme a mo kolobetsa." 
Acts8:39 Ya re ba tswa mo metsing, Mowa wa Morena wa tlosa Filipo, mme modiredi a se ka a tlhola a mmona; fela a tswelela mo tseleng ya gagwe ka boitumelo." 
Acts8:40 Filipo a fitlhelwa kwa Ašetote, a eta a ntse a rera Efangele mo metseng yotlhe, ga tsamaya a fitlha kwa Kaisarea." 
Acts9:1 Mme Saule yo o neng a sa ntse a gakaletse barutwa ba Morena ka go bôpa le go ba bolaya, a ya kwa moperesiting yo mogolo," 
Acts9:2 a mo kopa dikwalo tse di kwalelwang disenagoge tsa Damaseko gore fa a ka fitlhela bangwe ba e leng ba Tsela e ya bokeresete, banna le fa e le basadi, a ba golege, a ba tlise kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts9:3 Ya re a tsamaya, mme a atamela Damaseko, a tshogana ka lesedi le le tswang legodimong le mo phatsimela." 
Acts9:4 Mme a wela fa fatshe, a utlwa lentswe le mo raya le re: “Saule, Saule, o mpogisetsang?”" 
Acts9:5 Ene a re: “O mang, Morena?” Morena a re: “Ke nna Jesu yo ò mmogisang. Go thata mo go wena go raga ditlhabi tsa lešwane.”" 
Acts9:6 Foo a roroma, a gakgamala a re: “Morena, o rata gore ke dire eng?” Morena a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o tsene mo motseng; o tla bolelelwa se o tshwanetseng go se dira.”" 
Acts9:7 Banna ba ba neng ba mo patile ba eme, ba tlhoka puo, ba utlwa lentswe, mme ba sa bone ope." 
Acts9:8 Jaanong Saule a tsoga fa fatshe, mme le fa a budulogile matlho, a bo a sa bone. Ba mo tshwara ka letsogo, ba mo isa kwa Damaseko." 
Acts9:9 A tlhola malatsi a le mararo a sa bone, a sa je, a sa nwe." 
Acts9:10 Jaanong ga bo go le morutwa mongwe mo Damaseko, yo leina la gagwe e leng Anania. Morena a bua nae ka pono a re: “Anania!” Ene a re: “Ke fano, Morena.”" 
Acts9:11 Morena a mo raya a re: “Nanoga o ye kwa mmileng o o bidiwang Tolamo, o batle mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Saule wa kwa Tareso, mo ntlong ya ga Jutase. Gonne bona, o a rapela," 
Acts9:12 mme a bona monna ka pontsho yo leina la gagwe e leng Anania, a tsena a mmaya diatla gore a boe a bone.”" 
Acts9:13 Anania a fetola a re: “Morena, ke utlwile ka ba bantsi ka ga monna yoo gore o diretse baitshepi ba gago kwa Jerusalema tse di bosula tse di kana kang!" 
Acts9:14 Le mono o na le thata e e tswang mo baperesiting ba bagolo ya go golega botlhe ba ba bitsang leina la gago.” 
Acts9:15 Morena a mo raya a re: “Yaa teng; gonne ene yoo ke sediri sa me se se tlhaotsweng go rwalela leina la me fa pele ga baheitane le dikgosi le Baiseraele. 
Acts9:16 Kana ke tla mo supetsa gore tse a tshwanetseng go di boga ka ntlha ya leina la me di kana kang.” 
Acts9:17 Anania a tloga, a tsena mo ntlong, a mmaya diatla a re: “Saule, mokaulengwe, Morena, e bong Jesu yo o bonetseng go wena mo tseleng e ò tsileng ka yona, o nthomile gore o boe o bone, le gore o tladiwe Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Acts9:18 Ka bonako ga wa dilo mo matlhong a gagwe, e kete matlape, mme a foufologa, a ba a nanoga a kolobediwa," 
Acts9:19 a ja, a ba a boelwa gape ke thata. Mme a tlhola malatsi mangwe le barutwa ba ba mo Damaseko." 
Acts9:20 A akofa a simolola go rera mo disenagogeng gore Jesu ke ene Morwa Modimo. 
Acts9:21 Mme botlhe ba ba utlwang ba rerega ba re: “Yo a ga se ene yo o neng a dira setlhogo kwa Jerusalema mo go ba ba bitsang Leina leo, mme le mono o ne a tletse sona seo gore a ba golege, a ba ise fa pele ga baperesiti ba bagolo?”" 
Acts9:22 Saule a nonofela pele, a silofatsa Bajuta ba ba agileng mo Damaseko ka go tlhomamisa gore Jesu ke ene Keresete." 
Acts9:23 Ya re malatsi a se kae a sena go feta, Bajuta ba gakololana go mmolaya." 
Acts9:24 Mme Saule a itse maikaelelo a bone. Ba ne ba disa dikgoro bosigo le motshegare gore ba mmolae. 
Acts9:25 Mme barutwa ba mo tsaya bosigo, ba mo folosa ka fa loboteng, ba mo lepeletsa ka seroto." 
Acts9:26 E rile a fitlha kwa Jerusalema, a leka go ikopanya le barutwa; mme bone ba mmoifa botlhe, ba sa dumele gore ke morutwa." 
Acts9:27 Mme Baranaba a mo tshola, a ba a mo isa kwa baapostolong, a ba bolelela ka fa Saule a bonyeng Morena mo tseleng ka teng, le jaaka Morena a buile nae, le ka fa a rerileng ka teng mo leineng la ga Jesu kwa Damaseko ka bopelokgale." 
Acts9:28 Jaanong a nna nabo, a ntse a tsena a tswa mo Jerusalema, a rera mo leineng la Morena ka bopelokgale;" 
Acts9:29 a bua le Bajuta ba ba buang Segerika, a ba a ganetsanya nabo. Mme bone ba batla go mmolaya." 
Acts9:30 Ya re bakaulengwe ba lemoga, ba mo isa kwa Kaisarea, ba be ba mo romela kwa Tareso." 
Acts9:31 Jaanong phuthego ya nna mo kagisong nageng yotlhe mo Jutea le mo Galelea le mo Samaria, ya agega, ya tswelela pele mo go boifeng Morena, ya oketsega ka thuso ya Mowa o o Boitshepo." 
Acts9:32 Jaanong ya re Petoro a ba etela botlhe, a fitlha le kwa baitsheping ba ba agileng kwa Lita." 
Acts9:33 A fitlhela monna mongwe teng yo leina la gagwe e leng Enea, yo o neng a ntse a letse mo bolaong e setse e le dinyaga di le robedi, a sule mhama." 
Acts9:34 Petoro a mo raya a re: “Enea, Jesu Keresete o a go fodisa; tsoga o ikalolele!” A akofa a tsoga." 
Acts9:35 Botlhe ba ba agileng mo Lita le mo Sarone ba mmona, ba be ba sokologela Moreneng." 
Acts9:36 Jaanong go ne go le morutwa mongwe wa mosadi kwa Jope, yo leina la gagwe e leng Tabitha, fa go fetolwa ke go re Dorokase. Ene o ne a tletse ditiro tsa lorato, a atswa ba bantsi." 
Acts9:37 Ka malatsi ao a lwala, a ba a swa. Ya re ba sena go mo tlhapisa, ba mmaya mo ntlwaneng e e kwa godimo." 
Acts9:38 Ya re ka Lita a le gaufi le Jope, mme barutwa ba utlwa gore Petoro o teng, ba roma banna ba le babedi go ene, ba mo rapela ba re: “O se ka wa diega go tla go rona.”" 
Acts9:39 Petoro a nanoga, a ya nabo. Ya re a sena go fitlha teng, ba mo isa kwa ntlwaneng e e kwa godimo. Mme batlholagadi botlhe ba tla ba ema fa go ene ba lela, ba mo supetsa mesese le diaparo tse Dorokase a di dirileng a sa ntse a na nabo." 
Acts9:40 Ke fa Petoro a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle botlhe, a khubama a rapela, a ba a retologela kwa serepeng a re: “Tabitha, tsoga!” A buduloga matlho, mme ya re a bona Petoro, a kanamologa." 
Acts9:41 Petoro a mo neela seatla, a mo kakatlolola, a ba a bitsa baitshepi le batlholagadi, a mo ba supetsa a phela." 
Acts9:42 Ga ba ga itsiwe mo Jope yotlhe, mme ba bantsi ba dumela mo Moreneng." 
Acts9:43 Petoro a tlhola malatsi a se kae mo Jope mo go Simone mongwe, mosugi wa matlalo." 
Acts10:1 Go ne go le monna mongwe kwa Kaisarea yo leina la gagwe e leng Koronelio, e le molaodi-wa-lekgolo mo mophatong o o bidiwang wa Italia," 
Acts10:2 e le morapedi yo o boifang Modimo, ene le botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, yo o atswang batho thata, a rapela Modimo ka metlha." 
Acts10:3 E rile e ka nna nako ya boraro thapama, a bona moengele wa Modimo sentle ka pontsho a tsena go ene, a mo raya a re: “Koronelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Mme ene a tsepa matlho mo go ene a tshogile a re: “Ke eng, Morena?” A mo araba a re: “Merapelo ya gago le dikatso tsa gago di tlhatlogile go nna segopotso fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:5 Mme jaanong roma banna kwa Jope go bitsa Simone yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petoro; 
Acts10:6 o nna kwa go Simone yo mongwe wa mosugi yo ntlo ya gagwe e leng fa lewatleng; ene o tla go bolelela se o tshwanetseng go se dira.” 
Acts10:7 Ya re moengele yo o buileng nae a sena go tsamaya, a bitsa ba le babedi ba badiredi ba lelapa le motlhabani mongwe yo o boifang Modimo, wa ba ba nang nae ka gale," 
Acts10:8 a ba bolelela tsotlhe, a ba roma kwa Jope." 
Acts10:9 E rile ka moso, bone ba sa le mo tseleng, mme ba atametse motse, Petoro a tlhatlogela kwa godimo ga ntlo go rapela, e ka nna ka nako ya motshegare." 
Acts10:10 Foo a tshwarwa ke tlala, a ba a rata go ja. Ya re ba baakanya, a welwa ke tshiramo ya pelo," 
Acts10:11 a bona legodimo le bulegile, le setsholo sengwe, e kete lesela le legolo, se fologela fa fatshe se lepeleditswe ka dintlha tse nne," 
Acts10:12 mo go sona go le mefutafuta ya tse di maoto-mane le dibata le digagabi tsa lefatshe le dinonyane tsa loapi. 
Acts10:13 Lentswe la ba la tla go ene la re: “Nanoga, Petoro, tlhaba o je!”" 
Acts10:14 Mme Petoro a re: “A go se nne jalo, Morena; gonne ga ke ise nke ke je sepe se se ilegang, le fa e le se se itshekologileng.”" 
Acts10:15 Lentswe la ba la tla go ene lwa bobedi la re: “Tse Modimo o di itshekisitseng, wena o se ka wa re, di a ilega.”" 
Acts10:16 Ga dirafala jalo gararo; setsholo sa ba sa akofa sa tsholelwa kwa legodimong. 
Acts10:17 Ya re Petoro a sa ntse a akabetse gore pono e o e bonyeng e ka ne e kayang, ga tla banna ba ba romilweng ke Koronelio, ba boditse ka ga ntlo ya ga Simone, ba ema fa mojako," 
Acts10:18 ba bitsa, ba be ba botsa gore a Simone yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petoro o nna teng fa." 
Acts10:19 Ya re Petoro a ntse a akanya ka ga pono, Mowa wa mo raya wa re: “Bona, go banna ba le bararo, ba a go batla." 
Acts10:20 Nanoga o fologe, o ye nabo, o se belaele sepe; gonne ke nna ke ba romileng.”" 
Acts10:21 Petoro a fologela kwa banneng ba ba romilweng ke Koronelio kwa go ene a re: “Ke nna yo lo mmatlang; ke eng se lo se tletseng?” 
Acts10:22 Ba re: “Koronelio, molaodi-wa-lekgolo, monna yo o siameng yo o boifang Modimo, yo o bolelwang ka molemo ke setšhaba sotlhe sa Bajuta, o laetswe ke moengele yo o boitshepo gore a go biletse kwa ntlong ya gagwe, a utlwe mafoko mo go wena.”" 
Acts10:23 Ke fa a ba biletsa mo teng, a ba tshola. Ya re kamoso a tsoga a bolola nabo, le bangwe ba bakaulengwe ba ba mo Jope ba ya nae." 
Acts10:24 Ka moso o mongwe ba tsena mo Kaisarea. Koronelio a bo a ba lebeletse, a phuthile ba ga gabo le ditsala tse dikgolo tsa gagwe." 
Acts10:25 Ya re Petoro a re o a tsena, Koronelio a mo kgatlhantsha, a wela fa dinaong tsa gagwe, a mo obamela." 
Acts10:26 Mme Petoro a mo emisa a re: “Nanoga, le nna ke motho fela jaaka wena.”" 
Acts10:27 Ya re a ntse a bua nae, a tsena, a ba a fitlhela ba bantsi ba phuthegile." 
Acts10:28 A ba raya a re: “Lo itse ka losi gore monna wa Mojuta ga a a letlelelwa go ikopanya le mongwe wa morafe o sele, le fa e le go tsena go ene; mme nna Modimo o ntshupeditse gore ke se ka ka kaya motho ope gore o a ilega gongwe o itshekologile." 
Acts10:29 Ke gona ka moo e rileng ke bidiwa, ka tla fela, ke sa ganetse. Mme jaanong ke botsa gore lo mpileditseng?”" 
Acts10:30 Koronelio a araba a re: “E rile maloba, go setse go fetile malatsi a mane, ka nako eno ya boraro thapama, ka rapela mo ntlong ya me, ka bona monna a ema fa pele ga me, a apere diaparo tse di galalelang," 
Acts10:31 a nthaya a re: ‘Koronelio, thapelo ya gago e utlwilwe, le dikatso tsa gago di gopotswe fa pele ga Modimo." 
Acts10:32 Ka moo he, roma kwa Jope, o bitse Simone yo o okeleditsweng leina la Petoro; o nna mo ntlong ya ga Simone wa mosugi fa lewatleng; yoo e tla re fa a tsile, a bue nao.’" 
Acts10:33 Ke ka moo ke akofileng ka roma kwa go wena; mme o dirile sentle, fa o tsile. Jaanong re fano rotlhe fa pele ga Modimo go utlwa tsotlhe tse o di laetsweng ke Modimo.”" 
Acts10:34 Ke fa Petoro a tswa molomo a re: “Ammaaruri, ke lemoga gore Modimo ga o gobelelele motho;" 
Acts10:35 mme yo o o boifang, a ba a dira ka tshiamo morafeng mongwe le mongwe, o a mo amogela." 
Acts10:36 O rometse Baiseraele Lefoko la ona, wa bega kagiso ka Jesu Keresete Efangeleng; ke ene Morena wa botlhe." 
Acts10:37 Lo itse se se dirafetseng mo lefatsheng lotlhe la Jutea, go simolola kwa Galelea, morago ga kolobetso e Johane o neng a e rera," 
Acts10:38 e bong sa ga Jesu wa Nasaretha, jaaka Modimo o mo tloditse ka Mowa o o Boitshepo le ka nonofo; yo o ne a dikologa a dira molemo, a fodisa botlhe ba ba gatelelwang ke Diabolo; gonne Modimo o ne o na nae." 
Acts10:39 “Rona re basupi ba tsotlhe tse o di dirileng mo lefatsheng la Bajuta le mo Jerusalema, yo ba bileng ba mmolaya ka go mo pega mo logonnye." 
Acts10:40 Ene yoo Modimo o mo tsositse ka letsatsi la boraro, wa dira gore a bonale," 
Acts10:41 e seng mo bathong botlhe, mme e le mo basuping ba ba tlhaotsweng ke Modimo pele, e bong mo go rona ba re jeleng, ra nwa nae, a sena go tsoga mo baswing." 
Acts10:42 Mme o re laetse go rerela batho le go supa gore ke ene yo o tlhomilweng ke Modimo go nna moatlhodi wa baphedi le baswi. 
Acts10:43 Ke ene yo baporofeti botlhe ba supang ka ga gagwe gore mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang mo go ene o tla bona boitshwarelo jwa dibe ka leina la gagwe.” 
Acts10:44 Ya re Petoro a sa ntse a bua mafoko a, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa wela botlhe ba ba utlwang molaetsa." 
Acts10:45 Ke fa ba bogwera ba ba dumetseng, ba ba tsileng le Petoro, ba gakgamala fa neo ya Mowa o o Boitshepo e tshetswe le mo baheitaneng;" 
Acts10:46 gonne ba ba utlwa ba bua ka diteme, ba godisa Modimo. Ke fa Petoro a simolola go botsa a re:" 
Acts10:47 “A mongwe a ka thibela metsi gore batho ba, ba ba amogetseng Mowa o o Boitshepo fela jaaka rona, ba se kolobediwe?”" 
Acts10:48 A ba a laola gore ba kolobediwe mo leineng la ga Jesu Keresete. Jaanong ba mo rapela gore a tlhole malatsi mangwe teng. 
Acts11:1 Jaanong baapostolo le bakaulengwe ba ba kwa Jutea ba utlwa gore Baditšhaba le bone ba amogetse Lefoko la Modimo. 
Acts11:2 E rile Petoro a sena go fitlha kwa Jerusalema, ba e leng ba bogwera ba ganetsanya nae ba re:" 
Acts11:3 “O ile wa tsena mo banneng ba ba sa rupang, wa ja nabo.”" 
Acts11:4 Mme Petoro a simolola go ba ranolela ka thulaganyo a re: 
Acts11:5 “Ke ne ke le mo motseng wa Jope, ke rapela. Ya re ke wetswe ke tshiramo ya pelo, ka bona pono, e bong setsholo se se tswang kwa legodimong, e kete lesela le legolo, le lepeleditswe ka dintlha tse nne, la fitlha fa go nna." 
Acts11:6 Ya re ke sena go le tlhoma matlho, ka le tlhokomela, ka ba ka bona dilo tse di maoto-mane tsa lefatshe le dibata le tse di gagabang le dinonyane tsa loapi." 
Acts11:7 Le gona ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya le re: ‘Nanoga, Petoro, tlhaba o je!’" 
Acts11:8 Mme ka re: ‘A go se nne jalo, Morena; gonne ga go ise go ke go tsene sepe mo leganong la me se se ilegang gongwe se se itshekologileng.’" 
Acts11:9 Mme lentswe la araba lwa bobedi, le tswa kwa legodimong, la re: ‘Tse Modimo o di itshekisitseng, wena o se ka wa di kaya tse di ilegang.’" 
Acts11:10 Ga dirafala jalo gararo, tsotlhe tsa ba tsa tsholelwa gape kwa legodimong." 
Acts11:11 “Mme ka yona nako eo banna ba le bararo ba tla, ba ema fa pele ga ntlo e re ne re le mo go yona, ba romilwe kwa go nna, ba tswa kwa Kaisarea." 
Acts11:12 Mme Mowa wa nthaya wa re, ke ye nabo, ke se tlhaole ope. Mme le bakaulengwe ba barataro ba, ba ne ba ya le nna, ra tsena mo ntlong ya monna yoo." 
Acts11:13 A re bolelela ka fa a bonyeng moengele ka teng a eme mo ntlong ya gagwe a re: ‘Roma kwa Jope go bitsa Simone yo leina le lengwe la gagwe e leng Petoro; 
Acts11:14 ene o tla go bolelela mafoko a o tla pholosiwang ka ona, wena le ba ntlo ya gago botlhe.’" 
Acts11:15 Ya re ke simolola go bua, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa fologela mo go bona fela jaaka mo go rona mo tshimologong." 
Acts11:16 Jaanong ka gakologelwa Lefoko la Morena jaaka a rile: ‘Fa e le Johane, ene o kolobeditse ka metsi; mme lona lo tla kolobediwa ka Mowa o o Boitshepo.’" 
Acts11:17 Fa jaanong Modimo o ba neile neo e e tshwanang le ya rona ba re dumetseng mo go Morena Jesu Keresete, nna ke ne ke le mang, yo nka kgoreletsang Modimo?”" 
Acts11:18 Ya re ba utlwa jalo, ba didimala, ba be ba galaletsa Modimo ba re: “Jaanong ke go re: Baditšhaba le bone Modimo o ba neile tlhabologo e e isang bophelong.”" 
Acts11:19 Jaanong ba ba faladitsweng ka pogiso e e tsogileng ka ntlha ya ga Setefane ba ya go fitlha kwa Fenikia le kwa Kipero le kwa Antiogia, ba sa bolelele ope Lefoko fa e se Bajuta fela." 
Acts11:20 Mme bangwe ba bone e ne e le banna ba Kipero le ba Kirene, ba e rileng ba fitlha kwa Antiogia, ba bua le Bagerika le bone, ba rera Efangele ya Morena Jesu." 
Acts11:21 Letsogo la Morena la nna nabo, mme ba bantsi ba dumela, ba sokologela mo Moreneng." 
Acts11:22 Tumo ka ga bone ya utlwala mo ditsebeng tsa phuthego ya kwa Jerusalema, ba be ba roma Baranaba kwa Antiogia." 
Acts11:23 Ya re a fitlha teng, mme a bona bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo, a itumela, a ba a ba kgothatsa botlhe gore ba ngaparele Morena ka boikaelelo jwa pelo;" 
Acts11:24 gonne e ne e le monna yo o siameng, a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo le tumelo; mme bontsi jo bogolo jwa oketsegela Morena." 
Acts11:25 Ke fa Baranaba a tswa teng, a ya kwa Tareso go batla Saule." 
Acts11:26 Ya re a sena go mmona, a mo isa kwa Antiogia. Ga fela ngwaga o o tletseng ba ntse ba nna le phuthego, ba ruta bontsi jo bogolo. Teng kwa Antiogia barutwa ba simolola go bidiwa Bakeresete." 
Acts11:27 Mo malatsing ao ga fitlha baporofeti bangwe mo Antiogia, ba tswa Jerusalema." 
Acts11:28 Ga nanoga mongwe wa bone yo leina la gagwe e leng Agabo, a bolela ka Mowa gore go tla nna leuba le legolo mo lefatsheng lotlhe. Ke le le neng la dirafala mo malatsing a ga Kelaudio." 
Acts11:29 Barutwa ba dumalelana gore ba romele dithuso kwa badumeding-ka-bone ba ba agileng kwa Jutea, mongwe le mongwe ka fa a nonofileng ka teng." 
Acts11:30 Ba be ba dira jalo, ba di romela kwa bagolong ka Baranaba le Saule." 
Acts12:1 E rile ka sebaka seo kgosi Herote a tshwara bangwe ba phuthego go ba direla tse di setlhogo. 
Acts12:2 A bolaya Jakobo, morwa-rraagwe Johane, ka tšhaka." 
Acts12:3 Ya re a bona gore go kgatlhile Bajuta, a tswelela pele, a tshwara le ene Petoro. Mme ya bo e le malatsi a Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang." 
Acts12:4 Ya re a sena go mo tshwara, a mo tsenya mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, a mo neela ditlhophana tse nne tsa batlhabani, tse go leng ba le bane mo go sengwe le sengwe, go mo disa; mme a ikaeletse gore e tle e re Tlolaganyo e sena go feta, a mo sekise fa pele ga morafe." 
Acts12:5 Petoro a disiwa jalo mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; mme phuthego ya nna ya mo rapelela fa pele ga Modimo. 
Acts12:6 E rile ka jona bosigo joo, fa Herote a tla tsoga a mo ntsha, Petoro a bo a robetse fa gare ga batlhabani ba le babedi, a golegilwe ka dikeetane tse pedi, balebeledi ba le fa mojako, ba disitse ntlo ya kgolegelo." 
Acts12:7 Mme moengele wa Morena a ema fa go ene ka tshoganyetso, le lesedi la phatsima mo ntlong; mme a batola Petoro fa letlhakoreng, a mo tsosa a re: “Tsoga ka bonako!” Mme dikeetane tsa wa mo mabogong a gagwe." 
Acts12:8 Moengele a ba a mo raya a re: “Itlame o rwale ditlhako tsa gago!” Petoro a dira jalo. Jaanong a mo raya a re: “Apara kobo ya gago o ntshale morago!” 
Acts12:9 A tswa, a mo sala morago, mme a bo a sa itse gore a se se dirilweng ke moengele ke nnete; a itlhoma a bona pono fela." 
Acts12:10 Ya re ba sena go feta balebeledi ba ntlha le ba bobedi, ba fitlha fa setswalong sa tshipi sa kgoro e e tswelang kwa motseng; mme sona sa ba ipulela. Ba tswa, ba tsamaya go fitlha mokgwatheng o o kgabaganyang; foo moengele a akofa a kgaogana nae." 
Acts12:11 Ya re Petoro a sena go sedimogelwa, a re: “Jaanong ke itse gore ruri Morena o romile moengele wa gagwe, a nkgolola mo seatleng sa ga Herote le mo go tsotlhe tse morafe wa Bajuta o neng o di lebeletse.”" 
Acts12:12 Ya re a sena go lemoga jalo, a ya kwa ntlong ya ga Maria, mma Johane yo leina le lengwe la gagwe e leng Mareko, kwa ba bantsi ba neng ba phuthegetse teng, ba rapela." 
Acts12:13 Ya re a konyakonya setswalo sa kgoro, lelata le le bidiwang Rote la tla go reetsa." 
Acts12:14 A lemoga lentswe la ga Petoro, a se ka a bula kgoro ka ntlha ya boitumelo, mme a tabogela mo teng, a bolela gore Petoro o eme fa kgorong." 
Acts12:15 Ba mo raya ba re: “O a tsenwa.” Mme ene a tlhomamisa thata gore go ntse jalo. Bone ba re: “Ke moengele wa gagwe.” 
Acts12:16 Mme Petoro a nna a konyakonya. Ya re ba sena go bula, ba mmona, ba be ba tseana." 
Acts12:17 A ba boka ka seatla gore ba didimale, a ba bolelela ka fa Morena a mo ntshitseng mo ntlong ya kgolegelo ka teng; a ba a re: “Bolelang Jakobo le bakaulengwe dilo tseo.” Mme a tloga a ya felong go sele." 
Acts12:18 Ya re bo sena go sa, ga nna khuduego e kgolo mo batlhabaning gore go dirafetse eng ka Petoro." 
Acts12:19 Ya re Herote a sena go mmatla, mme a sa mmone, a sekisa balebeledi, a laela gore ba bolawe; a tloga mo Jutea, a ya kwa Kaisarea, a nna teng." 
Acts12:20 O ne a galefetse ba Tiro le ba Sitone thata. Mme bone ba tla go ene ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ba itsalanya le Belaseto, modisa wa marobalo a kgosi, ba kopa kagiso; ka gonne lefatshe la bone le ne le jesiwa ke lefatshe la kgosi." 
Acts12:21 Ya re ka letsatsi le le beilweng Herote a apara diaparo tsa bogosi, a nna mo sennong sa bogosi, a bua le bone." 
Acts12:22 Ke fa batho ba kua ba re: “Ke lentswe la modimo, ga se la motho.”" 
Acts12:23 Moengele wa Morena a mo itaya ka bonako, ka a se ka a naya Modimo tlotlo. Mme a jewa ke diboko, a swa." 
Acts12:24 Mme Lefoko la Modimo la gola, la ntsifala." 
Acts12:25 E rile Baranaba le Saule ba sena go fitlhisa dithuso tsa Antiogia, ba boa kwa Jerusalema, ba na le Johane yo leina le lengwe la gagwe e leng Mareko." 
Acts13:1 Go ne go le baporofeti le baruti mo Antiogia mo phuthegong ya teng, e bong Baranaba le Simeone yo o bidiwang Nigere, le Lukio wa Kirene, le Manaene yo o godisitsweng mmogo le kgosi Herote, le Saule." 
Acts13:2 Ya re ba ntse ba direla Morena, mme ba itima dijo, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa re: “Nntshetsang Baranaba le Saule gore ba ye tirong e ke ba bileditseng yona.”" 
Acts13:3 Jaanong ya re ba sena go itima dijo le go rapela le go ba baya diatla, ba ba naya tsela." 
Acts13:4 Jaanong bone, ka ba romilwe ke Mowa o o Boitshepo, ba ya kwa Seloikia, ba be ba tswa teng, ba tshelela kwa Kipero ka mokoro." 
Acts13:5 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa Salami, ba bolela Lefoko la Modimo mo disenagogeng tsa Bajuta, ba na le Johane e le mothusi." 
Acts13:6 Ya re ba sena go ralala setlhakatlhake sotlhe go fitlha mo Phafo, ba fitlhela monna mongwe wa moitseanape teng, moporofeti wa maaka, wa Mojuta yo leina la gagwe e leng Barejesu;" 
Acts13:7 o ne a nna le molaodi Seregio Paulo, monna wa tlhaloganyo. Ene a bitsa Baranaba le Saule, a eletsa go utlwa Lefoko la Modimo." 
Acts13:8 Mme Elemase wa moitseanape – leina la gagwe le fetolwa jalo – a ganetsanya nabo, a leka go faposa molaodi mo tumelong." 
Acts13:9 Jaanong Saule yo o bidiwang Paulo, a tlhoma matlho mo go ene, a tletse Mowa o o Boitshepo, a mo raya a re:" 
Acts13:10 “Wena yo o tletseng boferefere le bolotsana jotlhe, wena wa ga Diabolo, mmaba wa tshiamo yotlhe, a ga o nke o bakela go sokamisa ditsela tse di siameng tsa Morena?" 
Acts13:11 Jaanong bona, letsogo la Morena le mo go wena, mme o tla nna sefofu, o sa bone letsatsi sebaka.” Ga ba ga wela leoto le lefifi mo go ene ka bonako; a nna a dikologa, a batla ba ba ka mo gogang ka letsogo." 
Acts13:12 Ya re molaodi a bona se se dirilweng, a dumela, a gakgamaletse thuto ya Morena." 
Acts13:13 Jaanong Paulo le ba a nang nabo ba tloga mo Phafo ka mokoro, ba fitlha kwa Perege wa Pamefilia. Teng foo Johane a ba tlogela, a boela kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts13:14 Mme bone ba ralala lefatshe go tloga kwa Perege, ba fitlha kwa Antiogia wa Pisidia. Ba tsena mo senagogeng ka letsatsi la Sabata, ba nna fa fatshe." 
Acts13:15 Ya re go sena go buisiwa molao le baporofeti, bagogi ba senagoge ba roma kwa go bone ba re: “Banna, bakaulengwe, a e re fa lo na le lefoko lengwe la go kgothatsa batho, lo bue.”" 
Acts13:16 Ke fa Paulo a nanoga, a boka ka letsogo a re: “Banna ba Iseraele, le lona ba lo boifang Modimo, reetsang!" 
Acts13:17 Modimo wa morafe o wa Iseraele o itlhaoletse borraetsho, wa godisa morafe o le kwa majakong mo lefatsheng la Egepeto, wa ba ntsha teng ka letsogo le le tsholetsegileng." 
Acts13:18 Wa ba wa itshokela mekgwa ya bone mo sekakeng, e ka nna sebaka sa dinyaga di le 40." 
Acts13:19 Mme e rile o sena go senya ditšhaba tse di supang mo lefatsheng la Kanana, wa ba naya lefatshe la tsona go nna boswa." 
Acts13:20 Morago ga dilo tseo dinyageng tse e ka nnang di le 450 wa ba naya baatlhodi go tla go fitlha mo go Samuele moporofeti. 
Acts13:21 “Go tloga foo ba kopa kgosi. Modimo wa ba naya Saule, morwa Khiše, monna wa lotso lwa ga Benyamene, dinyaga di le 40." 
Acts13:22 Ya re o sena go mo tlosa, wa tlhoma Dafita gore a nne kgosi ya bone, wa supa ka ga gagwe wa re: ‘Ke bonye Dafita, morwa Isai, monna ka fa pelong ya me, yo o tla dirang thato ya me yotlhe.’" 
Acts13:23 Ke ene yo Modimo o ntshitseng Mopholosi wa Iseraele mo losikeng lwa gagwe ka fa tsholofetsong, e bong Jesu," 
Acts13:24 Johane a sena go rerela batho botlhe ba Iseraele kolobetso ya tlhabologo, pele Jesu a ise a simolole tiro." 
Acts13:25 E rile Johane a wetsa tiro ya gagwe, a re: ‘Se lo nkayang sona ga ke sona. Mme bonang, o e tla morago ga me yo ditlhako tsa dinao tsa gagwe ke sa tshwanelang go di funolola.’" 
Acts13:26 “Banna ba ga etsho, bomorwa lotso lwa ga Aborahame le ba ba boifang Modimo mo go lona, lefoko la pholoso e, le rometswe rona;" 
Acts13:27 gonne ba ba agileng mo Jerusalema le balaodi ba bone, ka ba ne ba sa mo itse, ba mo atlhola, ba dirafatsa mantswe a baporofeti jalo a a buisiwang ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe." 
Acts13:28 Mme le fa ba se ka ba fitlhela molato ope o o tshwanetseng loso mo go ene, ba kopa Pilato gore a bolawe." 
Acts13:29 E rile ba sena go swetsa tsotlhe tse di kwadilweng ka ga gagwe, ba mo pagolola mo logonnye, ba mo tsenya mo lebitleng." 
Acts13:30 Mme Modimo wa mo tsosa mo baswing," 
Acts13:31 a bonwa ka malatsi a mantsi ke ba ba duleng nae kwa Galelea, ba ya kwa Jerusalema, ba jaanong e leng basupi ba gagwe mo bathong." 
Acts13:32 Le rona re lo rerela mafoko a boitumelo a tsholofetso e e diretsweng borraetsho," 
Acts13:33 ka Modimo o e dirafaditse mo go rona, ba re leng bana ba bone, ka go tsosa Jesu, jaaka go kwadilwe mo Pesalomeng ya bobedi ga twe: “ ‘O morwaake, ke go tsetse kajeno.’" 
Acts13:34 “O mo tsositse mo baswing gore a se ka a tlhola a boela mo go boleng; o sa le o bua jalo o re: “ ‘Ke tla lo naya tse di boitshepo tse di tlhomameng tsa ga Dafita.’ 
Acts13:35 “Ke gona ka moo o buang le mo go e nngwe wa re: “ ‘Ga o nke o lesa Moitshepi wa gago a bona go bola.’ 
Acts13:36 “Gonne Dafita, e rile a sena go direla thato ya Modimo mo motlheng wa gagwe, a robala, a fitlhwa fa go borraagwe, a ba a bona go bola." 
Acts13:37 Mme ene yo Modimo o mo tsositseng ga a a ka a bona go bola. 
Acts13:38 Jaanong itseng he, lona banna ba ga etsho: Lo rerelwa boitshwarelo jwa dibe ka ene yo." 
Acts13:39 Mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang o siamisiwa ke ene mo dilong tsotlhe tse lo ne lo sa ka ke lwa di itshwarelwa ka molao wa ga Moše. 
Acts13:40 Jaanong itiseng, e se re gongwe lwa dirafalelwa ke se se builweng ke baporofeti se re:" 
Acts13:41 “ ‘Bonang, banyatsi ke lona, lo gakgamale, lo nyelele; gonne ke tla dira tiro mo malatsing a lona e lo ka bong lo sa e dumela ka gope, le fa mongwe a e lo bolelela.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Ya re Bajuta ba tswa mo senagogeng, baheitane ba kopa gore ba bolelelwe mafoko ao le ka Sabata yo o tlang." 
Acts13:43 Ya re phuthego e phatlalala, Bajuta ba bantsi le batlhabologi ba ba boifang Modimo ba sala Paulo le Baranaba morago. Bao ba ba kgothatsa, ba ba tlhotlheletsa gore ba nnele ruri mo boitshwarelong jwa Modimo." 
Acts13:44 Ya re ka Sabata yo o latelang ga batla go phuthega motse otlhe go utlwa Lefoko la Modimo. 
Acts13:45 Ya re Bajuta ba bona bontsintsi, ba tlala lefufa, ba ganetsa tse di builweng ke Paulo, ba kgala." 
Acts13:46 Mme Paulo le Baranaba ba bua ka bopelokgale ba re: “Go ne go tshwanetse gore Lefoko la Modimo le bolelelwe lona pele. Mme e re ka lo le gana, lo ikatlhola gore ga lo a tshwanelwa ke botshelo jo bo sa khutleng, bonang, jaanong re ya kwa baheitaneng." 
Acts13:47 Gonne Morena o re laetse jalo a re: “ ‘Ke go dirile lesedi la baheitane gore o nne pholoso go fitlha kwa dikhutlong tsa lefatshe.’ ” 
Acts13:48 Ya re baheitane ba utlwa, ba itumela, ba galaletsa Lefoko la Morena. Botlhe ba ba tlhaoletsweng botshelo jo bo sa khutleng ba dumela." 
Acts13:49 Lefoko la Modimo la ba la anamisiwa mo lefatsheng leo lotlhe. 
Acts13:50 Bajuta bone ba tlhotlheletsa basadi ba ba boifang Modimo ba ba tlotlegang le ditlhogo tsa motse, ba tsosetsa Paulo le Baranaba pogiso, ba ba leleka mo nageng ya bone." 
Acts13:51 Ke fa bone ba ba tlhotlhorela lorole lwa dinao, ba fetela kwa Ikonio." 
Acts13:52 Mme barutwa ba tlala boitumelo le Mowa o o Boitshepo. 
Acts14:1 Ga nna fela jalo le kwa Ikonio, ba tsena mo senagogeng sa Bajuta, ba bua tota, mo go bileng ga dumela bontsi jo bogolo jwa Bajuta le jwa Bagerika." 
Acts14:2 Mme Bajuta ba ba sa dumeleng ba tlhotlheletsa baheitane, ba ba galefisetsa badumedi." 
Acts14:3 Jaanong baapostolo ba nna teng sebaka, ba bua ka phuthologo, ba ikantse Morena yo o neng a supela Lefoko la bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe ka go dirafatsa ditshupo le dikgakgamatso ka diatla tsa bone." 
Acts14:4 Ke fa bontsi jwa motse bo kgaogana, bangwe ba goga le Bajuta, ba bangwe le baapostolo." 
Acts14:5 Mme ya re go nna pheretlhego ya baheitane le Bajuta, ba na le balaodi ba bone go ba bogisa le go ba kgobotletsa ka majwe," 
Acts14:6 ba lemoga, ba tshabela kwa metseng ya Lekaonia, e bong kwa Lesitara le Derebe, le mo tikologong ya yona," 
Acts14:7 ba rera Efangele teng. 
Acts14:8 Mo Lesitara go ne go ntse monna mongwe yo o palelwang ke dinao, a golafetse go tswa botsalong jwa gagwe, yo o iseng a ke a tsamae ka gope." 
Acts14:9 Ene a utlwelela Paulo a bua. Ya re Paulo a tlhoma matlho mo go ene, mme a bona gore o na le tumelo ya go ka pholosiwa," 
Acts14:10 a tlhatlosa lentswe a re: “Ema ka dinao, o tlhamalale!” Ke fa a ragoga, a tsamaya." 
Acts14:11 Ya re batho ba bona se Paulo a se dirileng, ba tsholetsa mantswe ka Selekaonia ba re: “Medimo e fetogile, ya tshwana le batho, ya fologela kwano go rona.”" 
Acts14:12 Ba bitsa Baranaba Jupitere, le Paulo ba mmitsa Merekurio, ka e ne e le ene sebui." 
Acts14:13 Moperesiti wa ga Jupitere yo tempele ya gagwe e leng kwa ntle ga motse, a tsisa dipoo le dirwalo tsa dithunya kwa dikgorong, a re o dira ditlhabelo mmogo le bontsi." 
Acts14:14 Ya re baapostolo Baranaba le Paulo ba utlwa, ba ikgagola diaparo, ba tlolela mo bontsing, ba kua" 
Acts14:15 ba re: “Banna, lo direlang jalo? Kana le rona re batho fela jaaka lona, re lo rerela Efangele gore lo tlogele medimo e e seng yona, lo sokologele kwa Modimong o o phelang, o o dirileng legodimo le lefatshe le lewatle le tsotlhe tse di mo go tsona;" 
Acts14:16 o e rileng mo dipakeng tse di fetileng wa lesa ditšhaba tsotlhe go itsamaela ka ditsela tsa tsona. 
Acts14:17 Le fa go ntse jalo, ga o a ka wa tlhoka go itshupa ka go dira molemo le go lo nesetsa dipula tse di tswang legodimong le go lo naya metlha ya go roba sentle le go tlatsa dipelo tsa lona dijo le boitumelo.”" 
Acts14:18 Le fa ba bua jalo, ba batla go palelwa ke go thibela batho gore ba se ba direle ditlhabelo." 
Acts14:19 Jaanong ga tla Bajuta teng ba ba tswang kwa Antiogia le Ikonio. Ya re ba sena go kgona bontsintsi, ba kgobotletsa Paulo ka majwe, ba mo gogela kwa ntle ga motse, ba itlhoma a sule." 
Acts14:20 Mme ya re barutwa ba sa ntse ba mo dikanyeditse, a tsoga, a boela mo motseng; ka moso a tloga le Baranaba, ba ya kwa Derebe." 
Acts14:21 Ya re ba sena go rerela motse oo Efangele le go dira barutwa ba se kae, ba boela kwa Lesitara le Ikonio le Antiogia." 
Acts14:22 Ba tiisa dipelo tsa barutwa, ba ba kgothatsa gore ba nnele ruri mo tumelong. Le gona ba re: “Re tshwanetse go tsena mo pusong ya Modimo ka ditlalelo di le dintsi.”" 
Acts14:23 Ya re ba sena go ba beela bagolo mo phuthegong nngwe le nngwe le go rapela ka go itima dijo, ba ba neela Morena yo ba dumetseng mo go ene." 
Acts14:24 Ba be ba ralala Pisidia, ba fitlha mo Pamefilia." 
Acts14:25 Ya re ba se na go bolela Lefoko mo Perege, ba ya kwa Atalea." 
Acts14:26 Ba tloga teng ka mokoro, ba ya kwa Antiogia kwa ba kileng ba neelwa bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo teng go ya go dira tiro e jaanong ba tswang go e fetsa." 
Acts14:27 E rile ba sena go fitlha teng le go kgobokanya phuthego, ba bolela dilo tsotlhe tse Modimo o di dirileng o na le bone, le ka fa o buletseng baheitane mojako wa tumelo ka teng." 
Acts14:28 Ba be ba nna le barutwa sebaka se seleele. 
Acts15:1 Ke fa bangwe ba tswa kwa Jutea, ba ruta badumedi ba re: “Fa lo sa rupe ka fa mokgweng wa ga Moše, ga lo ka ke lwa pholosiwa.”" 
Acts15:2 Ya re Paulo le Baranaba ba na le kgang le potsanyo e kgolo nabo, ga utlwanwa gore Paulo le Baranaba le ba bangwe ba bone ba ye kwa Jerusalema kwa baapostolong le bagolong ka ntlha ya kgang e." 
Acts15:3 Ya baa gona ba buledisiwang ke phuthego, ba ralala Fenikia le Samaria, ba eta ba bolelela badumedi tshokologo ya baheitane, ba ba itumedisa botlhe thata." 
Acts15:4 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa Jerusalema, ba tsholwa ke phuthego le baapostolo le bagolo, ba bolela dilo tsotlhe tse Modimo o di dirileng o na le bona." 
Acts15:5 Mme ga tsoga badumedi bangwe ba lekoko la Bafarisai ba ba reng: “Baheitane ba ba tlhabologang ba tshwanetse go rupisiwa le go laelwa gore ba tshegetse molao wa ga Moše.” 
Acts15:6 Jaanong baapostolo le bagolo ba phuthega go sekaseka kgang e. 
Acts15:7 Morago ga kganetsanyo e telele Petoro a ema, a ba raya a re: “Banna ba ga etsho, lo itse gore Modimo ga o bolo go intlhaolela mo go lona, gore baheitane ba utlwe Lefoko la Efangele ka molomo wa me, mme ba dumele." 
Acts15:8 Modimo, moitsi wa dipelo, o supile ka ga bone, wa ba naya Mowa o o Boitshepo fela jaaka rona." 
Acts15:9 Ga o a ka wa re farologanya le bone, gonne o phepafaditse dipelo tsa bone ka tumelo." 
Acts15:10 Jaanong he, lo lekelang Modimo ka go baya jokwe mo melaleng ya barutwa, e le e borraetsho le rona re neng re sa nonofa go e rwala?" 
Acts15:11 Mme re dumela gore re pholosiwa ka bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena Jesu fela jaaka bone.” 
Acts15:12 Foo ba didimala botlhe, ba reetsa Baranaba le Paulo, ba ba bolelang ditshupo le dikgakgamatso tse dintsi tse Modimo o di dirileng mo baheitaneng ka bone." 
Acts15:13 Ya re ba sena go didimala, ga simolola Jakobo go bua a re: “Banna ba ga etsho, ntheetsang!" 
Acts15:14 Simone o boletse ka fa Modimo o etetseng baheitane ga ntlha ka teng go batlela leina la ona morafe mo go bone. 
Acts15:15 Le mafoko a baporofeti a dumalelana le gona, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe:" 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Morago ga tseo ke tla boa, ke tsosa ntlo ya ga Dafita e e oleng, ke aga gape tse di oleng tsa yona, ke e siamisa" 
Acts15:17 gore masalela a batho a batle Morena, le Baditšhaba botlhe ba Leina la me le boletsweng mo go bone, go bua Morena yo o dirang dilo tseo," 
Acts15:18 tse di sa leng di itsege go tloga metlheng ya bogologolo.’ 
Acts15:19 “Ke gona ka moo nna ke atlholang gore ba ba tswang mo baheitaneng ba ba sokologelang Modimong, re se ka ra ba imetsa," 
Acts15:20 mme re ba kwalele gore ba ikilele mo go tse di itshekologileng tsa medimo ya diseto le mo boakeng le mo go se se betilweng le mo mading. 
Acts15:21 Gonne go tswa metlheng ya bogologolo Moše o ntse a na le ba ba mo rerang mo motseng mongwe le mongwe, ka a buisiwa mo disenagogeng ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe.”" 
Acts15:22 Jaanong baapostolo le bagolo, mmogo le phuthego yotlhe, ba fitlhela go le molemo go ka tlhaola banna bangwe ba bone le go ba roma kwa Antiogia, ba na le Paulo le Baranaba, e bong Juta yo o bidiwang Baresaba, le Silase, banna ba e leng bagogi mo gare ga badumedi." 
Acts15:23 Ba ba neela lokwalo lo lo reng: “Rona baapostolo le bagolo, re le badumedi-ka-lona re a lo dumedisa, lona badumedi ba lo tswang mo merafeng, lo le kwa Antiogia le kwa Siria le kwa Kilekia." 
Acts15:24 E re ka re utlwile gore bangwe ba ba duleng mo go rona, ba re sa ba romang, ba lo tshwentse ka mafoko, ba belaedisa dipelo tsa lona," 
Acts15:25 re fitlhetse go le molemo, mme ra dumalelana go tlhaola banna le go ba roma koo go lona, ba na le Baranaba le Paulo, baratiwa ba rona," 
Acts15:26 ba e leng banna ba ba beetseng leina la Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete maphelo a bone. 
Acts15:27 Ke ka moo re romileng Juta le Silase; le bone ba tla lo bolelela dilo tseo ka molomo. 
Acts15:28 Gonne go kgatlhile Mowa o o Boitshepo le rona gore re se ka ra lo rwesa morwalo ope o sele kwa ntle ga tse di batlegang tsa gore 
Acts15:29 lo ikilele mo nameng ya ditlhabelo tsa medimo le mo mading le mo go tse di betilweng le mo boakeng; fa lo ka ithiba mo go tseo, lo tla bo lo dira sentle. Salang pila.”" 
Acts15:30 Jaanong ya re bao ba sena go newa tsela, ba fitlha kwa Antiogia, ba phutha phuthego yotlhe, ba ba naya lokwalo."
