Acts15:31 Ba lo buisa, ba itumelela kgothatso eo." 
Acts15:32 Juta le Silase ba e bileng e le baporofeti, ba nametsa bana ba Modimo ka bone ka mafoko a mantsi, ba ba tiisa." 
Acts15:33 Ya re ba sena go nna sebaka teng, ba newa tsela ka kagiso go tswa mo go ba ga bone tumelong go boela kwa go ba ba ba romileng." 
Acts15:34 Fela Silase ene a kgatlhwa ke go sala teng. 
Acts15:35 Paulo le Baranaba ba nna sebaka kwa Antiogia, ba ruta, ba rera Efangele ya Lefoko la Morena mmogo le ba bangwe ba le bantsi." 
Acts15:36 E rile morago ga malatsi mangwe Paulo a raya Baranaba a re: “Jaanong a re boe, re ye go tlhola bakaulengwe mo motseng mongwe le mongwe o re boletseng Lefoko la Morena mo go ona, re bone ka fa ba phelang ka teng.”" 
Acts15:37 Mme Baranaba a rata gore le Johane yo o bidiwang Mareko a ye nabo. 
Acts15:38 Paulo ene a fitlhela go sa tshwanela gore a ye le bone, ka a ikgaogantse nabo kwa Pamefilia, mme a se ka a ya nabo tirong." 
Acts15:39 Ga tsoga phapaang e e botlhoko, mo ba bileng ba kgaogana. Baranaba a tsaya Mareko, a ya nae kwa Kipero ka mokoro." 
Acts15:40 Paulo a itlhaolela Silase, a bolola a sena go rapelelwa bopelotlhomogi jwa Morena ke bakaulengwe." 
Acts15:41 A ralala Siria le Kilekia, a eta a tiisa diphuthego." 
Acts16:1 A fitlha le kwa Derebe le Lesitara, a fitlhela morutwa mongwe teng, yo leina la gagwe e leng Timotheo, yo mmaagwe e leng Mojuta yo o dumetseng, rraagwe ene e le Mogerika." 
Acts16:2 A bo a bolelwa ka molemo ke bakaulengwe ba ba mo Lesitara le mo Ikonio. 
Acts16:3 Ene yoo Paulo a rata gore a tsamae nae; a mo tsaya, a mo rupisa ka ntlha ya Bajuta ba mafelo ao; gonne ba ne ba itse botlhe gore rraagwe ke Mogerika." 
Acts16:4 Ya re ba ntse ba ralala metse, ba ba laela ditaelo tse di utlwanetsweng ke baapostolo le bagolo ba kwa Jerusalema gore ba di tshegetse." 
Acts16:5 Diphuthego tsa tiisiwa jalo mo tumelong, tsa ntsifala mo palong ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe." 
Acts16:6 Ba ralala lefatshe la Feregia le la Galatia, ka ba ilediwa ke Mowa o o Boitshepo go bolela Lefoko mo Asia." 
Acts16:7 E rile ba fitlha go lebagana le Misia, ba leka go ya kwa Bithinia; mme Mowa wa ga Jesu wa se ka wa ba letlelela." 
Acts16:8 Ke fa ba feta Misia, ba fologela kwa Teroase." 
Acts16:9 Teng pono ya tlhagela Paulo bosigo, a bona monna mongwe wa Maketonia a eme, a mo rapela a re: “Tshelela kwano Maketonia, o re thuse!”" 
Acts16:10 Ya re a sena go bona pono, ra akofa ra leka go ya kwa Maketonia, ka re lemoga gore Modimo o re biditse go ba rerela Efangele." 
Acts16:11 Jaanong ra tswa mo Teroase ka mokoro, ra tlhamalalela kwa Samotherake, mme ka moso ra fitlha kwa Neapoli." 
Acts16:12 Go tloga foo ra ya kwa Filipi yo e leng motse wa ntlha wa karolo ya teng ya Maketonia, e le boago jwa Baroma; ra tlhola malatsi mangwe mo motseng oo." 
Acts16:13 Ya re ka letsatsi la Sabata ra tswela kwa ntle ga kgoro fa nokeng, kwa re ne ra gopola go le felo ga thapelo teng, ra nna fa fatshe, ra bua le basadi ba ba phuthegileng." 
Acts16:14 Mosadi mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Ledia, morekisi wa masela a mahibidu, wa motse wa Thiatira, yo o boifang Modimo, a reetsa; ene Morena a bula pelo ya gagwe gore a tlhokomele tse di buiwang ke Paulo." 
Acts16:15 Ya re a sena go kolobediwa le ba ntlo ya gagwe, a kopa a re: “Fa lo nkaya ke le yo o dumelang mo Moreneng, tsenang mo ntlong ya me, lo nne teng.” Mme a re emelela thata." 
Acts16:16 E rile ka letsatsi le lengwe re ya kwa felong ga thapelo, morweetsana mongwe yo o neng a na le mowa wa boitseanape a re kgatlhantsha, e le yo o neng a tsisetsa beng ba gagwe khumo e kgolo ka tsa boitseanape." 
Acts16:17 Yoo a sala Paulo le rona morago, a eta a kua a re: “Batho ba ke batlhanka ba Modimo o o godimodimo ba ba lo bolelelang tsela ya pholoso.”" 
Acts16:18 A dira jalo ka malatsi a mantsi. Mme Paulo a gakala, a retologa, a raya mowa a re: “Ke go laela ka leina la ga Jesu Keresete gore o tswe mo go ene!” Wa tswa ka yona nako eo." 
Acts16:19 Ya re beng ba gagwe ba bona gore tsholofelo ya bone ya go bapalela pele e nyeletse, ba tshwara Paulo le Silase, ba ba gogela kwa patlelong ya motse kwa balaoding," 
Acts16:20 ba ba isa kwa baatlhoding ba re: “Batho ba, e re e le Bajuta, ba feretlha motse wa rona," 
Acts16:21 ba ruta mekgwa e re sa letlelelwang go e amogela, le fa e le go e dira, ka re le Baroma.”" 
Acts16:22 Ke fa batho ba motse ba ba tsogela, mme baatlhodi ba ba rutla diaparo, ba laola gore ba itewe ka dithupa." 
Acts16:23 Ya re ba sena go ba itaya dithupa tse dintsi, ba ba latlhela mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba laela modisa wa kgolegelo gore a ba dise thata." 
Acts16:24 Ya re yo a sena go amogela taelo e e ntseng jalo, a ba latlhela mo kgolegelong e e kwa tengteng, a tlapisa dinao tsa bone ka dikota." 
Acts16:25 Ya re gare ga bosigo Paulo le Silase ba rapela, ba opelela Modimo difela, bagolegwi-ka-bone ba bo ba ba reeditse." 
Acts16:26 Jaanong ga nna thoromo e kgolo ya lefatshe ka tshoganyetso, mo metheo ya ntlo ya kgolegelo e bileng ya reketla, le mejako yotlhe ya bulega ka bonako, le dikgolego tsa botlhe tsa funologa." 
Acts16:27 Ya re modisa wa kgolegelo a thanya mo borokong, mme a bona mejako ya ntlo ya kgolegelo e bulegile, a somola tšhaka, a re o a ipolaya, a itlhoma bagolegwi ba tshabile." 
Acts16:28 Mme Paulo a kua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Se ipolae; gonne re fano rotlhe!” 
Acts16:29 Jaanong a lopa dipone, a tlolela mo teng, a wela fa pele ga Paulo le Silase, a roroma." 
Acts16:30 A ba a ba ntshetsa kwa ntle a re: “Barena, ke tshwanetse go dirang gore ke pholosiwe?”" 
Acts16:31 Ba araba ba re: “Dumela mo go Morena Jesu, mme o tla pholosiwa, wena le ba ntlo ya gago.”" 
Acts16:32 Ba be ba mmolelela Lefoko la Morena le botlhe ba ba mo ntlong ya gagwe. 
Acts16:33 A ba tsaya ka nako eo ya bosigo, a tlhatswa dintho tsa bone, a akofa a kolobediwa, ene le ba lapa la gagwe botlhe;" 
Acts16:34 a ba isa mo ntlong ya gagwe, a ba tsholela dijo, a ipela le botlhe ba ntlo ya gagwe, ka a dumetse mo Modimong." 
Acts16:35 E rile bo sena go sa, baatlhodi ba roma batlhanka ba re: “Golola batho bao!”" 
Acts16:36 Modisa wa kgolegelo a bolelela Paulo mafoko a, a re: “Baatlhodi ba rometse gore lo gololwe; jaanong he, tswayang lo tsamae ka kagiso.”" 
Acts16:37 Paulo a ba raya a re: “Ba re iteile mo pepeneneng, re sa atlholwa, re le Baroma, ba re latlhetse mo ntlong ya kgolegelo; mme jaanong a ba tla re ntshetsa kwa ntle ka go sa itsiweng? Le go ka! A go tle bone ka bosi, ba re ntshe.”" 
Acts16:38 Batlhanka ba bolelela baatlhodi mafoko ao. Ya re ba utlwa gore ke Baroma, ba boifa;" 
Acts16:39 jaanong ba tla, ba ba rapela. Ya re ba sena go ba ntsha, ba ba kopa gore ba tloge mo motseng." 
Acts16:40 Ba tswa mo ntlong ya kgolegelo, ba ya kwa go Ledia; mme ya re ba sena go bona bakaulengwe, ba ba gomotsa, ba tloga ba tsamaya." 
Acts17:1 E rile ba sena go ralala Amfipoli le Apolonia, ba fitlha mo Thesalonika, kwa go neng go le senagoge sa Bajuta teng." 
Acts17:2 Paulo a tsena fa go bone ka fa tlwaelong ya gagwe, a nna a fetolana nabo ka fa Dikwalong ka boSabata ba le tharo." 
Acts17:3 A phutholola, a ranola gore Keresete o ne a tshwanetse go boga le go tsoga mo baswing; le gona a re: “Jesu yo ke mo lo rerelang ke ene Keresete.”" 
Acts17:4 Bangwe ba bone ba utlwa, ba ikopanya le Paulo le Silase, le bontsi jo bogolo jwa Bagerika ba ba boifang Modimo, le basadi ba ba tlotlegang ba le bantsi." 
Acts17:5 Jaanong Bajuta ba ba sa dumeleng ba itseela banna bangwe ba ba bosula ba ba difafalele, ba kgobokanya bontsi, ba feretlha motse; ba tlhasela ntlo ya ga Jasone, ba leka go ntshetsa Paulo le Silase mo bathong." 
Acts17:6 Ya re ba sa ba fitlhele, ba gogela Jasone le bakaulengwe bangwe fa pele ga balaodi ba motse, ba kua ba re: “Batho ba, ba ba feretlhang lefatshe, le mono ba tsile." 
Acts17:7 Jasone o ba amogetse, mme botlhe ba, ba tlola ditaolo tsa Kaisara ba re, kgosi ke o sele, e bong Jesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Bontsi le balaodi ba motse ba huduega, fa ba utlwa jalo." 
Acts17:9 Mme ya re ba sena go amogela peeletso mo go Jasone le ba bangwe, ba ba lesa ba tsamaya." 
Acts17:10 Ke fa bakaulengwe ba akofa ba romela Paulo le Silase kwa Berea bosigo. Ya re ba fitlha teng, ba ya kwa senagogeng sa Bajuta." 
Acts17:11 Mme bone ba ne ba tsalegile bogolo go ba kwa Thesalonika, ba amogela Lefoko ka tlhagafalo yotlhe, ba lotolotsa Dikwalo ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe gore a dilo tse, di ntse jalo." 
Acts17:12 Jaanong ba bantsi ba bone ba dumela le bontsinyana jwa batlotlegi ba basadi le banna ba Bagerika. 
Acts17:13 E rile Bajuta ba Thesalonika ba utlwa gore le mo Berea Lefoko la Modimo le rerwa ke Paulo, ba ya teng, ba belaedisa batho, ba ba ferekanya le teng." 
Acts17:14 Ya baa gona bakaulengwe ba akofang ba tshabisa Paulo go ya go fitlha kwa lewatleng, Silase le Timotheo bone ba sala teng." 
Acts17:15 Ba ba patileng Paulo ba mo fitlhisa kwa Athene. Ya re ba sena go amogela molaetsa mo go Paulo wa gore Silase le Timotheo ba tle kwa go ene ka bonako, ba boa." 
Acts17:16 E rile Paulo a sa ntse a ba letile mo Athene, mowa wa gagwe wa galefa, ka a bona motse o tletse medimo ya diseto." 
Acts17:17 Ke ka moo a nnang a fetolana le Bajuta le ba ba boifang Modimo mo senagogeng, le ba ba rakanang nae mo marekelong ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe." 
Acts17:18 Jaanong bangwe ba batlhalefi ba Baepikure le Bastoike le bone ba ganetsanya nae. Bangwe ba re: “Kana mmalabadi yo, o rata go buang?” Ba bangwe ba re: “E kete ke moreri wa medimo e sele.” Ke ka gonne o ne a rera Efangele ya ga Jesu le tsogo ya baswi." 
Acts17:19 Ba mo tsaya, ba mo isa kwa lekgotleng la Areopago ba re: “A re ka itse gore thuto e ntšhwa e, e o e bolelang, ke ya eng?" 
Acts17:20 Gonne o utlwatsa dilo di sele mo ditsebeng tsa rona; jaanong re rata go utlwa gore dilo tse, di kayang.”" 
Acts17:21 Mme jaanong Baathene botlhe le bafaladi ba ba agileng teng, ba ne ba sa kgathalale sepe fa e se go bolela gongwe go utlwa se sešwa." 
Acts17:22 Jaanong Paulo a ema fa gare ga Areopago a re: “Lona banna ba Athene, ke lemoga gongwe le gongwe gore lo tlotla medimo thata." 
Acts17:23 Gonne ya re ke tsamaya, ke leba tse lo di obamelang, ka fitlhela le aletare e go kwadilweng mo go yona go twe: ‘YA MODIMO O O SA ITSIWENG’. “Jaanong he, ona o lo o obamelang lo sa o itse ke ona o ke o lo bolelelang." 
Acts17:24 Modimo o o dirileng lefatshe le tsotlhe tse di mo go lone, ona, ka e le Morena wa legodimo le lefatshe, ga o nne mo ditempeleng tse di dirilweng ka diatla;" 
Acts17:25 le gona ga o direlwe ka diatla tsa batho, jaaka e kete o tlhoka sengwe, etswe e le ona ka osi o o nayang botlhe bophelo le mowa le tsotlhe." 
Acts17:26 O dirile gore setšhaba sengwe le sengwe sa batho se tswe mo mading a le mangwe fela, ba age mo lefatsheng lotlhe; o tlhomamisitse metlha ya bone e e beilweng pele le melelwane ya maago a bone" 
Acts17:27 gore ba batle Modimo, e tle e re gongwe ba o apaape, ba o bone; kana ga o kgakala le ope wa rona;" 
Acts17:28 gonne re ntse re na nao, fa re tshela, re tsamaya, re le teng, jaaka le bangwe ba baboki ba lona ba buile ba re: “ ‘Kana le rona re losika lwa ona.’" 
Acts17:29 Jaanong he, e re ka re le losika lwa Modimo, ga re a tshwanela go itlhoma gore Modimo o ka tshwana le sebopiwa sa gouta gongwe sa selefera gongwe sa lentswe sa botswerere le kakanyo ya motho." 
Acts17:30 “Fa e le metlha ya botlhoka-kitso, Modimo o e tlhokomologile, mme jaanong o laela batho botlhe mo ntlheng tsotlhe go tlhabologa;" 
Acts17:31 gonne o tlhomile letsatsi le o tla atlholang lefatshe ka lone ka tshiamo, ka monna yo o mmeetseng gona, mme o buletse botlhe tsela ya go ka dumela ka go mo tsosa mo baswing.”" 
Acts17:32 Ya re ba utlwa tsogo ya baswi, bangwe ba sotla; ba bangwe ba re: “Re tla go utlwa gape ka ga moo.”" 
Acts17:33 Paulo a tswa jalo mo gare ga bone. 
Acts17:34 Mme banna bangwe ba mo ngaparela, ba dumela, mo go bone go le Dionisio wa Areopago, le mosadi mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Damarise, ba na le ba bangwe." 
Acts18:1 Morago ga tseo Paulo a tloga kwa Athene, a ya kwa Korinthe." 
Acts18:2 A fitlhela Mojuta mongwe teng yo leina la gagwe e leng Akwila, e le yo o tsaletsweng kwa Ponto, yo e leng gona a tswang kwa Italia, a na le Perisila mosadi wa gagwe; ka gonne Kelaudio o ne a laotse gore Bajuta botlhe ba tloge mo Roma, mme Paulo a ya kwa go bone." 
Acts18:3 Mme ya re ka a le wa tiro nngwe fela nabo, a nna nabo, mme ba dira. Tiro ya bone e ne e le go dira ditente." 
Acts18:4 Paulo a fetolana le batho mo senagogeng ka Sabata mongwe le mongwe, a kgona Bajuta le Bagerika." 
Acts18:5 E rile Silase le Timotheo ba tswa kwa Maketonia, Paulo a tlhagafalela Lefoko, a tiisetsa Bajuta gore Jesu ke Keresete." 
Acts18:6 Ya re ba ganetsa, ba kgala, a ikudubatsa diaparo, a ba raya a re: “A madi a lona a wele ditlhogong tsa lona! Nna ke itshekile; go tloga jaanong ke tla ya kwa baheitaneng.”" 
Acts18:7 Mme a tloga teng, a ya mo ntlong ya mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Titio Juseto, e le yo o boifang Modimo, yo ntlo ya gagwe e bapileng le senagoge." 
Acts18:8 Kerisepo, mogogi wa senagoge, a dumela mo Moreneng le botlhe ba lelapa la gagwe; le Bakorinthe ba le bantsi, ya re ba utlwa, ba dumela, ba be ba kolobediwa." 
Acts18:9 Morena a raya Paulo bosigo ka pono a re: “O se ka wa boifa; bua fela, o se ka wa didimala!" 
Acts18:10 Gonne nna ke na nao, mme ga go ope yo o tla go tlhaselang go go direla bosula; gonne ke na le batho ba bantsi mo motseng o.”" 
Acts18:11 Mme a nna teng ngwaga le dikgwedi tse thataro, a ruta Lefoko la Modimo mo go bona." 
Acts18:12 E rile Galeo e le molaodi wa Agaya, Bajuta ba tsogela Paulo ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ba mo isa kwa lekgotleng" 
Acts18:13 ba re: “Motho yo, o kgona batho gore ba direle Modimo ka mokgwa o o thulanang le molao.”" 
Acts18:14 Ya re Paulo a re o tumolola molomo, Galeo a raya Bajuta a re: “Bajuta ke lona, fa e ka bo e le tshiamololo gongwe tiro ya bolotsana, nka bo ke lo itshokela ka fa tshwanelong ya teng." 
Acts18:15 Mme fa e le dikgang ka ga thuto le maina le molao o e leng wa lona, tsona tseo di iponeleng ka losi; ga ke rate go nna moatlhodi wa dilo tseo.”" 
Acts18:16 Mme a ba leleka mo kgotleng. 
Acts18:17 Jaanong botlhe ba tshwara Sosethene, mogogi wa senagoge, ba mmetsa teng mo kgotleng; mme Galeo a se ka a re sepe ka ga dilo tseo." 
Acts18:18 Paulo a fela a tlhola malatsi a se kae teng; ke fa a sadisa bakaulengwe sentle, a tswa teng ka mokoro, a ya kwa Siria, a na le Perisila le Akwila; a bile a ipeotse tlhogo mo Kenegerea; gonne o ne a dirile maikano." 
Acts18:19 Ba fitlha kwa Efeso, mme a ba tlogela teng. Ene a tsena mo senagogeng, a fetolana le Bajuta." 
Acts18:20 Ya re ba mo kopa gore a tlhole nabo malatsinyana, a se ka a dumela," 
Acts18:21 mme a ba sadisa sentle a re: “Kana ke tshwanetse go nna mo moletlong o o tlang kwa Jerusalema. Ke tla boela kwano go lona, fa Modimo o rata.” Mme a tloga mo Efeso ka mokoro." 
Acts18:22 Ya re a sena go fitlha kwa Kaisarea, a tlhatlogela kwa Jerusalema, a dumedisa phuthego, a ba a ya kwa Antiogia." 
Acts18:23 Ya re a sena go nna sebaka teng, a tloga, a ralala lefatshe la Galatia le la Feregia ka go tlhomoganya mafelo, a tiisa barutwa botlhe." 
Acts18:24 Jaanong Mojuta mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Apolo a fitlha kwa Efeso; o ne a tsaletswe kwa Aleksanteria, e le monna yo o rutegileng, yo o nonofileng mo Dikwalong." 
Acts18:25 Monna yo, o ne a rutilwe Tsela ya Morena, mme a bua ka go tuka mo pelong, a ruta ka kelelelo ka ga Jesu, mme kolobetso o ne a itse ya ga Johane fela." 
Acts18:26 Ene a simolola go bua ka phuthologo mo senagogeng. Mme ya re Perisila le Akwila ba mo utlwa, ba mo itseela, ba mo phuthololela tsela ya Modimo ka kelelelo e e fetisang." 
Acts18:27 Ya re a rata go fetela kwa Agaya, bakaulengwe ba mo nametsa, ba kwalela barutwa gore ba mo tshole. Ya re a sena go fitlha, a thusa thata ba ba dumetseng ka bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo;" 
Acts18:28 gonne o ne a fenya Bajuta ka nonofo mo pepeneneng, a supa ka Dikwalo gore Jesu ke Keresete." 
Acts19:1 Jaanong e rile Apolo a le kwa Korinthe, Paulo a fitlha kwa Efeso, a sena go ralala dinaga tse di kwa godimo; a fitlhela barutwa bangwe teng." 
Acts19:2 A ba botsa a re: “A e rile fa lo dumela, lwa amogela Mowa o o Boitshepo?” Ba mo araba ba re: “Nnyaya, le e seng go utlwa gore go na le Mowa o o Boitshepo.”" 
Acts19:3 A botsa gape a re: “Lo kolobeditswe ka kolobetso efe?” Ba re: “Ka kolobetso ya ga Johane.” 
Acts19:4 Paulo a re: “Johane o kolobeditse ka kolobetso ya tlhabologo, a bolelela batho gore ba dumele mo go ene yo tlang morago ga gagwe, e bong Jesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Ya re ba sena go utlwa jalo, ba kolobediwa mo leineng la Morena Jesu." 
Acts19:6 Mme ya re Paulo a ba baya diatla, Mowa o o Boitshepo wa tla mo go bone, ba bua ka diteme, ba be ba porofesa." 
Acts19:7 Mme banna botlhe bao e ne e ka nna ba ba 12. 
Acts19:8 Jaanong a tsena mo senagogeng, a bua ka ga puso ya Modimo ka bopelokgale dikgwedi tse tharo, a fetolana nabo, a leka go ba kgona." 
Acts19:9 E rile bangwe ba ithatafatsa dipelo, ba sa utlwe, ba bua bosula ka ga Tsela ya bokeresete fa pele ga batho, a tloga mo go bone, a phuthela barutwa go sele, a fetolana le batho ka letsatsi lengwe le lengwe mo sekolong sa ga Tirano." 
Acts19:10 Selo se sa dirafala dinyaga di le pedi, mo botlhe ba ba agileng mo Asia ba bileng ba utlwa Lefoko la Morena, Bajuta le Bagerika." 
Acts19:11 Modimo wa dira ditiro tsa nonofo tse di gakgamatsang ka diatla tsa ga Paulo," 
Acts19:12 mo e bileng masela a a amileng letlalo la gagwe gongwe dikhiba di neng tsa bewa mo balwetseng, mme malwetse a tloga mo go bone, le mewa e e bosula ya tswa." 
Acts19:13 Bajuta bangwe ba ba pholethang, e le baleleki ba mewa e e bosula, ba leka go bitsa leina la Morena Jesu mo go ba ba nang le mewa e e bosula ka go ba raya ba re: “Re a lo leleka ka Jesu yo Paulo o mo rerang!”" 
Acts19:14 E ne e le bomorwa ba ba supang, ba Mojuta mongwe, e bong Sekefa, moperesiti yo mogolo, ba ba dirang jalo." 
Acts19:15 Mme mowa o o bosula wa ba fetola wa re: “Jesu ke a mo itse, le Paulo ke a mo tlhaloganya, lo bomang lona?”" 
Acts19:16 Mme monna yo mowa o o bosula o leng mo go ene, a ba tlolela, a ba betelela botlhe, a ba fenya, mo ba bileng ba tshaba mo ntlong eo, ba sa ikatega, ba le dintho." 
Acts19:17 Jaanong selo se sa itsiwe ke botlhe, Bajuta le Bagerika, ba ba agileng mo Efeso; poifo ya ba wela botlhe, mme leina la Morena Jesu la tumisiwa." 
Acts19:18 Ga ba ga tla ba bantsi ba ba dumetseng, ba ipobola, ba bolela ditiro tsa bone." 
Acts19:19 Ba bantsinyana ba bone ba ba neng ba dirile tsa mereo ya boloi, ba kgobokanya dikwalo tsa teng, ba di fisa fa pele ga botlhe; ba bala tlhotlhwa ya tsona, ba fitlhela e le diranta di le 5 000." 
Acts19:20 Ka mokgwa oo Lefoko la Morena la ata, la fenya ka nonofo." 
Acts19:21 E rile dilo tseo di sena go fela, Paulo a ikaelela mo moweng go ralala Maketonia le Agaya le go ya kwa Jerusalema, a re: “E tla re ke sena go nna teng, ke tshwanela go bona le Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Jaanong a roma ba le babedi ba bone ba ba mo direlang, e bong Timotheo le Eraseto, a ba romela kwa Maketonia, ene a nama a sa setse sebaka mo Asia." 
Acts19:23 Ka sebaka seo ga tsoga khuduego e kgolo ka ntlha ya Tsela ya bokeresete; 
Acts19:24 gonne monna mongwe yo leina la gagwe e leng Demeterio, mothudi wa selefera yo o dirang ditempelana tsa selefera tsa ga Diana, a bo a tsisetsa badiri papadi e kgolo." 
Acts19:25 Yoo a ba phutha le badiri ba tiro e e tshwanang a ba raya a re: “Banna, lo itse gore re bona khumo ya rona ka papadi e;" 
Acts19:26 mme lo a bona, e bile lo utlwa gore Paulo yo, o kgonne batho ba bantsi, e bile o ba fapositse, e seng mo Efeso fela, mme e batlile e nna le mo Asia yotlhe ka go bua a re: Medimo e e dirwang ka diatla ga se medimo." 
Acts19:27 Mme ga se tiro ya rona fela e e mo kotsing ya go ka nyatsega, e bile le tempele ya ga Diana, modimo o mogolo wa sesadi, e ka kaiwa e se sepe; tota ona ka osi o Asia yotlhe le lefatshe lotlhe le o obamelang, o ka senyegelwa ke kgalalelo ya ona.”" 
Acts19:28 Fa ba utlwa jalo, ba tlala bogale, ba kua ba re: “O mogolo, Diana wa Baefeso!”" 
Acts19:29 Mme motse wa tlala pheretlhego, ba tabogela mo lebaleng la tshamekelo ka bongwefela jwa pelo, ba sena go tshwara Gayo le Aristarego Bamaketonia, bapati ba ga Paulo." 
Acts19:30 Ya re Paulo a rata go tsena mo bathong ba, barutwa ba mo thibela." 
Acts19:31 Le balaodi bangwe ba Asia ba e leng ditsala tsa gagwe, ba roma kwa go ene, ba mo rapela gore a se ka a ya kwa lebaleng la tshamekelo." 
Acts19:32 Teng ba bangwe ba kua se, ba bangwe se sele; gonne kgobokano e ne e feretlhegile. Mme bontsi bo ne bo sa itse se se phuthegetsweng." 
Acts19:33 Bangwe ba bontsi ba isa Aleksantere kwa pele, ka Bajuta ba mo dirile mmueledi wa bone. Mme Aleksantere a boka ka letsogo, a rata go ba arabela mo bathong." 
Acts19:34 Ya re ba lemoga gore ke Mojuta, botlhe ba nna ba kua ka lentswe le le lengwe fela ka dinako tse di ka nnang tse pedi ba re: “O mogolo, Diana wa Baefeso!”" 
Acts19:35 Jaanong ya re mokwaledi wa motse a sena go didimatsa bontsi, a bua a re: “Lona banna ba Efeso, kana ke ofe mo bathong yo o sa itseng gore motse wa Efeso ke modisa wa tempele ya ga Diana yo mogolo le wa setshwantsho sa gagwe se se oleng kwa legodimong?" 
Acts19:36 Jaanong e re ka dilo tse, di sa ka ke tsa ganediwa, lo tshwanetse go didimala, lo se dire sepe ka potlako." 
Acts19:37 Gonne lo tsisitse banna ba, ba e seng magodu a dilo tsa tempele, le e seng bakgadi ba modimo wa rona wa sesadi." 
Acts19:38 Mme jaanong, fa Demeterio le badiri ba ba nang nae ba na le kgang le mongwe, makgotla a teng, le baatlhodi, a ba sekisanye." 
Acts19:39 Mme fa lo batla sengwe se sele, se tla sekwa mo pitsong e e epilweng ka molao." 
Acts19:40 Gonne re mo kotsing ya go ka bewa molato ka ntlha ya moferefere wa kajeno, ka go se na lebaka lepe le re ka ikarabelang ka lone ka ntlha ya pheretlhego e.” Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a phatlalatsa kgobokano." 
Acts20:1 E rile pheretlhego e sena go khutla, Paulo a bitsa barutwa, a ba kgothatsa; a ba a ba sadisa sentle, a bolola go ya kwa Maketonia." 
Acts20:2 A ralala dinaga tsa teng, a ba nametsa ka mafoko a mantsi, a ba a fetela kwa lefatsheng la Bagerika," 
Acts20:3 a nna teng dikgwedi tse tharo. Ya re ka Bajuta ba mo laletse, fa a re o ya kwa Siria ka mokoro, a fetoga maikaelelo, a potologa ka tsela ya Maketonia." 
Acts20:4 O ne a patwa ke Sopatere, morwa Piro wa Berea, le Aristarego le Sekunto, e le ba Thesalonika, le Gayo wa Derebe, le Timotheo, le ba kwa Asia, e bong Tigiko le Terofimo." 
Acts20:5 Bone ba ne ba fetetse kwa pele, mme ba re leta kwa Teroase." 
Acts20:6 Mme rona ra tswa mo Filipi ka mokoro morago ga malatsi a Dinkgwe tse di sa bedisiwang, ra ba fitlhela kwa Teroase morago ga malatsi a matlhano, ra tlhola teng malatsi a supa." 
Acts20:7 E rile ka letsatsi la ntlha la beke, fa re phuthegetse go nathoganya senkgwe, Paulo a bua nabo, a ikaeletse go tsoga a tsamaya; mme a rera nako e telele go fitlha gare ga bosigo." 
Acts20:8 Ga bo go le dipone tse dintsi mo ntlong e e fa godimo, kwa re phuthegetseng teng." 
Acts20:9 Jaanong lekau lengwe le leina la lone e leng Eutigo, le le ntseng mo fenstereng, la tshwarwa ke boroko jo bogolo, Paulo a sa ntse a buela pele; mme ka le fentswe ke boroko, la wela fa fatshe go tswa kwa ntlong ya boraro e e kwa godimo, la tsewa le sule." 
Acts20:10 Mme Paulo a fologa, a mo wela godimo, a mo tlamparela a re: “Se tsoseng modumo; gonne mowa wa gagwe o sa le mo go ene.”" 
Acts20:11 A ba a tlhatloga, a nathoganya senkgwe, a ja, a bua nabo go le goleele go ya bosigo bo be bo se, ya baa gona a tlogang." 
Acts20:12 Ba tsisa mosimane a phedile, ba be ba gomotsega thata." 
Acts20:13 Jaanong rona re ne ra fetela kwa mokorong, ra ya kwa Aso ka ona, kwa re tla tsayang Paulo teng; gonne o ne a laetse jalo, ka a ratile go tsamaya ka dinao." 
Acts20:14 E rile a kgatlhana le rona kwa Aso, ra mo pega mo mokorong, ra ya kwa Mitilene." 
Acts20:15 Ra tswa teng ka mokoro, mme ka moso ra fitlha go lebagana le Gio, ka moso o mongwe ra fapogela kwa Samo, mme ya re re sena go tlhola mo Terogileo, ka moso o mongwe ra fitlha kwa Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Gonne Paulo o ne a ikaeletse go feta Efeso ka mokoro gore a tle a se ka a diega mo Asia. O ne a itlhaganetse gore fa a ka kgona, a tle a nne kwa Jerusalema ka letsatsi la Pentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Ya re a le kwa Mileto, a roma motho kwa Efeso go bitsa bagolo ba phuthego." 
Acts20:18 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa go ene, a ba raya a re: “Lo itse ka fa ke ntseng le lona ka teng ka sebaka sotlhe, go tloga ka letsatsi la ntlha le ke tsileng mono Asia ka lone," 
Acts20:19 ke direla Morena ka boikokobetso jotlhe, le ka dikeledi, le ka dithaelo tse di nkwetseng ka ditalelo tsa Bajuta," 
Acts20:20 ka fa ke se kang ka tlhaetsa sepe se se molemo ka teng, ka lo bolelela, ka lo ruta mo ponatshegong le mo matlong;" 
Acts20:21 ka supa mo Bajuteng le mo Bagerikeng ka ga tlhabologelo Modimong, le tumelo ya go dumela mo go Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete." 
Acts20:22 “Mme jaanong, bonang ke etela kwa Jerusalema, ke bofilwe mo moweng, ke sa itse tse di tla ntirafalelang teng," 
Acts20:23 fa e se gore Mowa o o Boitshepo o ntshupetsa mo motseng mongwe le mongwe o re, dikgole le dipitlagano di nkemetse." 
Acts20:24 Mme ga ke re sepe ka tsona, le bophelo jwa me ga ke bo kaye se segolo, fa nka swetsa fela tshiano ya me ka boitumelo, e bong tirelo e ke e amogetseng mo go Morena Jesu ya go supa Efangele ya bopelotlhomogi jwa Modimo." 
Acts20:25 “Mme jaanong ke itse gore ga lo kitla lo tlhola lo bona sefatlhego sa me, lona lotlhe ba ke tsamaileng mo go lona, ke rera tsa puso ya Modimo." 
Acts20:26 Ke ka moo ke supang mo go lona ka letsatsi la kajeno gore ga ke na molato mo tatlhegong ya ga ope; 
Acts20:27 gonne ga ke a ka ka tlhaetsa sepe, mme ke lo boleletse maikaelelo a Modimo otlhe." 
Acts20:28 Lo itise, lo be lo dise letsomane lotlhe le Mowa o o Boitshepo o lo beileng go nna baokamedi ba lone, gore lo fudise phuthego ya Modimo e o e itheketseng ka madi a ona." 
Acts20:29 Gonne ke itse gore e tla re ke sena go tsamaya, go tsene mo go lona diphiri tse di setlhogo tse di sa rekegeleng letsomane." 
Acts20:30 Le mo go lona ka losi go tla tsoga banna ba ba buang tse di sokameng gore ba fapose barutwa, ba sale bone morago." 
Acts20:31 Ka moo, disang lo nne lo gakologelwe gore dinyaga di le tharo ga ke a ka ka khutla go kaela mongwe le mongwe bosigo le motshegare ka dikeledi." 
Acts20:32 “Mme jaanong, bakaulengwe, ke lo neela mo Moreneng le mo Lefokong la bopelotlhomogi jwa gagwe yo o nonofileng go lo aga le go lo naya boswa mmogo le botlhe ba ba itshepisitsweng." 
Acts20:33 Ga ke a ka ka eletsa selefera le fa e le gouta le fa e le diaparo tsa ga ope. 
Acts20:34 Lo itse ka losi gore diatla tse, di ntiretse tsa bophelo le ba ba neng ba na le nna." 
Acts20:35 Ke lo supeditse mo go tsotlhe gore ka go dira jalo re tshwanetse go thusa ba ba bokoa, le go gakologelwa Lefoko la Morena Jesu le a le buileng ka esi a re: ‘Go naya go na le lesego bogolo go go amogela.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a khubama, a rapela nabo botlhe." 
Acts20:37 Ga ba ga nna selelo se segolo mo go botlhe, ba wela mo molaleng wa ga Paulo, ba mo atla," 
Acts20:38 ba hutsafadiwa bogolo ke lefoko le a le buileng a re, ga ba kitla ba tlhola ba bona sefatlhego sa gagwe. Mme ba mo felegetsa go fitlha kwa mokorong." 
Acts21:1 E rile re sena go kgaogana nabo, ra tsamaya ka mokoro, ra tlhamalalela kwa Kose; ka moso ra ya kwa Roto, ra tswa teng, ra fitlha kwa Patara." 
Acts21:2 Ra fitlhela mokoro o o kgabaganyetsang kwa Fenikia, ra o palama, ra tsamaya." 
Acts21:3 Ya re re bona setlhakatlhake sa Kipero, ra se pota ka fa molemeng, ra fetela kwa Siria, ra goroga mo Tiro; gonne ke gona fa mokoro o neng o tla pagololwa morwalo teng." 
Acts21:4 Ya re re bona barutwa, ra tlhola malatsi a a supang teng; mme bao ba bolelela Paulo ka Mowa gore a se ka a ya kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts21:5 Ya re re sena go swetsa malatsi ao, ra tloga, ra tswelela, bone botlhe ba na le basadi le bana ba re buledisa, go ya re be re tswe mo motseng; ra khubama fa losing lwa lewatle, ra rapela." 
Acts21:6 Jaanong ra dumedisanya, ra palama mokoro, bone ba boela kwa gae." 
Acts21:7 Ya re re fetsa leeto la go tswa kwa Tiro, ra fitlha kwa Petolemai, ra dumedisa badumedi, ra tlhola nabo letsatsi le le lengwe fela." 
Acts21:8 Ka moso ra tloga, ra ba ra fitlha kwa Kaisarea; teng ra tsena mo ntlong ya ga Filipo wa moefangele yo e neng e le mongwe wa ba supa, ra tlhola nae." 
Acts21:9 Yoo a bo a na le bomorwadie ba le bane, e le makgarebe a a nang le neo ya boporofeti." 
Acts21:10 Ya re re sena go nna teng malatsi a se kae, ga tla moporofeti mongwe, a tswa Jutea yo go tweng Agabo." 
Acts21:11 A fitlha fa go rona, a tsaya moitlamo wa ga Paulo, a ipofa maoto le mabogo a re: “Mowa o o Boitshepo o bua jaana o re: ‘Mong wa moitlamo o, Bajuta ba tla mmofa jalo kwa Jerusalema, ba mo neela mo diatleng tsa baheitane.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Ya re re utlwa jalo, ra mo rapela, rona le ba felo foo, gore a se ka a ya kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts21:13 Foo Paulo a araba a re: “Lo dirang ka go lela, lo mphatlola pelo? Kana ke iketleeditse go swela leina la Morena Jesu kwa Jerusalema, e seng go golegwa fela.”" 
Acts21:14 Mme ya re a gana go rapelesega, ra ineela ra re: “A thato ya Morena e dirafale!”" 
Acts21:15 Morago ga malatsi ao ra ipaakanya, ra ya kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts21:16 Bangwe ba barutwa ba Kaisarea le bone ba ya le rona, ba re isa kwa go mongwe e bong Menasone wa Kipero, morutwa wa bogologolo, yo re yang go nna kwa ga gagwe." 
Acts21:17 E rile re fitlha kwa Jerusalema, bakaulengwe ba re tshola ka boitumelo." 
Acts21:18 Ka moso Paulo a ya le rona kwa go Jakobo; bagolo botlhe ba phuthegela teng. 
Acts21:19 Ya re a sena go ba dumedisa, a ba bolelela sengwe le sengwe se Modimo o se dirileng mo baheitaneng ka tirelo ya gagwe." 
Acts21:20 Mme bone, ya re ba utlwa, ba galaletsa Modimo, ba mo raya ba re: “Mogarona, o a bona gore ke dikete tse di kana kang tsa Bajuta ba ba dumetseng; mme botlhe ba tlhoafaletse molao." 
Acts21:21 Ba boleletswe ka ga gago ga twe: O ruta Bajuta botlhe ba ba mo go Baditšhaba gore ba hularele Moše, o a re, ba se rupise bana le e seng go tsamaya ka fa mekgweng ya segarona." 
Acts21:22 Mme jaanong go ka tweng? Go tshwanetse ga nna pitso ya phuthego; kana ba tla utlwa gore o tsile. 
Acts21:23 “Ka moo he, dira se re se go rayang. Re na le banna ba le bane ba ba nang le ikano;" 
Acts21:24 ba tsee, o itshekisiwe nabo, o ba duelele gore ba tle ba beolwe ditlhogo; mme botlhe ba tla itse gore tse ba di boleletsweng ka ga gago ga se tsona, mme le wena ka wesi o sepela o tshegeditse molao." 
Acts21:25 Fa e le Baditšhaba ba ba dumetseng re ba kwaletse katlholo ya rona gore ba se ka ba tshegetsa sepe sa dilo tse, mme ba ikilele mo nameng ya ditlhabelo tsa medimo le mo mading le mo go tse di betilweng le mo boakeng fela.”" 
Acts21:26 Foo Paulo a tsaya banna bao; mme ya re ka moso a itshekisiwa nabo, a tsena mo Tempeleng, a bolela gore sebaka sa malatsi a boitshekiso se tla fela leng, a nna teng go ya mongwe le mongwe wa bone a be a isediwe setlhabelo." 
Acts21:27 Jaanong e rile malatsi ao a supa a le gaufi le go fela, Bajuta ba ba tswang kwa Asia ba mmona mo Tempeleng, ba feretlha bontsi jotlhe, ba mo tshwara," 
Acts21:28 ba kua ba re: “Banna ba Iseraele, thusang! Motho yo ke ene yo o rutang botlhe mo ntlheng tsotlhe ka mokgwa o o thulanang le morafe wa ga rona le molao le Felo fa; e bile o tlisitse Bagerika mo Tempeleng, a itshepolola Felo-fa-go-Boitshepo fa.”" 
Acts21:29 Ba re jalo ka gonne ba ne ba bonye Terofimo wa Efeso, a na le ene mo motseng, yo ba itlhomileng gore Paulo o mo isitse mo Tempeleng." 
Acts21:30 Motse otlhe wa kgoberega, ga nna kgobokano ya batho; jaanong ba tshwara Paulo, ba mo swatolela kwa ntle ga Tempele; mme ka bonako mejako ya tswalwa." 
Acts21:31 Ya re ba rata go mmolaya, molaodi wa mophato o o sekete a itsisiwe gore Jerusalema yotlhe o feretlhegile." 
Acts21:32 A akofa a tsaya batlhabani le balaodi-ba-lekgolo, a tabogela kwa go bone. Mme ya re ba bona molaodi-wa-sekete le batlhabani, ba khutla go betsa Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Foo molaodi-wa-sekete a atamela, a mo tshwara, a laola gore a golegwe ka dikeetane di le pedi; a ba a botsa gore ke mang, le gore o dirile eng." 
Acts21:34 Mme bangwe mo bontsing ba kua se, ba bangwe se sele; ya re ka a retelelwa ke go lemoga tlhomamo ka ntlha ya pheretlhego, a laola gore a isiwe mo kagong ya batlhabani." 
Acts21:35 Ya re a fitlha fa mapalamong, a rwalwa ke batlhabani ka ntlha ya bogale jwa batho." 
Acts21:36 Gonne bontsi jwa morafe bo ne bo ba setse morago, bo kua bo re: “A a bolawe!”" 
Acts21:37 Ya re fa Paulo a tla isiwa mo kagong ya batlhabani, a raya molaodi-wa-sekete a re: “A nka bua sengwe nao!” Ene a araba a re: “A o itse Segerika?" 
Acts21:38 A ga se wena Moegepeto yo maloba o tsositseng pheretlhego, wa gogela babolai ba ba dikete tse nne kwa sekakeng?”" 
Acts21:39 Paulo a araba a re: “Ke Mojuta wa kwa Tareso wa Kilekia, moagi wa motse o o itsegeng; ke a go rapela, ntetlelele go bua le batho.”" 
Acts21:40 Ya re a sena go mo letlelela, Paulo a ema mo mapalamong, a boka batho ka letsogo; mme ya re go sena go nna tidimalo e kgolo, a bua nabo ka Sehebere a re:" 
Acts22:1 “Ba ga etsho le borra, utlwang boikarabelo jwa me mo go lona.”" 
Acts22:2 Ya re ba utlwa gore o bua nabo ka Sehebere, ba didimala bogolo; mme a tswelela pele a re:" 
Acts22:3 “Nna ke monna wa Mojuta, ke tsaletswe kwa Tareso wa Kilekia, mme ka godisediwa mo motseng ono, ka rutwa molao wa borraetsho fa dinaong tsa ga Gamaliele ka tlhokomelo e kgolo, ke le yo o tlhoafalelang Modimo jaaka lona lotlhe lo dira gompieno." 
Acts22:4 Ka bogisa Tsela e ya bokeresete go isa losong, ka golega banna le basadi, ka ba tsenya mo matlong a kgolegelo," 
Acts22:5 jaaka le ene moperesiti yo mogolo le lesomo lotlhe la bagolo ba ka supa ka ga me. Ke bile ka tsaya dikwalo mo go bone tse di yang kwa go ba ga etsho ba Damaseko, ka etela teng gore le ba ba teng ke ba golege, ke ba tsise kwano Jerusalema, ba tle ba fiwe petso." 
Acts22:6 “Jaanong ya re ke ntse ke tsamaya, ke atametse Damaseko, go le motshegare, lesedi le legolo le le tswang legodimong le phatsima tikologong ya me ka tshoganyetso," 
Acts22:7 ka wela fa fatshe, ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya le re: ‘Saule, Saule, o mpogisetsang?’" 
Acts22:8 Ka araba ka re: ‘Morena, o mang?’ A nthaya a re: ‘Ke nna Jesu wa Nasaretha yo ò mmogisang.’" 
Acts22:9 Mme ba ba neng ba na le nna ba bona lesedi, ba boifa, fela ba se ka ba utlwa lentswe la yo o buang le nna." 
Acts22:10 Ka ba ka re: ‘Morena, ke direng?’ Morena a nthaya a re: ‘Nanoga o tsene mo Damaseko, teng o tla bolelelwa tsotlhe tse o laotsweng go di dira.’" 
Acts22:11 Mme ka ke ne ke sa bone ka ntlha ya kgalalelo ya lesedi leo, ka gogwa ka letsogo ke ba ba neng ba na le nna, ka fitlha kwa Damaseko." 
Acts22:12 “Mme Anania mongwe, monna yo o boifang Modimo ka fa molaong, yo o neng a na le tumo e e molemo mo Bajuteng botlhe ba ba agileng teng," 
Acts22:13 a tla kwa go nna, a ema teng, a nthaya a re: ‘Saule, mokaulengwe, boa o bone!’ Ka foufologa e sa le ka nako eo, ka mmona." 
Acts22:14 A ba a re: ‘Modimo wa borraetsho o go itlhaoletse pele gore o itse thato ya ona, le go bona Mosiami le go utlwa lentswe le le tswang mo molomong wa gagwe;" 
Acts22:15 gonne o tla nna mosupi wa gagwe mo bathong botlhe, o supa tse o di bonyeng le tse o di utlwileng." 
Acts22:16 Jaanong o diegelang? Nanoga o kolobediwe, o be o tlhapisiwe dibe tsa gago o ntse o bitsa leina la gagwe!’" 
Acts22:17 “E rile ke boetse kwano Jerusalema, ke rapela mo Tempeleng, ka wela mo tshiramong ya pelo," 
Acts22:18 ka mmona, a nthaya a re: ‘Itlhaganele o tswe mo Jerusalema ka bonako; gonne ga ba nke ba tshola tshupo ya gago ka ga me.’" 
Acts22:19 Nna ka bua ka re: ‘Morena, ba itse ka bosi gore ba ba dumetseng mo go wena ke ba tsentse mo kgolegong, ka ba betsa mo disenagogeng;" 
Acts22:20 le gona e rile madi a ga Setefane, mosupi wa gago, a tshololwa, le nna ka nosi ka bo ke eme teng, ke dumelelana le go bolawa ga gagwe, ke disitse dikobo tsa ba ba mmolayang.’" 
Acts22:21 Mme a nthaya a re: ‘Tloga o tsamae; gonne ke tla go romela kwa kgakala kwa baheitaneng.’ ” 
Acts22:22 Ba nna ba mo reetsa go fitlha mo lefokong le; ya baa gona ba tsholetsang mantswe ba re: “A yo o ntseng jaana a tlosiwe mo lefatsheng; gonne ga go a tshwanela gore a phele!” 
Acts22:23 Ya re ba ntse ba kua, ba latlha dikobo, ba kubuela lorole kwa godimo," 
Acts22:24 molaodi-wa-sekete a laola gore a isiwe mo kagong ya batlhabani, a re, a botsolodiwe ka dithupa, a tle a lemoge gore ke ka ntlha ya eng, fa ba mo kuelela jalo." 
Acts22:25 Jaanong ya re ba mo ngamola ka dikgole, Paulo a raya molaodi-wa-lekgolo yo o emeng teng a re: “A lo letleletswe go seola motho yo e leng Moroma, a bile a ise a atlholwe?”" 
Acts22:26 Ya re molaodi-wa-lekgolo a sena go utlwa, a ya kwa molaoding-wa-sekete, a mo raya a re: “O tla reng? Motho yo ke Moroma.”" 
Acts22:27 Ga tla molaodi-wa-sekete, a mmotsa a re: “Mpolelele, a o Moroma?” Ene a re: “Ee.”" 
Acts22:28 Molaodi-wa-sekete a mo fetola a re: “Boroma joo ke bo rekile ka madi a mantsi.” Paulo ene a re: “Mme nna ke tsetswe ke le Moroma.” 
Acts22:29 Ya baa gona ba ba neng ba re ba a mmotsolotsa ba akofang ba tloga fa go ene; molaodi-wa-sekete le ene a boifa, a sena go utlwa gore ke Moroma, ka a mo golegile." 
Acts22:30 Ya re ka moso, ka molaodi a rata go itse ka tlhomamo se Bajuta ba mmonang molato ka sona, a mmofolola dikgolego; a ba a laola gore baperesiti ba bagolo le lekgotla le legolo lotlhe ba phuthege; a folosa Paulo, a mmaya fa pele ga bone." 
Acts23:1 Jaanong Paulo a tlhoma matlho mo lekgotleng le legolo, a ba raya a re: “Banna ba ga etsho, ke phedile ka segakolodi se se molemo fa pele ga Modimo go fitlhela letsatsing leno.”" 
Acts23:2 Foo Anania, moperesiti yo mogolo, a laola ba ba emeng fa go ene gore ba mo itee molomo." 
Acts23:3 Paulo a mo raya a re: “Modimo o tla go betsa, lomota lo lo takilweng ke wena! O a re, o nkatlhola ka fa molaong; mme a o laola gore ke itewe, mme e se ka molao?”" 
Acts23:4 Ba ba emeng teng ba re: “A o kgala moperesiti yo mogolo wa Modimo?” 
Acts23:5 Paulo a re: “Ba ga etsho, ke ne ke sa itse gore ke moperesiti yo mogolo; kana go kwadilwe ga twe: ‘O se ka wa hutsa molaodi wa morafe wa ga eno.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Ya re Paulo a lemoga gore bangwe ba bone ke Basadukai, mme ba bangwe ke Bafarisai, a kua mo lekgotleng a re: “Banna ba ga etsho, ke Mofarisai le ngwana wa Bafarisai; ke ka ntlha ya tsholofelo, e bong tsogo ya baswi, fa ke sekisiwa.”" 
Acts23:7 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, ga tsoga kgang fa gare ga Bafarisai le Basadukai; lekgotla la ba la kgaogana." 
Acts23:8 Gonne Basadukai ba re, ga go na tsogo ya baswi le e seng moengele gongwe mowa; mme Bafarisai ba di dumela tsotlhe." 
Acts23:9 Ga ba ga tsoga modumo o mogolo; mme bangwe ba Baitsedikwalo ba lesomo la Bafarisai ba nanoga, ba mo emela ba re: “Ga re bone bosula bope mo mothong yo; mme fa mowa gongwe moengele a buile nae, re ka palelwa ke go lwantsha Modimo!”" 
Acts23:10 Ya re kgang e gola, molaodi-wa-sekete a boifa gore Paulo o tla gagolwa ke bone; a ba a laola gore mophato o fologe, o mo tsee ka thata mo go bone, o mmusetse kwa kagong ya batlhabani." 
Acts23:11 Mo bosigong joo Morena a ema fa go ene, a mo raya a re: “Nametsega, Paulo; gonne o tshwanetse go supa le kwa Roma, jaaka o supile ka ga me mo Jerusalema.”" 
Acts23:12 E rile bo sena go sa, Bajuta ba dira kgolagano, ba ikana ka khutso gore ga ba kitla ba ja le e seng go nwa, ba ise ba bolae Paulo." 
Acts23:13 Ba ba dumalanyeng ka ikano eo ba ne ba feta 40. 
Acts23:14 Bone bao ba ya kwa baperesiting ba bagolo le bagolong ba morafe, ba ba raya ba re: “Re ikanne ka khutso gore ga re kitla re isa sepe ganong, re ise re bolae Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Jaanong he, lona le ba lekgotla le legolo, kopang molaodi-wa-sekete gore a mo folosetse kwano go lona, jaaka e kete lo rata go tlhotlhomisa ka ga gagwe ka tlhokomelo e kgolo; mme rona re ipaakantse go mmolaya, a ise a fitlhe.”" 
Acts23:16 Mme motlogolo wa ga Paulo a utlwela talelo eo, a ya, a tsena mo kagong ya batlhabani, a bolelela Paulo." 
Acts23:17 Paulo a bitsa mongwe wa balaodi-ba-lekgolo, a mo raya a re: “Isa lekau le kwa molaoding-wa-sekete; gonne o na le sengwe go se mmegela.”" 
Acts23:18 Ke fa a le tsaya, a le isa kwa molaoding-wa-sekete, a mo raya a re: “Paulo wa mogolegwi o mpiditse, a nkopa gore ke tsise lekau le kwano go wena; le na le sengwe go se go bolelela.”" 
Acts23:19 Molaodi-wa-sekete a le tshwara letsogo, a le gogela fa thoko, a le botsa ka sephiri a re: “Ke eng se o nang le go se mpolelela?”" 
Acts23:20 Ene a re: “Bajuta ba dumalanye go go kopa gore e re kamoso o folosetse Paulo kwa lekgotleng le legolo, jaaka e kete ba rata go botsolotsa ka ga gagwe ka tlhokomelo e kgolo." 
Acts23:21 “O se ka wa ba utlwa; gonne o laletswe ke banna ba ba fetang 40 ba bone, ba ikanne ka khutso gore ga ba kitla ba ja le e seng go nwa, ba ise ba mmolae; mme jaanong ba ipaakantse, ba letile tumelelo ya gago.”" 
Acts23:22 Ke fa molaodi-wa-sekete a rebola lekau gore le tsamae, a le laya a re: “O se ka wa bolelela ope gore o ntshebetse dilo tseo.”" 
Acts23:23 Jaanong a bitsa balaodi-ba-lekgolo ba le babedi, a ba raya a re: “Baakanyang batlhabani ba le 200, ba ye kwa Kaisarea, le bapalami ba dipitse ba le 70, le ba marumo ba le 200, ba tloge ka nako ya robongwe bosigo;" 
Acts23:24 gape ba baakanye dipelesa gore ba palamise Paulo mo go tsona, ba mo ise kwa go molaodi yo mogolo Felekise a phologile sentle.”" 
Acts23:25 A ba a kwala lokwalo a re: 
Acts23:26 “Nna Kelaudio Lisia ke dumedisa Felekise, molaodi yo o tlotlegang segolo, ka re:" 
Acts23:27 Monna yoo o ne a tshwerwe ke Bajuta, ba batla go mmolaya. Mme ka ya teng le mophato, ka mo golola, ka ke lemogile gore ke Moroma." 
Acts23:28 Jaanong ka ke ne ke rata go itse se ba mo latofatsang ka sona, ka mo isa kwa lekgotleng le legolo la bone;" 
Acts23:29 ka fitlhela a bewa molato ka ntlha ya dikgang dingwe tsa molao wa bone; mme a se na molato ope o o tshwanetseng loso, le e seng kgolego." 
Acts23:30 E rile ke sena go sebelwa gore monna yoo o tla lalelwa, ka akofa ka mo romela koo go wena, ka ba ka laela balatofatsi ba gagwe gore se ba nang naso ka ga gagwe ba se bue fa pele ga gago. Sala sentle.”" 
Acts23:31 Jaanong batlhabani ba tsaya Paulo ka fa ba laetsweng ka teng; ba mo isa kwa Antipateri bosigo. 
Acts23:32 Ya re ka moso ba tlogela bapalami ba dipitse gore ba tswelele nae; mme ba dinao ba boela kwa kagong ya batlhabani. 
Acts23:33 Ya re ba sena go fitlha kwa Kaisarea, ba neela molaodi yo mogolo lokwalo, le Paulo ba mmaya fa pele ga gagwe." 
Acts23:34 Ya re a sena go lo buisa, a botsa gore ke wa karolo efe ya puso ya Roma; ya re a utlwa gore ke wa Kilekia, a re:" 
Acts23:35 “Ke tla utlwa sentle kgang ya gago, balatofatsi ba gago le bone ba sena go tla.” A ba a laola gore a disiwe a le mo ntlong ya ga Herote ya bogosi." 
Acts24:1 E rile morago ga malatsi a le matlhano Anania, moperesiti yo mogolo, a tla le bagolo ba morafe bangwe le mmueledi mongwe, e bong Teretulo, ba begela molaodi yo mogolo Paulo." 
Acts24:2 Ya re Paulo a sena go bidiwa, Teretulo a simolola go mo latofatsa a re: “E re ka re bona kagiso e kgolo ka wena, le ka morafe ono o direlwa ditlhabololo ka tlamelo ya gago" 
Acts24:3 ka mekgwa yotlhe le mo ntlheng tsotlhe, re amogela gona ka tebogo yotlhe, wena Felekise yo o tlotlegang segolo." 
Acts24:4 Mme fela, ka ke sa rate go go dia, ke go rapela gore o re reetse go se kae ka bopelonomi jwa gago." 
Acts24:5 Re fitlhetse monna yo a le botlhole, a feretlha mo Bajuteng botlhe mo lefatsheng lotlhe; e bile ke moeteledi pele wa setlhopha sa maitirelo sa Banasaretha." 
Acts24:6 O bile o lekile go itshepolola Tempele; mme ra mo tshwara, ra rata go mo atlhola ka fa molaong wa rona." 
Acts24:7 Mme Lisia, molaodi-wa-sekete, a tla, a mo ubula ka thata e kgolo mo diatleng tsa rona," 
Acts24:8 a laela balatofatsi ba gagwe gore ba tle fa pele ga gago. O tla kgona go tlhaloganya dilo tsotlhe tse re mmayang molato ka tsona, fa o ka mmotsolotsa ka wesi.”" 
Acts24:9 Bajuta le bone ba mo tlatsa, ba tlhomamisa gore go ntse jalo." 
Acts24:10 Ya re molaodi yo mogolo a sena go mo gwetlha gore a bue, Paulo a araba a re: “E re ka ke itse gore e setse e le dinyaga tse dintsi o ntse o le moatlhodi wa morafe o, ke ikarabela ka phuthologo ntlheng ya tse di ntebanyeng;" 
Acts24:11 o ka lemoga gore fa ke sena go ya kwa Jerusalema go obamela, ga go ise go fete malatsi a le 12;" 
Acts24:12 mme ga ba ise ba mphitlhele ke ganetsanya le ope mo Tempeleng, gongwe ke dira khuduego mo bontsing le e seng mo disenagogeng gongwe mo motseng." 
Acts24:13 Le gona ga ba ka ke ba go tlhomamisetsa sepe ka ga dilo tse ba ntatofatsang ka tsona jaanong. 
Acts24:14 “Mme ke go ipobolela gore ka nnete ke direla Modimo wa borraetsho ka fa Tseleng e ba reng ke ya setlhopha sa maitirelo, ke ntse ke dumela tsotlhe tse di utlwanang le molao le tse di kwadilweng mo baporofeting," 
Acts24:15 ke na le tsholofelo mo Modimong ya se le bone ba se lebelelang gore go tla nna tsogo ya basiami le ya basiamolodi. 
Acts24:16 Ke bile ke ntse ke itlwaetsa go nna le segakolodi se se se nang molato ka gale mo Modimong le mo bathong. 
Acts24:17 “Mme morago ga dinyaga di se kae ka tla go tsisetsa morafe wa ga etsho dikatso le go isa ditshupelo. 
Acts24:18 Ya re ke di isa, Bajuta bangwe ba kwa Asia ba mphitlhela mo Tempeleng ke itshekisitswe, go se na bontsi jwa batho le e seng modumo;" 
Acts24:19 ke bone ba ba ka bong ba le fano fa pele ga gago ba supa molato, fa ba o bona mo go nna." 
Acts24:20 Gongwe a bone ba ka bosi ba bolele tshiamololo e ba e bonyeng mo go nna, fa ke ne ka ema fa pele ga lekgotla le legolo la bone." 
Acts24:21 Kampo ba mpona molato ka ntlha ya lefoko le le lengwe lele le ke le kuileng ke eme mo gare ga bone ka re: ‘Ke sekisiwa kajeno ke lona ka ntlha ya tsogo ya baswi.’ ” 
Acts24:22 Mme Felekise, e re ka a ne a itse tse dintsi tsa Tsela ya bokeresete, a busetsa kgang kwa morago a re: “E tla re Lisia, molaodi-wa-sekete, a sena go tla, ke atlhole kgang ya lona.”" 
Acts24:23 Jaanong a laela molaodi-wa-lekgolo gore a mo dise, mme a se ka a tshwenngwa; go se thibelwe ope wa ba ga gabo go mo direla gongwe go mo etela." 
Acts24:24 E rile morago ga malatsi mangwe Felekise a tla le Durusila, mohumagadi wa gagwe wa Mojuta; a bitsa Paulo, a mo reetsa, a bolela ka ga tumelo ya go dumela mo go Keresete Jesu." 
Acts24:25 Mme ya re a ntse a bua ka ga tshiamo le ka ga boitshwaro le ka ga katlholo e e tlang, Felekise a tshoga, a ba a mo araba a re: “Gompieno o ka tsamaya; e tla re ke sena go bona nako, ke go bitse.”" 
Acts24:26 E bile o ne a solofetse gore o tla newa madi ke Paulo gore a mo golole; ke ka moo a mmiditseng gangwe le gape, a buisanya nae." 
Acts24:27 E rile dinyaga tse pedi di sena go feta, Porekio Feseto a tsena mo boemong jwa ga Felekise; mme ya re ka Felekise a ne a rata go kgatlha Bajuta, a tsamaya, a sa golola Paulo." 
Acts25:1 Jaanong e rile Feseto a sena go fitlha mo karolong eo ya puso, a tloga kwa Kaisarea morago ga malatsi a mararo, a ya kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts25:2 Foo baperesiti ba bagolo le batlotlegi ba Bajuta ba mmegela molato wa ga Paulo, ba mo emelela," 
Acts25:3 ba kopa gore a ba itumedise kgatlhanong le ene ka go mmiletsa kwa Jerusalema; fela bone ba ne ba mo laletse go tla mmolaela mo tseleng. 
Acts25:4 Jaanong Feseto a fetola a re: “Paulo o disitswe kwa Kaisarea; le nna ka nosi ke tla tloga ke boela teng.” 
Acts25:5 A ba a re: “Jaanong a ba ba nang le thata mo go lona ba tsamae le nna; e tle e re fa go na le tshokamo nngwe mo monneng yoo, ba e supe.”" 
Acts25:6 Ya re a sena go tlhola nabo malatsi a a nnang robedi gongwe some, a boela kwa Kaisarea. Ka moso a nna mo sedulong sa katlholo, a laela gore Paulo a tsisiwe." 
Acts25:7 Ya re a sena go tla, Bajuta ba ba tswang kwa Jerusalema ba mo dikanyetsa, ba mmaya melato e mentsi e megolo e ba sa ka keng ba e supa." 
Acts25:8 Paulo ene a ikarabela a re: “Ga ke a leofela molao wa Bajuta le e seng Tempele le e seng Kaisara.” 
Acts25:9 Mme Feseto, ya re ka a rata go kgatlha Bajuta, a botsa Paulo a re: “A o rata go ya kwa Jerusalema go atlholwa teng fa pele ga me ka ga dilo tse?”" 
Acts25:10 Ke fa Paulo a re: “Ke eme fa pele ga sedulo sa katlholo sa Kaisara, fa ke tshwanetseng go atlholwa teng; Bajuta ga ke a ba siamololela ka sepe jaaka le wena o itse sentle." 
Acts25:11 Jaanong fa ke siamolotse, ke dirile sengwe se se tshwanetseng loso, ga ke gane go swa; mme fa go se na nnete mo go tse ba ntatofatsang ka tsona, ga go ope yo o tshwanetseng go nneela mo thateng ya bone. Ke ipiletsa Kaisara.”" 
Acts25:12 Feseto, fa a sena go gakololana le ba lekgotla, a mo araba a re: “O ipileditse Kaisara, o tla ya kwa go Kaisara.”" 
Acts25:13 E rile malatsi mangwe a sena go feta, kgosi Ageripa le Berenike ba fitlha mo Kaisarea gore ba dumedise Feseto." 
Acts25:14 Ya re ba sena go nna teng malatsinyana, Feseto a bolelela kgosi kgang ya ga Paulo a re: “Go na le monna mongwe mono yo Felekise a mo tlogetseng, a golegilwe." 
Acts25:15 E rile ke le kwa Jerusalema, baperesiti ba bagolo le bagolo ba Bajuta ba mpegela molato wa gagwe, ba batla gore a atlholwe." 
Acts25:16 Mme ka ba araba ka re, ga se mokgwa wa Baroma go neela motho ope mo petsong, fa yo o latofadiwang a ise a lebagane le ba ba mmayang molato, gore a nne le go ka ikarabela ka ga molato o a o bewang." 
Acts25:17 Jaanong ya re ba sena go phuthega mono, ka se ka ka diega; ka moso ka nna mo sedulong sa katlholo, ka laela gore monna yoo a tlisiwe." 
Acts25:18 Mme ya re ba ba mo latofatsang ba ema, ba se ka ba supa molato ope wa tse di bosula, tse ke neng ke di gopotse;" 
Acts25:19 mme ba bo ba na le dikganetsanyo dingwe nae ka ga tumelo ya bone le ka ga mongwe yo o bidiwang Jesu yo o suleng, yo Paulo o tlhomamisang gore o a phela." 
Acts25:20 Nna ya re ka ke akabadiwa ke go tlhotlhomisa dilo tse, ka mmotsa fa a rata go ya kwa Jerusalema le go atlholwa teng ka ga dilo tse." 
Acts25:21 Mme ya re Paulo a sena go rapela gore a nne mo kgolegong, a lete katlholo ya Kaisara, ka laela gore a disiwe go ya ke be ke mo romele kwa go Kaisara.”" 
Acts25:22 Jaanong Ageripa a raya Feseto a re: “Le nna ke rata go utlwa motho yoo.” Ene a re: “O tla mo utlwa kamoso.” 
Acts25:23 Kamoso Ageripa a tla le Berenike ka tlotlomalo e kgolo, ba tsena mo ntlong ya lekgotla le balaodi-ba-sekete le banna ba ba tlotlegang ba motse. Ke fa Paulo a tsisiwa ka taelo ya ga Feseto." 
Acts25:24 Feseto a bua a re: “Kgosi Ageripa le banna botlhe, ba lo nnang le rona fano, lo a mmona, yo bontsi jotlhe jwa Bajuta ba nthapetseng ka ga gagwe kwa Jerusalema le mono, ba kua ba re: ‘Ga a tlhole a tshwanela go phela.’" 
Acts25:25 Mme nna ka fitlhela a sa dira sepe se se tshwanetseng loso; mme e re ka ene ka esi a ipileditse Kaisara, ka atlhola go mo romela teng." 
Acts25:26 Mme fela, ga ke na sepe sa tlhomamo se nka se kwalelang morena ka ga gagwe. Ke ka moo ke mo tlisitseng fa pele ga lona, bogolo fa pele ga gago, kgosi Ageripa, gore e tle e re morago ga potsolotso ke nne le sengwe se nka se kwalang;" 
Acts25:27 gonne mo go nna ke bosilo, fa go ka romelwa mogolegwi, mme go sa bolelwe melato e a e bewang.”" 
Acts26:1 Jaanong Ageripa a raya Paulo a re: “O letleletswe go ipuelela.” Paulo a tsholetsa letsogo, a ikarabela a re:" 
Acts26:2 “Ke ikaya ke le sego, kgosi Ageripa, ka ke tshwanetse go ikarabela fa pele ga gago kajeno ka ga dilo tsotlhe tse ke latofadiwang ke Bajuta ka tsona;" 
Acts26:3 bogolo ka o na le kitso ka ga mekgwa le dikgang tsotlhe tse di mo Bajuteng; ke ka moo ke go rapelang gore o ntheetse ka bopelotelele. 
Acts26:4 “Jaanong fa e le tsa bophelo jwa me go tloga bošweng jwa me jo ke bo phedileng go tswa tshimologong mo morafeng wa ga etsho le mo Jerusalema, Bajuta botlhe ba a di itse," 
Acts26:5 ka ba sa le ba nkitse go tloga tshimologong; fa ba rata, ba ka bo ba supa gore ke phedile ke le Mofarisai mo lesomong le le nang le molao o o gagametseng thata la tumelo ya rona." 
Acts26:6 Mme jaanong ke eme fano go sekisiwa ka ntlha ya go solofela se Modimo o se solofeditseng borraetsho; 
Acts26:7 se ditso tsa rona tse di 12 di solofelang go se bona ka go direla Modimo ka tlhoafalo bosigo le motshegare. Mme kgosi, ke latofadiwa ke Bajuta ka ntlha ya tsholofelo eo." 
Acts26:8 Ke ka ntlhaang, fa mo go lona go kaiwa go twe, ga go dumelesege gore Modimo o tsosa baswi?" 
Acts26:9 “Fa e le nna, ke ne ke itheile ka re, ke tshwanetse go dira dilo tse dintsi tsa go lwantsha leina la ga Jesu wa Nasaretha." 
Acts26:10 Ke bile ke dirile jalo mo Jerusalema, ka tswalela baitshepi ba bantsi mo matlong a kgolegelo, ke sena go amogela thata mo baperesiting ba bagolo; e ne ya re ba bolawa, ke dumele." 
Acts26:11 Ke ne ke ba betsa gantsi mo disenagogeng tsotlhe, ke ba pateletsa go kgala, mme ya re ka ke ba gakaletse mo go fetisang, ka ba ka ba bogisa le kwa metseng e e ka kwa ntle." 
Acts26:12 “E rile ke ya kwa Damaseko go dira jalo ka thata le tetlelelo ya baperesiti ba bagolo," 
Acts26:13 foo, kgosi, motshegare, ke le mo tseleng, ka bona lesedi le le tswang legodimong, le gaisa kgalalelo ya letsatsi, le phatsima tikologong ya me le ya ba ba tsamayang le nna." 
Acts26:14 Ya re re wetse rotlhe fa fatshe, ka utlwa lentswe le nthaya ka puo ya Sehebere le re: ‘Saule, Saule, o mpogisetsang? Go thata mo go wena go raga ditlhabi tsa lešwane.’" 
Acts26:15 Nna ka fetola ka re: ‘Morena, o mang?’ Morena a re: ‘Ke nna Jesu yo ò mpogisang." 
Acts26:16 Jaanong tsoga o eme ka dinao; gonne maikaelelo a ke go bonaletseng ka ona ke gore ke go dire modiredi le mosupi wa dilo tse o mponyeng ka tsona, le wa tse ke tla bonalang mo go wena ka tsona." 
Acts26:17 Ke tla go golola mo Bajuteng le mo baheitaneng ba ke go romang kwa go bone," 
Acts26:18 go ba budulola matlho gore ba sokologe, ba tswe mo lefifing, ba tsene leseding, ba tswe mo thateng ya ga Satane, ba ineele Modimo, gore ba amogele boitshwarelo jwa dibe le boswa mmogo le ba ba itshepisitsweng ka go dumela mo go nna.’" 
Acts26:19 “Kgosi Ageripa, ke ka ntlha ya moo ke sa ganang go utlwa pono eo ya legodimo;" 
Acts26:20 mme ke ne ke rerela ba ba mo Damaseko pele, ke bile ke bolelela le ba ba kwa Jerusalema le ba naga yotlhe ya Jutea le Baditšhaba gore ba fetoge pelo, ba sokologele Modimong; ba dire ditiro tse di tshwanetseng boikwatlhao." 
Acts26:21 Ke ka ntlha ya tseo, fa Bajuta ba ntshwere mo Tempeleng, ba leka go mpolaya." 
Acts26:22 Jaanong ka ke bonye thuso mo Modimong, ke eme go fitlhela letsatsing le, ke supetsa bannye le bagolo, ke sa bue sepe, fa e se tse baporofeti le Moše ba rileng, di tla dirafala," 
Acts26:23 ba re, Keresete o tshwanetse go boga le go nna wa ntlha mo tsogong ya baswi gore a tle a rerele Baiseraele le Baditšhaba lesedi.”" 
Acts26:24 Ya re a ntse a ikarabela jalo, Feseto a bua ka lentswe le legolo a re: “Paulo, o a tsenwa! Thutego e kgolo e go dira setsenwa.”" 
Acts26:25 Paulo a fetola a re: “Feseto, motlotlegi yo mogolo, ga ke tsenwe, ke bua mafoko a boammaaruri le a tlhaloganyo." 
Acts26:26 Kana kgosi e itse dilo tseo; e bile ke bua ka bopelokgale fa pele ga yona; gonne ga ke dumele gore sengwe sa dilo tseo se e fitlhegetse; gonne ga di a ka tsa direlwa mo sephiring. 
Acts26:27 Kgosi Ageripa, a o dumela baporofeti? Ke itse gore o a ba dumela.”" 
Acts26:28 Mme Ageripa a raya Paulo a re: “O gaufi le go nkgona go ntira Mokeresete.” 
Acts26:29 Paulo a mo fetola a re: “Le fa go le gaufi gongwe kgakala, ke rapela Modimo gore e se nne wena fela, mme le botlhe ba ba nkutlwang gompieno ba tshwane le nna, ke sa ree dikgole tse.”" 
Acts26:30 Jaanong kgosi ya nanoga le molaodi yo mogolo le Berenike le ba ba ntseng nabo; 
Acts26:31 ba emela fa thoko, ba bua mmogo ba re: “Motho yo ga a a dira sepe se se tshwanetseng loso, le e seng dikgolego.”" 
Acts26:32 Ageripa a raya Feseto a re: “Motho yo, o ka bo a gololwa, fa a ka bo a sa ipiletsa Kaisara.”" 
Acts27:1 E rile leeto la rona la go isiwa kwa Italia ka mokoro le sena go rulaganngwa, Paulo le bagolegwi ba bangwe ba neelwa mo thateng ya molaodi mongwe wa lekgolo yo leina la gagwe e leng Juleo, wa mophato wa Kaisara." 
Acts27:2 Ra palama mokoro mongwe wa Ateramite o o neng o ya kwa mafelong a Asia a a ikamileng lewatle. Ra tsamaya re na le Aristarego wa kwa Thesalonika mo nageng ya Maketonia. 
Acts27:3 Ya re ka moso ra fitlha kwa Sitone. Mme Juleo a direla Paulo ka bopelontle, a mo letlelela go ya kwa ditsaleng tsa gagwe gore a bone tlamelo." 
Acts27:4 Ya re re tloga teng, ra tsamaya re ikamile Kipero; ka gonne diphefo di ne di lebaganye le rona." 
Acts27:5 Fa re sena go kgabaganya lewatle le le bapileng le Kilekia le Pamefilia, ra fitlha kwa Mira wa Lekia." 
Acts27:6 Teng molaodi-wa-lekgolo a fitlhela mokoro wa Aleksanteria o o yang kwa Italia; a ba a re palamisa mo go ona. 
Acts27:7 Ya re re sena go tsamaya ka bonya malatsi a se kae, ra fitlha go lebagana le Kenito ka bothata; e re ka phefo e ne e re thibela, ra tsamaya re ikamile Kereta go lebagana le Salemone;" 
Acts27:8 ra tsamaya ka bothata, re ntse re ikamile losi, ra ba ra fitlha felong gongwe fa go bidiwang Magorogelo-mantle, gaufi le motse wa Lasea." 
Acts27:9 E re ka sebaka se seleelenyana se ne se fetile le go eta mo lewatleng go setse go tshabega, ka malatsi a go itima dijo le ona a setse a fetile, Paulo a ba gakolola a re:" 
Acts27:10 “Banna, ke lemoga gore leeto le tla nna le tlalelo le tshenyegelo e kgolo, e seng fela ya morwalo le ya mokoro, mme le yona ya maphelo a rona.”" 
Acts27:11 Mme molaodi-wa-lekgolo a utlwa motsamaisi wa mokoro le mong wa ona bogolo go tse di buiwang ke Paulo. 
Acts27:12 Ya re ka magorogelo a sa siamela go nnela mariga teng, bontsi jwa banna jwa gakolola gore ba tswe teng, e tle e re fa go kgonega, ba fitlhe kwa Fenikise yo e leng magorogelo a Kereta a a lebileng kwa botsheka jwa borwa le jwa bokone ntlheng ya bophirimatsatsi, ba nnele mariga teng." 
Acts27:13 Jaanong e rile phefonyana ya borwa e foka, ba ithaya ba re, ba ka dirafatsa maikaelelo a bone, ba somola dikgoge, ba tsamaya, ba bapile le Kereta." 
Acts27:14 Mme morago ga sebakanyana ga fologa ledimo teng le le tswang kwa botsheka jwa botlhabatsatsi le bokone. 
Acts27:15 Ya re ka mokoro o tsewa ke phefo, o retelelwa ke go lebagana nayo, ra ineela, ra kgweediwa." 
Acts27:16 Ra feta re ikamile setlhakenyana sengwe se se bidiwang Kelauta, ra batla go palelwa ke go tshegetsa mokorwana." 
Acts27:17 Ya re ba sena go o pega mo mokorong, ba tiisa mokoro ka go o bofa kwa tlase ka dithapo; mme ka ba boifa gore ba tla kgaramelediwa kwa Siretise, ba folosa diseile, ba kgweediwa fela jalo." 
Acts27:18 Ya re ka moso re pitlaganngwa thata ke ledimo, ba latlhela dithoto dingwe mo lewatleng." 
Acts27:19 Mme ka letsatsi la boraro ra latlhela didiri tsa mokoro mo lewatleng ka diatla. 
Acts27:20 Ya re ka letsatsi le dinaledi di ntse di sa bonale ka malatsi a le mantsi, e bile re pitlagantswe ke ledimo le legolo, la bofelo tsholofelo yotlhe ya nyelela ya gore re ka phologa." 
Acts27:21 Ga feta sebaka se seleele go sa jewe; ke fa Paulo a ema mo gare ga bone, a ba raya a re: “Banna, fa lo ka bo lo ntheeditse, lwa se ka lwa tloga mo Kereta, lo ka bo lo sa bone tlalelo e le tshenyegelo e." 
Acts27:22 Mme jaanong ke lo kgothatsa gore lo namatshege; gonne ga go nke go senyega bophelo jwa ga ope mo go lona, fa e se mokoro o le osi fela." 
Acts27:23 Gonne moengele wa Modimo o ke leng wa ona, o ke bileng ke o direla, o letse a eme fa go nna," 
Acts27:24 a nthaya a re: ‘Paulo, se boife! O tshwanetse go ema fa pele ga Kaisara; mme itse gore Modimo o tla pholosa botlhe ka ntlha ya gago ba ba etang nao mo mokorong.’" 
Acts27:25 Ka moo he, banna, namatshegang; gonne ke dumela Modimo gore go tla nna fela jaaka ke boleletswe." 
Acts27:26 Mme fela re na le go kgaramelediwa kwa setlhakeng sengwe.” 
Acts27:27 E rile e le bosigo jwa 14 re ntse re kgarakgatshiwa mo lewatleng la Ateria, e ne e ka nna gare ga bosigo, badiri-mokorong ba lemoga gore ba atamela lefatshe lengwe." 
Acts27:28 Ba lekanya boteng, ba fitlhela e le dikgato di le 40; fa ba sena go tswelela kwa pelenyana, ba fitlhela e le dikgato di le 30." 
Acts27:29 Jaanong ka ba boifa gore gongwe re ka thula mafika, ba digela dikgoge di le nne ka kwa morago ga mokoro; ba be ba eletsa gore bo se." 
Acts27:30 Mme ya re badiri-mokorong ba rata go ngwega mo go ona, e bile ba setse ba foloseditse mokorwana mo lewatleng ka go ipata ba re, ba ya go digela dikgoge le ka kwa pele ga mokoro," 
Acts27:31 Paulo a raya molaodi-wa-lekgolo le batlhabani a re: “Fa ba, ba ka tlogela mokoro, ga lo ka ke lwa phologa.”" 
Acts27:32 Ya baa gona batlhabani ba kgaolang megala ya mokorwana, ba o lesa wa ya." 
Acts27:33 Ya re bo batla go sa, Paulo a nametsa botlhe gore ba je, a re: “Gompieno ke letsatsi la 14 lo ntse lo lebeletse, lo itimile dijo, lo sa je sepe." 
Acts27:34 Ke ka moo ke lo kgothatsang gore lo je; gonne go tla lo thusa go ka falola; kana ga go kitla go latlhega thiri ya ga ope wa lona mo tlhogong.” 
Acts27:35 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, a tsaya senkgwe, a leboga Modimo fa pele ga botlhe, a se nathoganya, a simolola go ja." 
Acts27:36 Jaanong ba namatshega botlhe; le bone ba a ja. 
Acts27:37 Rona rotlhe mo mokorong re ne re le batho ba ba 276. 
Acts27:38 Fa ba sena go kgora, ba imolola mokoro ka go tshololela mabele mo lewatleng." 
Acts27:39 Fa bo sena go sa, ba se ka ba bona lefatshe sentle, mme ba lemoga segoro sengwe se se nang le losi lwa motlhaba; jaanong ba ikaelela go kgweeletsa mokoro kwa go sona, fa ba ka kgona." 
Acts27:40 Ba kgaola dikgoge, ba di tlogela mo lewatleng, ba be ba funolola megala ya dipati tse di sokololang mokoro; ya re ba sena go tsholeletsa seile e e kwa pele kwa phefong, ba leba kwa losing." 
Acts27:41 Mme ya re ka ba fitlha mo thotaneng ya motlhaba e e kgaoganyang metsi, ba tsenya mokoro teng; sehuba sa ona sa tlhaba, sa tsepama; marago ona a thujwa ke thata ya maphoto." 
Acts27:42 Jaanong batlhabani ba ne ba ikemisetsa go bolaya bagolegwi, e se re gongwe bangwe ba šapela kwa lefatsheng, ba ngwega." 
Acts27:43 Ya re ka molaodi-wa-lekgolo a rata go boloka Paulo, a ba kganela go dirafatsa maikaelelo ao; a ba a laola gore ba ba itseng go šapa, ba itatlhele pele mo lewatleng gore ba fitlhe kwa lefatsheng," 
Acts27:44 mme ba ba setseng ba ithuse, bangwe ka dipati, ba bangwe ka dilo tse dingwe tsa mokoro. Botlhe ba falolela jalo kwa lefatsheng." 
Acts28:1 E rile re sena go phologa, ra utlwa go twe, setlhake seo se bidiwa Maleta." 
Acts28:2 Batho ba teng ba re direla ka botsalano jo bogolo; ba ne ba re gotsetsa molelo, ba re tshola rotlhe ka ntlha ya pula e e neng e na le ka ntlha ya serame." 
Acts28:3 Jaanong ya re Paulo a sena go rwalela ngata ya dikgong le go di baya mo molelong, ga tswa noga, e ntshitswe ke bolelo, ya mo palama letsogo." 
Acts28:4 Fa batho ba teng ba bona noga e lepeletse mo seatleng sa gagwe, ba raana ba re: “Ruri, motho yo ke mmolai; le fa a falotse lewatleng, pusoloso ga e mo leseletse go phela.”" 
Acts28:5 Mme ene a tlhotlhorela noga mo molelong, a se ka a direga sepe." 
Acts28:6 Bone ba bo ba lebeletse gore o tla ruruga, gongwe a wele fa fatshe, a swe ka bonako. Ya re ba sena go lebelela nako e telele, mme ba sa bone sepe se se bosula se mo tlela, ba fetoga mogopolo ba re: “Ke modimo.”" 
Acts28:7 Mo tikologong ya felo foo go ne go le masimo a mookamedi wa setlhake yo leina la gagwe e leng Pubilio, yo o neng a re tshola, a re babalela ka botsalano malatsi a le mararo." 
Acts28:8 Jaanong rraagwe Pubilio o ne a robetse fatshe, a tshwerwe ke go fisa le go tsholola madi; Paulo a ya kwa go ene, a rapela, a ba a mmaya diatla, a mo fodisa." 
Acts28:9 Ya re go sena go dirafala jalo, ga tla le ba bangwe ba setlhake ba ba nang le malwetse, ba fodisiwa." 
Acts28:10 Bao le bone ba re tlotla gagolo; ya re re tsamaya, ba re abela tse re di tlhokang." 
Acts28:11 Morago ga dikgwedi di le tharo ra tsamaya ka mokoro wa Aleksanteria o o neng o nnetse mariga fa setlhakeng; letshwao la one e ne e le Kastore le Polokese. 
Acts28:12 Ya re re fitlha kwa Sirakuse, ra tlhola malatsi a le mararo teng." 
Acts28:13 Ra ba ra tswa teng, ra fitlha mo Regio; ya re morago ga letsatsi le le lengwe fela ga tsoga phefo ya borwa; mme ka letsatsi la bobedi ra fitlha kwa Puteoli." 
Acts28:14 Teng ra fitlhela badumedi, ra rapelwa gore re nne malatsi a a supang nabo; morago ra fitlha kwa Roma." 
Acts28:15 E rile bakaulengwe ba re utlwela, ba tswa teng, ba tla go re kgatlhantsha kwa Patlelong ya ga Apio le kwa Matlong-mararo-a-baeti. Ya re Paulo a ba bona, a leboga Modimo, a ba a namatshega." 
Acts28:16 E rile re sena go tsena mo Roma, molaodi-wa-lekgolo a neela molaodi wa bafemedi ba Kaisara bagolegwi, mme Paulo a letlelelwa go nna a le esi le motlhabani yo o mo disitseng." 
Acts28:17 Morago ga malatsi a le mararo a phutha baeteledipele ba Bajuta; ya re ba sena go phuthega, a ba raya a re: “Banna, bakaulengwe, le fa ke sa dira sepe se se lwantshang morafe wa ga etsho gongwe mekgwa ya borraetsho, ke neetswe mo diatleng tsa Baroma ke le mogolegwi, ke tswa kwa Jerusalema." 
Acts28:18 Bone, e rile ba sena go mpotsolotsa, ba rata go nkgolola, ka go se na molato ope wa loso mo go nna." 
Acts28:19 Ya re Bajuta ba ganetsa, ka patelesega go ipiletsa Kaisara, e se gore ke na le sengwe se ke latofatsang morafe wa ga etsho ka sona." 
Acts28:20 Jaanong ke ka ntlha ya moo ke kopileng go lo bona le go bua le lona; gonne ke golegilwe ka keetane ena ka ntlha ya tsholofelo ya Iseraele.” 
Acts28:21 Ba mo fetola ba re: “Ga re a amogela dikwalo tse di tswang kwa Jutea ka ga gago; le gona ga go a tla ope wa ba ga rona go bolela le fa e le go bua sepe se se bosula ka ga gago. 
Acts28:22 Le gale re fitlhela e le tshwanelo gore re utlwe mo go wena se o se gopolang; gonne fa e le thuto eo, re itse gore e ganediwa ntlheng tsotlhe.”" 
Acts28:23 Ya re ba sena go mmeela letsatsi, ba bantsi ba tla kwa go ene mo ntlong e o ntseng mo go yona, a ba phuthololela tsa puso ya Modimo, a supa ka ga yona; go tloga mosong go ya maitsiboeng a leka go ba kgona ka molao wa ga Moše le ka baporofeti gore ba dumele mo go Jesu." 
Acts28:24 Bangwe ba dumela tse a di buileng, ba bangwe ba se ka ba dumela." 
Acts28:25 Ya re ba sa dumelelane, ba phatlalala, Paulo a sena go bua lefoko le le lengwe a re: “Mowa o o Boitshepo o buile sentle le borraeno ka moporofeti Jesaya" 
Acts28:26 wa re: “ ‘Yaa kwa morafeng oo o re: Go utlwa lo tla utlwa, mme ga lo nke lo tlhaloganya ka gope; le go leba lo tla leba, mme ga lo nke lo bona ka gope;" 
Acts28:27 gonne dipelo tsa morafe o di thatafaditswe, ba kabetse ditsebe, ba ipuduladitse matlho, e se re gongwe ba bona ka matlho, ba utlwa ka ditsebe, ba tlhaloganya ka dipelo, ba sokologa, mme ka ba fodisa.’" 
Acts28:28 “Ka moo he, itseng gore pholoso e ya Modimo e rometswe kwa baheitaneng; e bile bona ba tla utlwa.”" 
Acts28:29 Ya re a sena go bua jalo, Bajuta ba tsamaya, ba le mo kganetsanyong e kgolo." 
Acts28:30 Paulo a nna dinyaga di le pedi tse di tletseng mo ntlong e o e adimileng ka tuelo, a tshola batho botlhe ba ba tlang go ene," 
Acts28:31 a rera puso ya Modimo, a ba a ruta tsa Morena Jesu Keresete ka phuthologo yotlhe, go se na kgoreletso." 
Romans1:1 Nna Paulo, motlhanka wa ga Jesu Keresete, yo ke biditsweng go nna moapostolo, ka tlhaolelwa Efangele ya Modimo" 
Romans1:2 e o e solofeditseng ka baporofeti ba ona mo Dikwalong tse di boitshepo," 
Romans1:3 ka ga Morwaa-ona yo o tsetsweng e le wa losika lwa ga Dafita ka fa nameng; 
Romans1:4 yo o beilweng go nna Morwa Modimo yo o tletseng thata ka fa Moweng o o Boitshepo ka tsogo mo baswing, e bong Jesu Keresete, Morena wa rona," 
Romans1:5 yo re amogetseng bopelotlhomogi le boapostolo ka ene gore go nne kutlo ya tumelo mo merafeng yotlhe ka ntlha ya leina la gagwe," 
Romans1:6 e le lona lo leng ba yona lo le ba ba biditsweng ke Jesu Keresete. 
Romans1:7 Ke kwalela lona lotlhe ba lo kwa Roma, lona baratwi ba Modimo, lona baitshepi ba lo biditsweng: A bopelotlhomogi bo nne le lona le kagiso tse di tswang mo go Modimo Rraetsho le mo go Morena Jesu Keresete!" 
Romans1:8 Ke simolola ka go leboga Modimo wa me ka Jesu Keresete ka ntlha ya lona lotlhe, ka gonne tumelo ya lona e bolelwa mo lefatsheng lotlhe;" 
Romans1:9 kana Modimo o ke o direlang ka mowa wa me ka go rera Efangele ya Morwaa-ona, ke mosupi wa me wa gore ga ke khutle go lo gopola." 
Romans1:10 Ga ke bolo go kopa mo merapelong ya me gore ke bone phatlha ya go tla koo go lona, fa go ka nna jalo ka fa go rateng ga Modimo;" 
Romans1:11 gonne ke tlhologeletswe go lo bona gore ke lo abele neo nngwe ya Mowa, lo tle lo tiisiwe;" 
Romans1:12 e le gore re tle re gomotsege mmogo ke le koo go lona, mongwe ka tumelo ya yo mongwe, e bong nna ka ya lona le lona ka ya me." 
Romans1:13 Ba ga etsho, ga ke rate lo tlhoka go itse gore ke ikaeletse gantsi go tla koo go lona, mme ke kganelesegile go fitlha jaanong, gore le mo go lona ke tle ke nne le maungonyana jaaka mo merafeng e mengwe." 
Romans1:14 Ke tshwanetse go direla Bagerika le ba e leng batho fela, ba ba botlhale le ba ba seng botlhale." 
Romans1:15 Fa e le nna, ke eleditse ka ntlha ya moo gore le lona ba lo leng kwa Roma, ke lo rerele Efangele." 
Romans1:16 Gonne ga ke tlhajwe ke ditlhong ka Efangele ya ga Keresete, ka e le thata ya Modimo e e pholosang mongwe le mongwe yo o dumelang, Bajuta pele, le bone Bagerika;" 
Romans1:17 gonne tshiamo ya Modimo e senolwa mo go yona ka tumelo go isa tumelong, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: “Mosiami o tla phela ka tumelo.”" 
Romans1:18 Kana bogale jwa Modimo jo bo tswang kwa legodimong bo a bonala, bo wela boikepo jotlhe le tshiamololo tsa batho ba ba kgoreletsang boammaaruri ka tshiamololo;" 
Romans1:19 gonne se se ka itsiweng ka ga Modimo se senogile mo go bone, ka Modimo o se ba senoletse." 
Romans1:20 Kana go tswa tlholegong ya lefatshe bosabonweng jwa ona, e bong thata e e sa khutleng ya ona le Bodimo jwa ona, bo lemogwa sentle ka ditiro tsa ona gore ba se nne le seipato;" 
Romans1:21 gonne e rile ba ntse ba itse Modimo, ba se ka ba o galaletsa jaaka Modimo, le e seng go o leboga, mme ba fetoga masilo mo dikakanyong tsa bone, dipelo tse di se nang tlhaloganyo tsa bone tsa fifala." 
Romans1:22 Ya re ka ba itshema matlhale, ba direga masilo." 
Romans1:23 Mme kgalalelo ya Modimo o o sa nyeleleng ba e fetola go tshwana le setshwano sa motho yo o nyelelang, le sa dinonyane le sa tse di maoto-mane le tse di gagabang." 
Romans1:24 Ka ntlha ya moo Modimo o ba neeletse mo masweng ka dikeletso tsa dipelo tsa bone gore ba tlotlololane mebele; 
Romans1:25 ba ba fetotseng boammaaruri jwa Modimo maaka, mme ba tlotla setlhodiwa, ba se direla bogolo go Motlhodi yo o tshwanetsweng ke pako ka bosakhutleng. Amen." 
Romans1:26 Ka ntlha ya moo Modimo o ba neeletse mo dikeletsong tse di tlhabisang ditlhong; gonne mokgwa o e leng wa tlholego, basadi ba bone ba o fetotse o e seng wa tlholego." 
Romans1:27 Fela jalo le banna ba tlogela go dira le mosadi ka fa mokgweng wa tlholego, ba tukelana ka dikgatlhego tsa bone, banna ba dira matlhabisa-ditlhong le banna ba bangwe, ba amogela tuelo e e tshwanetseng timelo ya bone mo go bona ka bosi." 
Romans1:28 Mme ka ba ne ba sa re sepe go itse Modimo, Modimo o ba neeletse mo maitlhomong a bokgopo go dira dilo tse di sa tshwanelang," 
Romans1:29 ba tletse tshiamololo yotlhe le boaka le bosula le bopelotshetlha le bokgopo; ba tletse lefufa le polao le ntwa le boferefere le bolotsana; 
Romans1:30 ke basebi le basenya-maina le ba ba tlhoang Modimo le bagateledi le baikgodisi le baikgantshi le batlhalefedi ba bosula le ba ba sa utlweng bagolo," 
Romans1:31 le masilo le ba ba sa ikanyegeng le ba ba se nang lorato le ba ba sa itshwareleng le ba ba sa utlweleng botlhoko; 
Romans1:32 ba e reng ba ntse ba itse molao wa Modimo wa go re, bone ba ba dirang dilo tseo ba tshwanetswe ke loso, ba sa di direng fela, mme e bile ba itumelela ba bangwe ba ba di dirang." 
Romans2:1 Ke ka moo ò tlhokang go itlhatswa, motho ke wena, le fa o ka ne o le mang yo o latofatsang; ka gonne se o latofatsang yo mongwe ka sona ke se o itatofatsang ka sona; ka gonne wena molatofatsi o dira sona seo." 
Romans2:2 Mme kana re itse gore katlholo ya Modimo ke ya nnete mo go bone ba ba dirang dilo tse di ntseng jalo. 
Romans2:3 Motho ke wena, a o gopola gore wena yo o latofatsang ba ba dirang jalo, o ka falola mo katlholong ya Modimo, etswe o dira jalo ka wesi?" 
Romans2:4 A kampo o nyatsa lohumo lwa bopelontle le lwa boitshoko le lwa bopelotelele jwa ona, o sa itse gore molemo wa Modimo o go gogela tlhabologong?" 
Romans2:5 Mme wena, ka fa pelong e e thata ya gago e e sa ikwatlhaeng, o ikgobokanyetsa bogale mo letsatsing la bogale le la ponalo ya katlholo e e siameng ya Modimo," 
Romans2:6 o o tla duelang mongwe le mongwe ka fa ditirong tsa gagwe: 
Romans2:7 Ba ba batlang kgalalelo le tlotlo le bosafeleng ka go tshwarelela ditirong tse di molemo, o tla ba naya botshelo jo bo sa khutleng;" 
Romans2:8 mme ba ba ratang kgang, ba gana go utlwa boammaaruri, mme ba utlwa tshiamololo, bone o ba duele ka bogale le kgakalo." 
Romans2:9 Tlalelo le pitlagano di tla wela motho mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang bosula, Mojuta pele, le ene Mogerika." 
Romans2:10 Mme kgalalelo le tlotlo le kagiso di tla tlela mongwe le mongwe yo o dirang molemo, Mojuta pele, le ene Mogerika." 
Romans2:11 Gonne Modimo ga o gobelelele motho. 
Romans2:12 Kana botlhe ba ba leofileng ba se na molao ba tla latlhega kwa ntle ga molao; mme botlhe ba ba leofileng ba na le molao ba tla atlholwa ka molao. 
Romans2:13 Kana ba e leng basiami fa pele ga Modimo ga se ba ba utlwang molao ka ditsebe fela, mme badirafatsi ba molao ke bone ba ba tla kaiwang basiami." 
Romans2:14 Gonne fa Baditšhaba bangwe ba ba se nang molao ba dira dilo tsa molao ka fa tlhagong, ba bo ba tshotse molao ka bobone, le fa ba se na molao wa ga Moše;" 
Romans2:15 ba itshupa gore go dira ka fa molaong go kwadilwe mo dipelong tsa bone, digakolodi tsa bone di ntse di supa jalo le dikakanyo tse di ba latofatsang gongwe di ba latofolole," 
Romans2:16 jaaka go tla itshupa mo letsatsing le Modimo o tla atlholang tse di sa itsiweng tsa batho ka lone, ka Jesu Keresete, ka fa Efangeleng ya me." 
Romans2:17 Jaanong fa o bidiwa Mojuta, mme o ikaega ka molao, o ipoka ka Modimo," 
Romans2:18 o itse go rata ga ona, o tlhotlhomisa tse di tshwanetseng, ka o ntse o rutwa molao," 
Romans2:19 o ithaya o re, o mogogi wa difofu, o lesedi la bone ba ba mo lefifing," 
Romans2:20 o mokaedi wa ba ba sa rutegang, o moruti wa ba e leng bana, ka o na le kitso le boammaaruri tota ka molao:" 
Romans2:21 Mme jaanong wena yo o rutang yo mongwe, ga o ithuteleng? Wena yo o rerang gore motho a se ka a utswa, o utswelang?" 
Romans2:22 Wena yo o reng, motho a se ka a akafala, o akafalelang? Yo o ilang medimo ya diseto, o thopelang tsa ditempele?" 
Romans2:23 Wena yo o ipokang ka molao, o tlotlololelang Modimo ka go tlola molao?" 
Romans2:24 Kana leina la Modimo le kgalwa mo baheitaneng ka ntlha ya lona jaaka go kwadilwe. 
Romans2:25 Go rupa le gale go ka thusa, fa o dirisa molao; mme fa o le motlodi wa molao, foo go rupa ga gago go fetogile bosarupang." 
Romans2:26 Mme fa yo o sa rupang a ka tlhokomela tshiamo ya molao, a bosarupang jwa gagwe ga bo ka ke jwa kaiwa go rupa?" 
Romans2:27 Yo o sa rupang ka fa tlhagong, fa a dirisa molao, a ga a nke a go bona molato, wena yo o leng motlodi wa molao, o ntse o na le lokwalo lwa molao o rupile?" 
Romans2:28 Kana Mojuta tota ga se yo e leng Mojuta ka fa ponalong; le thupiso e e dirwang mo mmeleng fela ga se yona tota. 
Romans2:29 Mme Mojuta wa nnete ke yo e leng Mojuta ka mo teng; le thupiso ya nnete ke e e leng ya pelo ka fa moweng, e seng ka fa molaong; poko ya yo o ntseng jalo ga e tswe mo bathong, mme e tswa mo Modimong." 
Romans3:1 Mojuta jaanong o gaisa ba bangwe ka eng, gongwe thuso ya thupiso ke eng?" 
Romans3:2 Ke e kgolo mo ntlheng tsotlhe; gonne ga ntlha: ba neetswe Lefoko la Modimo. 
Romans3:3 Jaanong go ka tweng? A ke go re, fa bangwe ba ne ba sa ikanyege, go-sa-ikanyegeng ga bone go ka dirolola boikanyego jwa Modimo?" 
Romans3:4 Le go ka! Mme go tshwanetse ga nna jaana: Modimo o boammaaruri, mme motho mongwe le mongwe ke moaki, jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: “Gore o tle o fitlhelwe o siame mo mafokong a gago, o fenye, fa o bewa molato.”" 
Romans3:5 Fa jaanong tshiamololo ya rona e tlhomamisa tshiamo ya Modimo, re ka reng? A Modimo o a bo o siamolola, fa o re galefela? Ke bua ka mokgwa wa batho." 
Romans3:6 Le go ka! Gonne fa go ka bo go ntse jalo, Modimo o ka atlhola lefatshe jang?" 
Romans3:7 Fa boammaaruri jwa Modimo bo totafaletse kgalalelong ya ona ka maaka a me, ke tla bo ke sa ntse ke sekisediwang jaaka moleofi?" 
Romans3:8 A ga re ka ke ra bua bogolo ra re: “A re direng bosula gore molemo o tswe mo go jona!” jaaka bangwe ba sotla ka rona ba re, re bua jalo? Bao ke ba petso e ba tshwanetseng." 
Romans3:9 Jaanong go ka tweng? A re gaisa ba bangwe? E seng ka gope; gonne re setse re supile gore Bajuta le Bagerika botlhe ba mo taolong ya boleo," 
Romans3:10 jaaka go kwadilwe ga twe: “Ga go ope yo o siameng, le e seng a le mongwe fela." 
Romans3:11 Ga go ope yo o tlhaloganyang, ga go ope yo o batlang Modimo." 
Romans3:12 Botlhe ba fapogile, botlhe mmogo ba tlhobosegile; ga go ope yo o dirang molemo, ga a yo le e seng a le mongwe fela." 
Romans3:13 Memetso ya bone ke mabitla a a butsweng; ba tsietsa ka diteme tsa bone. Botlhole jwa dinoga bo mo melomong ya bone. 
Romans3:14 Magano a bone a tletse thogako le bogalaka. 
Romans3:15 Dinao tsa bone di bofefo go tsholola madi. 
Romans3:16 Tshenyo le pogiso di mo ditseleng tsa bone," 
Romans3:17 mme tsela ya kagiso yona ga ba e itse. 
Romans3:18 Ga ba boife Modimo jaaka o le fa pele ga matlho a bone.” 
Romans3:19 Mme jaanong re itse gore dilo tsotlhe tse molao o di buang, o di bua le bone ba ba mo taolong ya molao gore molomo mongwe le mongwe o thijwe, mme lefatshe lotlhe le nne molato fa pele ga Modimo." 
Romans3:20 Ke ka moo go se nang motho ope yo o tla siamisiwang fa pele ga ona ka ditiro tsa molao; gonne molao o re naya kitso ya boleo. 
Romans3:21 Mme jaanong tshiamo ya Modimo e senotswe kwa ntle ga molao, e supilwe ke molao le baporofeti," 
Romans3:22 e bong tshiamo ya Modimo e e bonwang ka go dumela mo go Jesu Keresete, mme ke ya botlhe ba ba dumelang; gonne ga go na pharologanyo epe;" 
Romans3:23 gonne botlhe ba leofile, ba tlhoka tlotlo fa pele ga Modimo," 
Romans3:24 mme ba ka siamisiwa fela ka boitshwarelo jwa ona ka kgololo e e mo go Keresete Jesu," 
Romans3:25 yo Modimo o mmeileng go nna thuanyo ka madi a gagwe e e bonwang ka tumelo, gore go supiwe tshiamo ya ona ka ntlha ya go tlhokomologa maleo a a dirilweng pele, Modimo o ntse o iphapaantse" 
Romans3:26 gore o tle o supe tshiamo ya ona mo sebakeng seno, e nne ona o o siameng, o o siamisang ene yo o dumelang mo go Jesu." 
Romans3:27 Mme jaanong ipelafatso e kae? E latlhetswe kwa ntle. E le ka molao ofe? A ke wa ditiro? Nnyaya, ke ka molao wa tumelo." 
Romans3:28 Ke ka moo re kayang gore motho o siamisiwa ka tumelo fela, e seng ka ditiro tsa molao." 
Romans3:29 A kampo Modimo ke Modimo wa Bajuta fela? A ga se wa Baditšhaba le bone? Ee, ke wa Baditšhaba le bone," 
Romans3:30 ka e le gore Modimo ke o le mongwe fela; ba ba rupileng o tla ba siamisa mo tumelong, le ba ba sa rupang o ba siamisa ka tumelo." 
Romans3:31 Jaanong a ke go re, re dirolola molao ka tumelo? Le go ka; tota re tlhomamisa molao." 
Romans4:1 Mme jaanong re ka botsa re re: Aborahame, rraetsho-mogolwago-lwane ka fa nameng, o bonye eng?" 
Romans4:2 Kana fa Aborahame a ka bo a siamisitswe ka ditiro, o ka bo a na le pelafalo, fela e seng fa pele ga Modimo." 
Romans4:3 Gonne Lokwalo lo a reng? Lo a re: “Aborahame o ne a dumela Modimo, mme ka moo a kaiwa mosiami.”" 
Romans4:4 Yo o dirang, tuelo ga a e balelwe ka fa bopelotlhomoging, mme e le ka fa selekanyong." 
Romans4:5 Mme ene yo o sa direng, mme a dumela mo go ene yo o siamisang moikepi, ene tumelo ya gagwe e tla kaiwa tshiamo," 
Romans4:6 fela jaaka Dafita a bua ka ga lesego la motho yo Modimo o mo kayang mosiami kwa ntle ga ditiro a re: 
Romans4:7 “Go sego bone ba ditshiamololo tsa bone di itshwaretsweng, ba dibe tsa bone di bipilweng." 
Romans4:8 Go sego monna yo Morena a sa mmaleleng molato wa boleo ka gope.”
